C: 「卡芙卡。人类女性。出身天衣五：新巴比伦。星核猎手核心成员，『命运的奴隶』的副手。对以下罪案负责：庇尔波因特入侵案，计两起；庇尔波因特失窃案；特洛维斯星系失踪案；杰莫斯、北加拿、茜拉-39C、乌尔摩拉、七中村、洛尔-51、德洛瓦星核事件；针对庇尔波因特的黑客袭击，计四起；针对螺丝星的黑客袭击；针对黑塔的黑客袭击；耶佩拉叛乱案。怀疑与以下罪案有关：希刺拉拉、因奴庇斯、乌恩-G7、祖寇、利多维亚、伊利利、阿图因、布哈雅玛星核事件。\n通缉等级：最高。死活不论。」\n——星际和平公司所颁之通缉令
E: "Kafka, female human. Hails from New Babylon of Pteruges-V. Core member of the Stellaron Hunters, the next-in-command of 'Destiny's Slave.' Responsible for the following infractions: The Pier Point Incursion, two counts; The Pier Point Heist; The Trovys Disappearance; The Stellaron events of Jemorse, Bayjhana, Shilla-39C, Ulmora, 7-Midville, Loar-51, and Dro'a; Cyber attacks against Pier Point, four counts; Cyber attacks against Planet Screwllum; Cyber attacks against Herta Space Station; The Jepella Rebellion. Suspected to be related to the following infractions: The Stellaron events of Sich-Lala, Inupeis, Oun-G7, Zukov, Lidovia, Illily, Attouine, Buhayama.\nWanted Level: Highest. Dead or alive."\n— Wanted Order by the Interastral Peace Corporation

C: 好奇心与精力都很旺盛的少女，空间站「黑塔」的名义站长。\n无论是管理各抒己见的科员，还是直接又不失礼貌地回复博识学会的种种刁难，对艾丝妲来说都易如反掌。\n毕竟指挥空间站…总比继承家业简单吧！
E: A fiercely inquisitive and energetic young girl. She is the Lead Researcher of the space station Herta.\nWhether it is managing opinionated staff, or courteously but firmly responding to the Intelligentsia Guild's devious demands, Asta handles it all effortlessly.\nAfter all... commanding a space station is much easier than taking over the family business!

C: 「如何快乐工作是一种艺术。」 「其一，不超额完成任务。上峰交代的任务在期限前匀速完成，千万别提前交付。」 「其二，不主动揽活。上峰若不开口言明要你办妥的事情，就是与你无关。」 「其三，不单独打拼，也绝不争功。能拉上别人合作垫背一同辛苦，就千万别为了显示能耐单枪匹马一人扛着。」 「事后有了功劳也要推给同侪，既做了顺水人情，为将来栽了一颗大树好乘凉；又杜绝了上峰欣赏提拔你的可能——职位提升，那要做的岂不是更多了？」 「总而言之，言而总之，这三条就是快乐工作的基本法则——不主动，不拒绝，不负责。你，学会了吗？」
E: "Being happy at work is an artform." "First, never overdo any task. Higher-ups want to see their tasks progressing at a consistent pace before the deadline, so never turn in anything early." "Second, never take the initiative. If higher-ups don't personally tell you what they want you to do, that is not your problem." "Third, don't work hard by yourself, and never fight for clout. If you can, try and drag someone in to suffering together with you. Whatever you do, never work alone for the sake of trying to demonstrate any kind of ability." "Afterward, you can give credit to your peers, both as an easy hat-tip or simple investment into your future. But also as a shield against the possibility of higher-ups promoting you — a promotion means even more work." "The point is, there are three basic principles for happiness at work – do not be proactive, do not say no, and do not be responsible. Did you get it?"

C: 说起停云的六骨叠扇，乃是工造司的机巧名物。 天外行商为了防范旅行中的危险，多半会佩戴武器防身。可停云是个例外——她坚持不用任何不符合自己审美的武器：刀、枪、剑、戟之类大抵过刚过强，到底称不上软款优雅；但若用暗器如飞镖银针之流，又显得自己貌似阴狠毒辣，实在有失体面。 思来想去，停云最终选定了这柄雕琢有加的叠扇。用她本人的话来解释，那便是： 「谈生意的人嘛，以和为贵。随身携带兵器，有伤交谊，不利商祺。」 「我这把扇子就不同啦，平时扇扇风，凉快凉快。遇到不好说话的也给他扇扇风，消消气。若能坐下来谈谈那自然好；若不能……」 「——就再用力扇他，让他哪儿凉快哪儿呆着去！」
E: Speaking of Tingyun's six-ribbed reticulated fan, it is a well-known ingenium made by the Artisanship Commission. Most merchants carry weapons in self-defense while traveling, but Tingyun is an exception — she refuses to equip any weapons that do not conform to her style, such as blades, lances, swords, and halberds, which are strong but ungraceful. And she considers booby-traps like darts and needles to be too toxic and disgraceful. After thinking over things, Tingyun finally chose this carved reticulated fan. Put into her own words, here's why: "Business people cherish peace above all else. Carrying a weapon dishonors friendships and makes for bad business." "My fan is different from a weapon. I can use it to cool myself off as well as cooling off a nasty business client. It's best if we can just have a nice chat, but if things don't go smoothly..." "...Then I just have to fan them harder, and cool them off until they know I mean business!"

C: 「那支孤军散发着浓烈的血腥，像一支染血的长枪。那名领军的战士即是枪尖，永远裹挟着深不见底的愤怒与仇恨刺向敌人。 自拉冬，经哀地里亚，再至厄涅俄努斯，他一次次自死亡回归，也为所经之处带来滔天的战火。那令世人侧目的厄涅俄努斯之战中，未尝一败的克吕提俄斯高举巨斧，万箭自他的身后齐发。然而烟尘散去，火自血中沐浴而出，战士的拳风如尖刺，撕开了克吕提俄斯的咽喉。 在那足以载入史诗的战役后，战士的真实身份越发扑朔迷离。那支军队明显带有悬锋的训练痕迹，但却从未悬挂悬锋的旗帜，无人知晓他们是游荡于战场的悬锋孤魂，还是失落家乡已久的迷途人。 往来的吟游诗人将那孤军行旅编成哀伤的歌，在翁法罗斯带着铁锈味的野风中，孤高的狮子带着成群的老弱残兵迁徙，寻找不存在的家园。 现实绝不会因残酷改变自己的面貌。那些忠心耿耿追随他的悬锋子民，即便曾是精锐，也没有他那神一般的不死之身。随着岁月流逝，连悬锋的神明已陷入疯狂，凡人又该往何处去？ 那孤高的人是否会将子民的命运背于己身，是否为自己戴上王的枷锁？还是说，这只是他一厢情愿的徒劳……」 ——选段自歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆藏 「翁法罗斯战争史」 「赫菲斯辛、帕狄卡斯、莱昂、托勒密、朴塞塔…你们的名字，必不遗落于历史。」 ——男人的字迹
E: "The lone army emits a strong scent of blood, like a blood-stained spear. The leading warrior, the speartip, is always enveloped in unfathomable rage and hatred, thrusting towards the enemy. From Ladon, through Aidonia, to Aenionus, he returned from death time and again, leaving towering infernos of war in his wake. In the infamous Battle of Aenionus, the undefeated Klytius raised his massive axe as thousands of arrows darkened the sky behind him. Yet, when the smoke cleared and fire rose from the blood-soaked ground, the warrior's fist struck like a spear, tearing open Klytius's throat. After that epic battle, the true identity of the warrior became yet more elusive. That army clearly bore the marks of Kremnoan training but had never flown Kremnos's flag. None know whether they are Kremnoan spirits wandering on the battlefield or lost souls who have long been away from their homeland. Wandering bards turned the lone army's journey into mournful songs, while in the rust-flavored winds of Amphoreus, the lone lion led a group of old and weak soldiers as they wandered, searching for a nonexistent homeland. Reality will never alter its face due to cruelty. The once-elite citizens of Kremnos who followed him were loyal but mortal, lacking his god-like immortality. As time wore on, and even the gods of Kremnos succumbed to madness, how could humanity hope to know whither they should go? Will that proud, lonely man carry the weight of his people's fate alone? Will he bind himself to the chains of kingship? Or was it all just his wishful thinking..." — Excerpt from "A History of the Wars of Amphoreus" archived in the Garbaniphoro Library collection "Hephaestion, Perdikkas, Leonnius, Ptolemy, Peucesta... your names will not be forgotten by history." — A man's handwriting

C: 奥赫玛，英雄汇聚之地，末世最后的希望所在。 「逐火之旅」，「火种」，「泰坦」…即便已熟悉那些酷烈灼热的名词，当别人称她为英雄时，她仍是挥挥手。 「我只是一名医师而已。」 她对每个来到庭院的人都那么说。 悲伤的少女来询问那被死亡之泰坦波及的「顽疾」。 「蝶宝，那才不是病呢！你还有很多事可以尝试！」 她常常和少女一同观鸟观星，制作标本和奇美拉玩偶。看到少女脸上的笑容，她也会感到温暖。 她知晓冷冽的织者和高傲的学者之间的不和。 在那崭新的调解室，她为织者准备了最爱的燕麦粥，学者批改论文时必备的气泡山葵醋，并请来资历最老的半神—— 「如果他们不来，我就…派小伊卡天天在他们耳边嘟嘟嘟！」 她在昏光庭院播下石榴的种子，种下一方麦草，开辟一片花海，让每一位从远方来到奥赫玛的异乡人，都能在此放下心结，畅所欲言。 「希望点滴的善意，能消融族群之间长久的心病。」 她总放心不下那不断磨损的半神。 「小风堇…踏上逐火之旅的第一天，*我们*就已经想到这一天啦……」 她们总是如此说。 「即便能为你们减少一丝痛苦也好…我再去树庭的图书馆查查资料吧……」 她也总是如此做。 …… 天空的后裔，悬锋的族人，奥赫玛的原贵族，哀地里亚的圣女，哀丽秘榭的战士，雅努萨波利斯的圣女…小小的庭院中，各色融汇成一道虹光。 但闲暇的片刻，她也会想到旅途的尽头。 「到那时候，我…还能做些什么呢？」
E: Okhema, the gathering place of heroes, the last hope in the end times. "The Flame-Chase Journey," "The Coreflame," "The Titans"... Even though she had long grown familiar with these fierce and burning names, when others called her a hero, she would simply wave it off. "I'm just a physician." That was what she told everyone who came to the courtyard. The sorrowful girl came seeking answers about the "incurable ailment" inflicted by the Death Titan. "Cassie, that's not an illness at all! There's still so much for you to experience!" She often accompanied the girl in birdwatching and stargazing, crafting specimens and chimera plush toys. Seeing the smile on the girl's face, she, too, felt warmth. She was well aware of the discord between the cold weaver and the proud scholar. In the newly established mediation room, she prepared the weaver's favorite oatmeal, the scholar's essential fizzy horseradish vinegar for grading papers, and invited the eldest demigod. "If they refuse to come, then... I'll have Little Ica du-du-du in their ears every single day!" She sowed pomegranate seeds in the Twilight Courtyard, planted a field of wheatgrass, and cultivated a sea of flowers, creating a place where every traveler arriving in Okhema could set down their burdens and speak freely. "I hope that small acts of kindness can melt away the long-standing wounds between our peoples." She could never stop worrying about that ever-corroding demigod. "Cinny... From the very first day we set out on the Flame-Chase Journey, we already knew this day would come..." That was what they always said. "Even if I can ease just a fraction of your pain... I'll go check the library in the Grove again..." And that was what she always did. ... The heir of the Sky, the Kremnoan, the original aristocrat of Okhema, the Holy Maiden of Aidonia, the warrior of Aedes Elysiae, the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis... In the small courtyard, all their colors merged into a radiant rainbow. Yet in rare moments of leisure, she would also ponder the journey's end. "When that time comes... what else will I be able to do?"

C: 从阿兰警觉的眼神中你隐约察觉到，密钥不仅可以用来解锁权限，也是你们身份的证明。\n赶快使用它吧。
E: You can sense from Arlan's cautious gaze that the encryption key is not only used for unlocking authorization but also proof of your identity.\nHurry up and use it.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 坏消息是，你的「好哥们」桑博抛弃了你，留下你独自面对银鬃铁卫戍卫官——杰帕德•朗道；好消息是，面前这位威风凛凛的军人似乎没那么死板。\n你成功说服了杰帕德，令他相信你们来自天外世界。他承诺会护送你前往贝洛伯格的大守护者之所在。\n这一切看起来是那么恰到好处…别怀疑，跟着银鬃铁卫们走就是了。
E: The bad news is that your buddy Sampo has abandoned you and left you to deal with Gepard Landau, the Silvermane Guard Captain, alone. The good news, however, is that the imposing soldier is actually quite flexible.\nYou successfully persuade Gepard by making him believe that you are from a world beyond the sky. He promises to escort you to the Supreme Guardian at Belobog.\nEverything looked perfect... There's no reason for doubt, all you have to do is follow the Silvermane Guards.

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n夜幕低垂，城中也逛无可逛，不如就此打道回府、返回歌德宾馆结束这尚可称为愉快的一天吧 。
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nIt's getting late and not much more is happening on the streets. It's a good time to return to the Goethe Hotel and bring this so-far pleasant day to an end.

C: 克服千难万险之后，你们终于来到了寒潮肆虐的极北之地，百年来除大守护者外无人能够踏足的古代战场。\n可可利亚与布洛妮娅就在这里的某处…你们要做的就是深入禁域，找到她们。\n那灾难的源头「星核」也在前方——做好决一死战的准备吧。
E: After overcoming numerous difficulties and dangers, you have finally come to the Far North, where the Eternal Freeze is raging. For hundreds of years, no one except the Supreme Guardian could set foot upon this ancient battlefield.\nCocolia and Bronya are here somewhere... Your mission is to go deep into the forbidden zone and find them.\nStellaron, the source of disaster, also lies ahead. Get ready for a fight to the death!

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在「长乐天」静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you are engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 符玄将卡芙卡解往太卜司，却要求你们暂作等候。罗浮仙舟正值多事之秋，谁人不是坐困围城？\n趁此休整的机会，你们到处逛了逛，静待着太卜司引路人传来消息。
E: Fu Xuan took Kafka to the Divination Commission but asked you to wait. The Xianzhou Luofu is in troubled times, and everyone feels trapped in place.\nYou take this chance to stroll around the area and wait for the Divination Commission's messenger to arrive.

C: 建木重生，意味着罗浮上的星核所在已然明了。然而造成这一切的祸首却尚未露全貌。\n符玄受命率领云骑军监视毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司洞天。而你们，本着好用就往死里用…不是，本着能者多劳的原则，景元请你们往音信全无的工造司一探究竟，并借捷径赶往丹鼎司。
E: The revival of the Ambrosial Arbor makes the location of the Stellaron on the Luofu abundantly clear, but the culprit of this disaster remains obscure.\nFu Xuan is tasked to lead the Cloud Knights and keep watch over the Alchemy Commission delve next to the Ambrosial Arbor. As for you, based on the principle that a good tool should be used until it breaks — Errr, that the reward for hard work is more work! Jing Yuan asks you to find out what is happening in the radio-silent Artisanship Commission, and head to the Alchemy Commission via a shortcut.

C: 变生腋肘，药王秘传的魁首濒死之际，呼唤为她带来星核之人，反物质军团的援手。而那位时刻追随你们左右的引路人「停云小姐」却以令人震悚的方式化为一团火焰，向你们宣布它的真实身份：绝灭大君，幻胧。\n幻胧以军团爪牙阻住你们的去路，而它即将深入鳞渊境，染指仙舟人长生的起源，建木。
E: In a sudden turn of events, the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus calls out on the brink of death for the one who brought the Stellaron to her, the assistant from the Antimatter Legion. Then, the guide who had been beside you all this time, "Miss Tingyun," suddenly turns into a ball of flame in a terrifying fashion, declaring to you their true identity of Phantylia, the Lord Ravager.\nPhantylia uses the Legion's soldiers to block your path while moving deeper into Scalegorge Waterscape to claim the source of the Xianzhou natives' immortality — the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 仪式结束，景元邀请你们前往神策府一叙。在那里，他代表罗浮送出对列车团的赠礼——一枚结盟玉兆。凭此信物，云骑将不畏遥远，赶赴盟友的身边。而此次仙舟的开拓之行，终于抵达了尾声。在离开前，你想也许可以和与此行结识的人们一一告别。\n你列了列清单，神策府、星槎海、长乐天、太卜司，还有工造司…这一趟朋友结交的可真不少啊。
E: Jing Yuan invites you to have a chat at the Seat of Divine Foresight when the ceremony ends. Once there, he presents Luofu's gift to the Express Crew — a jade abacus of allying oath. With this token in hand, the Cloud Knights swear to come to the aid of their allies, no matter the distance they must cross. Your current trailblazing journey on the Xianzhou has finally come to an end. Before you leave, you might be able to bid farewell to the people you got to know on this journey.\nYou take a mental note of everything. The Seat of Divine Foresight, Starskiff Haven, Exalting Sanctum, the Divination Commission, and the Artisanship Commission... You've made quite a few friends this trip.

C: 进入桑博的梦泡，你发现自己回到了贝洛伯格下层区那位大夫的诊所里，但这里比你印象里的要更冷清，更可疑。\n在心生疑虑之前，你应该如桑博所说，先熟悉下梦中梦的感觉为好。
E: Entering Sampo's dream bubble, you realize that you have returned to that doctor's clinic in Belobog's Underworld, but this place is even more desolate than you remembered and far more suspicious.\nBefore indulging your suspicions, you should do as Sampo suggested and adjust to the feeling of a dream within a dream.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 你们来到了一座雕像丛生的玄关大厅，发现这里根本没有前进的道路…换句话说，连门都没有。看来你们现在得想办法变出一扇门了——\n好在那位博学的教授总是有主意…他不会是读过剧本吧？
E: You two reach a foyer full of statues and realize there is no way to proceed further... In other words, there is not even a door in sight. Looks like you have to find a way to conjure up a door...\nFortunately, the learned professor always knows what to do... Could he have studied the script before?

C: 醉醺醺的宾客摇摇晃晃地消失在美梦深处。望着他的背影，你陷入了思考：将看不见摸不着的幻象当做赖以为生的唯一选择，这种活法当真是正确的么？\n星期日看出了你的忧虑，提议在「梦主」抵达前再四处探视一番，你的疑虑或许便能得到解答。
E: The drunken guest stumbles unsteadily as they disappear into the depths of the dream. As you watch his figure from behind, you fall into deep reflection: Is it really right to rely on something as intangible and invisible as a fantasy as your only option in life?\nSeeing your concern, Sunday suggests exploring the area before the Dreammaster arrives... Perhaps, there will be an answer to your doubts to be found?

C: 你们成功抵达「苏乐达™盛会海选•热砂分会场」。梦想成为大明星的人们聚集于此，展开激烈的闯关竞争，目标是成为唯一的「盛会之星」。作为「盛会海选」的赞助方，苏乐达™的元素充斥着整个区域：街边布置着难以细数的饮料广告和招牌，苏乐达™瓶形状的建筑与雕塑亦是随处可见。\n可惜，现在不是悠闲游玩的时候——绷紧神经，使出全力，想办法速通这座苏乐达游乐园吧！
E: You successfully made it to the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions in Scorchsand Hall. Those who dream of becoming huge stars gather here and compete in a ferocious competition in hopes of becoming the one and only "Festive Superstar." As the sponsor of the Festivity Auditions, the entire venue is covered in SoulGlad™ memorabilia: Beverage advertisements and billboards litter every square inch of the streets, and buildings and statues in the shape of SoulGlad™ bottles surround you as far as the eye can see.\nUnfortunately, this is not the time to be having fun and playing games... Steel your nerves, use all your strength, and think of a way to speed around this SoulGlad amusement park!

C: 谐乐大典开幕式不出意外地出意外了：那位爱笑的女孩费心布局，四处分发按钮，显然就是为了这一刻。\n<unbreak>999</unbreak>枚虚数中子弹…说真的，她到底是从哪儿搞来这么多大规模杀伤性武器的？但无论如何，身为无名客的你必须挺身而出，守护美梦——按图索骥，火速解决危机吧。
E: As expected, something unexpected happened during the opening of the Charmony Festival: That laughter-worshiping girl had painstakingly laid out buttons everywhere obviously for precisely this moment.\n<unbreak>999</unbreak> imaginary neutron bombs... seriously, how on earth did she get her hands on so many weapons of mass destruction? But in any case, as one of the Nameless, you are duty-bound to stand up and protect the Dreamjoy: Follow the clues and overcome the crisis as soon as possible.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 三番苦行终了，皮肉之苦不过尔尔。速速将苦行的成果汇报给苦茶大师，让他知晓你离忍者之名又近了一步。如此顺利的修行…想必终有一日，你能驱散忍之都的灰霾。\nAK-A-3，你沉浸在这样的谎言里，是在怜悯自己，还是在怜悯那位怜悯你的老人？
E: You have overcome all three trials, and the physical pain you have endured is but a trifle. Inform Master Kucha of your accomplishments, signaling your progress toward becoming a true ninja. With such smooth progress in training... It is certain that one day you shall dissipate the gloomy haze shrouding the Ninja Capital.\nAK-A-3, you're drowning in all those lies. Is it out of sympathy for yourself, or for the elder who also sympathizes with you?

C: 这是什么地方？这具身体…又是谁？应该万分不安地向前走，又或回头寻找来处？
E: What is this place? ...Whose body is this? Should you power on ahead in uncertainty, or turn back to find out where you came from?

C: 好一个不要笑挑战——我快笑得裂开了原来并非空谈。\n为了解决眼前的异状，先去找一个容易沟通些的「停云女士」吧。
E: So much for a "try not to laugh" challenge... Turns out people can really get stomach cramp from laughing.\nTry and find a "Miss Tingyun" that is easy to communicate with, so you can solve this anomaly.

C: 这场回望，终究迎来了此刻。望着不远处的身影，无人能猜到男人的心中所想。
E: This journey of reflection has finally led to this moment. Looking at the silhouette up ahead, no one can imagine what he is thinking.

C: 只有坠落于地，才能习得如何飞翔，而一个人若想谢幕，就必须再一次站上台前。\n前往匹诺康尼大剧院，完成这场告别的最后一步。
E: Only when one has fallen to the ground can they learn how to fly. If one wants to take a curtain call, they must stand on the stage once more.\nGo to Penacony Grand Theater and complete the final step of this farewell.

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 在黄金裔浴场中，阿格莱雅以自己的方式确认了我们的善意，似乎奥赫玛愿意将我们奉为贵宾。希望此次开拓之行真能这般顺利吧。
E: In the Chrysos Heirs bath, Aglaea affirmed our good intentions in her way, and it seems Okhema is willing to welcome us as honored guests. Let's hope this trailblazing expedition continues to unfold as smoothly.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 格奈乌斯竟是尼卡多利的一部分。如今得知后世苦难，他坦然将自己融入尼卡多利早已腐坏的神魂之中，让尼卡多利重归完整，破解不死身的同时，也意味着一尊鼎盛的泰坦将伫立在我们面前。
E: Gnaeus turns out to be a part of Nikador. Now aware of the agony of this world, he calmly merges with Nikador's long-decayed divine soul, fully completing Nikador. While that destroyed the god's immortality, it also means we're now face-to-face with a Titan at the peak of their power.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n根据迷迷所说{NICKNAME}早在车厢坠落中途就已死去，而如今只是一簇行走的记忆。多亏了翁法罗斯当地独特的生死规律，{NICKNAME}尚有一线生机，而找到塞纳托斯变成了不得不优先完成的要务。\n{NICKNAME}会没有事的，我衷心祈祷如此。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nAccording to Mem, {NICKNAME} had died halfway through the Express's descent, and now is just a walking memory. Thanks to the unique life-death laws of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} still has a slim chance of survival, and finding Thanatos has become the priority task.\n{NICKNAME} will be just fine, I sincerely pray so.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。\n别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。
E: Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch.\nDon't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 我后来得知，{NICKNAME}与我几乎是在同一时刻遭遇了元老院的「清洗者」们，但不同的是，他们发生了正面冲突。
E: I later learned that {NICKNAME} encountered the Council of Elders' "Cleaners" at almost the same moment I did, but unlike me, they engaged them head-on.

C: 真相十分苦涩——塞涅俄丝早已对族人彻底失望，而风堇一族的血脉，则传承自一位未被肃清的无名黄金裔，好在她并未因此黯然。事已至此，我们将直面「晨昏之眼」艾格勒，为这段天空的因缘画上句点。
E: The truth is extremely bitter — Seliose had long since lost all faith in her kin. Hyacine's bloodline leads back to an unnamed Chrysos Heir who escaped the purge, yet thankfully, she refused to let this black moment shape her. Now, we shall confront Aquila, Eye of Twilight, and bring closure to this saga of skies and predestination.

C: 跑起来，银河球棒侠！你的从者已经等候多时了。
E: Run, Galactic Baseballer, run! Your Servant's been waiting long enough!

C: 既然开拓者并没有给牛仔发出短信，那么，在影视乐园等待他们的究竟是…
E: Since Trailblazer never texted the Cowboy, what exactly is waiting at the theme park?

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 位于最前线的基座舱段危险重重，守望此地的科员于孤独中等待着后方的援助。此刻，一位名叫亚伯拉罕的故人正要直面他的阿喀琉斯之踵……
E: The Base Zone on the frontline is engulfed in grave danger. The researchers are alone and waiting for support. At this moment, an acquaintance named Abraham is about to face his Achilles Heel...

C: 奇物再收容小队队长温明德正为逃窜的界种奇物「异星水魈」烦恼。他有一项任务，需要你这位新晋助手帮忙分忧，那就是带回走失的科员亚伯拉罕。
E: Wen Mingde, the leader of the Curio Collection Squad, is troubling over a runaway Curio — the Xenohydro. He has a mission that requires the help of a junior assistant like you. He needs you to bring back the missing researcher, Abraham.

C: 前往收容舱段，向艾丝妲委派的调查人员打听舱段现况。
E: Go to the storage zone and ask the investigators sent by Asta about the current situation.

C: 终端机上有着空间站所有人的数据记录，你决定先从梅厄的数据记录查起。
E: The terminal stores the data records of everyone in the space station. You decide to begin by checking Mare's record.

C: 银狼的入侵路线最终指向了黑塔的办公室。思考再三，你和伦纳德决定将这个坏消息告知她本人。\n但踏入办公室的那一刻，你却看到了惊人的一幕……
E: Silver Wolf's path of infiltration eventually leads to Herta's office. After giving it some thoughts, Leonard and you decide to tell this bad news to Herta herself.\nHowever, the moment you entered the office, you got a surprise...

C: 按照机器人的导航，接下来的路程要从磐岩镇起步。你不禁想起那些旧朋友们……
E: According to the robot's navigation plan, your next journey starts from Boulder Town. Hearing that, you cannot help but think of old friends...

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区收集完了。该去下层了。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Finished in the Overworld. Time to go to the Underworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了解开谜题的报酬——快去收下吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the rewards for solving the puzzle. Collect them now.

C: 你从诊所内的病患处得知，研制出「特效药」的瓦赫医生从不关心自己的患者。\n这与你从加入「互助会」的患者们口中得到的印象冲突巨大。\n真相到底如何，或许只有娜塔莎知晓…毕竟他是瓦赫医生的妹妹。
E: The patients in the clinic tell you that Dr. Vache, who developed the wonder medicine, doesn't care about his patients at all.\nThis is completely different from what you heard from those who joined the mutual aid society.\nPerhaps Natasha is the only one who knows the truth... After all, she's Vache's sister.

C: 虎克大人自己准备的藏宝图，自己却看不懂，意料之外，情理之中。\n幸好，你还有在矿区捡到的家用寻物仪——查宝。可以用它来找找看看。
E: Hook can't read her own treasure map, which is understandable.\nFortunately, you took Findie, the Home-Use Object Finder you found in the mine, with you. Give it a try.

C: 你以最快速度赶到了铆钉镇，一路寻找下终于找到了科鲁泽。看着科鲁泽的样子你急切地想上去查看，但此时，先前便重创了科鲁泽的怪物却发现了你…
E: You arrive at Rivet Town as fast as possible and finally find Kluzer. You're in a hurry to check his status, but the monster that hurt him notices you...

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n起效了——希莉儿似乎终于找回了一些属于她的记忆碎片。\n加把劲——再解开一次箱子谜题，或许她就能彻底找回自我……
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nIt worked — she finally seems to have regained some of her memory fragments.\nKeep at it. Solve another puzzle for her, and maybe she'll be able to completely rediscover herself...

C: 这可真是一番激战——但你们成功消灭了怪物，取得了「钥匙」，真可谓是不虚此行……\n我知道你想抱怨什么——但现在还是姑且先按下不表，等回到机械屋再向同伴尽情发牢骚吧。
E: What a fierce battle! You successfully defeat the monsters and get the "key." This trip was completely worth it...\nI know what you want to complain about, but let's keep our heads down and complain as much as you want when you're back at the workshop.

C: 翻阅过瓦赫最后的实验笔记之后，娜塔莎决定继承他最后的遗愿，将对「风雪免疫」的研究继续下去。\n除此之外，她还有一个最后的请求……
E: After reading Vache's last experiment notes, Natasha decides to inherit his wish and continue the research on "Blizzard Immunity."\nAlso, she has one last request for you...

C: 机械屋总给人以家的温暖感。而当你准备收拾行李、头也不回地离开这里时，这种温暖的感觉更是尤甚。\n不过这只是你的个人揣测…希露瓦是怎么想的？恐怕只有她自己清楚。\n但这毕竟与你无关，眼下还是先陪她一起收拾行李吧。
E: The workshop always felt as comforting as a home. As you prepare to pack up and leave here forever, this homely feeling is intensified.\nBut this is only your personal guess... What does Serval think? She is probably the only one who knows that.\nBut this has nothing to do with you. Just help her pack for now.

C: 一位是痴情医护，一位是寻药病患，若说没奇缘，今生偏又遇着他。总之再去下一处地点相会吧。\n这附近药王秘传的人也越来越多了，可得小心。
E: One is an obsessed nurse, and the other a patient seeking medicine. She bumped into him too many times to say that it isn't destiny. Meet up with him at the next location.\nThere are more and more Disciples of Sanctus Medicus around, be careful.

C: 持明族的刺客利用云吟术隐藏身形接近了你们，并发动袭击。丹恒身经百战，能够从容应付，但白露就不一定了。保护好白露！\n持明族的蜃影似乎对丹恒和白露都有主动响应，听听他们说了什么，也许能帮助你们了解多年前到底发生了什么。
E: The Vidyadhara assassins used cloudhymn magic to conceal themselves and get close to you before attacking. As a seasoned warrior, Dan Heng is more than capable of handling himself, but Bailu is another deal, and will need your protection!\nThe Vidyadhara Mirage Echo offers active responses to both Dan Heng and Bailu. Listen to what they're saying and maybe it will help you all understand what happened all those years ago.

C: 正论也好、歪理也罢，只要能说服大善人们接受放生机兵，就算全面胜利！
E: Whether it's right or wrong, as long as the Benevolent Ones can be convinced to accept releasing the automatons, it's a win!

C: 在浮烟的指引下，你在幻境中找到一篇怪异的话本残篇。其中讲述了许久之前罗浮将军与岁阳的故事，而其中行文似有所指，暗含着你勘破幻境的方法。
E: Through Cirrus' guidance, you discover a ripped page from a bizarre story recounting events surrounding the heliobi and the Luofu's general from centuries ago. Its writing style seems to hint at a way to see through the illusory maze.

C: 尘埃落定…字面意义上的尘埃落定。你和判官们经历这曲折、嘈杂、奔波的一夜后，终于抵达这个灵异故事的尾声。但像你看过的大部分恐怖片一样，导演总爱在其中埋下续集的伏笔…你祈求上苍，不要再有续集了！
E: The dust has settled... quite literally. After a night full of twists, noise, and running around with the Judges, you've finally reached the end of this eerie tale. But, just like most horror movies you've seen, directors always like to leave hints for a sequel... You pray to the heavens that there won't be a sequel!

C: 不出意外，孤云被偷走了！现在嫌疑最大的人就是云璃，这也不出意外。但是云璃是个说到做到的女孩儿，她答应了你不会对孤云出手，你可以相信她。\n你已经掌握了关键的证据，现在应该足以驳倒大毫的推理了。
E: To no one's surprise, Guyun has been stolen! And lo and behold, the prime suspect is none other than Yunli. But Yunli has promised she wouldn't do anything to the sword, and you know you can trust her because she is someone who makes good on her word.\nYou have gathered key evidence. Time to refute Dahao's deductions with good reason.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在彦卿的陪同下，你们终于见到了景元，得知罗浮仙舟在建木灾异之后重开演武仪典的用意，更得知了来自朱明与曜青两座仙舟的将军前来观礼的消息。\n所谓来者不善，大概如是了。
E: Accompanied by Yanqing, you all finally gained a meeting with Jing Yuan, learning the purpose of the Wardance's revival after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis. You also learned of the generals of the Zhuming and Yaoqing coming forth to observe the ceremony.\nTheir motives were anything but earnest.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 沦入狼爪，陈于刀俎之间，曜青医士椒丘正努力寻求拖延与分化步离人的良机……也许在这场狼与狐的周旋之间，他能找到救治其主的秘密，抑或逃出生天的机会？
E: Having fallen into the wolves' clutches and now at the mercy of their blades, the Yaoqing healer Jiaoqiu is trying his best to find an opportunity to stall for time and split up the borisin... Perhaps, in this battle between fox and wolf, Jiaoqiu will be able to find the secret to curing his superior or a way to escape his current predicament.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 失去挚友的罗伯特陷入了绝望，开始徒劳地追逐莱斯利•迪恩的影子。\n将他珍视的东西还给他，让他暂时忘记莱斯利•迪恩吧。
E: Faced with the loss of his dearest friend, Robert succumbed to despair and fruitlessly pursued the shadow of Lesley Dean.\nRestore what he cherishes most and let him temporarily forget Lesley Dean.

C: 怎么回事？钟表小子怎么又出现了？难道这段故事还另有隐情？
E: What's going on? Why is Clockie here again? Is there more to this story than meets the eye?

C: 「湛蓝爵士」找到了过去的记忆，现在的它或许会有些新的想法。
E: Dr. Blues has recovered its memories. It might now have some new ideas.

C: 了解到了乔伊和冯恩的真实过往，或许该把这些情况都记录下来。
E: You learned Joey and Vaughn's true history. Maybe you should note all this down.

C: 在雅努萨波利斯的废墟中，散落的泰坦梦呓将过往铭记。
E: In the ruins of Janusopolis, the scattered Titans relive the past in their sleep.

C: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里的读者口味刁钻啊…或许我该想想办法。
E: Third stop, Penacony!\nThe readers here are rather picky... I should probably do something.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 「寻径指津」的爱好者们借着演武仪典的东风，在竞锋舰上办了一场大型活动，去凑凑热闹也无妨。
E: Lovers of "Pathfinder" took advantage of the Wardance excitement and organized a large-scale event on the Skysplitter. It wouldn't hurt to see what it's about.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 向守卫迴星港的云骑兵复命，领取清理污染的酬劳。
E: Report back to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and claim the rewards for cleansing the contamination.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 希瑞雅终于得偿所愿了，把这个善意的谎言埋在心底，带她离开黎明云崖吧。
E: Serena has finally fulfilled her wish. Just keep this kind lie to yourself for now, and escort her out of Dawncloud.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 你收到了来自卡芙卡的消息，她声称自己遭遇了危机，需要你的帮助。你愿意帮助她吗？…或者，你真的相信她吗？
E: You received a message from Kafka claiming that she is in trouble and requires your help. Do you go to her rescue? ...Or rather, do you believe her?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用棒球棍作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield the baseball bat in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n大守护者布洛妮娅似乎想要为此找你谈谈——听听她想说些什么吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nSupreme Guardian Bronya seems to have something to tell you. Go meet with her.

C: 在你们忙于拍摄宣传材料的时候，靠谱的小秘书已经在和燕翠师傅商量正式合作的事了，现在去找找小秘书吧。\n不知道她会怎么用这些照片呢？还是说，她会重新找人拍摄吗？说不定很有可能……
E: While you were all busy shooting promotional material, the ever-reliable secretary Mingxi already found and broached the topic of a formal partnership with chef Yancui. You should go find Miss Secretary and see how she's doing.\nHow will she use these photos? Or might she look for another photographer? It's definitely a possibility...

C: 小秘书正式通知你，金人巷商会在你的帮助下顺利完成这一阶段的营收目标，并且会将部分收入用在码头修缮上。她还在高阿姨那里订了不少小吃，去好好享用吧。\n虽然小秘书没有明说，请你把这些小心思当作一个阶段完成的奖励吧。
E: Miss Secretary has officially informed you that, with your help, the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has successfully achieved their revenue goal for this phase, and will spend part of the revenue on dock maintenance and renovations. She also ordered plenty of snacks from Tall Auntie for you to enjoy.\nThough Miss Secretary didn't state it directly, you should take this as a reward for helping everyone reach the revenue target for this phase.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要成为冠军，必须先组建一支强大的队伍。\n你已经捕捉了足够的以太灵，该回去向乔瓦尼先生寻求下一步指示了。
E: You must build a powerful team before you can become the champion.\nYou've caught enough Aether Spirits. It's time to go seek instructions for the next step from Mr. Giovanni.

C: 造物们太喜欢这个地方了，过于兴奋可不行，把这里弄得乱七八糟的，还是找保姆机器人收拾一下吧。\n你就宠着它们吧。
E: The creations love this place, but too much excitement can be a bad thing. They made everything super messy in here. Let's get the Helper Robot to tidy up.\nYou seriously spoil them too much.

C: 匹诺康尼的某些屏幕突然开始播放一些奇怪又低俗的节目。电视台的主持人乌玛想找你聊聊内情。\n虽说你也不知道究竟是怎么一回事，但去聊聊的话说不定能知道点隐秘故事……
E: Some of the TV screens in Penacony start to air some strange and vulgar programs. Uma, the TV host wishes to speak with you about it.\nAlthough you don't know what's going on, you might get some insider information if you speak to her...

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n怪物们都聚在了一起，去看看它们究竟在聊什么吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nThe monsters are all gathered here. Take a look and listen to what they are discussing.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！/本层有两位员工，去找找他们吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThere are two staff members on this floor. Go find them!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 通过威胁信，尾巴成功进入了斯科特的内心世界。据说，恶人的欲望会被具象化成宫殿的样子，而扭曲的欲望就隐藏其中。\n被夺取了扭曲欲望的斯科特，该洗心革面了。
E: Tail found his way into Skott's inner world through a threatening letter. The desires of the wicked are manifested as palaces, with their twisted desires hidden within.\nSkott should become a better person now that his twisted desires have been removed from him.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n尾巴大爷说他能让斯科特洗心革面，他最好可以……
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nMr. Tail claims he can make Skott turn over a new leaf. We shall see about that...

C: 卢卡第一场比赛的对手是云骑军。\n你在云骑军那里也算有几分薄面，搞不好人家还愿意给你个面子呢。趁比赛还没开始，去见见他们吧。
E: The opponent for Luka's first match is a Cloud Knight.\nYou carry some weight in the Cloud Knights as well, so maybe they'll do you a favor. Go meet them before the match begins.

C: 罗浮请纯美骑士当嘉宾，实在是一步妙棋。\n首先，他们长得好看，门票卖得非常好。其次，他们的战斗技巧和道德水准都很高，绝对不会误伤选手。第三，他们基本算是出家人，不太在乎出场费，很实惠。\n说起来，银枝真的特别欣赏卢卡。可能因为他们长得有点像。
E: The Luofu made a great call to invite the Knights of Beauty as guests.\nFirstly, they all look good, so the tickets sell like hotcakes. Secondly, they have both outstanding martial prowess and peerless morals, so they would never accidentally hurt their opponent. Thirdly, they're basically monastic monks and do not care much for the invitation fee, making them very cost-effective.\nNow that you think about it, Argenti really does take a liking to Luka. Maybe it's because they look similar.

C: 青雀对伊戈尔遗物的研究似乎又有了新进展，去太卜司找她们聊聊吧。
E: Qingque seems to have made more progress with Igor's relic. Go to the Divination Commission to chat with them.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n和乐队成员们会合，交流当前的进展并商量后续行动。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nMeet up with the band members, discuss what you have so far, and figure out what to do from here.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 参与「摄影展览」需要提交证件照，三月七希望由你来拍这张至关重要的照片。
E: Joining the Photography Exhibition requires participants to submit their ID photo. March 7th hopes you can take this very important photo for her.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「预言算碑」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by the Prophecy Tablet. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 花园里可不能允许有人胡闹！和风堇一同去阻止那位发脾气的男性吧。
E: Someone is causing a scene in the Garden! Join Hyacine in stopping the furious man.

C: 你将在淘汰赛第一场中迎击强敌——「十敌」和他的红温海豹。\n教教他「失败」两个字怎么写吧。
E: In the first match of the knockout stage, you'll face a formidable opponent — Yourdei and his Red Hot Seal.\nTeach him the meaning of the word "defeat."

C: 顺利来到最后的总决赛，下面将是匹诺康尼与全银河观众见证你的高光时刻！
E: You've successfully made it to the finals. The audience from Penacony and the entire Cosmos will witness your ultimate victory!

C: 派对车厢里出现了一个奇怪的棋盘，或许你应该去看看。列车上总会出现奇怪的东西，留给它们的空间不多了。\n什么，你还不知道有这么个东西？没关系，现在你知道了。
E: A strange chessboard has appeared in the Party Car - you might want to check it out. Weird stuff keeps popping up on the Express, and we're running out of room for all of it.\nWhat, you didn't know about this? Well, now you do.

C: 与陌生女性交谈，厘清现状
E: Talk to the unfamiliar woman and find out about what's happening

C: 寻找物资，前往集市广场
E: Search for the supplies, go to the market square

C: 设法找到开关，开启机关门
E: Try to find the switch and open the mechanism gate

C: 与伙伴会合，准备离开
E: Meet up with your friends and prepare to leave

C: 调查工造司内，破解玄鹿重生力量的来源
E: Investigate the Artisanship Commission, and find the source of the Ebon Deer's rejuvenation

C: 将礼物送交「不夜侯」的梦茗
E: Give the gift to Mengming from the Sleepless Earl

C: 与列车组交谈
E: Speak with the Crew

C: 与爱德华医生交谈，进入梦境
E: Speak with Dr. Edward and enter the Dreamscape

C: 返回玄关
E: Return to the foyer

C: 跟上█ ██年幼█自█ █埃维金██ 男孩 █
E: Cat█h up ███th██You█g Avgin b█y

C: 离开█ 开 ██过█迷█宫█ ██去█
E: L██ve █he █aze ███ █o

C: 调查会说话的钟表雕像
E: Investigate the talking Clock Statue

C: 与黑天鹅交谈
E: Speak with Black Swan

C: （可选）与各位来宾聊聊
E: (Optional) Chat with the guests

C: 调查奇怪的猴子…蕉？
E: Investigate the bizarre monkey... bana?

C: 忍心撩乱！从此屋遁逃！
E: The ninja's heart is disturbed! Escape from the evil stronghold!

C: 此乃忍•科学，使用「气泡弹珠」追逐普利蒙蕉授
E: Such is the ninja tech! Pursue Profnana Primon using the Bubble Pinball

C: 探查异响的来源
E: Investigate the source of the abnormal noise

C: 前往浴场打听达米亚诺斯的去向
E: Head to the baths to inquire about Damionis' whereabouts

C: 与丹恒会合
E: Meet up with Dan Heng

C: 与缇宝一起去见阿格莱雅
E: Go see Aglaea with Tribbie

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 通过锁链桥前往对岸
E: Cross the chain bridge to the other side

C: 继续前进，寻找其它可交流的眷属
E: Continue to search for and talk with other Titankin

C: 继续前进
E: Continue forward

C: 前往通信区
E: Go to the Communications Zone

C: 提交火种
E: Submit Coreflame

C: 与遐蝶同行，了解公民大会现状
E: Walk with Castorice and learn about what's happening at the citizens' assembly

C: 与瑟希斯对话
E: Speak with Cerces

C: 回到第一面镜，准备折跃
E: Return to the First Mirror and prepare for the warp jump

C: 前往「命运重渊」雅努萨波利斯，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Abyss of Fate" Janusopolis and continue your adventure

C: 挖，挖，挖宝藏
E: Dig, dig — treasure awaits

C: 找出葛瑞迪的真身
E: Find Grady's true body

C: 前进，向血染的深海
E: Go forth, to the bloodstained deep sea

C: 前进，向等候你的她
E: Go forth, to her who is waiting for you

C: 寻找打败赞达尔的方法
E: Find a way to defeat Zandar

C: 继续批阅记忆的谏书
E: Continue reviewing the Epistle of Remembrance

C: 继续前进，前往新的扇区
E: Continue forward and head to the new sector

C: 前往中央区渡台，上传密钥
E: Head to the Central Access Platform and upload the encryption key

C: 继续前进，深入大墓
E: Continue forward deeper into the Great Tomb

C: 深入树庭，寻找荒笛
E: Venture into the Grove, seek out Terravox

C: 击败金血忆灵
E: Defeat the ichor memosprite

C: 前往码头，再看一眼哀丽秘榭的海
E: Head to the dock for one last look at the sea of Aedes Elysiae

C: 铁墓已然降临。击败它，熄灭「毁灭」的劫火
E: Irontomb has descended. Defeat it and extinguish the karmic flames of the Destruction

C: 追逐记忆的花
E: Chase the Flower of Memory

C: 调查医疗舱内古怪的希拉
E: Investigate and find out more about this mysterious Sheila

C: 上前察看原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>的状态
E: Check the status of Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>

C: 将得到的物品交给呜呜伯
E: Give the belongings to the Wubbaboo

C: 拍摄呜呜伯与纪念碑入镜的照片
E: Snap a photo of Wubbaboos and the monument

C: 前往空间站，打探「瓜农」的下落
E: Head to the space station and find the whereabouts of Gossipmonger

C: 与姬子交谈，获得为她拍照的许可
E: Speak with Himeko and obtain her consent to take her picture

C: 进入收容舱段，调查现场状况
E: Enter the storage zone and investigate the site conditions

C: 与维修工程师对话，上报算力问题
E: Talk to the maintenance engineer and report the computing power issue

C: 在诊所门口附近寻找虎克
E: Find Hook near the clinic

C: 与拍卖师对话，等待拍卖开始
E: Talk to the auctioneer and wait for the auction to begin

C: 与娜塔莎对话，给科鲁泽安排体检
E: Talk to Natasha and arrange a health examination for Kluzer

C: 寻找茉莉，了解故障机器人详情
E: Find Molly and ask about the malfunctioning robots

C: 前往工业展馆
E: Head to the Industrial Hall

C: 在长乐天与绿芙蓉接头
E: Meet up with Green Hibiscus at the Exalting Sanctum

C: 前往迴星港
E: Head toward Stargazer Navalia

C: 前往若木亭，与丹恒会合
E: Meet up with Dan Heng at Synwood Pavilion

C: 前往金人巷，与素裳对话
E: Go to Aurum Alley and talk with Sushang

C: 与神策府中的其他人交谈
E: Talk to the others at the Seat of Divine Foresight

C: 前往幽狱之底
E: Go to the bottom of The Shackling Prison

C: 击败伪装的步离狼卒
E: Defeat the disguised Borisin Wolftroopers

C: 抵达竞锋舰上层
E: Reach the Skysplitter's upper deck

C: 与此同时，战后的金人巷中…
E: At this moment, in the war-torn Aurum Alley...

C: 与此同时，战后的金人巷中…
E: At this moment, in the war-torn Aurum Alley...

C: 与等待已久的人碰面
E: Meet up with the person who has been waiting

C: 向附近的人打听埃夫姆的消息
E: Ask people around for news on Ephraim

C: 见证蒂索克二世成为一个疯狂的屠夫
E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler

C: 继续前进，见证查德威克的经历
E: Continue onward and witness Chadwick's experiences

C: 继续大堂经理的工作
E: Continue fulfilling your duties as the lobby manager

C: 跟随迷迷的指引，救回帕西提亚
E: Follow Mem's direction and rescue Pasithea

C: 拍摄华劳斯与永冬铭碑的照片
E: Take a photo of Wallace and the Everwinter Monument

C: 搜集「垃圾大王」的线索

E: Please select the assist you want Silver Wolf to provide you today

E: Tenacity

C: 三月七试吃了药膳未满足，椒丘留下「赤龙血」的传闻。
E: March 7th tried the medicinal dish but found herself unsated. Jiaoqiu let a rumor regarding the "Crimson Dragon Blood."

C: 被冰冻之前的事，你还记得吗？
E: Do you remember what happened before you were frozen?

C: …但是咱口渴了嘛！
E: ...But I'm thirsty now!

C: 还有什么要跟帕姆说的吗？
E: Something else you need?

C: 有话直说吧。别打机锋了，卡芙卡。
E: Stop speaking in riddles, Kafka. Say what you have to say.

C: 帕姆也一起去吧？
E: Why not come with us, Pom-Pom?

C: 我的开拓等级如何了？
E: How's my Trailblaze Level?

C: 那个传说中制造了博识尊的人？
E: The one who supposedly created Nous?

C: 就是那一战让艾利欧看上了你：宇宙里居然有人能破解螺丝咕姆的程序！…先是螺丝咕姆，再是黑塔，宇宙中怕是没有人在这么短的时间里连续招惹两个天才了，命运使然呢。
E: Ah, that battle was how Elio got his eyes on you. Imagine, someone actually able to crack Screwllum's code! First Screwllum, then Herta... there's probably no one else in the universe who offended two genii in such quick succession. It must be destiny.

C: 身份认证更新通知：本次更新支持义体机械ID代码以及虹膜扫描，欢迎各位科员申请办理。（佩戴接触性角膜无法使用虹膜扫描模式）
E: Identity Update Notice: The update supports prosthetic mechanical ID codes and iris scans. All researchers are welcome to apply. (Iris scan mode is not available for those who wear contact lens)

C: 这也是个很好的答案。
E: This is also a lovely answer.

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 呼，你们平安回来了就好。阿兰刚刚来过了，收容舱段的事他都告诉我了。还有他的伤…多亏你们的帮助。
E: Whew, I'm glad you're all back safe. Arlan just told me about the situation at the storage zone — and about his injury... thank you, for all your help.

C: 那就帮大忙了。
E: That would be of great help.

C: 我是猫派。
E: I'm more of a cat person.

C: 我坚定地相信着，等我看到了这个绝望的美丽的走马灯数，我的人生也走到了走马灯的最后……
E: I know in my heart that when I see that hopelessly beautiful cyclic number... it will mean the poetic end of my life's cycle.

C: 内容有点多…都记住了么？
E: It's quite a bit to remember... You got everything?

C: 完美，谢谢。
E: Wonderful, thank you.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着白厄：「……？！」
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Phainon: "...!?"

C: 不会是列车吧？看来它会比我们先到月台耶。
E: Could it be the Express? It looks like it'll get to the platform before us.

C: 我是法律上的主人，实质上这个地方我不管。我造好它，往里面放东西，塞人，然后让人自己管理。
E: On paper, yes. But I don't really care about this place. I built it, put some stuff in, left some people here, and let them just manage themselves.

C: 过去，我们已经停靠了好几个世界，将来，我们也会如此继续——银河里有数不清的下一站。
E: Sometimes, we stop on other worlds and we'll continue to do so. There are countless "next stops" in the galaxy.

C: 之后旅行中的见闻，我也会收录整合进去，你可以时常来看看。我们的终端设备上也有快捷入口。
E: I'll be entering any new information we encounter on future journeys, so drop by anytime to check it out. We also have a shortcut on the terminal device.

C: 对了，这些东西你拿着。
E: Oh yeah, take these.

C: 最后的堡垒？
E: Last bastion?

C: …没错。
E: ...Correct.

C: 你说的没错，我们之所以会来寻求合作，归根结底是因为大家的利益一致——如果不封印「星核」，我们也无法离开这个星球。
E: You're right. Our reason for coming here is not purely selfless. If we don't seal the Stellaron, we cannot leave this planet.

C: 我就知道她不对劲！
E: I knew there was something up with her!

C: 咦，真的可以吗？我随便说说的……
E: Huh? Really? I just wanted to say something...

C: 观隅反三——
E: Three of a kind...

C: 没有，那东西与怪物有关吗？也许守护者大人知道什么。
E: No. Does that have to do with the monsters? Perhaps the Madam Guardian will be familiar.

C: 可可利亚…可可利亚……
E: Cocolia... Cocolia...

C: 哈？你也太经不住诱惑了吧！
E: Hah — do you just say yes to everything?

C: 自我介绍一下，我是银鬃铁卫的情报官，也是「贝洛伯格历史之旅」的临时向导，佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜。
E: So, let me introduce myself. I'm the Intelligence Officer for the Silvermane Guards, and a temporary guide for the "A Journey Through Belobog's History" program. My name is Pelageya Sergeyevna.

C: 现在的我嘛，就窝在这机械屋里修修破烂，玩玩音乐，过得挺自在的。
E: These days I just spend my time fixing things in this workshop and playing music. It's a pretty carefree existence.

C: 哎呀，我可没打算跟你们聊不堪回首的过去，还是说回你们吧。消失好久的布洛妮娅让你们来找我，一定有很重要的事吧？
E: *sigh* If I'm not careful I'll start boring you all with sob stories from the past. Let's get back to you guys. If long-lost Bronya told you to come here, you must have something important to tell me?

C: 怪不得最近都没有布洛妮娅的消息，原来还有这么段故事。下层区啊，封闭好多年了，很久没人上来过，没想到是这样……
E: So that's what's been happening — no wonder we hadn't heard from Bronya recently. *sigh* After all these years in isolation and without a single word from below, this is what's become of the Underworld...

C: 我记得父亲曾经和我说过，「这是祖辈们为我们留下的『保险』——被逼入绝境的时候就想办法打开这个铁盒吧。」
E: I remember my father telling me, "This is the 'insurance' left for us by our ancestors... When there is no other way, find a way to open this iron box."

C: 看，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩这不是回来了嘛。
E: Look, they are back.

C: …无穷无尽。但，那已经不能称之为人类了。
E: ...Forever. But in that scenario, they can't be considered human anymore.

C: 哎，我这不是有求于你嘛～
E: Hehe, this is a pretty big ask⁓

C: 她想走这事惊动布洛妮娅了？
E: Was Bronya caught off guard by her desire to join the Astral Express?

C: ——但有件事…我必须亲自和你确认。
E: ...but there's something I need to ask you.

C: …我会的。谢谢你，布洛妮娅。
E: ...I will. Thank you, Bronya.

C: …怎么，不信？想不到吧，可可利亚那家伙曾经也是很热血的。
E: Don't believe me? Let me tell you, Cocolia and I shared a similar way of thinking back in the day.

C: …咦？这个旋律是？
E: ...Huh? That melody...

C: 哎？！别别别——你看我这不是…腾不出手嘛。
E: What!? No! No, no, no — can't you see I'm just short of hands here?

C: 嗯…如果我说舍得，你会信吗？
E: Well... would you believe me if I said yes?

C: 嗯…还是被你看出来了。
E: Hm... you can see right through me.

C: 你靠近这只小小的设备，感到些微暖意。
E: You approach this small device, and feel a slight warmth emanating.

C: 路灯还没有打开。
E: The street lamps haven't been turned on yet.

C: 这是爱情剧《星尘玫瑰》的宣传画。
E: This is an advertisement poster for the romantic drama Stardust Rose.

C: 失意的公司职员在边荒小镇遇见真爱，面临事业与爱情的抉择。看完《星尘玫瑰》的剧情简介，你好像已经看完了整部剧。
E: A disillusioned company employee meets his true love in a small town on the edge of the desert and faces the choice between career and love. After reading the plot synopsis of Stardust Rose, you seem to have finished the whole drama.

C: 在化装舞会上宾客们接连遇害原本只是常见的命题创作，但是宣传画上不起眼的一行「根据真实事件改编」勾起了你的兴趣……
E: Guests being killed one after another in a masquerade party is quite a typical setup. However, an inconspicuous line on the poster saying "based on real events" aroused your interest...

C: 巨大的办公桌，非常干净。
E: A large office desk that's kept very clean.

C: 这什么慈善组织！
E: Does this count as a charitable organization?

C: 没有，舒服极了。
E: No, I feel much better.

C: 虎克要去玩搏击了，就不带你们进去啦。
E: Hook's gonna go fight. See ya later!

C: 这个时间段，希儿一般都在这片区域巡逻啊……
E: Seele's usually always out on patrol here at this time...

C: 娜塔莎居然会出现在这儿…看来事态比想象中严重。
E: What's Natasha doing here...? Things must be worse than I thought.

C: 要是没有「地火」帮忙，这大矿区怕是要彻底沦落到那些家伙手里喽。
E: It's only thanks to Wildfire that the Great Mine hasn't fallen into their hands completely.

C: …欺软怕硬的货色，怎么在史瓦罗的喽啰前头就支棱不起来了啊？你们爹妈没教过什么叫骨气吗？
E: ...Cowards and bullies. I don't remember you guys acting this tough around Svarog's minions. Did your parents never teach you what a backbone was?

C: 成天好吃懒做，一门心思只想占别人便宜，居然还这么理直气壮…真不要脸！
E: You're lazy. All you want is to profit off of our sweat and tears. And you don't even try hiding it! ...Disgraceful.

C: 你俩每句话都要拌个嘴吗？这都什么时候了，先聊正事吧！矿区里圈这么危险，咱们还进得去吗？
E: Can you two say anything without quarreling? This isn't the time! It sounds like there's danger waiting for us in the inner section, can we still get through?

C: 你挺有雅兴啊？
E: Does it matter?

C: 这就开始这就开始，对了，这位{NICKNAME}也想加入鼹鼠党，可以一起玩吗？漆黑的虎克大人？
E: Okay, okay, we're done. Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, this is my friend, {NICKNAME}. {F#She}{M#He} also wants to join The Moles. Can {F#she}{M#he} play too?

C: 伊蕾恩！你还好吗，伤势严重吗？
E: Elaine! Are you okay? Are you hurt?

C: 有一句古话叫「祸兮福所倚，福兮祸所伏」。地下的历史与地上一样悠久，并且没有大守护者的干预，我们很有机会查出星核的所在。
E: There's an old saying that goes: "Good fortune lies within bad, bad fortune lurks within good." Even when compared with the Overworld, the Underworld has a long history. There should be valuable intel here. Not to mention, without the supreme guardian's interference, we have a better chance than ever of locating the Stellaron.

C: 你看{NICKNAME}，特别洒脱地说出完全不负责任的台词。
E: Would you look at {NICKNAME}, blurting out something so irresponsible.

C: 在我看来，可可利亚大人的命令——将你们逮捕才是合理的。但母亲一开始并没有这么做……
E: As far as I was concerned, Madam Cocolia's order to arrest you sounded reasonable... but why didn't she issue it straight away?

C: 所以她一定在你们身上看到了什么…一些我尚且觉察不出的东西。这让我很困扰……
E: She must have realized something about you... Something I haven't yet been able to perceive for myself, and it bothers me...

C: 你一个人去也太冒险了，让奥列格派人和你一起吧？
E: It's too dangerous to go alone. Get Oleg to send someone with you.

C: 你也说了，那是银鬃铁卫的规矩——别把它套在我们身上。
E: Exactly, a rule of the Silvermane Guards. Don't apply your rules to us.

C: 真好？你在挖苦我吗？
E: Nice? You being sarcastic with me?

C: 我发现咱们的作息对不上啊，你要么大半夜就爬起来，要么就睡得昏天黑地。不好不好，团队协作方面你还需要加强呀。
E: I've noticed that our sleep routines don't match up. You either keep getting up in the middle of the night or snoozing away until the day is almost out. Unacceptable. You gotta work on your teamwork!

C: 你们不计较就好。娜塔莎一向办事谨慎，但她绝对没有什么坏心思，这点想必你们也发现了。
E: I'm glad you don't mind. Natasha is always cautious, but she has no ill intent, as you surely have noticed.

C: 来吧…来吧……
E: Come... Come...

C: 包在我身上了。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 是你啊，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。我原本也想给你们送行，不过你们也看到了——这下层的破事，刚处理完一件，就又会冒出三件。
E: Ah, young {F#lady}{M#lad}. I wanted to see you off, but you know how things are around here in the underground. Solve one problem and three more take its place.

C: 拿着，之前答应给你的奖金尾款，我史考特说到做到。以后有机会了，可以来找我谈谈生意，咱们互惠互利——嚯哈哈哈！
E: Here's the rest of your money like promised. Scott is always true to his word. If we can get a chance in the future, then come and talk business with me. We can help each other out— muhahaha!

C: 没问题！我这就给您安排加赛，还请您稍作等候。
E: No problem! I'll arrange an extra match for you right now, please wait a moment.

C: 哈哈，欢迎我们的大明星{NICKNAME}！你现在已经是俱乐部的焦点了，大家都盼着你上擂台呢。
E: Haha, well if it isn't our big star, {NICKNAME}! You're the big draw for the club now, everyone is looking forward to you taking the ring.

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 将胜利的消息分享给了歌蒂……
E: You tell Gertie about the victory...

C: 相信布洛妮娅吧。
E: Put your faith in Bronya.

C: 喂…这火药味儿好像有点浓啊……
E: Uh... she's not trying to be diplomatic about it, is she?

C: 多亏了杰帕德戍卫官，损失被限制到了最小程度。经此一役，下层区对银鬃铁卫的风评想必会改善不少。
E: Thanks to Captain Gepard, we managed to keep our losses to a minimum. I'm sure people will begin to appreciate the Silvermane Guards after this battle.

C: 没关系！吃穿用度还是没问题的……
E: Thanks! We can manage our daily expenses...

C: 杰帕德，{NICKNAME}——我还有最后一件事想拜托你俩。
E: Gepard, {NICKNAME}, I have one last thing that I might need your help with.

C: 你可以收集齐之后给我看看呀。
E: You go find those pages so that you can let me read them.

C: 我找不到，你再帮帮我。
E: I don't know where to look. Help me.

C: （将收集的书页交给尼古莱）
E: (Give the pages to Nika)

C: 垃圾桶冷冷凝视脚边喘息的垃圾桶：「我说过的，塔塔洛夫。」它说，「我说过总有一天，你会翻倒在我的脚边，到那个时候，我会狠狠地嘲笑你。风水是会轮流转的。」
E: The trashcan glared coldly at the other trashcan gasping for air at its feet. "I told you, Tatalov," it said. "I told you that you will one day collapse beside me. When that time comes, I will laugh to your dying face. Such is the wind of change."

C: 你看见一间简陋的居室：一条起皱泛黄的铺盖，麻袋做成的枕头，两瓶已开封的面包味汽水，一双矿工靴，一本书，书页已经烂了，你看不清上面写了什么。以及，一把小刀。
E: You see a shabby room with a set of wrinkled yellowish bedding, a pillow made from a gunny sack, two opened bread-flavor soda, a pair of miner's boots, a torn out book whose words can no longer be distinguished, as well as a knife.

C: 垃圾箱荧荧发光，有人往里面扔了三块地髓，力道很大，以至于矿石碎屑散落得到处都是。你不知道那人的愤怒从何而来，毕竟，地髓就相当于地底的钱。你会在生气的时候扔钱吗？
E: The dumpster is shining. Someone threw three pieces of Geomarrow in it. The person threw it so heavily that shards of the ore scattered all over the trashcan. You have no idea where the anger of that person stems from, neither can you understand this behavior. After all, Geomarrow is as valuable as gold in the underground. Would you throw money even in a fit of anger?

C: 根据信号内容，雅利洛-Ⅵ原住民在数琥珀纪前的浩劫中幸存至今，并于不久前在一群无名客的帮助下成功结束了大寒潮。
E: The message that the signals contain states that the natives of the planet have survived the catastrophe that happened many Amber Eras ago and recently received help from a group known as the Nameless, which allowed them to put an end to the Eternal Freeze.

C: 「仙舟联盟」将举行演武仪典， 邀请各友好世界前来观礼。
E: The Xianzhou Alliance is set to hold a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from friendly worlds to witness the occasion.

C: 先给两位打个预防针。接下来的谒见环节，务必打起精神，认真应对。
E: I need to give you two a heads up first. Our meeting with Madam Yukong won't be without risk. We need to be prepared and take it seriously.

C: 「星核」之灾，仙舟确有解决法子。但平定灾患需要时间，需得投入云骑军主力方能成事。但这卡芙卡潜藏在仙舟上，终究是个祸患，不得不防。
E: We can handle the Stellaron, but it will take time and will require the bulk of the Cloud Knights on the ship. It is this Kafka that concerns me. The longer she stays on the ship, the bigger the threat she will pose.

C: 列车久无消息，如今看到它再度驰骋星海，重回正轨，真是令人畅怀啊。
E: We had heard nothing of the Express for a long time. It is heartening to learn of its continued journey along that starward track.

C: 和大人物打交道，可比对付怪物还累人……
E: *sigh* I'd rather deal with monsters than these big shots...

C: 请您通融一下吧…
E: Please find it in your heart to let me through...

C: 可这样的话，解封之前我们该靠什么养活自己啊？
E: If this keeps up, how'll we survive then?

C: 虽然您不一定需要，但要是有什么急用得上我的地方，欢迎随时来找我。
E: You may not need it right now, but if there's any help I can give you, come to me any time.

C: 在下虽然目不能视，但也听说「罗浮」上目前出了些变故。太卜司所在的洞天断绝了音信。安全起见，还是留在此处为好。
E: I've heard there are serious incidents unfolding on the Luofu. Communication with the Divination Commission's delve has been severed. For your own safety, I'd suggest you remain here.

C: 那个孩子啊，听称呼来头还不小。
E: You mean the child? She's starting to sound like a big shot.

C: 我在前面开路，辛苦二位也留神四周啦。
E: I'll lead the way. You two keep an eye on our surroundings.

C: 操作台，操作台…在哪儿呢？
E: Control panel... Where is the control panel?

C: 客气什么，这是云骑军人应该做的！
E: No need to thank me, just a Cloud Knight doing her job!

C: 对不起，只想打听个人…
E: Sorry, we were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...

C: 难怪瞧你们一身打扮，像是从其他世界来的吧。
E: I should've guessed from your attire — you look like you're from another world.

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 没见过。
E: ...Didn't see her.

C: 这股烟雾对我们没有影响？
E: This smoke can't affect us?

C: 是「只有这条路通向了已知最好的结果」，如果可以选，没有人会选择跳下悬崖。
E: Rather, only this way leads to the known best result. If we can afford to choose, then none would choose to leap off a cliff.

C: 炉鼎…熄灭了。
E: So you succeeded in dousing the elixir cauldrons...

C: 啧啧，为什么要逼我亲自出手呢，这有悖我的「毁灭」美学呀…小卒子。
E: Ah ah, little pawn, must you force me to intervene directly? I'm loath to flout my philosophy of destruction.

C: 她是纳努克座下的七位大君之一，钟爱凡人的自毁，许多生灵被她诱入过万劫不复的深渊……
E: She's one of seven Lord Ravagers who serve Nanook... and finds pleasure in witnessing the self-destruction of mortals. She's led countless souls down a dark and hopeless path.

C: 你们…谢谢你们。我感觉自己好多了。
E: ...Th—Thank you, all of you. I feel much better now.

C: 关于星核…
E: About Stellarons...

C: 是咎由自取。仙舟联盟不允许有人触碰长生的禁忌。
E: They brought this upon themselves. The Xianzhou Alliance forbids anyone from accessing forbidden knowledge regarding immortality.

C: 医士认为，「魔阴身」与记忆有关。长生种虽有极其漫长的寿命，记忆的容量终有极限。
E: The healers believe that the mara-struck condition is related to memories. Unsurprisingly, long-life species have long lifespans, but there is a limit to the brain's capacity.

C: 我已将眼前的情况报知了神策府。
E: I've reported the current situation to the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 你是…！
E: You...!

C: 可惜那位将军执意要我登台，幻胧也只得献丑一番。
E: But since that stubborn general of yours has forced me to take center stage, I'll make sure I steal the show.

C: 我已经和你，还有那个女人说过很多遍了…我是「丹恒」。
E: I have told you and that woman many times... I am Dan Heng.

C: 我和你们的过去毫无瓜葛。
E: I have nothing to do with your past.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: （永远接不通的消息…真麻烦。也不知{NICKNAME}，三月和杨叔那边发生了什么……）
E: (The messages never get sent... I wonder what's happening with those three?)

C: 你真是吓我一跳。还以为你惹了什么麻烦，被将军逮住了呢！本来还盘算怎么搭救你，闹了半天，原来你们早就认识哇。
E: You scared the heck outta me! For a second I thought you'd annoyed the general — it seemed like you were his prisoner. There I was thinking up a plan to kidnap you, and it turns out the two of you are old buddies!

C: 你疯了！你以为这能换取仙舟人的信任？非我族类，永远不可能同心一致！
E: You've lost your senses! You think this will gain the trust of the Xianzhou natives? Those who are not of our kind can never be of our mind!

C: 我可是短生种啊，你觉得一个时辰很少？对我来说，那就足够了。
E: I'm a short-life species, do you think two hours isn't enough? It will be done.

C: 是幻胧…我们得快些了。
E: It's Phantylia... we must hurry.

C: 越「丰饶」的世界，越有「毁灭」的价值，不是吗？
E: The more abundant a world becomes, the greater the value of its destruction, wouldn't you say?

C: 我当时还说，自己要去请上一尊——咳，我没料到，只是提了一嘴的事，她竟记挂在心上了。
E: I... I remember asking her for one at the time... Ahem, this is unexpected. I only mentioned it in passing, but she remembered.

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们手头的东西，你觉得该挑哪些放上星槎啊？
E: {NICKNAME}, out of all this stuff we've got, what do you think we should place on the starskiff?

C: 你好？
E: Hi?

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 你走就走吧，跟我们有什么关系？我们很熟吗？还要来和我们道个别？
E: Just go then, what's it gotta do with us? You think we're friends or something? You wanna say goodbye to us?

C: 将军，奠仪结束了。您该歇息了。
E: General, the ceremony has finished. You should take a rest.

C: 也无需在意，这种「遗忘」发生在每一个清晨，是我们早已习惯的平常。
E: Pay no mind, for this forgetfulness happens with each new dawn. It is an occurrence that we have become accustomed to for so long.

C: 邀请函究竟是哪一方势力寄出的，将一众派系召集至匹诺康尼的目的是什么，家族又为何知情不言…此行疑点众多，在查清更多事实前，不可贸然出手。
E: Who sent the invite, what is the purpose of gathering all the factions into Penacony, and why does The Family choose to remain silent about their knowledge of this... There are too many unanswered questions. We must use the utmost caution before we go deeper.

C: 放心吧，教授，我有的是办法。家族害怕公司搞事，所以才处处针锋相对…搞不好，匹诺康尼从始至终就是「同谐」的阴谋。
E: Don't worry, Doctor, I have my ways. The Family fears interference from the IPC, hence their constant intervention... Or, to play devil's advocate, perhaps Penacony might have always been a ruse under the guise of "the Harmony?"

C: 听说这座酒店非同一般。
E: I hear this hotel is pretty unique.

C: 谢谢，礼物就免了。
E: Thank you, but we can spare the gifts.

C: 我现在这么有名了？
E: I'm that famous now?

C: ——已经为您分析完成了！我想您一定会喜欢这枚梦泡。
E: ...And that's the end of my analysis! I'm sure you'll be a fan of this dream bubble.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 帕姆。
E: Pom-Pom.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: （还以为上来就能找到无名客的线索，果然没那么容易……）
E: (I was hoping I would find some clues about the Nameless up here... Well, can't expect it to be that easy...)

C: 长、长官？
E: S—Sir?

C: 这怎么好意思…
E: You shouldn't have!

C: …的眼睫毛发出来的。
E: ...coming from the Clockie's eyelashes.

C: 稍后再说吧。
E: Maybe later.

C: 呃…在哪儿？我看不到啊……
E: Um... Where's he? I can't see him...

C: 滴答，滴答！场面变得这么混乱，都是石头老板的错！
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock! It's all {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s fault that things have turned out this way!

C: 不打扰你了…
E: I'll leave you to it...

C: 没关系的！梦里什么都会发生，每天都有好多人从天上掉下来——行人早都见怪不怪了。
E: It doesn't matter! Anything can happen in a dream, and there are lots of people falling from the sky every day. The pedestrians aren't going to be fazed by anything.

C: 我不能信任一个有所隐瞒的人。
E: I can't put my trust in someone who hides things from me.

C: 两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
E: None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.

C: 和你跳舞就能放我们过去了吗？
E: Will you let us in after I dance with you?

C: 噢，抱歉。我只是…情难自禁。
E: Oh, sorry about that. I just can't help myself.

C: 女孩将手机递给了你，眼神里满是期待。
E: The girl hands the phone to you, her eyes filled with expectation.

C: …我真的、真的对你太失望了。
E: ...I'm really, really disappointed in you.

C: （唔…这里…是什么地方？）
E: (Ugh... This... What is this place?)

C: 竟然真的可以？随意改变梦境的重力明明是严令禁止的……
E: Can't believe that worked. Tampering with the Dreamscape's gravity is clearly strictly forbidden...

C: 就像它们和钟表小子一起…
E: Just like they did with Clockie...

C: 不要过来
E: No, don't come close

C: …一模一样的房间？
E: ...The exact same room?

C: 这里是天堂吗…
E: Are we in Heaven... Or?

C: …这一天终于来了。那么，出发吧——我会护送您前往王座「造物之柱」，见证我等一族的未来……
E: ...I've waited so long for this day. Here, I'll escort you to your throne, the Pillars of Creation, where you'll witness the future of my people...

C: 还是智取，智取…
E: Gotta work smarter, smarter...

C: 你为什么要数垃圾？
E: Why are you counting trash?

C: 可惜，没什么不同。也许爱德华医生没来得及去管这些细节。
E: Unfortunately, there isn't any difference. Maybe Dr. Edward did not have time to attend to these details.

C: 给你来点公司的料吧，朋友。你知道「冥火大公」——陀斐特的阿弗利特么？
E: Let me give you some IPC insider information, my friend. Do you know "Duke Inferno" — Fetora's Ifrit?

C: 好吧好吧～我只是想说…如果你需要，我随时都可以帮你哦？谁能拒绝一位在鸡翅膀上打钉饰的男孩呢？
E: Alright, alright~ Just putting it out there... If you're ever in a pinch, remember I've got your back. I mean, who could resist a guy rocking spikes on his wings?

C: 虽然态度友好，但他们未必信任我们…先行后闻吧。
E: We may be on amicable terms, but that doesn't mean they trust us... Let's act first and talk later.

C: 当然，前来这里的忆者不止我一人——匹诺康尼首次向家族以外的派系公开发出邀约，忆庭要铭记下这历史性的一刻……
E: Of course, I'm not the only Memokeeper who has come — Penacony has opened its doors to factions beyond The Family for the first time, and the Garden must record this historic moment...

C: 我可以保护你们免受伤害，在忆域中，我也需要忆者的援助，以及…如果遇见家族，多一个人总能多一份解释。
E: I can protect you from harm, but in the Memory Zone, I'll need assistance from the Memokeeper as well. And... if we run into The Family, it wouldn't hurt to have one more person to explain the situation.

C: （怎么回事，那种微妙的感觉又来了……）
E: (What's going on? That weird feeling is back again...)

C: 会不会是认错了？
E: Could you be mistaken?

C: …是因为害怕从「梦」中醒来。
E: ...It is because they're afraid to awaken from the dream.

C: 出发吧，我们得另寻他路……
E: Let's go. We have to find another path...

C: 从这些残骸的记忆来看…那人身材高大，比成年男性还要健壮许多，手段干脆利落，都是一击毙命——也许是雇佣兵，或者杀手。
E: From the memories of these carcasses... that person was tall, and much stronger than an adult male. The method was clean and crisp, all one-strike kills — maybe a mercenary, or an assassin.

C: 总的来说，朋友，你得谢谢这位小姐。她非但没有算计你——恰恰相反，她救了你……
E: In short, you need to thank this lady here, my friend. Not only did she not betray you — on the contrary, she rescued you...

C: 我完全想起来啦，那个时候，我是这么对你说的——
E: I remember everything now. This was what I told you at that time...

C: 这不公平，对不对？所以朋友，我需要你的帮助。
E: That's not fair, right? So then, friend, I need your help.

C: 这我也知道…只是不曾想过会从你口中听闻。
E: I know that... I just never expected to hear you say it.

C: 没有那个必要了…告诉你也无妨，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
E: No need for that... No harm in mentioning that Elio's only given me one instruction: "Get all of the Astral Express to track down the grand legacy."

C: 现在 黄金的时刻
E: Present day — Golden Hour

C: 我知道你能赢…你一直是个运气很好的孩子，你的幸运是{RUBY_B#芬戈-比约斯}地母神{RUBY_E#}的恩赐……
E: Of course. Of course you'd win... You've always been a lucky child. {RUBY_B#Fenge Biyos}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#} must be watching over you...

C: 就你脑袋上这个！虽然比不过我——「机动骑士」的全领域歼击动力铠。
E: The one on your head! Of course, it's nothing compared to my... full pocket-dimensional annihilating power armor of the "Mobile Knights."

C: 多亏你有一位眼光独到的朋友，我才能为你的职业生涯添上一次彻底的失败。
E: It was all thanks to your friend with a keen eye that I could add a blot of utter failure to your storied career.

C: 敬告各位住客：星际和平公司将在酒店开展特殊工作，请跟随负责疏散的员工前往指定安全区域，否则将被采取强制措施！
E: To all guests: The IPC will be conducting special operations within the hotel. Please follow the staff in charge of evacuation to the designated safe zones, or compulsory measures will be enforced!

C: 没错！就是我，钟表小子！
E: That's right! It's-a-me, Clockie!

C: （看来他还是不打算松口……）
E: (Looks like he still doesn't want to budge an inch...)

C: 最后人们为自由而建的美梦，会反过来成为囚禁自我的牢笼。
E: ...In the end, the dreams that people built in the name of freedom became the cage that imprisoned them.

C: …黄泉小姐，换我来为你分享一个故事吧。
E: ...Miss Acheron, now it's my turn to share a story with you.

C: （「冒牌货」？原来如此，她把我的行踪带给了另一个在追踪黄泉的人。）
E: (Imposter? I see. She gave my whereabouts to someone who is tracking Acheron too.)

C: 不是什么遗嘱——我只想问你，她究竟是如何*变成*巡海游侠的。
E: Not quite. I only want to ask, how exactly did she become a Galaxy Ranger?

C: 才能和顾客一同调制出每个人人生的风味。
E: Only then can a perfect drink, crafted with the customer's life story, be created.

C: 我找齐想要的材料了。
E: I've gathered all the ingredients I need.

C: 似乎没有可以投入的东西…
E: There doesn't seem to be anything that can be put in...

C: 就这里吧，视野不错。正好可以望见他……
E: The view here is great, right? We can see everything from here...

C: …治安官先生，你多大了？
E: ...How old are you now, Mr. Officer?

C: …同伴在担心你吗？
E: ...Are your companions worried about you?

C: 可即便无人接待，二位也应静坐等候主人到来，不是么？
E: But even if there's no one to greet you, you should wait for the host, don't you agree?

C: 只要有了这些钱，我就能爬到比你更高的位置，手握比你更多的财富…我赌你不敢给我，所以，叫他过来吧。
E: With this money, I'll climb to even greater heights than you, grasp even more riches than you... I wager you won't give me this chance... which is why you should call him here.

C: …就在这堆廉价的珠宝里。
E: Piled up with these cheap baubles.

C: 不付出一点代价，怎么能骗过家族？没关系，「存护」的基石就算裂成碎片也能发挥作用，尽管效用会大打折扣，但对我来说…足够了。
E: How else would The Family be fooled if there was no price to pay? It doesn't matter — even smashed to smithereens, the Preservation's cornerstone can still be used. Its effect may be greatly diminished, but... it's enough for me.

C: …因为他们不在这里。
E: ...Because they're not here.

C: 他要的只有匹诺康尼，无论手段，不计代价…也和具体的人无关。
E: He's just after Penacony, no matter the means, no matter the price... It's not personal.

C: 即便这非你所愿。因为祂与其他星神不同。
E: Precisely because it's not what you want. Because THEY are not like other Aeons.

C: 无非是大家都走在「巡猎」的命途上，都有自己坚信的正义，都不是那么…受所谓「普世价值」的欢迎呗。
E: Everyone's on their own fated path along The Hunt, with their own resolute sense of righteousness, and not so... welcome among such so-called universal values.

C: 你是…流萤的灵魂？
E: Are you... Firefly's soul?

C: 不必为此感到负担。即便没有你体内的那颗星核，砂金也会找到其他方法达成目的。眼下就相信黄泉小姐吧。考虑到她的实力，我们应该也无需担心。
E: Don't feel burdened by this. Even without that Stellaron inside you, Aventurine would still have found other methods to accomplish his goal. Let's just believe in Miss Acheron. And given her prowess, I don't think we've got anything to worry about.

C: 咳…不知道。不过它和加拉赫的关系倒是值得深究。无论如何，我们都得找到他。
E: Uhh, no idea. But its connection to Gallagher is worth digging into. Regardless, we have to find him.

C: 别说出那名字！都怪你，它、它们来了！
E: Don't say that name! It's all your fault! Th—They're coming!

C: 想必说的是知更鸟。此刻，她也在流梦礁。
E: That must be Robin. She's also here, in Dreamflux Reef.

C: 您认识我们？
E: You know us?

C: 我很遗憾，是家族出现了背叛者，他…或者他们，舍弃了最初的信念，以「同谐」之名利用人性的弱点，将匹诺康尼变成了沉沦于虚幻美梦的「盛会之星」……
E: It's regrettable, but The Family has experienced betrayal. The traitor, or traitors abandoned their original principles and, using the name of Harmony, exploited people's weaknesses to turn Penacony into the Planet of Festivities, trapping everyone in the illusion of the sweet dream...

C: 呵呵，看来我们的小博士还有些迷茫。这样吧，孩子们，我来为你们讲一个故事。
E: Ah, I see. It seems our little scholar is still a bit unsure. Well, let me tell you youngsters a story.

C: 所以，其实鸟儿天性是不会飞的，但它们靠自身的意志做到了，对吗？
E: So, you mean, birds aren't born to fly, but they find a way to do it through their determination, right?

C: 这就是我之前所说的纪念碑，上面的名字…各位应该不陌生。
E: This is the monument I mentioned earlier. The names inscribed on it... should be familiar to all of you.

C: 我向米凯先生确认过，有关家族、「钟表匠」和那位米哈伊尔的事迹，都核验无误。
E: I double-checked with Micah, and everything he said about The Family, the Watchmaker, and Mikhail is true.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>如今的「盛会之星」，就是阿斯德纳的星核之灾啊。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In Asdana, the Planet of Festivities itself is a Stellaron disaster.</color>

C: 还记得那个「填海造陆」的比喻吧？真相是星核从来没有被封印，只是换了种形式存在于梦中。好好想想，要构筑并维持如此庞大的「美梦」，代价是什么？
E: Remember the island-in-the-ocean metaphor? The truth is, the Stellaron was never truly sealed. It existed in a different form within the Dreamscape. Think about this — what would it cost to create and maintain such a lavish dreamland?

C: 此话怎讲？
E: What do you mean by that?

C: 你们即将面对的敌人，或者说，敌人们，可不像我这条老狗这么好欺负，动一动就会自己散架……
E: The enemies you are about to face aren't like this old dog here, who can barely even bark...

C: {NICKNAME}，你身上应该带着公司使节给你的那件信物吧，可否借我一用？
E: You're still carrying the keepsake the IPC envoy gave you, right, {NICKNAME}? May I borrow it for a moment?

C: 临行前，列车长曾拜托我们在匹诺康尼打听三位无名客的消息。现在我们已经知晓了拉扎莉娜女士和铁尔南先生的事迹，只差最后一位「拉格沃克」了。
E: Before we departed, the conductor asked us to inquire about the three Nameless in Penacony. We've already collected intel about Razalina and Tiernan, so the only one left is Legwork.

C: 嗝…嗯？小姑娘，你刚才问了什么？我没听清……
E: *hiccup* Huh...? What did you just say, young lady...? I didn't quite catch that...

C: 我讨厌孤独，忍受不了无聊的生活，而这片充满乐子的梦境正适合我。
E: I can't stand being lonely or bored, so this jubilant Dreamscape is perfect for me.

C: 且不提你是怎么想的，鸡翅膀男孩，我们这位可爱的知更鸟小姐现在应该是打定主意不登台了吧？毕竟你也看到了，这座美梦在「同谐」的运作下有多难看……
E: I don't care what you're thinking, chicken wing boy, but I'm pretty sure our lovely Robin won't be appearing on stage. After all, you're well aware of what a sorry state this Dreamscape is in under the banner of Harmony...

C: 这算什么事，交给江湖智慧。
E: This is where my street smarts come into play.

C: 二位客人请息怒！我记得当时，是橡木家系的家主星期日先生亲自处理此事的。请稍等片刻，我这就去联系他。
E: Please calm down, dear guests! I do recall that Mr. Sunday, the Oak Family Head, personally handled this issue earlier. Please wait a moment while I contact him.

C: 去吧，速去速回啊。
E: Sure thing — just don't keep me waiting forever.

C: 阿斯德纳白橡木？二位应该是记错了，我们这里没有这款酒。
E: Asdana's White Oak? I think there might be a misunderstanding. We don't serve that here.

C: 以防万一，如果那忆者始终不出现，我还有个备用计划…这是最后一个了。
E: Just in case, I have a backup plan if the Memokeeper doesn't show up... this is my final backup plan, I promise.

C: 嘿嘿，其实我从知更鸟小姐的粉丝群里拿到了几张特邀门票！
