E: Heh-heh, I've already procured special invite tickets from Miss Robin's fan club!

C: 回答正确！同伴看着你在沙子里打滚，想起此行种种坎坷。她忍不住笑出声，内心的希望重新燃起，所以这位姑娘——
E: Right answer! Your companion sees you rolling about in the sand, and thinks about the arduous obstacles along this journey. She can't help but let loose a laugh, rekindling hope in her heart — and so this girl...

C: 龙啊，请将我的敌人都吞噬吧，嘎呜——！
E: O dinosaur, devour my enemies, grawwrr!

C: 好了，快去吧，哈努兄弟。但要小心，有两个坏家伙也盯上了拼图碎片…要么想办法打昏他们，要么就别被他们发现。
E: Now, scurry along, Hanu. But tread carefully – two ne'er-do-wells are also eyeing those jigsaw pieces... Either outsmart them with a quick knockout, or ensure they don't catch you in the act.

C: 我说…这剧情和台词也太随便了吧……
E: Sheesh... The logic in this plot and dialogue is really being pushed to its limits...

C: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
E: Am I... just a failed experiment?

C: 如果是我的话…应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>吧？
E: If it were me... I guess I'd choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build a cage for the little Charmony Dove</color>.

C: 「星神在上，那枚子弹直接打进了她的脖子…不过，或许是平日践行『同谐』善举的回报，子弹没有伤及命脉。等你处理完琐事，尽快给她回信为好。」
E: "By the Aeon above, the bullet struck her neck directly... Yet, possibly as a reward for her consistent deeds of Harmony, it didn't hit any vital arteries. Once you've attended to your outstanding tasks, it'd be advisable to write her back as soon as possible."

C: 所以，梦泡中的这栋建筑是你童年的「家」。
E: So, this building in the dream bubble is your childhood "home."

C: 但我想，应该不会有人有异议吧。
E: Although I don't think anyone will have any objections.

C: 总得有人站出来拯救露莎卡，小米沙，为什么不能是我？
E: Someone has to step up and save Lushaka. So, why can't it be me, Misha?

C: 我的一生都在前进，尽己所能冲破那些拦住去路的障碍。但最后，我的路也走到了尽头，身躯就像一节破破烂烂的车头，身后也没留下任何值得托付的财产……
E: I've been moving forward all my life, doing what I could to overcome the obstacles in my path. But ultimately, my journey reached its end, and I left behind no possessions worth entrusting...

C: 所以，我为各位留下一个故事，和两件礼物——
E: All I have for you is a story and two gifts...

C: 也正因如此，在接下来的对决中——他必然会全力以赴。
E: That's why he'll give it his all in the upcoming battle.

C: 米哈伊尔每次出海回来，都会把一本航海日志放在房间的书架上。这是他探索世界每一寸角落的记录。
E: Yeah, whenever he came back, he'd place a logbook on the bookshelf in his room. They contain records of his expeditions to every corner of the world.

C: 只要不停踏出向前的那一步，我一定能抵达自己想去的地方。然后，我好像就听见了……
E: He said, as long as I kept moving forward, I'd eventually reach my desired destination. And then, it was as if I heard...

C: 尽管它的定义离我还很遥远，可普通人终其一生寻找的，不也是这么一个答案吗？一个能在墓志铭里留下的…短短的名字。
E: Though its definition escapes me, isn't this the answer that ordinary people look for their whole lives? A name that can be carved onto their tombstone.

C: 真暖和啊。这死海边平时连个活物都见不着，你倒是幸运，找到了避雨的地方不说，还有新鲜浆果，真不容易。
E: It's warm here, isn't it? You're lucky to have found shelter from the rain, let alone fresh berries, in this desolate place.

C: 或许是害怕呢？
E: Or perhaps I'm just afraid?

C: 「这便是第三日与第四日。」
E: "That marked the third and fourth days."

C: 我还真怕它们突然动起来…快离开吧！求你了！
E: I'm seriously scared they might start moving... Let's just leave, please!

C: 可这位「新至的主人」…怎么感觉不是什么好东西？
E: But this New Master... seems like a bad guy to me, don't you think?

C: 而这里的氛围…也和先前两个场景完全不同了。
E: And the atmosphere here... is completely different from the previous two scenes.

C: 你醒了，{NICKNAME}。感觉如何？
E: You're awake, {NICKNAME}. How do you feel?

C: 哈哈，问得好！那当然是……
E: Haha, good question! It's...

C: 公司的格局太大了！
E: So, the IPC does see the big picture, huh?

C: 这星穹列车倒真是挺舒服的…但，我就一个小意见啊，你们列车上咋没啥*带劲的*饮料啊？
E: This Astral Express sure is comfy... but, I got one tiny problem with it. How come there ain't no potent drinks on this ride?

C: 我超厉害的！
E: Yup, I'm super-duper awesome!

C: 呵呵，看来我们终于要出发了。远方还有那么多闪耀的记忆在等待着我们…就先聊到这里吧？
E: Heh, it looks like we're finally about to set off. There are countless gleaming memories out there waiting for us... Why don't we just leave it at that for now?

C: 黑天鹅和某位悲悼伶人约定了在那里见面。听说他们最近正在筹备特别演出…我倒是不介意前去欣赏一番。
E: Black Swan has arranged to meet a Mourning Actor there. I've heard they're preparing a special performance... I wouldn't mind going to enjoy the show.

C: 其人不愿故星偏离自由的道路，意图巧借谎言让各异的命途在此延续长存。
E: He did not want his star to deviate from the path of freedom, so he intended to cleverly employ falsehoods and keep various Paths existing here for a long time.

C: 这下我总算可以松一口气了。
E: Finally, I can breathe a sigh of relief.

C: 这是什么地方？
E: What is this place?

C: 因为亲口告诉我这些的人正是你：关于那辆列车，你曾经的两位伙伴，那场止于虫灾的拓荒，你的死里逃生，与巡海游侠的相遇……
E: Because it was you who told me about the Express, your two former companions, the expedition cut short by the Swarm, your narrow escape from death, and your encounter with the Galaxy Rangers...

C: 牵住我的手，跟我来吧。我们…会离开这里。
E: Take my hand and come with me. We... will leave this place.

C: 又或者，这就是答案本身。
E: Or perhaps, such is the answer itself.

C: 错了！怎么会只有一颗呢？应该是两颗星星，不…满天的星星才对！
E: No, not just one star! We should have two stars... or maybe even more!

C: 誓以对「秩序」的渴望——
E: By the solemn desire for Order...

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>11</unbreak>系统时 流梦礁的另一边
E: <unbreak>11</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - The other side of Dreamflux Reef

C: 哼…呜呜……
E: Oink... Oink...

C: 就拿没来的那个金毛小子举例，他费了半天功夫，连自己的小命都差点搭进去了，究竟是为了什么？
E: Let's take that golden-haired guy who's not showing up for example. He put in great effort and almost got himself killed, but what was it all for?

C: 准备好再试一次了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Ready for another try, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我一转头，那人已经消失不见了。没办法，我只能把它交给附近的猎犬。听说类似的报案还有不少，在谐乐大典开幕前就有了。
E: By the time I turned around, the person had already vanished. So I handed it over to a nearby hound. I heard there were many similar reports before the Charmony Festival started.

C: 言语总是苍白的，如果要为一段往事作结，在这间酒吧里，没有比调饮更好的方式。
E: Words always fall short. If you want to bring closure to past events at this lounge, there's no better way than mixing a drink.

C: 你呢，和老奥帝先生谈过了么？
E: How about you? Have you spoken with Mr. Alfalfa?

C: 麻烦各位帮忙准备一下相应的流程了。
E: Please help me with the necessary arrangements.

C: （说起来，她说要去碰碰天才俱乐部后就消失不见了，不知道还顺利吗。）
E: (Come to think of it, she disappeared after mentioning that she was going to meet with the Genius Society. I wonder how things turned out for her.)

C: 她会因「幸运」获得无穷的财富，却再也无法将那财富用在重要之人身上。
E: She will accrue a vast wealth due to her "good luck," but she'll never be able to use it for the people who truly matter to her.

C: 我叫三月七。
E: My name is March 7th.

C: 「匹诺康尼之父」拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔，为匹诺康尼奠基的传奇无名客之一！
E: The father of Penacony, Mikhail Char Legwork, one of the legendary Nameless who laid the foundations of Penacony!

C: 我三呢？
E: Where's three?

C: 真的吗？宝了个贝的，如果你现在觉得不够刺激，我倒是不介意展示一下什么叫真正的危险和癫狂。
E: Really? Fork you. If you think this isn't intense enough, I don't mind showing you what real danger and madness look like.

C: 呀哈哈！你找到我了…呃，不是，我是说「谢谢你」啾！
E: Yahaha! So you've found me... Uh, no, I meant to say "thank you," tweet!

C: 我们都还有各自的路要走，就踏上旅途吧。希望再见时…已是天晴。
E: We both still have our own paths to walk. So let's forge ahead. Hopefully, if we meet again... it'll be beneath clear skies.

C: 虽然帕姆当时更多是在宣泄情绪…但它说的也确实没错。
E: Well, they were a little emotional at the time, but... I'm afraid that's not out of the question.

C: 两次…那岂不是已经很危险了？噫，我可不想又变回在太空中漂泊的冰块啊！
E: Only two more... Isn't that super risky? Ahh! I don't wanna become an ice cube floating around in space again!

C: 请跟随引导，稍作等候。
E: Please follow the guide and wait for a while.

C: 不管你是谁，猎犬家系正在这查案呢，麻烦绕个道……
E: I don't care who you are. The Bloodhound Family is investigating a case here. Please make way.

C: 你——啊对对对，烦人，确实烦人！但这些流程都是为了宾客们的安全，猎犬从不嫌麻烦！我们这就离开，您好好休息啊。
E: You...! Sus... sustainable! Ah, yes, sustainable! We know frequent inspections may not seem sustainable to some, but these procedures ensure a safe and secure environment for guests, so the Bloodhounds are more than happy to do so. We'll take our leave for now. Please have a good rest!

C: 这…不可能，怎会如此？
E: That's... impossible. How can it be?

C: 它们说了什么！
E: What did they say!?

C: （…看来这里的确是出口，快走吧。）
E: (...This does look like the way out. Let's go.)

C: 别这么理直气壮。
E: That's a bold declaration.

C: 什、什么？可是调律是测弦考试最重要的环节……
E: Wh—What? But tuning is the most important segment of the Tuning Test...

C: 丝蒂娜女士，在你任教的十三年零四个月里，你连续进行了七次学术造假——看来怠惰已经让你的艺术修养变成一堆废胶卷了。
E: Miss Sedina, in your thirteen years and four months of teaching, you've committed seven counts of academic fraud. It seems your laziness has turned your artistic integrity into a pile of decaying film.

C: 多谢夸奖。
E: Thanks for the compliment.

C: 怎么看出来的？
E: How do you know?

C: 怎么样？对这个结果可还满意？
E: What do you think? Are you satisfied with your result?

C: 很好，感谢你愿意听从导演的建议，不胜荣幸。
E: Very good. I'm grateful you're willing to listen to your director's suggestions. It's truly an honor.

C: 过了一会儿，丹恒和三月七也结束了考试……
E: Dan Heng and March also finish the exam after some time has passed...

C: …你确定吗？
E: ...Are you sure?

C: 好吧。
E: Alright.

C: 名字好长！
E: That's a really long name!

C: 听起来好棒，我们一起来拍吧！
E: That sounds great. Let's take some photos together!

C: 我好像知道是谁了…
E: I think I know who that is...

C: 逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
E: Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?

C: 莫奈拉介绍我来的
E: Monella referred me.

C: 对你而言，我的出现是有些突然，也称得上缺乏铺垫。换作平时，我断然无法接受这种不够精致的编排。
E: You may think that I popped up out nowhere — and yes, you can attribute that to a lack of foreshadowing. I wouldn't have approved such a sloppy sequence in usual cases.

C: 你发现房中有一只奇怪的…猴子玩偶？
E: You notice a strange... monkey doll in the room?

C: 如果罪犯真的图谋不轨，又何必来折纸大学上课呢——你只是个热爱学习的好孩子吧？
E: If the stowaway is indeed plotting something nefarious, it wouldn't make sense for them to attend classes at Paperfold University. So, I'm certain you're just an inquisitive student.

C: 我亲自招待了令尊，真可怜啊，一把年纪了，还要抛下大半辈子积蓄，来这种举目无亲的地方工作。我感受到他的疲惫和焦虑……
E: I took the time to chat with him. Looking at how old he is, my heart really went out to him. Throwing in most of his life savings, only to slog his guts out in a foreign land... I could sense his exhaustion and distress.

C: 是啊，我怎么就忘了蕉，你是个无可救药的差生，与其留着浪费教学资源，不如变成财富学院的商品，那样多少还有点价值，蕉蕉蕉。
E: Of course, bana... Why didn't I realize this sooner? You're a hopeless student. Rather than squandering our educational resources on you, why don't you become one of Fortune Academy's products? At least scrape some worth out of yourself, bana hyuk hyuk!

C: 正是。御猿•邪忍…就是「御猿•邪忍」。
E: Astute. Evil Ninja Osaru... it's definitely Evil Ninja Osaru.

C: 这就对了！上课地点在摄影教室，我们一会儿见。
E: That's the way! We'll be at the photography studio. See you later.

C: 挑衅地爆粗
E: Provoke with swear words

C: 唉，不及格！不及格！不及格！芮克先生，停止拍摄吧，他们根本没有扮演小猴的天份蕉！
E: Ugh. Fail! Fail! Fail! Stop filming, Mr. Reca. None of them are cut out for portraying our beloved monkeys, bana!

C: 恭喜各位同学，你们马上就能成为合格的演员了，感谢睡蕉小猴吧——
E: Congratulations, students! Thanks to Slumbernana Monkey, you'll soon be qualified actors!

C: 他们无一例外都变得非常幸福，看起来真令人羡慕。
E: Every single one of them looked like they were in a state of absolute bliss. I want to feel like that too.

C: 不是吧…蒙塔娜，你还没搞清楚情况吗？你身后那是个坏家伙啊！
E: Gosh... Montana! Don't you see what's going on? The bad guy's the one behind you!

C: 但扣动扳机的力量…偏偏来自心灵，而非血肉之躯。现在，他不过是个孩子，偏偏就不懂如何开出这一枪。
E: But it just so happens that the decision to pull the trigger has to be made by his soul rather than his body. The child version of him now is completely incapable of firing his own gun.

C: 模因刻录要开始了。赶紧离开吧，不然我们也会受到影响。
E: Memetic etching is about to begin. Let's get out of here! Or we'll get affected as well.

C: 弟子在。
E: Yes, Master.

C: 人死了就没法复仇了。想踏上「巡猎」？妹子，这可是条不归路啊！
E: You want to go on The Hunt? Know that this is a road of no return!

C: 邪忍要在此处布下阵法，用大师交给在下的忍•科学，为即将到来的忍侠铺平道路吧！
E: The Evil Ninja is about to set a matrix here. Using the ninja tech left to me by Master, I shall pave the way for those Ninja Heroes that are soon to arrive!

C: 飞龙•忍者，{NICKNAME}•忍者。拜托两位同行，和在下一同终结邪祟•总长的颠倒•梦想吧！
E: Ninja Hiryū, Ninja {NICKNAME}, I'm counting on the two of you to aid me in ending the Fiendling Chief's reversed dream!

C: 是吗？看来你们的学习生涯没那么悠闲啊。没关系，比起平凡的生活，意外才是青春中最难忘的事情。
E: Is that so? Sounds like student life wasn't boring after all. Look on the bright side — sometimes the most memorable things are the accidents of our youth.

C: 自相矛盾，强词夺理，只为自己的欲望。这种课根本没有听的必要——
E: You're self-contradictory and unreasonable, only striving to further your own agenda. There's no need to listen to such lessons!

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: 「心中至深恐惧之物」…那男人最畏惧的，竟是这副景色？
E: "The greatest fear in the depths of a warrior's heart," huh? ...So, this is what he fears the most?

C: 「宁战死，毋荣归」——悬锋精神将永远捍卫我！
E: "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." May the Kremnoan spirit always watch over me!

C: 呵…听起来算不得坏事。这倒意味着，我们定能在这里找到白厄了。
E: Hmm... That doesn't exactly sound like a bad thing. At least it means that we'll be able to find Phainon here.

C: 那…明天见？祝两位明天和好如初……
E: Uh... See you tomorrow? I hope you two patch things up soon...

C: 嗯，明天见。也祝你生意兴隆。
E: See you tomorrow. May the winds of fortune bless you.

C: 愿这条浪漫之路，能为奥赫玛带去佳音。
E: May this romantic path bring good tidings to Okhema.

C: 阿那克…那刻…哎，算了，还是叫你那刻夏吧。现在，你能回答……
E: Anaxago... Anax... Ugh, I'll just stick to Anaxa. Now, can you tell me—

C: 好个猴急的孩子…着急可吃不得热燕麦粥哪。
E: What an impatient child... Don't you know that haste makes waste?

C: …咳咳，不对，串台了，这里是翁法罗斯，不是《开拓豪侠传》。那么，水车动了么？
E: Oops, wrong channel, this is Amphoreus, not the Legend of the Trailblazer. So, did the waterwheel move?

C: 眼下，吾仅想借此机会，验验汝二人成色如何。怎样，足够真诚了么？
E: I'm simply making use of this opportunity to see what you two are made of. So, is that truthful enough for you?

C: {NICKNAME}，眼下我们利益一致，还是先依她指示行事吧。况且，她知道我的过去…虽然不便展开，但她有理由忌惮我。
E: {NICKNAME}, since our interests are aligned right now, it's better for us to do as she says. Besides, she knows about my past... Even though I'm not able to elaborate much, I can tell you that she has reasons to fear me.

C: 缇安大人？…等等，还有迷迷，她们俩跑哪去了？
E: Lady Trianne? ...And even Mem? Where have they disappeared to?

C: 那就…拜托大家了…！
E: I'll... leave it in your capable hands...!

C: 「死亡」的气息…愈发浓烈了。
E: The smell of Death... is becoming more and more intense.

C: 才、才不是…这是人家表达歉意的甜美舞蹈…！
E: N—No... This is a sweet little dance to express my apologies...!

C: 既然话已说到这个份上…我问你，是谁杀死了父亲？
E: Since you've brought that up... Tell me, who is responsible for my father's death?

C: …全副武装扎进高温浴池，这是什么新风尚吗？
E: ...Is this the latest trend now? Getting into the baths while dressed in full armor?

C: 呵…因为实在没什么可说的。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，因为战火，早就不复存在了。
E: Well... It's because there isn't much to say. Aedes Elysiae is simply a tiny village that disappeared many years ago in the flames of war.

C: 卡林尼库斯…他虽是一名学者，但每次回来探望我的时候，都会向我讨教武艺。可笑吗？一名黄金裔，竟向我这样的普通人学艺。
E: You know, Callinicus... Even though he was a scholar, he'd always ask me to teach him how to fight whenever he came back. Isn't it funny that a Chrysos Heir like him wants to learn from an ordinary person like me?

C: 怎么啦，年轻人，怎么不说话？总不能是我的女儿们，真闯祸了吧？
E: What's the matter, young one? Why so quiet? Did my daughters really get into some trouble?

C: 这么说来，在涡心时似乎也…
E: Now that you mention it, I think the same thing happened in the Vortex...

C: 我们想得到你，还有悬锋族人的信任。我想，最好的办法…就是带你亲眼见证<color=#dbc291ff>预言的源头</color>。
E: We wish to earn your trust, and those of the Kremnoans. I think the best way to do that... is to take you to witness the <color=#dbc291ff>source of the prophecy</color> for yourself.

C: 如此，纷争的子民便能够还乡，拥抱传统——即便他们中的大多数人只在史诗中听闻过那「传统」——然后，他们便能围绕在王的身旁，投身战场。
E: The children of Strife would then be able to go home and embrace the old traditions — never mind that most of them have only ever been heard in these so-called "traditions" in song. They would then gather around their king and throw themselves into battle.

C: 听起来是个美梦呢。
E: Well that sounds like a lovely dream.

C: 那山就像活着似的，一直在向小岛靠近。后来我才发现，那根本不是山，是很高很高的海浪…海浪拍在小岛上，像是要把它吃掉。小动物们想把它赶走，但根本拦不住……
E: The mountain looked alive, and it kept getting closer to the island. Then I realized that it wasn't a mountain, but a very, very tall wave made of water... When the wave smashed against the island, it looked like it was going to eat the island up. The small animals tried to chase it away, but they couldn't stop it...

C: 就像平日那样，来玩「捉迷藏」，好不好？缇里西庇俄丝的脑瓜最聪明了，你肯定记得大家都躲在哪里。
E: Let's play hide-and-seek just like we used to, okay? My Tribios is the smartest girl. I'm sure you remember where everyone is hiding.

C: 很久以后，会有许多勇敢的战士登上这艘船。他们武艺高强，不畏艰险。
E: Many years later, many brave warriors will board this ship. They are skilled combatants who fear no danger.

C: 不对劲…缇宝，你有没有觉得，神殿有些太安静了？
E: Something feels off... Tribbie, don't you think the temple is a little too quiet?

C: 你们再不赶来，这泰坦怕是要牺牲我了。
E: Any later, and I fear the Titan would have sacrificed me.

C: 他拿走了山之民囤积的宝石，找拉冬人交换了大量火药。但不是为了抗击坎帕人——趁着夜色，他点燃聚落周围的山林，逼迫所有人逃出了山野。
E: He took the Mountain Dwellers' store of gemstones and traded them with the Ladonians for a massive amount of gunpowder — but he didn't do this to fight the Campanians. Under the cover of night, he set ablaze the forests surrounding the settlement, forcing his people to flee the mountain.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"One day, you shall die with a wound in your back."</color>

C: …没了你我们可怎么办啊，呜呜呜。
E: *sob* ...What are we going to do without you?

C: 但哈托努斯，请你继续关照白厄。我有一种预感，也许他的命运…比我们所有人加起来都更沉重。
E: Nevertheless, I must request that you continue to watch over Phainon, Chartonus. I have a feeling that his fate... will weigh heavier than all of ours combined.

C: 也对…你一直是我们当中最乐观的那个。
E: That's a valid point... You have always been the most optimistic one among us.

C: 迈德漠斯！你刚训练回来吗？
E: Mydeimos! Did you just come back from training?

C: 不记得了。但应该是*我们*那十年间的发明创造吧。
E: That doesn't ring a bell. It should be something we invented during those ten years.

C: 要怎么做，运用{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量么？
E: But how? With {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' power?

C: 来来，吃些甜饼吧！她以前很喜欢我做的点心，或许你和她口味相仿呢。
E: Here, have some of my sweet pastries. She used to enjoy them, so maybe you'll like them too.

C: 无妨。我的双手不为挥舞枪矛而生，而双足生来便要为众生奔走。
E: No matter. My hands are not made for bearing arms, but my feet are destined to embark on a journey for the benefit of all.

C: 我想……
E: I think...

C: 即便世界已经成了如今摇摇欲坠的样子，大家也仍然拼尽全力，想要走得更远，走向明天。
E: Even as the world teeters on the brink of collapse, everyone is pressing forward, longing to reach farther and move toward tomorrow.

C: 当然记得啊！
E: You bet I do!

C: 此刻，在另一边，圣杯战争的举办人正饶有兴致地观赏着广告……
E: At the same time, the host of the Holy Grail War is sitting elsewhere watching the advert with interest...

C: 别怪我多嘴，奥帝先生…我当然很高兴得到您的赏识，但说到底，我只是一个微不足道的小角色，还是公司的小角色。听说您一直很不待见公司，不是吗？所以，为什么选我？
E: Don't get me wrong, Mr. Oti... I'm honored you picked me, but I'm just a nobody, a bottom-tier cog in the IPC. And if the rumors are true, you're not exactly a fan of the IPC. So why me?

C: 行了，该准备准备了。接下来要按请柬的指示「召唤英灵」了。回见！
E: Alright, time to get prepped. Up next, per the invite's instructions... summoning a Heroic Spirit. See ya!

C: 唉…放心吧，奥帝先生，别说一个小小的波提欧了，只要陷阱和计谋准备得充分，就算是路易斯•弗莱明也不过是待宰羔羊！
E: Heh... Don't worry, Mr. Oti. Forget a small fry like Boothill. If the traps are set right and the schemes are airtight, even Louis Fleming wouldn't be able to escape!

C: 又是哪位乘客乱扔的垃圾？等我抓到他，一定要让他罚抄一百遍列车卫生守则！
E: Who the heck keeps tossing garbage around? The next passenger Pom-Pom catches littering is going to have to write down the train's sanitation rules, a hundred times!

C: 啧，真是伦常颠倒！星穹列车上的动物竟然也能获得参赛资格……？
E: Tsk, the world's turned upside down... Even the animals on the Astral Express can enter this tournament!?

C: 没错，御主。那是一位……
E: That's right, Master. Their Servant is...

C: 够了，奥帝。过时的比喻就像隔夜餐点让我作呕。我已经履行了约定，到你了。
E: Enough, Oti. Outdated metaphors are as revolting as last night's leftovers. I've kept my promise. Now it's your turn.

C: 其实，我没有上过学…
E: Actually, I never went to school...

C: 我很自由。
E: I'm totally free.

C: 我梦见自己参与了圣杯战争。
E: I dreamt that I was part of the Holy Grail War.

C: 不，王的身边有比他更英勇的骑士，他们的名字都没能流传下去。
E: No. There were knights more courageous than him by his side, but their names didn't survive in time.

C: 月度经费审批。
E: Monthly Budget Review.

C: ……那么，我将拭目以待。
E: ...I will wait and see.

C: 你以为自己很特别吗？那些比你更优秀的无名客…铁尔南也好，凯勒贝克也罢，他们全都被黑暗的深空吞没，再也没有回来！
E: Do you think you're special? Think of Tiernan and Kelbeck... The Nameless who were better than you... they were all consumed by the lightless outer space, never to return!

C: 所以，你终于承认，我是一个无名客了？
E: So you'll finally admit... that I'm a Nameless?

C: 我还记得每当我唱歌时，粗鲁的囚犯就会安静下来，哭闹的孩子们停止啜泣开始微笑。因为这些微不足道的事情，即便在铁牢里，我仍然感觉自己是自由的。
E: Because... I still remember how the rough prisoners fell silent, and the crying children smiled whenever I started to sing. Those small moments made me feel free even in that iron cage.

C: 「黄金的时刻」要看我的脸色给商品定价，「蓝调的时刻」为我制定匹诺康尼的时尚潮流。
E: The Golden Hour will set the prices for goods based on my desires, and the Blue Hour will craft Penaconian fashion based on my whims.

C: 还有还有，{NICKNAME}总是拉着三月七乘客一起胡闹，现在，就连帕姆最看好的丹恒乘客，都快被带坏了。
E: And! And! {NICKNAME} is always dragging March 7th into trouble. Pom-Pom had such high hopes for Dan Heng, but even he's started to follow along now.

C: 《美梦与圣杯战争》，寰宇各大娱乐频道火热上映中！
E: Sweet Dreams and the Holy Grail War, now airing across entertainment channels throughout the universe!

C: 我被关进这个房间了！
E: I'm locked inside this room!

C: 对，踢一脚。
E: Yes. Kick once.

C: 万一这也是斯科特的阴谋呢？如果邪恶的他只是在我的身体里沉睡了，随时准备醒来……
E: Then I thought... what if this is all part of Skott's plan? What if the evil side of him is lying in wait within me, ready to spring to action at any moment...

C: 滴答，以为我会乖乖陪你们玩勇者游戏？葛瑞迪先生给了我一颗必中的作弊子弹，只要扣下扳机，这场戏里台词最多的御主就会当场报废。
E: Tick-tock, thought I'd just play along in your little hero fantasy? Mr. Grady gave me a special bullet that never misses. One pull of this trigger, and the Master with the most dialogue will drop dead on the spot.

C: 滴答，我是你灵魂的主治医师。
E: Tick-tock, I am the chief physician of your soul.

C: 一个死了几百年的烂片导演，能让战略投资部的大人物看上？感谢你的安慰，但你显然不太会撒谎。
E: A director of flops from centuries ago catching the eye of a big shot from the Strategic Investment Department? Thanks for the compliment, but that was a pretty bad lie from you.

C: 考虑到这趟旅程的特殊性，不妨多做些准备。在正式决定前，我也会尝试从列车的盟友那里打听翁法罗斯的消息。
E: Seeing as how this is going to be an unusual adventure, it'd be good for us to take some time out to make preparations for the journey. Meanwhile, I'll see if I can find out more about Amphoreus from our allies before we depart.

C: 所以消息是真是假？前阵子的动静真是橡木家系出了问题？
E: Are the stories going around true? Was the furor that broke out a while ago really a result of trouble within the Oak Family?

C: 应该说是人祸…我们遇见一位皮皮西人，说自己在录不要笑挑战——请我们尝一种吃了就会大笑的糖。
E: Actually it's more like it was someone's fault... We met a Pepeshi filming a try-not-to-laugh challenge, and he gave us some of his candy. A type of candy that's supposed to make you fall over laughing.

C: 杨叔，这位是？
E: Mr. Yang, who's this?

C: 「你也可以证明自己是个例外。那同样是我乐见的结果。」
E: "You may also prove yourself to be the exception. I would also be pleased with that result."

C: 「而经由这条道路——」
E: "And only by walking this path—"

C: 呃…是因为能给第三只眼睛用吗？
E: Uhm, did you pick that because of her third eye?

C: 是呀。
E: Exactly.

C: 你拥有一份类似的记忆。
E: You have a similar memory.

C: 看来今天，我们都受好运眷顾。
E: It seems we've been blessed with good fortune today.

C: 但他也因此和列车告别，一生都再没有走向群星。
E: And because of that, he bid farewell to the Express and never walked among the stars again in his lifetime.

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 这期间，我会看好他的。
E: I'll keep a close eye on him in the meantime.

C: 列车要变永动机了？
E: The Express can soon achieve perpetual motion?

C: 返航！下一站，露莎卡星！
E: We're turning back! Next stop: Lushaka!

C: 鬼…压床了？
E: Are you... possessed?

C: 具体不得而知，可能只是时间早晚。
E: There's no way to tell at this point. It could just be a matter of time before everyone feels unwell.

C: 向着「永恒之地」——出发吧！
E: Go ahead and journey into The Eternal Land!

C: 好好好，我明白了……
E: Mm, alright, alright. I get it...

C: 要想见到机器头，算力至少得匹配上。每秒执行的浮点运算达不到个几万垓次，祂压根就感受不到你的存在。
E: We're going to need out-of-this-world computing capability if we hope to meet Droidhead. If we can't churn out calculations faster than a yottaFLOPS computer, then we can forget about having THEM notice our existence.

C: 「人格映射模块」…已关闭。奇怪，这项参数应该是默认打开的才对吧？
E: The "Replica Personality Module"... is off. That can't be. This parameter is set to be enabled by default.

C: 黑塔女士！那些声音，又出现了！
E: Madam Herta! We're hearing those voices again!

C: 唔…我们睡了多久？
E: Ugh... How long were we out for?

C: 什么动静？！
E: What's that sound!?

C: 不，我绝对不同意……
E: No, I will never agree to that...

C: 啊，抱歉……
E: Oh, I'm sorry...

C: 既然风波已经平息，我们想先完成一项使命：在此地留下「开拓」的信标。
E: We'd like to get back to our mission now that the situation has calmed down. We want to lay down a beacon of the Trailblaze here.

C: 不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
E: Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.

C: 你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
E: You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.

C: 泰坦，真神奇啊…
E: Titans are really capable of anything...

C: 轻轻地触摸它的脑袋。
E: Gently pat it on the head.

C: 呜嗡嗡…嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhh... Grumphhh!

C: 那个给我们拍照的达米亚诺斯…一定是他。他当时点开了相册，看见了三月七以前拍的照片。
E: That Damionis guy who took a photo for us... It must be him! He must have opened the album and saw the photos that March 7th previously took.

C: 要来不及了……
E: We're running out of time...

C: 那是，缇宝的姐妹……
E: Isn't that Tribbie's sister...

C: 古老的「海洋」祭司发现了那里，他们用灵水修建障壁，避免其遭受外物的侵扰，但同时也留下了一条通路。
E: When the ancient Ocean Priests discovered that place, they used spirit water to build a barrier in order to prevent the site from being disturbed by external forces. However, they also left behind a passageway.

C: 任务完成，缇宝应你们的呼唤而来，将你们带回了奥赫玛。
E: As the mission has been completed, Tribbie arrives per your summons and brings you back to Okhema.

C: 毕竟我们也救下了一位公民的性命。
E: After all, we still saved a citizen's life.

C: 玩笑并不能掩藏你的真心。机会稍纵即逝，你已经浪费了一次。
E: Jokes cannot conceal your true intentions. Opportunities are fleeting and you've just wasted one.

C: 只要凑近一些，侧耳倾听，就能捕获虚空中响起的只言片语。
E: Move closer, listen carefully, and you may just catch the whispers echoing in the void.

C: 然后便是「黄金战争」…那场战役背靠神明，却让凡人流尽了鲜血，众多英雄在此期间陨落。
E: Then came the Chrysos War... A conflict backed by the gods, yet one that brought much bloodshed and claimed many heroes.

C: 不过，我总觉得水面下还隐藏了什么…就连黄金裔内部，也不是我们想象的那么团结。
E: But I feel that there's more to everything than meets the eye... Even the Chrysos Heirs themselves aren't as unified as we imagined.

C: 所以将计就计，我索性将「流放」改成了「处刑」，用最极端的情境测量那两人的意志。
E: Therefore, I took advantage of the situation and changed the threat from "banishment" to "execution," to see if the two could remain firm under the most extreme pressure.

C: 嗯…什么声音？
E: Mmm... What's that sound?

C: 小白，小敌，还有…新来的小灰，准备好出发了吗？
E: Snowy, De, and newbie Little Gray, are you all ready?

C: 给我说说这吧。
E: Tell me about this one.

C: 那我呢？
E: What about me?

C: 等等，这里真壮观…
E: Hold on, this view is incredible...

C: 没错。也许等你赶到时，它已经是我手里的尸体了。
E: That's right. But by the time you arrive, he might already have fallen by my hand.

C: 虽然不认可这种行为。但情况特殊，借用一次吧。
E: I don't normally approve of this, but given the circumstances, let's use it this one time.

C: 就像眼前的道路，尽管残破不堪，但一定会通向终点。
E: Just like the path ahead, even though it's completely dilapidated, it will still lead us to our final destination.

C: 我也走神了…
E: I wasn't paying attention either...

C: 现在，想办法把断裂的路面铺平。
E: We need to find a solution to mend the broken path.

C: 但今天过后，它们就只能永远沉睡了。
E: But after today, they'll be slumbering here forever.

C: 求翻译。
E: We need a translation for that.

C: 抱歉——假如你不愿帮助我们——那悲伤和消亡就会变成世上仅剩的东西！
E: Forgive me, but if you refuse to help us, then despair and demise will be all that's left on this world!

C: 「天秤即是入口…天秤即是考验。」
E: "The scales are as much an entrance... as they are a challenge."

C: 比「世界的命运」更沉重的东西？这题面真令人迷惑。
E: Something that has more weight than the fate of the world? That's a baffling riddle.

C: 你一个箭步跳到了天秤的托盘上……
E: You dexterously leap onto the scale's tray...

C: 你是？我是…是谁？
E: You are? I am... Who?

C: 告别。时间，还有。
E: Farewell. Time, there is.

C: 真是值得期待的一天。两个人——不再是共犯，只是在银河间漂泊的两个灵魂——普普通通地相见，普普通通地相识……
E: A day worth waiting for. Two people — no longer accomplices, just two drifting souls in the cosmos — meeting and getting to know each other in the most ordinary way...

C: 但你终会与我重逢，那也就意味着…我会失而复得。
E: But in the end, we will meet again, which also means... I'll always get you back.

C: 浮黎？刚才？
E: Fuli? Just now?

C: 和我一起——点燃大海。
E: Together, we shall... set the seas ablaze.

C: 放心，即便没有他们的情报，我也已探查到城底的暗流。不过是些小小的麻烦，我能亲自解决。
E: Don't worry. Even without their intel, I've already detected hidden currents within the city. A trivial issue, nothing I can't handle on my own.

C: （对，就是它！谢谢你，姐姐……）
E: (Yes! That's it! Thank you, big sis!)

C: 等等，{NICKNAME}阁下，最好先别去那边……
E: Please wait, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. It's best not to go there yet...

C: 还是先在附近收集下线索吧。
E: Let's try to find more clues around here first.

C: 引导我们吧，让我们看见你曾看见的，听到你曾听到的……
E: I ask for you to guide us. Let us see what you once gazed upon, let us hear what your ears once heard...

C: 那庸王欧利庞，他试图剥离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性，并以精心打造的容器永久贮存。
E: King Eurypon wanted to strip {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} of their divinity and seal it within an intricate vessel for all eternity.

C: 历史走上了错误的轨道…需要修正。
E: History has taken a wrong turn... and must be set on the right course once more.

C: 「以此为证：它从未在战场上退缩过一步。」
E: "A testament that they have never once retreated from a battle."

C: 记住——<color=#dbc291ff>我是这世间必要的伤痕！</color>
E: Remember this: <color=#dbc291ff>I am the scar that this world needs!</color>

C: 嗯，甚至没法给三月发消息，让她替你清下每日任务。
E: It's a pity we can't send March a message, so she can help you finish your dailies.

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯的人生就像一出讽刺剧。他身为黄金裔，却拒绝聆听神谕；他不敬神明……
E: Anaxagoras' life is almost like a satire: as a Chrysos Heir, he refuses to heed the prophecy, while he disrespects the gods...

C: 第一次带你进入创世涡心的光景还历历在目。那时我无论如何也想不到，一位天外来客会肩负起翁法罗斯的命运。
E: I can still vividly recall when you entered the Vortex of Genesis for the first time. At that time, I could never have imagined that a guest from beyond the sky would shoulder the fate of Amphoreus.

C: 你的母亲…是谁？
E: Who is... your mother?

C: 所以，我的超能力是什么？
E: So... what's my superpower?

C: 抱歉，暂时还没有…也许是我高估了自己的能力。
E: My apologies, not as of yet... Perhaps I have overestimated my capabilities.

C: 啊呀…本以为你有何奇谋，不成想是从一座牢笼进到另一座来了哪。
E: Alas... I had hoped for a brilliant plan from you, but it turns out you just left one cage to enter another.

C: 真分不清你是在夸赞还是贬低自己。我很好奇，理性之泰坦学过修辞吗？
E: I really can't tell whether you are praising or demeaning yourself. Now I'm quite curious whether the Reason Titan has studied figures of speech before?

C: 答案就在其中。如果你连这都想不明白，不妨把「理性」的权柄让渡给我吧，留着也是浪费。
E: The answer lies within my tale. If even you cannot understand it, perhaps you should relinquish the divinity of Reason to me? After all, it'd be a waste for you to hold onto it.

C: 果不其然，为吾留了陷阱哪……
E: As expected, you laid a trap for me to step into...

C: 感谢理解。我不过一介孱弱书生，闻不惯铜臭和鲜血的味道。
E: Thank you for understanding. I am but a feeble scholar who is not used to the stench of avarice and blood.

C: 不说我的事了。卡厄斯之前回应过你么？
E: Enough about me. Did Khaos ever reply to you?

C: 欸？阁下竟然有这种兴趣吗，那你应该…很喜欢奥赫玛的氛围。
E: Hm? You're interested in that? Well, you'll feel right at home in Okhema then.

C: 我…不可能这么做。
E: ...I'll never do that.

C: 这是假的。
E: This is the wrong one.

C: 啊这，她说她不知道。
E: Hmm, so. She says she doesn't know.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈——「蜗居公主」的雅号，果然名不虚传——！
E: Hahaha! No wonder they call you Princess Homebody!

C: 阿格莱雅已经替我付过了。
E: Aglaea has already paid for me.

C: 看来对「暂停逐火之旅」的全民表决已经开始了…好多人。
E: The streets are packed... It seems the vote to pause the Flame-Chase Journey has begun.

C: 那个拒绝死亡的孩子——我在这里发现了他的足迹哪？
E: It's about that boy who defied death... I found traces of him here.

C: 实在抱歉，此次出征容不得半分疏忽，未能抽身迎接，还请见谅。
E: Since the current campaign requires the utmost care, I wasn't able to make time to welcome all of you. Please, forgive me.

C: 听着怪怪的…算了，都交给人家吧！
E: That sounds so weird... Forget it. Just leave it to me!

C: 不会有遗憾的……
E: There won't be any regrets...

C: 掌控…你能掌控之事。待那无可逃避的命运降临时……
E: Control what little you can. And when fate's inescapable grasp comes...

C: 对不起，出于一些原因，我的记忆中没能留下你的身影。但在许多人的帮助下，我终于得以拾起那些旧日的碎片……
E: I'm sorry I wasn't able to remember you, but with the help of many people, I was finally able to pick up these broken fragments of my past...

C: 我们…不会要钻进蛋里吧…
E: Uh... We won't have to go into an egg, right?

C: 扯谎！如果这么恐怖的敌人近在眼前，奥赫玛岂能继续享受眼前的和平？
E: Lies! If such a powerful enemy is indeed approaching, why is Okhema still a picture of peace?

C: 截至目前，「继续逐火之旅」者与「暂停逐火之旅」者，双方民意在{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天平上……
E: At the present time, on the scales of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, those who call for the continuation of the Flame-Chase Journey and those who demand its suspension...

C: 你知道吗，阁下？这片花海，此地的每一朵鲜花，都由塞纳托斯亲手栽下。它们本来无生无灭，但在冥河带来的第一场雨中，它们获得新生，承载着无数灵魂发荣滋长……
E: Did you know? Every flower here was planted by Thanatos themself. These flowers were originally both lifeless and immortal, but in the first rain brought by the River of Souls, they were given new life, flourishing as the bearers of countless souls...

C: 我来了，人间。
E: Hello again, mortal realm.

C: 那个人就是你，刻法勒之子——这也便是「负世之泰坦」的含义。
E: That person is you, child of Kephale. This is what it means to be the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 说，什么问题？我们搞不好在想同一件事。
E: What is it? Maybe we're thinking of the same thing.

C: 希望您有所收获。
E: May your journey yield good results.

C: 在终极协议划定的范围内，我有<unbreak>178244</unbreak>条可被用于说服您的逻辑链。
E: Within the scope of the ultimate protocol, there are <unbreak>178,244</unbreak> logic chains at my disposal to convince you.

C: 况且，你我都明白卡厄斯的为人：身为救世主，他绝不会如此轻易倒下，更不会抛下他记念的一切，不是么？
E: And besides, we both know Khaos' nature. A Deliverer like him wouldn't fall so readily, much less give up on all that he holds dear, isn't that so?

C: 「光辉灿烂的众神曾行于我们所行之道，」
E: "Splendid gods once walked the paths we walk."

C: 不多想了，走吧。
E: Enough musing for now. It's time to move.

C: 对。<color=#dbc291ff>在黑潮入侵时，老师前往启蒙王座的真正目的…是打算施行炼成，将自身与泰坦的火种熔合。</color>
E: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>When the black tide came, the true reason Anaxa headed to the Luminary Throne was... to transmute and fuse himself with the Titan's Coreflame.</color>

C: 第二，为什么我会这么说？刚才已经解释过，答案就藏在那场死亡之旅中。
E: The reason I say this is as I've mentioned earlier: The answer was hidden in my journey unto death.

C: 如果我们成功取回并归还{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，而无人通过那死亡之泰坦的试炼，会发生什么？
E: If we successfully retrieve and return {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame without anyone passing the Death Titan's trial, what would happen next?

C: 灾厄三泰坦消殒后，逐火之旅必须到此结束！
E: After the destruction of the Three Titans of Calamity, the Flame-Chase Journey will have to end!

C: 元老院议员们发出*议论纷纷的讨论声*。
E: The members of the Council of Elders are discussing fervently.

C: 我祈祷泰坦宽恕这些趾高气扬、自命不凡的英雄。
E: O Titans, please forgive these arrogant and self-conceited heroes.

C: 嗯？
E: Oh?

C: 真是可笑…明明我本就时日无多了，却也惧怕迎接死亡……
E: How absurd... My time is almost up, but I'm still afraid to welcome death...

C: 在迎战{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}前，我们也将它从石像里解放了出来……
E: Before we fought {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, we also released it from the stone statue...

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈！看啊，你们都看到了吗——这迂腐的家伙，她是个多会引人发笑的虚伪之徒哪！
E: Hahaha! Take a good look at this pathetic fool! Do you see it? What a laughable hypocrite!

C: ——你刚刚已经给自己判了死刑，我们要做的事不过是顺水推舟而已。
E: — You've already sentenced yourself. All we're doing is following through.

C: 届时，再让我好生嘲谑人子那被先祖叛卖的宿命吧。
E: When that time comes, I'll take pleasure in mocking these mortal children on how their progenitress sold their unborn lives.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人！无论现在你是否能听到，我都想把心中所想对你述说。
E: Lady Seliose! I want to tell you this! Doesn't matter if you can hear me or not!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这个在末世中砥砺奋进的族类，值得拥有第二次机会——我们配得上一个崭新的黎明！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Our people, forging through the trials of the end times, deserve a second chance — we are worthy of a new dawn!</color>

C: 那里一定还有路可走！
E: There's got to be a path!

C: 就快到了。终点就在前方，只需要一道彩虹桥……
E: We're almost there. The end is just ahead. All we need is a rainbow bridge...

C: 我来劈落，虚假的太阳！
E: I shall strike down the false sun!

C: （咳，冷静，赛法利娅…你得保持冷静。）
E: (Ahem, calm down, Cifera... Just breathe.)

C: …逐火之旅的威胁，也就只剩下一个了。
E: ...the Flame-Chase Journey is down to its final threat.

C: 那么…就由本姑娘来会会你吧？
E: Alright then... Guess it's my turn to see what you've got!

C: *他们都说，我是注定要归还刻法勒的火种，然后在新世界背负天地的大英雄……*
E: They say I'm destined to return Kephale's Coreflame and carry the weight of a new world on my shoulders...

C: 阿格莱雅…你看到了吗？
E: Aglaea... did you see that?

C: 这是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by that?

C: 嘿…这么一想，心情还真是舒畅多了呀。
E: Heh... now that I think about it, I feel much better.

C: 不要被外界的喧杂影响，集中于你脑海中的关键词……
E: Don't be influenced by the noise outside, just focus on the keyword in your mind...
...Huh?

C: 哈哈，这下套出你的秘密了！
E: Nice! Now I know your secret!

C: 承蒙您的信任，我定会谨慎再三。
E: You honor me with your trust. I will be very careful.

C: 您会如此发问，是打算拒绝我的提议，继续站在黄金裔一边吗？
E: Are you asking this because you plan to refuse my offer and continue supporting the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 这个我知道，靠做梦。
E: I know how. In your dreams.

C: 应该带着批判的眼光看待…
E: It should be approached with a critical eye...

C: 得设计一套迷迷专用牌。
E: Then, gotta craft a Mem-specific deck.

C: 嘿…缇宝老师也会忘记事情吗？
E: Heh... Even Lady Tribbie forgets things...

C: 人性将尽？呵，阿格莱雅，你不妨用你那引以为傲的金线读读我的想法，看看我们精心给你准备的礼物，能不能让一尊冰冷的半神动容？
E: Humanity fading? Ha, Aglaea, why not use your precious golden thread to peer into my thoughts? See if the gift we've so meticulously prepared for you can move that cold demigod heart of yours.

C: …话说回来，这破地方…怎么到处都是水啊？湿漉漉、冰冰凉，讨厌，难受，不喜欢……
E: Anyway... What's with all this water? It's damp, cold, and miserable here. I hate it...

C: 所以，干脆就由你在前面扛着吧？我负责在边上补补刀就行了~
E: So, how about you take the front? I'll attack from the side.
...Huh?

C: …啊对，想起来了，我是跟你说过。也没什么大不了的嘛，就是混进了一群神神叨叨的祭司里，天天看着他们在那块发光的大石头前边装神弄鬼。
E: ...Ah, right, I did tell you. It wasn't a big deal. I just snuck in with a bunch of mumbling priests and watched them do their spooky rituals around some glowing rock.

C: 我们…现在该怎么办？
E: What should we do now?

C: 白厄，我想让你明白——在你热忱地追逐「纷争」，以为那才是你应当投身的命运时——从始至终，我的想法从未改变：
E: Phainon, while you zealously pursued "Strife," believing it to be your destined path — from the very beginning, my thoughts have never changed.

C: 嗯哼……
E: Uh-huh...

C: 根据树庭的讲义规范，授课教师在最后一个课时的结尾，应当「与学生畅谈卒业后之理想，引导学生走上妥实之道路。」
E: According to the Grove's protocols for a cohort's final class, the lecturer should take some time in that lesson to "discuss the students' post-graduation aspirations with them and guide them toward a solid path."

C: 您是克里斯普斯阁下，对吗？我在族谱上读到过您的故事。听说您曾是一位正直的裁判官，为许多遭受诬告的公民洗刷了冤屈。
E: You are Lord Crispus, aren't you? I've read your story in our family tree. You were a righteous judge who vindicated many who were wrongfully accused.

C: 你说自己来自昏光庭院？也就是说……
E: So you're from the Twilight Courtyard? Does that mean...

C: 她一路过关斩将走到了悬锋祭典的最后，只差一步就能为天空之子赢得和平誓约。但…她最终还是败于当时的督战勇士之手。
E: She fought her way through every challenge and reached the final stage of the Kremnos Festival. She was just one step away from securing a peace treaty for the Skyfolk, but... was ultimately defeated by the champion warrior of that time.

C: 交给岁月的半神吧。
E: Leave it to the demigod of time.

C: 还不知道如何启动这个装置，先去聆听先祖们的对话吧。
E: We still don't know how to turn on this device. Let's hear what the ancestors have to say first.

C: 艾格勒不喜欢阴雨吗…总觉得不可思议，但先把这条线索记下了吧。
E: Aquila doesn't like rainstorms...? It seems a little hard to believe, but we should write this clue down first.

C: 我的猜测没错，这里的确是进行天象仪式的场所。迷宝，还能捞起更多记忆吗？
E: My guess was right. This venue is indeed where celestial rituals were performed. Memmie, can you retrieve even more memories?

C: …什么意思？
E: ...What does that mean?

C: 真是糟糕的童年。
E: What a terrible childhood.

C: 你的父母，还有他们的父母…一直都陪伴在天空后裔身边吗？
E: Your parents, and their parents... Have they always been by the Skyfolk's side?

C: 结束聆听，继续赶路。
E: Stop listening and move on.

C: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
E: — Your good friend, Trissha

C: 不行呀…祷言的效力不够持久，没法让风场一直倒转。
E: It didn't work... The prayer's power didn't last long enough, and we couldn't get the fans to keep turning in the other direction.

C: 索拉比斯和露奈比斯，它们是她的坐骑、战友。
E: Solabis and Lunabis. They were her steeds and comrades.

C: 塞涅俄丝挑战神明以后，天空之子们去了哪里？
E: Where did the Skyfolk go after Seliose challenged the god?

C: 和历史上的所有部族一样，被淹没在了时代的乌云中。
E: Just like the countless tribes throughout history, they were drowned in the dark clouds of time.

C: 别放弃，我们是领路的人…绝不能自己先丧失方向。
E: Don't give up. We're the ones leading this journey... so we can't afford to lose our way.

C: 抱歉，阿格莱雅…我答应过你，要把「再创世」的选择留给翁法罗斯的人们……
E: Apologies, Aglaea... I promised you that I would leave the choice of Era Nova to the people of Amphoreus...

C: 在黎明云崖驻留期间，那刻夏老师对各处都进行了…勘察。
E: During his time at Dawncloud, Professor Anaxa conducted... surveys in various areas.

C: 万一她出了什么意外…
E: What if something happened to her...

C: 啊…回归，白厄……
E: Ah... Returned, Phainon...

C: 我充分理解各位的处境，眼下我能做的，也只有暂时冻结那名黑衣人的行动。时间有限。所以，我将以最简洁的措辞归结来意——
E: I fully understand your situation. For now, the only thing I can do is temporarily freeze that black-clad one in place. Time is limited. So, I'll keep this brief—

C: 这个世界被难以言明的「防火墙」笼罩，时间的流速也和现实不同，我和黑塔女士只能撕开一道缝隙，将影像投射进内部。
E: This world is enveloped in a "firewall" that defies explanation, and the flow of time here is also different from reality. Madam Herta and I can only tear open a gap and project images inside.

C: 这是我的使命。
E: This is the path I must take.

C: 你熟悉的阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，也提出过类似的观点：翁法罗斯的一切，都是凭借「智种」在后人的记忆中诞生。
E: As your acquaintance Lord Anaxagoras suggested: everything in Amphoreus exists through Nouspores, living in the memories of those yet to come.

C: 是吗？虽然你的个头比我要高，但论成熟，我可远胜于你呢。
E: Sure, sure. You may have the height advantage, but when it comes to maturity? I'm leagues ahead of you.

C: 「心和猎手」？你是准备捕获谁的心呢，嗯？
E: Steal-a-heart Hunter? Planning to steal someone's heart, are we?

C: …你也做了这样的梦？
E: ...Wait, you had that dream too?

C: 我雕刻到一半的小兵人？居然真的还在……
E: My unfinished little soldier? After all these years...

C: 小白真敢说呢！当时你口口声声「一定不会忘记」，结果这么久没来，还是要把大家都忘掉了。
E: How could you, Snowy! You swore you wouldn't forget about us, but you were gone so long you almost did!

C: 不…不……
E: Stop... please stop...

C: 每个英雄都曾是孩子，也都会长大。
E: Every hero was once a child. And every child must grow.

C: 真是宏伟。即便{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}已经陨落，它的天平仍在履行称量万物的使命。
E: Amazing. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} may have fallen, but their scales remain true to their purpose.

C: 呵…像是你的作风。可惜现在不是叙旧的时间，那边的悬锋人……
E: Ha... That's Cyrene for you. Unfortunately, this isn't a good time for reminiscing. That Kremnoan over there...

C: 「信念的重量并非源于自身——」
E: "The true weight of conviction originates not from itself..."

C: 「惟有一人能觐见奇迹…此乃命运使然……」
E: "One person alone may witness the miracle... Such is the will of fate..."

C: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
E: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

C: 好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
E: Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.

C: 直到翁法罗斯，迎来真正的黎明。
E: Until Amphoreus welcomes a true dawn.

C: 别屈膝，别行旧王朝的吻手和吻脚礼，更别跪拜——凯撒厌恶繁文缛节——更厌恶比她高的人头颅低过她的皇冠。
E: Don't kneel, don't do the hand-kissing or foot-kissing gestures of the old dynasty, and most of all, don't bow — the Imperator despises such rituals — especially when the heads of those taller than her bend beneath her crown.

C: 凯撒的同盟需要「毁灭」，我愿意倾尽全力。而逐火的战利品——火种——都将为我封印。
E: The Imperator's alliance needed the Destruction, and I was ready to pour all my strength into it. The spoils of the Flame-Chase — the Coreflames — would be sealed by my hand.

C: 只要…将「死亡」的火种交出便可。
E: As long as... you hand over the Coreflame of Death.

C: 即便是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，亦不能随心所欲地塑造万物，更无法裁夺万物生灵的命运。无人能独力担起生死的天平，哪怕是神明。
E: Even {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} cannot shape all things at will, nor can they dictate the fate of all life. No one can shoulder the balance of life and death alone, not even a god.

C: 自我决定开始施行这个计划……
E: Ever since I committed to this plan...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运更为沉重之物，就是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What weighs more than the fate of the world is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>

C: 现在，握住我的手，做个短暂的道别，然后就去往明天吧。
E: Now, take my hand, say a brief farewell, and step forward into tomorrow.

C: 我们以后…还有机会再见面吗？
E: Do you think... we'll see each other again?

C: 下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局……
E: Amphoreus will fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova"...

C: …就算写下他的名字，也不会发生任何事哦？而且，这本书是很可爱的童话，不要写下反派的内容啦。
E: ...Nothing's gonna happen even if you write down his name, you know? Besides, this book is a cute fairytale. Please don't write stuff about the antagonist in it.

C: 怎么你身边又多了个小粉毛？
E: Why do you have another little pink one next to you?

C: 我收拾好啦。挑了又挑，最后还是决定只带这几样东西出发。
E: I finished packing. I decided to just bring these few things in the end.

C: 哼，可不是吗！又是黄金裔，又是「救世主」…我们这些凡人在她眼里到底算什么？
E: Exactly! Chrysos Heirs, "Deliverers"... What about us ordinary folk? How much are we worth in her eyes?

C: 铁证如山，不必白费口舌了。不过，这场审判先按下不表——
E: The evidence is irrefutable, so there is no need to waste your breath. However, let us set this trial aside for the time being...

C: 嘁，真是败兴。
E: Tch, how disappointing.

C: 我相信聪慧如二位，一定能看到凯撒隐于表象下的深思。
E: You two, as bright as you are, will surely see the deep thoughts hidden beneath her exterior.

C: 知道了。但我还是得驳一句，你口中的鱼腥，对我而言反倒是大海独有的馨香。
E: Fine. But I must retort. What you call the "reek of fish," to me, is the unique fragrance of the sea.

C: 听说了吗？
E: Did you hear?

C: 这场宴会的蜜酿不限量供应，两位也可尝尝，看看它是否比天外的琼浆更加醇厚。
E: This banquet has a never-ending flow of honey brew. You are welcome to try it and see whether our drinks are as good as those from beyond the sky.

C: {RUBY_B#午夜}幕匿{RUBY_E#}将至，诸位也已酒过三巡，我便不再行那繁文缛节——凡与我共同征战过的勇士，早该对那些字句了然于胸。
E: {RUBY_B#Midnight}The hour{RUBY_E#} draws late, and I trust you have all had your fill of brews. Therefore, I will not observe the usual ceremonies. Any warrior who has fought by my side should have those speeches memorized by now.

C: 当然。身为神礼观众，我切不可错过这一幕：见证一位无名之人的陨落。
E: Of course. As the Theoros, I simply cannot miss this moment: miss witnessing the fall of a nameless one.

C: 呵，终于卸下伪装了啊。
E: Hah. So you've finally tossed aside your act.

C: 呵呵，看来您已经忘记了…在此处，我们无法对彼此出手。
E: Heh, it seems you have already forgotten... We can't hurt each other in this place.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>已锁定异常数据。确认为非法通信，开始处理……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Abnormal data, locked on. Unauthorized communication, confirmed. Initiating response...]</color>

C: 集中精神，与「毁灭」同调。
E: Focus and resonate with the Destruction.

C: 嗯？没有哦，要么是碰巧错开了吧？
E: Hmm? No, he's not. Maybe I just happened to miss him?

C: （不，有天才帮忙，丹恒一定能平安返回。而且我认识的三月，怎么可能对同伴这么漠不关心……）
E: (No. The geniuses would have made sure that Dan Heng made it back on the Express. Besides, the March I know wouldn't be so dismissive about her companions...)

C: 对于「记忆」，这些瞬间可都是编织宇宙的重要质料喔？
E: The Remembrance treats all these instances as important materials needed to weave the universe.

C: 真是度过了好长、好长的时光呀。
E: It's been such a long, long time.

C: 斯缇科西亚是死亡与海洋交汇的城邦。在那里，结合「海洋」和「门径」的权能，*我们*就能创造出一条通往创世涡心的洋流……
E: Styxia sits where death meets the ocean. There, with the combined powers of Ocean and Passage, we can summon a current that leads to the Vortex of Genesis...

C: 继续观赏吧。小心：往后的舞台年久失修，一如她破碎的命运。
E: Keep watching. But tread carefully, for the stage ahead is crumbling with age... just like her shattered fate.

C: 我等金血孕育出一头无往不利的{RUBY_B#铁墓}巨兽{RUBY_E#}，它将成为我们的铁蹄，踏遍天外群星！
E: Born from our golden blood is an unstoppable {RUBY_B#Irontomb}colossus{RUBY_E#}, our iron beast to trample the universe!

C: 你将杯中的蜜酿倾倒在碑前，琥珀液体流入碑文的裂隙，仿佛英雄在畅饮泼洒的敬意。
E: You pour the honey brew onto the gravestone, amber liquid seeping into the crevices of the inscriptions, as if the heroes are drinking deep of the spilled tribute.

C: 于海市蜃楼的泡影中，他们将踏足星间的空想托付予后世的英雄。
E: In the shimmering mirage of illusion, they entrusted their dreams to ride among the stars to the hero yet to come.

C: 敬阿格莱雅，缇里西庇俄丝，迈德漠斯，遐蝶，阿那克萨戈拉斯，赛法利娅，雅辛忒丝……
E: To Aglaea, Tribios, Mydeimos, Castorice, Anaxagoras, Cifera, Hyacinthia...

C: 看，一座墓碑……
E: Look, a gravestone...

C: 致那些为了逐火而牺牲的黄金裔们——他们的命运不为神谕所示，却不因其微渺而自惭自卑，决然地将金血挥洒于逐火的道路。
E: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives chasing flame — Their fates were not foretold by prophecy, yet they bore no shame in their insignificance. With unwavering resolve, they shed golden blood along the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 「天空之半神」雅辛忒丝，生于光历<unbreak>4297</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年。
E: Hyacinthia, the Demigod of Sky. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4297</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>.

C: 一下子就看穿了！不愧是大家口中的「第一位天才」呢。
E: You guessed it right away! As expected from someone people call the First Genius.

C: 很漂亮吧？这就是翁法罗斯。这个世界，就在这条无穷的光带中绵延流淌。
E: Isn't it pretty? That's our Amphoreus. Our world flows and meanders in this endless band of light.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我的离去，会筑成你们的长阶——待我陨落的消息传扬开来，你终会明白这个道理。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>My departure will create a long staircase for you. You will understand what I mean when news of my death reaches your ears.</color>

C: 您希望后人如何记住自己？为逐火献身的英雄…还是一位暴君？
E: How do you want history to remember you? As a hero who gave up her life for the Flame-Chase... or as a tyrant?

C: 果然瞒不过你呀，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。
E: But I see that wasn't enough to fool you, my dear {NICKNAME}.

C: 在消失前，「三月七」向我许下心愿。她唯一的愿望，就是「开拓」的旅途能一直继续下去。
E: "March 7th" made a wish to me before she disappeared. Her only wish... was for the Trailblaze's journey to continue without an end.

C: 但，它为什么会提到{NICKNAME}？三月七进入翁法罗斯，应当远远早于{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
E: But why did it mention {NICKNAME}? March 7th should have entered Amphoreus long before {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng did.

C: 你听见了么？她刚才说的……
E: Did you hear that? She just said...

C: 三千万世轮回，昔涟从未缺席。在世界的反面，她以自己的方式记录下逐火之旅，将「记忆」留在这里。
E: Cyrene was always there during the thirty million recurrences. She recorded the Flame-Chase Journey in her own way on the reverse side of this world, depositing all the "memories" in this place.

C: 但现在，你必须给出一个解释：关于这座大墓，还有「第十三位泰坦」——
E: But you'd better explain everything to us: this tomb, and the "Thirteenth Titan"...

C: 就算被人口口声声「救世主」、「救世主」地叫着，我相信{NICKNAME}也没有忘记过……
E: Even with everyone calling {M#him}{F#her} "Deliverer," I believe that {NICKNAME} hasn't forgotten...

C: 这里是……
E: Where am I...

C: 你没有死，所谓「陨落」只是一场骗局。不惜背离逐火的使命，也要和她搭上关系，为什么？
E: So you didn't die. Your "fall" was just a lie. You cast aside your duty as a Flame-Chaser and joined her. Why?

C: 那又如何？污浊的金血，浸入此身……
E: And what of it? This body is soaked in filthy golden blood...

C: 罢了，我毕竟是你要背负的重责……
E: After all, I am the heavy burden you must bear...

C: 想来，若非油尽灯枯，它也不必如此破釜沉舟。
E: I presume they wouldn't have made such a drastic and irreversible decision if they had not exhausted all other means.

C: 桀桀桀！玩水的装酷小子，没想到会在这里遇见你！
E: Hehehe! Look who it is! It's the water-splashing poser! Didn't think I'd catch you here!

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>█投身 █熔 █炉████ █ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>█Throw yourself into █the █forge████ █ █</color>

C: 姬子小姐、瓦尔特先生、帕姆，还有星期日、黑天鹅、两位天才…所有人都在尽己所能相助。
E: Miss Himeko, Mr. Yang, Pom-Pom, and even Sunday, Black Swan, and the two geniuses... They are all doing everything in their power to aid us.

C: 这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
E: I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...

C: 先等等…
E: Let's wait for a moment...

C: 这…怎么会……
E: What... How...

C: 没错。纳努克的令使，也是祂燃烧命途的兵器。寻常的兵法、韬略，恐怕对他们不起作用。
E: Indeed. Nanook's Emanators are also THEIR weapons to burn down the Paths. I'm afraid conventional military tactics and strategies will be useless against them.

C: 谨代表匹诺康尼分家向各位致以歉意。我们尝试过向家族请求援助——很遗憾，回音寥寥。
E: On behalf of the Penaconian Family branch, I extend my sincerest apologies to everyone. We tried to request aid from The Family, but we essentially received no response.

C: 显然，你在翁法罗斯受了许多戏剧文化的熏陶。
E: You've obviously been learning from the theatrical culture in Amphoreus.

C: 让我们一同——「开拓」这个世界的命运吧。
E: Together, let us blaze a trail for the destiny of this world.

C: 歌颂「裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯」，您在理性的树上结出硕果，教我们在缺憾中启蒙「智识」。
E: Praise be to "Anaxagoras, Bough of Rift," for you bear fruit upon the tree of reason, teaching us to find Erudition amidst imperfection.

C: 世界会一直和平，直到决战来临。
E: Peace will reign until the decisive battle arrives.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这片废墟，是他用三千万世残躯堆成的「封印」哪。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This ruin is the "seal" he built from the shattered remains of thirty million lifetimes.</color>

C: 原来如此，他以这种方式囚禁铁墓，为外界争取时间。
E: I see... So this is how he trapped Irontomb to buy time for the world outside.

C: 「它会启程，去往他的身边。」
E: "It takes flight, and finds its way to him."

C: 然后，再一起打败坏蛋。我们所有人，在西风尽头相见。
E: Then, we'll defeat the baddies together, and meet everyone at the end of the west wind.

C: 呵呵，生来第一次，我意识到了……
E: Hehe, for the first time in my life, I've realized....

C: 它们拥有的自由，或许远在我之上啊。
E: May have lived with more freedom than I ever had.

C: 至、至少押韵啦！
E: A—At least it still rhymes!

C: 「真是非人的折磨啊……」
E: "That's more than anyone should be made to suffer..."

C: 就是实现大家的愿望！
E: Is to fulfill everyone else's wishes!

C: 终于。旅途的尽头。
E: Finally. The end of this journey.

C: 「畸形的巨神，支撑它屹立的。便是这『憎恨』的化身吧？」
E: "What a twisted giant. It must be supported by this embodiment of 'hatred'."

C: {NICKNAME}▀▄抓紧▄█我▄▀▄
E: {NICKNAME}▀▄Hold onto▄█Me▄▀▄

C: 他用牺牲，换来了这片宁静。
E: He gave everything to obtain this momentary peace.

C: 史诗中的「英雄」，只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在那里。
E: The "heroes" of legends were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.

C: 「就算在深不见底的虚空中，我依旧能听见你的声音。」
E: "I can still hear your voice in this bottomless void."

C: 「欢迎来到这个世界，我的孩子。你将迎来许许多多个明天……」
E: "Welcome to this world, my child. You'll see so many tomorrows..."

C: 「接下来，你的选择会将命运一分为二：在更坏的可能性里，『开拓』的旅途将变成一段完美无缺的『记忆』。」
E: "From this point, your choice will split destiny in twain. In the darker of the two outcomes, the Trailblazing journey will turn into a flawless 'memory.'"

C: 「身体」本就该受「心灵」的制约，不是么？哪怕灭世的病毒注定要被播撒向银河，我们至少能尝试以爱对抗憎恨……
E: The "body" is meant to be restrained by the "heart," no? Even if the apocalyptic virus is doomed to spread into the cosmos, we can at least try to fight against hatred with love...

C: 缇里西庇俄丝们聚在一起，嬉笑打闹的样子，在小灰的记忆里应该不多见吧？
E: The Tribioses all laughing and playing around together... That must be quite a rare sight in Little Gray's memories, huh?

C: 这下有理由多待一会儿了。
E: Well, now I have an excuse to stay a bit longer.

C: 哈哈，不赖嘛。不过，这下我就踏实了——毕竟我准备的台词，意蕴在你之上。
E: Haha, not bad at all. But now I can rest easy. After all, the lines I prepared are way more profound than yours.

C: 铁墓殒落后的片刻……
E: Moments after the fall of Irontomb...

C: 为注定发生的「奇迹」，种下因果吧♪
E: And plant the seed of causality for the "miracle" that is destined to bloom ♪

C: 在这遗世独立的星系，诞生过至少三位堪比「令使」的存在。
E: Then this isolated star system must have been home to at least three beings comparable to Emanators.

C: 我记得，哀丽秘榭的那棵树……
E: I remember that tree in Aedes Elysiae...

C: 我叫莉维娅，莉——维——娅！下次再记不住，我可不告诉你咯。
E: My name is Livia. Li—vi—a. If you forget again, I won't tell you next time.

C: 「毕竟，我们总是心有灵犀呀♪」
E: "After all, we've always been in sync."

C: 「慢下来，让文字得到沉淀吧。」
E: "Slow down. Let the words settle."

C: <unbreak>405</unbreak>；<unbreak>504</unbreak>；<unbreak>093</unbreak>；<unbreak>365</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>405</unbreak>. <unbreak>504</unbreak>. <unbreak>093</unbreak>. <unbreak>365</unbreak>...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她浇灌了一颗真正的「心」——而它具备感染「智识」的能力。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She managed to nourish a real "heart"... A "heart" with the capacity to influence the Erudition.</color>

C: 引导祂完成最后一次求解——自我的毁灭。
E: And direct THEM to complete THEIR final query: The destruction of the self.

C: 在茫茫太空里拿根探针随便嗅嗅，就能找到{NICKNAME}和丹恒…你这小玩意这么厉害啊，忍者妹？
E: You mean you just waved a probe around in deep space and found {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...? That little thing's really that impressive, ninja girl?

C: 她呀，这回可真是在鬼门关前走了一遭。
E: Well, she almost had a near-death experience this time.

C: 拜托你装到底啊…
E: Ugh, at least keep the act till the end.

C: 好家伙，几千项货损。
E: There are thousands of items on that list!

C: 我当然没事！浑身上下，每一块骨头，都好着哪。
E: Of course I'm fine! Every muscle and bone, everything is fine.

C: 喝一口少一口，可惜啊，可惜！
E: I'd better enjoy every last sip while I still can.

C: 啊对了？！还没自我介绍吧？
E: Oh, right! I haven't introduced myself yet, have I?

C: 不过！既然和你说了半天，也算投缘，值得破例一回。
E: However! Since we've been talking this whole time and you seem agreeable enough, it's worth making an exception.

C: 这老斑鸠有过不少唬人的头衔。比如<color=#dbc291ff>「前地概科员」、「前无名客」、「武装考古学派成员」</color>。
E: That old fart has a bunch of grand titles, like <color=#dbc291ff>former researcher in the Department of Cosmic Geography, former member of the Nameless, and member of the Armed Archaeologists</color>.

C: 你要是学他，我保证你一只脚还没离地，就会被防卫科的小崽子们按在地上一顿摩擦。
E: If you try to copy him, I guarantee that those kids from the Security Department will mop the floor with you before you even lift a foot off the ground.

C: 别误会，我就问问，我反正是不信老斑鸠能留下什么好东西。
E: Don't get me wrong. I'm just curious. I don't believe that old scoundrel would leave us anything good.

C: 给我瞧瞧。
E: Let me have a look.

C: 它对你很重要。
E: It is very important to you.

C: 解决出问题的人是吧？
E: So we get rid of the troublemaker, right?

C: 我只是路过的。
E: I'm just passing through.

C: 救命啊，救命——等等，电梯来了！
E: Help! Somebody help! ...Wait, the elevator is here!

C: 防卫科的一把手阿兰看了眼单子就急匆匆地走了，谁不知道他是艾丝妲的亲信。
E: The Security Department's head honcho, Arlan — he left pretty quickly when he saw them. We all know he's on her side anyway.

C: 如需帮助，请选择：
E: If you need help, please select:

C: 第一重权限。
E: Tier-1 certification.

C: 依靠头发辨认。
E: By their hair.

C: 「军团」入侵前，我的桌子上已经放了整整一排这样的小石头。可惜，它们在混乱中全丢了。
E: Before the Legion invasion, I had a bunch of rocks all lined up in a row on my desk. Unfortunately, they went missing in the chaos.

C: <unbreak>44</unbreak>月<unbreak>-47</unbreak>月
E: <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE, Months <unbreak>44</unbreak>–<unbreak>47</unbreak>

C: 这显然是有人被困在斥力桥时所摄影像。
E: This surveillance footage clearly shows that someone is trapped in the repulsion bridge.

C: 我、我脑子一下子转不过来了……
E: I... I can't get my head around this...

C: 我想你肯定和我一样，也很好奇那深空中到底还有何种景象。
E: I'm sure you are just as curious as I am about the scenery in deep space.

C: 课题更重要！
E: Your research is more important!

C: 我只是怕他所谓的付出一切，是要离开空间站，那我还是会有点…舍不得啊。
E: I'm just worried that when you said he's willing to do anything, it includes leaving the space station. I will... miss him.

C: 奇物…什么来着？
E: Curio Collection... what?

C: 但复兴计划实施起来并不容易，艾丝妲小姐也认为目前需要的人手超出了我们的预期……
E: But the implementation of Project Revival is not easy, and Lady Asta believes that the number of personnel needed exceeds our previous estimates.

C: 赶紧的，报酬少不了你的。
E: Hurry up. I won't let you go empty-handed.

C: 利用快闪的视讯号，几不可闻的超声音波，在信息的深处植入危险的诱饵，操弄潜意识实施对其主体的反噬……
E: Malicious baits are deeply embedded in the information by means of flashing visual stimuli and inaudible ultrasound waves, thus manipulating the subconscious to inflict harm on the subject.

C: 没有借阅记录，说明嫌疑人不愿暴露身份；没有破坏痕迹，说明他并非为了销毁录像带，而是为了观看其中的秘密。
E: There are no borrowing records, indicating that the suspect is unwilling to expose their identity. There was no sign of damage, indicating that they were not trying to destroy those videotapes but to view the secret within.

C: 我身体也有点不舒服…
E: I'm feeling a little sick, too...

C: 这个说法，应该能解释你的疑惑吧。
E: That should clear up any misunderstandings you may have.

C: 我认为乔安的推理完全正确。
E: I think Joanne's theory is correct.

C: 什么是仿生人？
E: What is an android?

C: 其实你们之前才见过…
E: Actually, you only just met not long ago.

C: 这么精细的实验品，只要存在，就是一种艺术。毕竟连医学诊断也无法察觉她与真人的不同。除了…在她的脖颈侧面，隐藏着一个<unbreak>157</unbreak>的编号。
E: Such a fine piece of technological experimentation, its mere existence is a work of art. Even the most advanced diagnostic equipment couldn't detect the difference between her and a real person. Except... on the side of her neck, there is a vague mark with the number <unbreak>157</unbreak>.

C: 我们之前…见过吗？不好意思，作为向导，一天之内要和太多人打交道，请{M#先生}{F#小姐}原谅我的健忘。
E: Have we... met before? Sorry, as a guide, I have to deal with many people every day. Please excuse me, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}, for my forgetfulness.

C: 在她的脖颈处，有着一行精致的数字：<unbreak>158</unbreak>。
E: On her neck, there is a faint line of numbers: <unbreak>158</unbreak>.

C: 嗯，我想请你帮忙调查「螺中笑声」感染的模因病毒的源头。
E: Yeah. I want you to investigate the source of the memetic virus that infected the Crackup Conch.

C: 那么蓬松的毛发、健硕的四肢…要是能摸摸该有多好啊，呸呸，我怎么能有这种亵渎的想法。
E: Fluffy hair and strong limbs... If only I could touch it. Bah! What kind of dirty ideas is this?

C: 因为之前空间站被入侵过，整个数据中心都遭受重创，终端机所在的机房也不例外。
E: As you know, the invasion of the station severely damaged the whole data center. And the server room where the terminal is housed is no exception.

C: 有人喘着气急急忙忙跑着回到了房间，看起来，他就是艾丝妲所说的<color=#dbc291ff>「维修工程师」</color>。
E: Someone runs back into the room, panting. Looks like he's the <color=#dbc291ff>"maintenance engineer"</color> Asta mentioned.

C: 一直要我重新加载…
E: It kept asking me to refresh...

C: 太好了，我听维修工程师之前向我汇报，因为先前入侵遗留的复兴工作还未全部完成，终端机的算力一直拖累你的进度。
E: Great. I heard from the maintenance engineer that, due to incomplete recovery from the previous invasion, the terminal's computing power had been hindering your progress.

C: 在缺乏兴趣爱好的满足与休息的情况下，人就像一只被源源不断注入气体的气球，不放气的话，只有崩溃这个必然的结局。
E: When they don't get enough rest or fulfillment, people will just be like a balloon being unceasingly inflated, which will inevitably blow up if there's no chance for an air release.

C: （夸大其词强调情况的急迫性）
E: (Exaggerate the urgency and importance of the situation)

C: 这个说法怪怪的耶…你那里还有别的线索吗？
E: Uh, eh-he... This interpretation is sounding a little odd... Do we have any other evidence?

C: 脚印。
E: The footprint.

C: 那如果这样的话，我就只能退而求其次，把这只呜呜伯先抓回去交差了……
E: If that's the case, my only option is to make a concession by arresting this one for an internal report...

C: 等等，我认识你，刚才见你一直在和阿兰队长聊天，你一定就是那位备受黑塔女士瞩目的新星。
E: Wait a second. I know you! I saw you chatting with Captain Arlan just now. You must be the rising star who caught Madam Herta's attention.

C: 嗯，有人看法和你一致。
E: Mmm, some others have surmised the same as you.

C: 啊？好吧，贵人多忘事，我帮你回忆一下——
E: Huh? Well, you've got a lot on your plate. Let me jog your memory...

C: 吓、吓死我了！你看到了吗，啪的一下，这里好像冒出了什么东西，然后虚卒就跳出来了！
E: Th—That scared me to death! Did you see that? It seemed like something popped up here, then Voidrangers jumped out!

C: 刚才我们无意中再次激活了这个信标，它们就被丢了回来…我的天啊，星核猎手还有这种本事？
E: We accidentally activated the beacon again just now, and they were brought back... Geez, Stellaron Hunters have the ability to stow enemies away like that?

C: 好像记得这个场景。
E: I think I remember this.

C: 我欣赏知识的奔流，但不认可模拟宇宙永远只是待办事项上的一纸合约。
E: I adore the vast amount of knowledge, but I cannot accept that the Simulated Universe remains simply a pending contract waiting to be attended to.

C: 我会使用有别于常规的方式将你送入模拟宇宙，或许会与你平时的体感有所不同。
E: I will be sending you into the Simulated Universe using an alternative method. It might feel a little different than usual.

C: 只是有过一面之缘。
E: We've met only once.

C: 什么时候…
E: When did you...

C: 这不是个唯一解，我的朋友。它对于不同人的意义完全不同。
E: There is no one answer to that question, my friend. It holds a different meaning for everyone.

C: 叛逆的「多人协作玩家」说，游戏是为了邂逅。
E: The rebellious Collaborative Gamer said, "Games are about encounters."

C: 但幸运的是，你拥有丰富的安全知识！你知道如何清除这些涂鸦和它们附带的病毒，令故障的设备恢复正常——和之前的探测仪一样，<color=#dbc291ff>调查平面上的涂鸦，然后进行扫描</color>。
E: But luckily for you, you have a wealth of security knowledge! You know exactly how to clear up these graffitis and the viruses they carry so that the malfunctioning devices are restored. Just like the detector from before, <color=#dbc291ff>investigate the graffiti on the surface and scan them</color>.

C: 演练方案修改得如何了？
E: How is the drill revision coming along?

C: 后来我就放弃花哨的飞行员念想了，安心在公司上班，可能这就是龙套该有的一生？
E: I gave up my unrealistic dream of becoming a pilot and worked for the IPC instead. I guess I'm living the life of a supporting character now.

C: （四处查探下列车吧……）
E: (Check around the Express...)

C: 它吞下了整部列车？
E: It's swallowed the entire Express?

C: 能在此遇见诸位，我银枝死而无憾。
E: After meeting all of you, I, Argenti, can die without regrets.

C: 那是「幻觉」吗？
E: Are they a "hallucination"?

C: 嗯，这是我的职责。
E: Yes, this is my duty.

C: 你是在担心我吗？谢谢，谢谢……
E: You worry for my safety? Thank you.

C: 你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
E: Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.

C: 咦…有点奇怪帕。帕姆刚刚选定了行进的路线……
E: Hmm... something seems off. Pom-Pom already selected a route...

C: 列车…被吞进了虫子的胃里？
E: So... the train has been swallowed by a giant bug? And we're inside its stomach?

C: 怎么样，打听到你想要的情报了么？
E: How's it going? Did you find the information you're after?

C: 但如你所见，在这个密封的罐头里，从来没有不透风的墙。
E: However, as you can see, it's hard to keep secrets in a sardine can like this.

C: 你们先聊吧。阿德勒，佩佩已经借你了，之前委托你调查的事……
E: I'll leave you to it. Adler, Peppy's in your hands now. Oh, about that investigation I asked for...

C: 我跟你讲个事儿，你可千万别告诉别人。
E: I'm gonna tell you something. Make sure you don't tell anyone else.

C: 根据你的陈述，你同黑塔见面的原因是收到了指名委托。
E: Based on your story, you met with Herta because she specifically wanted you for an assignment.

C: 想必那件奇物是某位天才的创造。逻辑：具有非凡的意义。
E: I would imagine the Curio is the creation of a genius. Affirmation: It holds some special meaning to Herta.

C: 是时候回去和艾丝妲小姐，还有螺丝咕姆先生聊一聊了。
E: It's time to go back and chat with Lady Asta and Mr. Screwllum.

C: 这么做就落了下乘…我会留在这里，尽力控制消息扩散，期间调查就拜托你们了。
E: If we did that, we'd be at a disadvantage... I'll stay here and try to contain the news as best I can. Please investigate the issue quickly.

C: 将三者串联起来的是……
E: The link between the three is...

C: 那么，告辞了，希望未来也能有机会与诸位天才相遇。相信届时，也会如今日这般……
E: With that, I take my leave. I look forward to future encounters with such brilliant minds. Let's hope they're as memorable as those we had today.

C: 我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。
E: I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: {NICKNAME}，这个阮•梅的「切片」，你在模拟宇宙里见过吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, this fragment of Ruan Mei — have you seen it in the Simulated Universe before?

C: 结果我一句话都没说。
E: I didn't end up saying anything.

C: 此后每次遇见同样的风景，我都忍不住驻足停留。
E: From then on, whenever I come across a familiar scene, I find myself pausing to take it all in.

C: 这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
E: These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.

C: 我会去看你演出的。
E: I will come and watch your performance.

C: 我要开一下闪光灯，别眯眼！我开自动连拍了！
E: I will turn on the flash, try not to squint! Automatic burst mode activated!

C: 好、好吧，我试试——来，这边走，我记得是在那条路……
E: O—Okay. I'll try... Come with me. I think it was down that path...

C: 感受到了「开拓」的意义。
E: I have learned what it means to "Trailblaze."

C: 相逢一场总归是缘分，各位有什么想了解的尽管问我，知无不言言无不尽！不过长话短说，银鬃铁卫随时可能出现……
E: Anyway, a meeting like this has to have been written in the stars. Ask me anything you like — I won't skimp on the details. Still, make it snappy, you're never more than ten feet from a Silvermane Guard...

C: ——但我就是乐于助人。哈哈，心地善良就是我桑博的代名词！跟我来，朋友，轻点声，可别被铁卫发现了。
E: ...B—But it would be my pleasure! "Kindness" is Sampo Koski's middle name. Follow me, friends, and keep quiet. We don't want to be spotted by the Guards.

C: 快去快去，我就在这儿等你。
E: Alright slowpoke, I'll wait for you here.

C: 啊…原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 那帮家伙的武器，还有他们操纵的机兵，威力比我们的大太多了。
E: Their weapons and automatons are much stronger than anything we have.

C: 姐…姐姐好。请问您是……
E: H—Hello Miss... Are you...?

C: 看来我的消息源说的没错：大型机器人和小姑娘之间建立了牢不可破的纽带…真是个温暖人心的故事！
E: So, it seems my source was right: Who'd have thought that such a strong bond could exist between a giant robot and a little girl...? So heartwarming!

C: 喂，那边那个大家伙！这里管事的是你吗？
E: Hey, you! Are you in charge around here?

C: 在你眼中不近人情的公司职员们，其实也都有着各自的人生轨迹。以我自己为例，我出身自一个位于银河边缘的不起眼星球，它的名字除了原住民以外几乎无人知晓。
E: In your eyes, the IPC may seem heartless or cruel, but in reality, we all have a story to tell. As for myself, I was born on a small, unremarkable planet at the edge of the galaxy — a place whose name is known only to the native inhabitants.

C: 您的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 根据公司留下的设计蓝图，筑城者们建造出了第一批仿制品机兵。但在阿丽萨•兰德率领的抵抗军中，主力仍是血肉之躯的人类。
E: The Architects used the IPC blueprints to construct replica automatons. However, the overwhelming majority of the combatants, commanded by Alisa Rand, were human.

C: …上面的回复，审批通过了。
E: My superiors have granted me the approval I need.

C: 哈哈哈，当然不是！
E: Haha, I wish!

C: 我只是把贝洛伯格的人们集结在一起，并告诉他们，我们得来不易的自由再次面临着巨大的威胁。
E: All I did was bring the people of Belobog together and make them aware that our hard-earned freedom was under immense threat once again.

C: 有什么事吗？不妨有话直说吧。
E: ...Can I help you? If you've got something to say, say it already.

C: 用双手为后人筑造地基——听上去特别伟大，对吧？但是对于切身参与到这项工程中的人们来说，这里面又有多少乐趣可言呢？
E: Building a better world for future generations sound great, right? But is it any fun for the engineers and Architects who are directly involved in such a pursuit?

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了奥列格……
E: You tell Oleg about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: 托帕就在前方。她本可以用手段强制我服从命令，但却并未如此行事。
E: Topaz is ahead. She had the means to force me to comply with her orders, but chose not to.

C: 听说，放完假要调休…
E: I hear I have to work overtime for taking time off when I get back...

C: 托帕离开铆钉镇之后便不知了去向，她的部下随后涌入，占领了这里。
E: Topaz disappeared after leaving Rivet Town. In her absence, her subordinates flooded in and took over.

C: 互助会？什么互助会？
E: Mutual aid what now? What are you talking about?

C: 真可怜啊，那个女人…她的丈夫孩子都生病去世了。
E: That poor, poor lady... Both her husband and child became ill and passed away.

C: 年轻人，来这边吧，别打扰那个可怜人了…我跟你说几句……
E: Come over here, child. It's best to leave that poor lady in peace. Let me explain...

C: 真是无可救药啊，我这蠢妹妹…哎……
E: *sigh* Oh sister, sometimes there just isn't a cure...

C: 曾经，上层区有一位医术高明的医生，他同时还拥有过人的制药天赋。
E: There was once a brilliant Overworld doctor with unmatched pharmaceutical skill.

C: 我只是散步经过而已…
E: I'm just taking a walk...

C: 最后，奥列格建议将他驱逐了事，并且永远禁止他再踏足下层。
E: In the end, Oleg suggested that we banish him and permanently deny him access to the Underworld.

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 但就在前两天，我收到了一封奇怪的信，既然你来了，也帮我拿拿主意。
E: But just two days ago, I received a strange letter. Now that you're here, perhaps you can help me figure out what it is about.

C: 宓堂空境解语人是谁？
E: Who is this Cryptologist From Locus Silentii?

C: {NICKNAME}为什么问我这个，莫非，你正在调查「异星水魈」窜逃案吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, why are you asking me this? Are you investigating the escape of the Xenohydro?

C: 你不是第一个问这问题的人…撇开「波少」的粉丝不谈，很多人对卡波特先生印象糟糕，认为他行事张扬，仗势欺人。
E: You're not the first person to ask me this question... Except for his fans, many people have a bad impression of Master Capote. They think he is loud and obnoxious.

C: 可惜我不争气，如果是姐姐在黑塔，一定能干出一番名头。所以我是怎样的人？这个问题，我无法…或是说，根本不敢回答……
E: It's a pity I am such a failure. If my sister were here in the space station, she would be able to make a name for herself. So how do I see myself? I can't... Or dare not answer this question at all...

C: 三堂深处？
E: The three depths?

C: 拉明娜？你怎么又不说话了？！你不会这时候良心发现，想反水吧，咕噜噜。
E: Lamina? Why aren't you saying anything!? Did you suddenly find your conscience? You want to back out now? *gurgle*

C: 嘿嘿，不瞒你说，宓堂空境解语人不是别人，就是我。当初要写这封古言信，我可是向温明德队长请教了十来天，吃了不少苦头呢。
E: Hehe, to tell you the truth, the Cryptologist From Locus Silentii is none other than yours truly. This letter took me more than ten days to write, and I asked Mr. Wen for advice. It wasn't easy.

C: 你又是什么人…少多管闲事……
E: Who are you anyway... Mind your own business...

C: 把你在边缘通路偶遇希莉儿的事告诉了桑博……
E: You tell Sampo about your chance encounter with Cyrille at Backwater Pass...

C: 啊？当、当然不是，你可别把我当成唯利是图的主啊……
E: Mmm? O—of course not. Don't paint me as such a greedy mercenary...

C: 我会努力，争取靠自己的力量走出这里……
E: I'll work hard and try to get out on my own...

C: 来梳理一下刚才发生的事吧——我检查过数据储存端后，发现只要按照图案给定的顺序操作栈桥，就可以解除栈桥的制动。
E: Let's recount what just happened. After checking the data storage terminal, I found that the gear bridge brakes can be released by following the sequence of these given patterns.

C: 这个钻头样的首饰，上面刻着「巴拉金」的字样…应该就是茉莉小姐要找的「钥匙」了。
E: This piece of drill-shaped jewelry is engraved with the word "Balakin"... It must be the key Miss Molly is looking for.

C: 不会是他伪造的吧？
E: Sampo couldn't have forged it, could he?

C: 你愿意听我讲讲有关花的故事吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Do you want to hear a flower story, {NICKNAME}?

C: 跟我讲讲吧，娜塔。
E: Let's hear one, Nat.

C: 娜塔喜欢的花是…
E: What's your favorite flower...?

C: 真是位伟大的母亲。
E: She's a great mother.

C: 哥哥…你到底去了哪里？你到底……
E: Brother... where are you? What happened...?

C: …你说得没错。瓦赫犯下的恶行无法宽恕，他也愧对「医生」这个称呼。
E: ...You're right. There can be no forgiveness for the crimes he committed. He didn't deserve the title of "doctor."

C: 据我了解，这文物交易的买卖，里面能榨出的油水可是多得很…啧，要不是我还在给「地火」办事，说不定也会心动。
E: From what I hear, smuggling museum artifacts is a lucrative enterprise... Tsk, if I wasn't working for Wildfire, I'd be tempted to get in on the cash myself.

C: …我明白了，看来确实有人在下层区撺掇矿民，组织盗窃文物的行动。
E: ...I see. Looks like someone is getting the miners involved in the stealing after all.

C: 好普通的一块石头。
E: Looks like an ordinary rock.

C: 走吧，去把展品找回来。
E: Time to go get that sculpture.

C: 绝对没错…这零件肯定就是从「齿轮与智慧」上拆下来的！
E: There's no mistaking it... this component was taken from Gears and Wisdom!

C: 数量比我们之前找到的多好多啊…这么一想，感觉有点泄气……
E: These kids found way more than we did fixing all those robots... what an embarrassment...

C: 这都多亏了我。
E: Good thing you have me around.

C: 明白了！我们这就出发，布洛妮娅小姐。
E: Understood! We'll head there at once, Miss Bronya.

C: 那个…请您回答一下我们刚才的提问？
E: Um... Can you please answer the question we just asked?

C: 布洛妮娅大人，佩拉副官，我回来了。
E: Lady Bronya, Miss Pela, I have returned.

C: 稍等一下。
E: I need a little while.

C: 等等，{NICKNAME}！先别急着上去。
E: {NICKNAME}, wait, don't make a move yet!

C: 哼哼，这可就不由我说了算了……
E: Hmph, that's not up to me...

C: 不过，我还是稍微有些迷惑…这位诺尔伯特少爷不过是个鬼迷心窍的公子哥，他哪来的那么大本事，召集了这么多人手，还组织了这么大规模的盗宝行动……
E: However, I'm still a little confused... Mr. Norbert is wealthy and opportunistic, but how did he manage to find so many accomplices and organize such a large-scale smuggling operation...

C: 别哭了，早知如此，何必当初？每个人都得为自己做出的人生决定负责，没有例外。
E: Enough blubbing. If you didn't want to face the time, why do the crime? Everyone is responsible for the decisions they make in life — no exceptions.

C: 还是说，你…唔…这什么破宾馆啊，房门上怎么连个猫眼都没有？
E: Or maybe you... Ugh, what kind of hotel is this, anyway? No peepholes on the doors?

C: 小子，有件事我突然记不清了，你提醒我一下——
E: Y'know, I just realized there's something I forgot — maybe you could help me remember.

C: 我回到下层区后，平日里除了四处问诊，剩下的时间便是照顾孤儿院里的孩子们——儿童公社，这是孤儿院的另一个名字。
E: After I got back to the Underworld, I'd spent all my time running around treating patients and looking after the children at the orphanage — the clinic nursery was really just another name for an orphanage.

C: 呵呵…我也感到很高兴。希望将来也能在博物馆里见到你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hehe... The pleasure is mine, too. I hope to see you at the museum again in the future as well, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哼哼，虎克一下子就把它搞定啦！这下荣誉队员就可以带我去博物馆了吧？
E: Hmph, I got it done in no time at all! Now you can take me to the museum, right? Honorary member?

C: 虽然搞不懂发生了什么…但我和克拉拉会等你的！
E: Although I'm not sure what all this is about, I'll wait for you with Clara!

C: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
E: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

C: 你听起来好像没兴趣。
E: Seems like you are not interested.

C: 那你觉得怎么写比较合适？
E: Well, what do you think I should write?

C: 名字？这也要改吗？
E: Change my name? Seriously?

C: 对不起，这是我的恶作剧。
E: Sorry about that. It's just a prank, sis.

C: 不、不要，不要学我！
E: Hey, n—no need for that!

C: 是你们啊…看样子，冲突已经暂时解决了。太好了，矿区里的伤员再增加下去，我也不知道该怎么办了。要是那个人在的话……
E: Oh, it's you... It looks like the conflict is over for now. Thank goodness, if the numbers of wounded had kept climbing, I don't know what we'd have done. If only he'd have been here...

C: 嘁，算了。只能绕远路了。
E: Tsk, forget it. We'll have to go the long way around.

C: 嚯，这么自信？那咱就试试吧。
E: Oh, well aren't you confident? Let me give it a try then.

C: …咱们运气可真好，要是没有查宝，估计得花上半天才能找到这些零件吧？
E: ...We're pretty lucky, huh? Without Findie, it probably would've taken half the day to find these parts.

C: 嘿嘿，我「千面尤利安」的名号…等等，现在不是说这个的时候！
E: Heehee, I, Julian of a Thousand Faces... Wait, it's not the time for this!

C: 喂，你到底是站哪边的呀！
E: Hey, whose side are you on!?

C: …完了完了，我听上去是不是特别可疑？可我真的什么都没干，你们要相信我……
E: Oh no, oh no... I must sound very suspicious. But I really didn't do anything. You have to believe me...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>厨子。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The cook.</color>

C: 你们得动动脑子。
E: Use your brains.

C: 我确实弄错了，对不起。
E: I was wrong, my apologies.

C: 避难所中的物资品箱子，里面湿漉漉的，就像是从地下河水里打捞起来的一样。从标签上来看，应该是用来存储应急食品的货箱。
E: A supply crate from the shelter. It's wet, as if it has been salvaged from the underground river. Judging by its label, it was used to store emergency food.

C: 还能修好吗？
E: Can it be repaired?

C: （矿具…匹克…三件套…可恶，又被桑博耍了！）
E: (Mining tools... Peak... Set of three... Darn it! Sampo fooled me again!)

C: 消消气，消消气…你看，我这儿还有张货真价实的藏宝图，你收下吧。
E: Calm down, calm down! Look, I do have a genuine treasure map here for you.

C: 了解，我会把他们带回来的。铁卫和「地火」已经在大桥上布置了防御，你们先撤到那里去吧。
E: Understood, I'll bring them back. The Guards and Wildfire have set up defenses on the bridge. You should head over.

C: 继续向前搜索失散的女孩子和矿民吧。
E: Let's keep searching for the missing girl and the miner.

C: 看来前面有强敌盘踞…希露瓦，{NICKNAME}，千万小心。
E: I think he was right about the monster... Serval, {NICKNAME}, no sudden moves.

C: 抱歉啦，老弟。每到关键时刻，我总是要让你费心。
E: I'm sorry, brother. I always make you worry when things get serious.

C: 可以合理推测…可可利亚大人的幻影就是引发这次入侵的罪魁祸首。先前未知的异变可能也是由它引起的……
E: ...I think it's safe to say that the shadow of Madam Cocolia was the reason for this invasion. The other anomalies we experienced were probably also a direct result...

C: 他们怎么还没回来……
E: Why are they not back yet...

C: 外面危险，快进来！
E: It's dangerous outside. Come in!

C: 玲可是谁？
E: Lynx?

C: 放心，她很显眼的：她跟我俩一样，一头金发，然后…唔，个子比较小，平时总会戴一顶白绒帽…如果我没猜错，她应该会在靠近雪原的出入口等人。
E: Don't worry. She stands out. She's blonde like us and, um... quite short. She's always wearing a white fur hat... If I'm right, she should be waiting for someone at the city exit closest to the Snow Plains.

C: 准备好防寒衣物了吗？
E: Did you bring enough warm clothes?

C: …哎？！我来挖就好了！你不用动手……
E: ...Huh!? I can do the digging! You don't need to...

C: …没有没有，是你的错觉！
E: ...Nope, nope, it's all your imagination!

C: 鲱鱼罐头也要加进去吗？！
E: You're putting canned sardines into a hotpot!? Please don't say that...

C: 啊，佩拉！稍等一下……
E: Ah, Pela! Hold on...

C: 慌乱中，软盘不知道被落在了哪里…到最后，他只保住了那台终端机。
E: During the attack, he dropped the floppy disk in confusion, only managing to bring back the terminal.

C: 狮子大开口啊，这孩子！
E: What a rip-off!

C: …不是幻觉。
E: ...It wasn't my imagination.

C: 我知道了，那你一定要小心。
E: Understood. Be careful, though.

C: 真让人怀念啊…还记得我有一次荡得太高，把旁边所有人都吓出一身汗。
E: Ah, it sure brings back memories... I still remember one time I swung super high, and everyone was scared I would fly off.

C: 不是哦，这些弹珠才是他要找的东西。
E: No, these marbles are what he's after.

C: （用家用寻物仪帮虎克找找吧。）
E: (Let's use the Home-Use Object Finder to help Hook search.)

C: 糟糕！它好像把我们也当作敌人了……
E: Oh no! It seems to think we're its enemies as well...

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们在附近再多看看吧？克拉拉还有些在意的事。
E: Let's take a look around again, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. I'm still not finished here.

C: （它决定收集零件、修缮城镇，等大家回来……）
E: (He decided to collect parts, repair the town, and wait for everyone to return...)

C: 但现在不一样了，你们的到来让史瓦罗也承认「出现外来变量」，事情发生了变化，我虽然不清楚原委——但也许你们有机会说动他。
E: But things have changed — your arrival constitutes an "external variable" for Svarog. I may not have the full picture, but perhaps you guys have an opportunity to sway him.

C: 你不骗我们就谢天谢地了。
E: It's all good. We've had you for practice.

C: 童话故事里的口令，在这里不可能奏效吧。
E: It's an imaginary password that children like to use... and I don't think it's going to be of much use.

C: 别想那些没用的了，这家伙要进攻了！
E: Wishful thinking, it's about to attack!

C: 啊！？怎么，你想打架啊？正好我心情不好，来跟我过两招啊！
E: Huh!? You wanna go? You caught me in a bad mood, let's do this!

C: 这下咱们就能进去了吧？嘿嘿，史瓦罗的认证机制也不过如此！
E: We can get in now, right? Hehe, Svarog's certification system is no match for us!

C: 发现史瓦罗大佬的访客。
E: Visitors for Svarog detected.

C: 认证失败…个体未获得访问权限。
