E: Certification failure... Subject has yet to obtain access permissions.

C: 啊，原来你们之前是去别的小镇观光啦？
E: Wait, you guys went sightseeing in another town?

C: 自我修复模组正在初始化…初始化失败……
E: Initializing self-repair module... Initialization failure...

C: …大家都是在为下层区的人们努力，但是史瓦罗先生不相信人类的情感，他只相信计算的结果。
E: Um... I know you're working hard for the people down here, but Mr. Svarog doesn't trust human emotions. He only trusts his calculation results.

C: 就当还我们人情吧，克拉拉。
E: See it as returning the favor, Clara.

C: 我们就是新的「变量」。
E: We're the new variable.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，来帮我一下，合力把这东西修好。
E: {NICKNAME}, March, give me a hand. We should be able to fix it between us.

C: 欸？只看外表的话，确实跟其他人完全不一样……
E: Well, uhh... you do look very different from other people.

C: …别再骗自己了，布洛妮娅。该到你下定决心的时候了。
E: ...I'm sorry. It's no use lying to yourself, Bronya. It's time for you to make a decision.

C: 那个冷血的大守护者用谎言和手腕将上下层隔开，如果被她发觉了地下的变化，不知会做出什么事来……
E: That cold-blooded supreme guardian has used lies and tricks to keep the surface separated from the underground. If she detects any change in the Underworld, I don't know what she might resort to...

C: 别看希儿平时大大咧咧的，她心里其实有一面镜子，所有的是非利害她都再清楚不过。
E: Don't let her carefree nature fool you — she's actually very discerning, and can read a situation like no one else.

C: 身体才是革命的本钱，就这么垮了可不行。史瓦罗和「炉心」就先交给「地火」吧，你们该回去好好休息一番了。
E: Health is everything — you won't be much use if you neglect yours. Let Wildfire take care of the Furnace Core for now. You head back and recuperate.

C: 就你这水平还当拍卖师呢？
E: Call yourself an auctioneer?

C: 原来如此，怎么不早说呢？我对你们的拍品很感兴趣。
E: Oh, haha, wh—why didn't you bring that up earlier? Your item has piqued my curiosity.

C: …不行！虎克才不会干这种事！
E: ...No! Hook won't do that!

C: 都是荣誉队员该做的。
E: It's what an honorary member should do.

C: 费斯曼有地髓探针。
E: Fersman has the Geomarrow Probe.

C: 啊，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对！原来如此，克拉拉记下来了……
E: Oh, you're right, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! I see! I'll jot it down...

C: 它好像…彻底没法行动了……
E: It seems to have stopped working...

C: 克拉拉…感觉不太好……
E: I... feel bad about this...

C: 滋…滋……
E: Dzz... Dzz...

C: 同样的特质，克拉拉只在史瓦罗先生身上见到过……
E: I've only ever seen this quality in Mr. Svarog...

C: …原来是这样。也许在史瓦罗先生看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
E: I see. Maybe Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually, which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

C: …克拉拉明白了。那…我们就先回基地吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: ...I see. In that case, let's go back to the base.

C: 帕斯卡，不会，偷窃，再！执行，克拉拉，任务！
E: Pascal, not, again, steal! Carry out, Clara, mission!

C: 在前线戒备期间，把栈桥调转到不贯通前后方的位置，然后从后方切断栈桥终端的能源，避免误操作…或者出现逃兵的可能。
E: With the front line on high alert, they must have rotated the bridge to make it impassable. Then they cut off the energy supply to the terminals to avoid accidental repositioning... or to prevent deserters from escaping.

C: 邓恩…邓恩？嗐，你早说啊！得了得了，那没事了——我们回头再来找你。
E: Dunn... Dunn? Ha, why didn't you say so! No problem. We'll be back in a bit.

C: 太直接了吧你？！
E: Could you be any less discreet!?

C: 在下一拨袭击到来之前，铁卫还能争取一些时间。
E: The Guards can give you some time before the next wave of attacks is upon us.

C: …这可不是什么好理由。茉莉小姐，虽然我不想把话说得太难听，但对于你这次的行为，我只能评价为有勇无谋。
E: That is not a good excuse, Miss Molly. No offense, but you were simply too reckless.

C: 我现在也能安心仰仗其他人了…如果让斯捷潘先生知道了这件事，他会开心吗？
E: I can place my trust in people now... Would Mr. Stefan be happy if he knew about this?

C: 铁卫小队没在仓库里发现什么异常现象，不过倒是找到了些奇怪的书信…我们大概扫了一眼，但大伙都对里面的内容毫无头绪。
E: My Silvermane Guard squad never found anything strange in the warehouse other than a few weird letters... We scanned them over but nobody had any idea about what they said.

C: 那就是说她们肯定来过这儿了，对吧？
E: Which means they were definitely here, right?

C: 而且看样子，她们是往那个方向去了。
E: And it looks like they went that way.

C: …那，我们岂不是主动往圈套里跳？
E: ...Then, aren't we walking straight into a trap?

C: …说下去，杰帕德。
E: ...Go on, Gepard.

C: 「星核」封印以后，寒潮会慢慢消退。这个世界的裂界不会再凶猛扩张，但也不会凭空消失。雅利洛-Ⅵ得到了重获生机的可能性，但那需要时间……
E: Now that the Stellaron is sealed, the Eternal Freeze will slowly recede. The Fragmentum won't aggressively expand anymore, but nor will it disappear. Jarilo-VI has a chance to return to life, but it will take time...

C: ——我是希莉儿，贝洛伯格的大守护者。
E: — I'm Cyrille, Supreme Guardian of Belobog.

C: 他们中大部分人都只是凭着第一印象对这差事做出粗暴的判断。统计当然可以由机器代劳，但是有了麻烦，还是得靠人亲自上阵才行啊。
E: Most people are just judging the job based on first impressions. Statistics can of course be done by a machine, but when there is trouble, it is still necessary to rely on humans like us.

C: 星槎海街区目前只允许同行两个类型的星槎：<color=#dbc291ff>客运型和货运型</color>。
E: At the moment, there are only two types of starskiffs allowed on the streets of the Starskiff Haven: <color=#dbc291ff>passenger-type and cargo-type</color>.

C: 然后，我现在就去追肇事者。
E: And now, I've got a perp to chase.

C: 我就听到「咚——」的一声，我就跑出来了，看到人摔在地上…然后我就往星槎的航道里看，我什么都没看清，它已经跑远了。
E: Well, I heard a "thud" and ran outside. Seeing that person on the ground, I looked over toward the starskiff lane, but I didn't see anything. The starskiff had already escaped.

C: 好了好了，是才能的话，可得好好利用才行。
E: Well, if it's a talent, it must be put to good use.

C: 这张照片比较有用，能看到不同的星槎去往了不同方向。
E: This photo is more useful, you can see different starskiffs going in different directions.

C: 从左数第三艘。
E: The third one from the left.

C: 你是想说，仙舟人不像化外民一样会怕老，所以不会害怕自己老无所依吗？
E: You mean people on Xianzhou don't age like Outworlders, so they aren't afraid of getting old and ending up living on the streets?

C: 我会在这里待一会儿，就不再打扰您了，祝您的生活愉快。
E: I'll stay here for a while. I should stop bothering you now. Have a nice day.

C: 放心吧，她精通药理。
E: Don't worry. She is skilled in pharmacology.

C: 呃，你好…请问你有什么事吗？
E: Umm, hi... how can I help you?

C: 如果不能弄清这个关键，就意味着这笔知识交易对我而言收益为零！去吧，我绝不亏待你。
E: If I can't figure out this key issue, that means my net gain would be zero from this exchange of knowledge! Now, go, and I will pay you handsomely.

C: 听说你在找我？
E: I heard you're looking for me?

C: 这么矫情，打一顿就好了。
E: Don't be so dramatic. Give it a whack and it'll be fine.

C: 你要是打坏了，还得赔我材料钱和工本费。
E: If you break it, then you have to pay me for labor and materials.

C: 很难理解机器人的忧郁…
E: It's difficult to understand a robot's sadness...

C: 「恋人之间的依依不舍」。
E: "The parting of a couple in love."

C: 「以及我生活中所能有的创造力与直率。」
E: "Whatever creativity and frankness my life."

C: 啊，你要问的居然是感情吗？
E: Oh, I see you're interested in her love life.

C: 你怎么知道那没有意义？
E: Why are you so sure about that?

C: 你和小聪仔细地看了看这把漂亮的同心锁，并且在锁眼附近找到了「吾爱静斋」的刻痕。
E: Cong and you examine the beautiful lock. A phrase that read "I love Jingzhai" is engraved near the keyhole.

C: 给我说点好听的。
E: Don't jinx it.

C: 可是我并不是在追求孤屿的幸福……
E: But I'm not pursuing Guyu's happiness...

C: 找我？
E: Looking for me?

C: 看来该跟这位「狐仙」好好聊一下了。
E: Looks like we have to talk to this "foxian beauty."

C: 所以是你一直在跟我聊天吗？
E: So it was you talking to me this whole time?

C: 根据青雀牌友的说法，有不少人选择不再关注黛青，还有一些人留了下来。
E: According to Qingque's game mates, some followers chose not to follow Daiqing any longer, while some continued.

C: 你要是觉得残忍的话，也许你可以让那位「狐仙」说得温柔一些？
E: If you think it's brutal, maybe you can ask the Foxian Beauty to convey her sentiments more gently?

C: 哎，你就别在这里恭维我了。
E: Anyway, I'm not the one who deserves the credit here.

C: 因为留下这些记号，就能提醒武装考古学派的笨蛋，别把遗迹给炸上天。
E: These markings serve as reminders for those moronic Armed Archaeologists, so they won't blow up the historical sites.

C: 你带上手机去那边，只要附近有学会标识的反射信号，插件就会发出提示。找准标记的位置，把它「拓印」下来就行。够简单吧？
E: Just bring your phone with you. The plug-in will issue a notification if the reflection signal of a nearby marking is detected. Your job is to locate the marking and make a rubbing of it. Easy-peasy, right?

C: （陶德想看的持明卵，好像就在这附近……）
E: (The Vidyadhara egg Todd wants to see seems to be nearby...)

C: 一个孩子孤零零地站在海边，不知为何，他稚嫩的面庞有些眼熟。
E: A child stands alone by the sea and, for some reason, his young face looks rather familiar.

C: 我这一生比大部分不知自己所求，又无法得偿所愿的人强太多了。我著书立说，我授徒无数。虽然没有孩子，但我的学生中有不少让我颇为骄傲。
E: In this life I've been far better off than most people, who don't even know what they want, let alone how to get it. I became a published author, and I've taken on countless apprentices. I may have no children, but there are several of my students of whom I'm rather proud.

C: 若不是手里没几个人，我也不至于要求告外援。不过，这件事确实勉强算得上跑腿。
E: If I had more people, I wouldn't have to ask for external help. But as things stand...

C: 持明族设有「龙尊」的称号代代相传，地位形同族长。不过那是只有身具龙相，传承龙心的持明人才能接任的。
E: The Vidyadhara "high elder," on the other hand, is a position similar to a chief — it's been passed down from generation to generation. But only the Vidyadhara that possess draconic features and inherit the dragon heart can be successors.

C: 我明明看见了街上有医士…
E: But I saw doctors...

C: 干脆假装是站在牌桌后指点江山的牌友吧，只要双手抱胸、时不时摇摇头，就能顺利融入环境气氛之中…但是这根本称不上是藏身处，再去找找还有没有更合适的地方吧。
E: Of course, you can pretend to be a player and stand beside a game table, commenting on other players' moves with some head-shaking and finger-pointing. However, it's not a proper hiding spot. You shall find a better place to hide.

C: 看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
E: Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.

C: 稍、稍等一下！我再找找。
E: W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.

C: 好啊，你明天要记得带零食来喔。
E: Alright, remember to bring some snacks with you tomorrow.

C: 好汉饶命！
E: Please spare me!

C: 十王司的判官？！
E: A Ten-Lords Commission judge!?

C: 久闻衔药龙女的大名，那我就麻烦你帮我治疗了。
E: Your reputation precedes you, Healer Lady... Sorry to trouble you, please begin the healing whenever you're ready.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 你打算留在罗浮上吗？流放令已解除，短时间内龙师们也不敢再轻举妄动。这正是你重返故土的好机会。
E: Are you planning on staying on the Luofu? The banishment decree has been revoked, and the Preceptors have regained an awareness of the situation. This is your chance to return to your homeland.

C: 嗯，据说丹枫对龙祖「不朽」的力量贪妄执着，造出了一头龙形巨物。他说的应该便是这件事了。
E: Hmm... I heard that Dan Feng craved the powers of our dragon ancestor, Long the Permanence, and created a monstrous dragon-like creature. That must be what he's referring to.

C: …不对，你只是个蜃影唉，又上当了。
E: ...W—Wait, no! You're just a Mirage Echo. Ugh, I got tricked again!

C: 丹恒，这就是承受龙尊之力的代价吗？背负他人的期待，然后是憎恨？
E: Dan Heng, is this the price we pay for bearing the power of the High Elder? Carrying the weight of all these expectations, all this hatred...

C: 听说了行动计划之后，所有的地衡司执事都很兴奋。
E: All the Realm-Keeping Commission officers are super excited after hearing about the plans for this operation.

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Maybe next time.
(I... okay.)

C: 嗯…二三一四…罗刹从客栈中出来，去了三余书肆，然后钻进了一个小角落。再之后…拎着行李出现在码头上……
E: Hmm... 2, 3, 1, 4... Luocha emerges from the inn, goes to Spare Time Book Shop, turns into an alley, then appears at the dock with his luggage...

C: 罗刹在长乐天的码头上眺望着风景，旁边立着一口棺材。可能是刚下星槎，也可能是在等星槎。走了一会儿，他将行李放在一边，靠在栏杆上观看码头下往来的星槎。
E: Luocha is looking into the distance at the dock of Exalting Sanctum with his coffin at his side. Maybe he just left a starskiff, maybe he is waiting for a new starskiff. He walked along the dock for a while and put aside his luggage, leaning on the railing and watching starskiffs passing by the dock.

C: 嗯，辛苦了。
E: Understood, thank you.

C: （就…生计所迫嘛！罗刹他也不想的。）
E: (He, uh... had no choice? Times are tough.)

C: 我看看…这一面是药方，这一面好像也有字…啊！原来是这样啊！
E: The prescription's on this side, but on the back there's... Huh? So that's what this is all about!?

C: 是啊，这一切与你我无关…旅程才刚开始……
E: Yes. None of this is our concern... The journey has only just begun to—

C: 我妈怎么会把这样一个东西「贴身携带」呢！
E: You think my mom would carry this with her?

C: 这是…巡猎的徽记？
E: Is this... the Hunt crest?

C: 这件圣物并不是普通的工艺品，它可算得上是铭记血泪的见证。
E: This object is no ordinary trinket. It has borne witness to blood and tears.

C: 我没有其他问题了，多谢将军。
E: I don't have any other questions. Thank you, general.

C: 是啊，是挺傻的。
E: You can say that again.

C: 呃…你们在看什么？我可没在摸鱼，我在用帝垣琼玉训练术算机的运算能力…我…我这可是正经事！绝对不是在打牌！
E: Uhh... can I help you? I—I know what it looks like, but I'm using Celestial Jade to... improve the algorithm! I—I'm working, I swear!

C: 但对我来说，那是我人生中最为美好的回忆。抛洒热血、搏击长空、荡涤妖邪、匡扶正义，狐人的一生如此短暂，难道不正应为这样光荣的事业而燃烧吗？
E: But those are my best memories. We would strike out into the sky — repelling demons and upholding justice — the blood we shed bore witness to it all. The life of a foxian is short and fleeting... surely we should dedicate ourselves to such glorious aims?

C: 是啊，想死你了。没有你伴航，总觉得银河都小了一圈……
E: Of course I missed you! The galaxy felt smaller without you in my cockpit...

C: 机巧鸟连接上手机，就能远程遥控它了。快点用它来寻找失事地点吧。
E: Connect the cycrane to your phone to control it remotely. Use it to find the crash, and hurry.

C: 换作是我的话——如果我在危难之际寻求谁的帮助，我会很希望他出现在面前吧……
E: If it were me seeking help from someone in a time of crisis, I'd sure hope they showed up in person...

C: 接下来，我要令他的意识远离仙舟。「忘掉」景元、镜流、应星和你那丹恒朋友。这过程同样不能被打扰，但在开始之前，我可以抽出时间回答你的问题。
E: I'm going to transfer his consciousness away from the Xianzhou and cleanse his memories of Jing Yuan, Jingliu, Yingxing, and your friend Dan Heng. Again, this process mustn't be interrupted, but I can answer questions before I begin.

C: 我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
E: Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.

C: 人感受不到恐惧，就会被欲望和快感支配，变成「恶魔」。艾利欧找到我的时候，我正在执行任务…而他开的条件，我很感兴趣。
E: When people don't feel fear they are dominated by desire and pleasure — they become "devils." When Elio found me, I was in the middle of a mission... and the conditions he offered me caught my interest.

C: 你为什么加入星核猎手？
E: Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?

C: 未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
E: The future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.

C: （所以，我的回答是——）
E: (So, my answer is...)

C: 虽说萨姆和银狼会把我们救出来，但阿刃会受到很严重的伤害，我们和仙舟的关系也会闹得很僵……
E: Of course, Sam and Silver Wolf would have broken us out, but Bladie would've been gravely injured, and our relationship with the Xianzhou would've been damaged beyond repair.

C: 抱歉，卡芙卡，有一个人…一个我亏欠了许多的人，要去见一下。
E: I am sorry, Kafka. There is a person... a person to whom I am greatly indebted. I must see them.

C: 据战事文牍记载，倒在她剑下的丰饶之民数不胜数。造翼者的羽卫，步离人的父狼，连高如山岳的器兽也当不住她的一击，可谓是名噪一时的传奇。
E: According to records of wars past, her blade has slain countless Denizens of Abundance. Not even the Feather Guards of the Wingweaver, the Father Wolf of the borisin, or the gigantic Mechabeast could withstand a single strike from her. She's a renowned legend.

C: 飞行士…
E: Pilot...

C: 我…什么都想不起来。
E: I... can't remember anything.

C: 这回你怎么这么慢啊？
E: What took you so long this time?

C: 那个人的名字在你思绪的边缘如风中落叶般飞舞，却始终不能清晰可见。
E: The name of that person flutters at the edge of your thoughts like a leaf in the wind, but it remains elusive and unclear.

C: 我看你身上也没长出什么奇形怪状的东西嘛。
E: You don't seem to have any of that...

C: 如果你想，我会奉陪到底。
E: If you wish, I will see it through.

C: 我该为丹枫的作为负责吗？
E: Should I be responsible for Dan Feng's actions?

C: 彦卿。
E: Yanqing.

C: 这的确是彦卿的示迹玉扣，不胜感谢。
E: Without a doubt — this jade tracer belongs to Yanqing. I can't thank you enough.

C: （景元沉默良久）
E: (Jing Yuan is silent for a while)

C: 好了，我的事办完了。该送姐姐去安全的地方了。
E: Well, my work here is finished. Now to make sure you get to a safe destination.

C: 但他若向仙舟内逃窜…这么大的地界，很难抓得着他。
E: But if he fled towards the interior of the ship... it'll be hard to track him down over such a vast area.

C: 没错。在联盟成立后，仙舟上的一切医治行为都有严格的标准和界限，为的是避免借「治愈」之名求取长生或变异改造。
E: That's right. Since the Alliance was first established, all medical practices aboard the Xianzhou adhere to strict standards that prohibit long-life or mutant modifications under the guise of "curing."

C: 无论选哪个，都让咱们把声线放低一些。这都不是体面的话题。
E: Regardless of what you choose, let's keep our voices down... eh? This isn't the kind of conversation you can have out in the open.

C: 哈哈，只有那些被妖弓蛊惑之人，才会仇视慈怀药王。但很遗憾，这样的人很多…实在是太多了。
E: Haha. Only those led astray by followers of the Devilish Archer could despise Merciful Medicus. Sadly, there are many such people... too many.

C: 哎呀，都这个时候了，就别说冷笑话了…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: *sigh* Is this really the time for jokes of that quality... You're here undercover, right? Well, so am I!

C: 请二位在此处决斗，活下来的人，就可以正式成为一名莳者。
E: ...it's time for you two to battle it out. Whoever survives will officially become a disciple.

C: 现在，一切都好起来了…过去那个可悲的「神枪执信」已经不复存在了，只剩下了慈怀药王忠诚的莳者。
E: Now, everything has changed... Zhixin and his pitiful spearmanship are no more... All that remains is a loyal disciple of Merciful Medicus.

C: 又耽搁你时间了，等把你们送回去，我请你们吃饭吧。
E: Apologies for asking you to stick with me a bit longer. I'll treat you guys when I get you back to safety.

C: 雪衣登上了星槎，你们目送她离去。
E: Xueyi boards the starskiff, and you watch as she leaves.

C: 究竟是谁呢？「不应在场，但却在场」的人…
E: "The person present who shouldn't be..." Who could that be?

C: 等司辰宫的赠剑手续完成，我会在这条街道挑选一处清静的地方，栽下幼苗，届时我的任务也就完成了。
E: Once the formalities at the Palace of Astrum are finished, I'll find a quiet spot on this street and plant a seedling, and then my mission will be complete.

C: 有魔力的剑？恶魔的剑？
E: So it's a sword that's been cursed?

C: 我也想找个机会，和她好好谈谈这柄剑的下落与经历…但那不应该是「赠剑仪式」，你看得出来，那不是一个好契机。
E: I also wanted to find a chance to tell her about the history and origin of this sword... but not during the ceremony. As you saw, it wasn't a good time.

C: 正是。身为伊德莉拉的骑士，我誓言安贫乐道，对偷窃行为有所不齿——为了兼顾对孤云阁下的承诺以及骑士誓言，便只好留下玫瑰。
E: Yes, I did. As Idrila's knight, I've sworn to live in poverty, and I abhor theft. I had to leave behind a rose petal in order to keep my promise to Master Guyun and uphold my knightly oath.

C: 别这么严肃，聊两句嘛。距离咱们俩流落在这个世界快三百多个自转日了。发信器从来也没个响，看来联络大部队是指望不上了。
E: Hey, just relax a bit. It's been over <unbreak>300</unbreak> days since we were both stranded on this planet. The transmitter never rings, so I guess we can't count on that anymore.

C: 您要去哪儿，大人？
E: Where are you going, Your Highness?

C: 唉，如果一开始我能冷静地找爷爷谈谈…也许这件事不会闹出如今这样的轩然大波。
E: If only I had talked to you from the beginning, Grandpa... Maybe things wouldn't have escalated like this.

C: 帕沃尔先生，让您久等了，我们开始「赠剑仪式」吧。
E: Sorry for keeping you waiting, Mr. Paavo. Now, let the Sword-Gifting Ceremony begin.

C: 忆者…你觉得你能安然离开？
E: Memokeeper... Did you think you could just leave?

C: 要是没有你们的帮助，我们可真不知道该怎么办才好！
E: We don't know what we'd do without your help!

C: 一个小板凳，倒还算得上正常。上面画了两个小脚印——还是用蜡笔画的。
E: A little stool that seems quite normal. There are two small footprints drawn on it in crayon.

C: 好家伙，直接给您换了种鸟类。
E: This guy is mixing up his birds here.

C: 竟然不行吗？看来花火小姐比我想象中还要「严谨」一些。
E: It doesn't? Looks like Miss Sparkle is more careful than I thought.

C: 正确答案是——「花火」！
E: The correct answer is: "Sparkle"!

C: 所以，凶手究竟是谁？
E: So who exactly is the murderer?

C: 证据就是这张板凳，对么？
E: This stool is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 元会算法读取完成，输入玉兆运行。
E: Hmm. Meta algorithm reading complete, inputting jade abacus for simulation.

C: {RUBY_B#大凶}大祸临头{RUBY_E#}——这就是太卜司今日的运势。
E: Ahem... it's an {RUBY_B#Great Woe}utter disaster{RUBY_E#}. How's that for a Divination Commission fortune?

C: 太卜大人，虽然没收到您下令，我还是把客人给您带来啦。
E: Master Diviner, I've brought you the guests, though... it wasn't your order I received.

C: 未经本座允可，踏入穷观大阵，不合规制——
E: Entering the Matrix of Prescience without my permission is a breach of protocol...

C: 待此间事了，星核之患拔除，卡芙卡便于仙舟无用。你若有心悬赏，自行带她去见公司便是。联盟对公司的赏金毫无兴趣。
E: Once this is over and the Stellaron curse has been lifted, the Xianzhou will have no more use for Kafka. If you wish to claim the bounty, feel free to take her to the IPC — the Alliance has no interest in the IPC's reward.

C: 到底发生了什么？
E: What just happened?

C: 你在关心我吗？我很好，仙舟对待俘虏一向很客气。
E: Concerned about me? I'm fine, the Xianzhou is always courteous with its captives.

C: 在列车上，我没有和你说话，因为那时我就知道在这里，你和我会单独交谈。所以我想，干嘛不把一切都留到现在呢？你好像有很多事情想问我。
E: I didn't talk to you on the train because I knew you and I would get to talk alone here. Worth waiting for, don't you think? You seem to have a lot to ask me.

C: 星穹列车要来到罗浮，没错，而且还要在仙舟做出一番大事：在艾利欧选择的那个未来里，「巡猎」的力量是不可或缺的。为此，你们必须和联盟产生联系……
E: In the future that Elio chose, the power of The Hunt is indispensable. That's why the Astral Express crew had to come to the Luofu and achieve something important for the Xianzhou. You had to establish a connection with the Alliance...

C: 各位！大事不妙！
E: Listen up! We've got a situation!

C: 然而事起仓促，临敌之际我若与各位讨价还价，岂不是令各位的恩义失色，也令罗浮蒙羞？
E: Nevertheless, the enemy is upon us and time is of the essence — let us not allow monetary affairs to cast a shadow over more pressing matters.

C: 而且，将军相信「丹鼎司」内有人背叛了仙舟。那些自称「药王秘传」的叛徒蓄谋已久，借着地利实施阴谋，我也得尽快行事了。
E: To make matters worse, the general suspects there are traitors in the Alchemy Commission. The self-proclaimed Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been plotting this for a long time — now they're using the location to their advantage. I must take action as soon as possible.

C: 但能将星核送入仙舟，避过监察，植入「建木」…只有六司的人才能办到了。
E: But only someone from the six commissions could bring the Stellaron into the Xianzhou undetected, let alone plant it within the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 哎哟，吓死我了。「建木」长出来那会儿，我正躲在书库里吃零食呢。突然老大一棵树杈子就划破了天空。书里的说法果然不是假的。
E: Phew, that was scary. I was having a snack in the repository when the Ambrosial Arbor started to grow — the trunk suddenly shot right up into the sky. So the legends were right all along...

C: 咱们要走啦。
E: We've gotta get going.

C: 不必伤心，救星这就来了。
E: Worry no more. The knight in shining armor is here to the rescue.

C: 出事的时候，他拉着我、子铭、云澈几个往外头逃。结果到了半路，他自己又转身往里面冲去了。
E: When the incident happened, he dragged me, Ziming, and Yunche to safety... But then he turned around and ran back in.

C: 那个…刚刚几位说你们是来帮忙的，真的吗？
E: Anyway... you said you're here to help us, right?

C: 但这传送距离还是不太够啊……
E: Still, the teleportation range wasn't enough...

C: 依老夫的猜想，「建木」的根系应该深植地底，各处都是。只能说工造司的地界里，应该清剿得差不多了
E: I suspect the Ambrosial Arbor's root system must have spread far underground. The only thing we can say with confidence is that we removed the majority of those within the bounds of the Artisanship Commission.

C: 杨先生很有见地。可惜八千年前，身为「求药使」的先人们不能洞见这背后的隐忧——
E: You are a man of vision, Mr. Yang. It's a shame our ancestors, the Elixir Seekers, were unable to see that hidden curse <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years ago...

C: 去吧，各位，一路小心。老夫在此祝你们顺利。
E: Go, friends, and stay vigilant. I wish you a safe journey.

C: 配好的药在这里。她家就在悠暇庭附近，去那里很容易就能找到她。
E: This is the medicine. Her house is near the Court of Tranquility, it shouldn't be hard to find her.

C: 住手！
E: Stop it!

C: 不知道这是你的日记啊…
E: Oops, I didn't realize this was your diary...

C: 完全理解，希望你不要太难过。
E: I understand, try not to be too upset.

C: 带上这个谛听吧，也许能帮你找到这位…「朋友」。
E: Take this Diting with you, it might just help you find this... "friend."

C: 这早晚的事，就留到以后再说吧…现在我们各退一步，不要相互为难了。
E: If it is to happen sooner or later, I would rather it happen later... Now, let us both take a step back — we needn't make this difficult.

C: 出来吧，小谛听。帮我找到丹枢吧。
E: Time to come out, little Diting. I need you to help me find Dan Shu.

C: {NICKNAME}！你到底怎么了！你们当心点，别伤到{F#她}{M#他}……
E: {NICKNAME}! What happened to you? Be careful, don't hurt {F#her}{M#him}...

C: 罚款…呜呜…
E: I'm fined? Sob, sob...

C: 钟珊，这位就是打算加入咱们「放生帮」的青年才俊吗？
E: Zhongshan, is this the young talent who is interested in joining us?

C: …哈哈哈哈，在贝洛伯格与世隔绝了太久，一时间我很难接受这么新奇的思潮冲击啊。
E: ...Hahahaha! Being isolated in Belobog for so long, it's hard for me to accept such a novel idea.

C: 以和为贵，我呸！我一定要让那两个家伙付出代价，让他们好好偿还我的巨额损失。还有你们俩，走着瞧……
E: Peace? Forget about it! I'll make them pay for the loss I've suffered. And the two of you. Just you wait...

C: 就那个大铁胖子…叫什么来着…「灰熊」！我把它放生了以后，它又跟着我回了家，给了我一个结结实实的拥抱……
E: It was the doing of that huge automaton... the one called Grizzly! After I released it, it followed me to my home and gave me a tight embrace...

C: 我也不清楚发生了什么。按说他们罚款的罚款、拘禁的拘禁。我本来打算去瞧瞧这几个倒霉蛋的状况，看看能帮衬着做点什么。
E: I'm not sure what happened. I was told that they were either fined or imprisoned. I thought of visiting them to see how I could help.

C: 看来绥园闹鬼一事有理有据？
E: Sounds like the hauntings in Fyxestroll Garden could be true after all?

C: …是、是。
E: ...O—Okay.

C: 不需要！无关人等即刻离开，送客。
E: Unnecessary. Those not involved should leave now. Go.

C: 嗯…他被封印在我的尾巴上……
E: Yes... he's trapped in my tail, so...

C: 走吧！接下来吾要和各位分头行动，击破被恚炎附身的傀儡。在这蠢笨岁阳回过神来之前，将「藏月瓠」中岁阳尽数镇压。
E: Let's go! I will find my own way to defeat the pawns possessed by Furynox... and before that foolish heliobus has realized what's happening, I will suppress all of their fragments within the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 算了，情感思考一向非吾所长。
E: Never mind. I've never been good at figuring out emotions.

C: 你的身体故障似乎很严重。
E: Your body seems to be severely malfunctioning.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 除了绥园里咱们几个，造化洪炉破碎时，还有其他岁阳逃逸无踪。他们如今何在？又会在罗浮各处掀起什么水花来？
E: I wasn't the only heliobus to escape when the Creation Furnace was destroyed... there are more of us than the mere few in Fyxestroll Garden. Where are they now? And what will they do to the Luofu?

C: 嘁，十王司根本就不在乎，只有你自己在意得很。
E: Tsk, the Ten-Lords Commission never cared a wink about your frail constitution. You're the only one who makes a big deal about it...

C: 采集这些原料的过程十分危险，故而这款皮靴当季限量发售…呃…两百，不…三百双，本店也只剩下最后三双了。
E: The journey to harvest these materials was highly dangerous — the very reason that only... err... two hundred, no... three hundred pairs of this limited design were sold this season. And our shop only has three pairs left.

C: 看看这条白色的裤子。
E: I'd like to take a look at these white pants.

C: 那这件事就劳烦您了。正好，我手头还有其它客人需要照顾。
E: I'll be troubling you with this matter then. Just as well, I have other guests to look after right now.

C: 哎，这孩子…从小就古怪，不知道遗传了谁的脾气。
E: *sigh* This girl... She's always been an odd one since young. I wonder who she takes after.

C: 找到一件适合自己的衣服和找到知己一样难——所幸有你介绍，我最近找到了不少「知己」。
E: Finding clothing that suits you is as difficult as finding a soulmate — it's all thanks to your recommendation that I've been able to find quite a few "soulmates."

C: 感谢您的同情。但您恐怕不会理解…对于我这样的人来说，这不是能由我做主的选择。来自里面的声音在牵着我走——我没有自由，只能任它摆布。
E: Thank you for your compassion, but I'm afraid you won't understand... For someone like me, this choice isn't up to me. The voice within guides me — I have no freedom, and I am only to be led by them.

C: 放手。
E: Let go.

C: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
E: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

C: {NICKNAME}，真是个好名字。
E: {NICKNAME}, a delightful name.

C: 你应该寻求帮助。
E: You should seek help.

C: （有种不好的预感。最好回梦境里看看莱斯利的情况。）
E: (I have a bad feeling about this. I should return to the dream and check in on Lesley.)

C: …谁、谁在房间里？！
E: ...Who... who is in that room!?

C: 我…可我身上一分钱都没有。自从上次偷偷花钱租带子的事被老妈发现以后，她就再也不给我零花钱了……
E: I... I don't have any money at all. My mom cut off my allowance ever since she caught me secretly renting tapes last time...

C: 你听不清他们对话的词句，但能看到两人脸上洋溢着的笑容——那些飞舞的眉梢和上扬的嘴角足以为证，他们的快乐中绝无表演的痕迹。
E: You cannot hear their conversation clearly, but you can see two people with beaming smiles... Their dancing eyebrows and upturned smiles are proof that their joy is not manufactured in any way.

C: 不懂得自爱的人总是会曲解「爱」的涵义。「爱」需要靠每个人的自我去感知…但你已经放弃了自我，选择了沉沦。
E: People who do not love themselves always misinterpret the meaning of the word "love." "Love" is something that everyone must sense within themselves... But you gave up on yourself long ago. You chose obsession instead.

C: 我们去下个地方吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。应该还有别人在等着我们。
E: Let us continue to the next location, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I imagine someone else is waiting for us.

C: 迪恩先生，明天的拍摄，我会让芙洛拉全程跟着，让她熟悉一下工作环境…您不介意吧？
E: Mr. Dean, I will have Flora accompany you for tomorrow's shoot so she can get used to the working environment... You don't mind, do you?

C: 我说过了，不饿！你没听见吗？
E: I told you I'm not hungry! Can you not hear?

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我有一个发现。
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I have realized something.

C: 说来古怪，明明我之前还那么惧怕会失去「自我」——但从您口中得知真相以后，我反而有了放手的勇气。
E: It is strange to say it, I was so scared before of losing "myself"... But ever since you told me the truth, I've gained the courage to let go.

C: 那么，就把这艘空艇重新起名为<color=#dbc291ff>「塔塔洛夫号」</color>吧——传说中伟大的垃圾之王，它将指引我们走向征服和伟业！
E: Then, we'll rename the airship to <color=#dbc291ff>the Tatalov</color>! The legendary Garbage King will lead us on a path of conquest and greatness!

C: 除去了一桩未了事，还有一桩——船长，根据我的航行经验，我发现船上有个地方有点问题，您最好来亲自看一下。
E: Now that this is done and dusted, there's another issue. Captain, according to my navigational experience, I've realized another problem with the ship. I think it's better if you see it for yourself.

C: 船长…你抱着双臂试试…哈，果然和画像一样。画像里的您文静些，您本人看起来有血有肉的更有活力。
E: Captain... try crossing your arms... Ha, looks just like the portrait. You look more demure in it, but you are much more spirited in person.

C: 你知道我是谁吗？
E: Do you know who I am?

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女爵}{M#爵士}！振聋发聩的名字！
E: {F#Dame}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}! A most enlightening name!

C: 冒昧地问一句，刚才是您把自动化服务终端的电源拔掉了吗？
E: May I ask... Did you just unplug the automated service terminal?

C: （希望接下来的工作也能如此顺利。）
E: (Hope the rest of this job goes just as well.)

C: 呵呵，原来如此…看来砂金总监是想当面和我抢人咯？
E: Haha, so that's how it is... So, Director Aventurine would like to poach people from right under my nose, huh?

C: 怎么样，很棒吧？只要符合条件，房费可是全免哦。
E: What do you think? Awesome, huh? It's a free stay at the hotel if you qualify.

C: 我愿…终止生长……
E: I'm willing... to cease my growth...

C: 模仿下帝垣琼玉。
E: Act like you are playing Celestial Jade.

C: 就是就是！没听过那个经典段子吗？「三缺一，狗东西；鸽牌局，遭雷劈」！
E: Exactly! You know the saying, right? "Bounce from the game, bad luck be your fate!"

C: 这里是丹恒的老家，咱们当然也算是地主啦。
E: This is Dan Heng's home. Of course we count as hosts as well!

C: 唉，可不要因为飞霄就对我怀有什么误会啊。
E: Ah, please don't allow Feixiao to mislead you about me.

C: 说起来，三月你是不是没有参加演武仪典？
E: Come to think of it, you never took part in the Wardance in the end, did you?

C: 嗯，今日临舟饯别就到此为止吧，感谢罗浮仙舟的殷勤招待，丹恒代表列车组谢过了。
E: Indeed. Let's leave the farewell party here for today. On behalf of the Crew, I would like to thank the Xianzhou Luofu for your kind hospitality.

C: 这次罗浮仙舟之行，感受如何？
E: How do you feel about your journey to the Xianzhou Luofu?

C: 干脆假装我们什么也没找到。
E: Let's just pretend that we didn't find anything.

C: 走吧，我们去看星槎！
E: Let's go. We'll go look at some starskiffs!

C: 让迴星港的流水线上流转制造自己的设计，这是所有行舟坊工匠的梦想。
E: Getting your own designs onto the assembly lines in Stargazer Navalia is the dream of all craftsmen in Xianzhou.

C: 他们将小树枝放进培养液里，就像是引爆了一颗炸弹，一瞬间他们藏身的小楼被迅速生长的大树撑破坍塌。
E: When they dropped their bonsai cutting into the culture medium, it was like detonating a bomb — in a flash, their hideaway had a massive tree burst through the roof, causing the whole building to collapse.

C: 有没有想过干脆不做工匠了？
E: Have you ever thought of giving up?

C: （垂直起降）
E: (Take off and land vertically)

C: 惊动逝者，这不妥吧？
E: Wouldn't it be inappropriate for us to disturb the deceased?

C: 现在，我想试试别的工作。
E: Now, I'd like to give other careers a shot.

C: 这件事就包在我身上好了。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 你们刚才在聊什么呢？
E: What were you two chatting about?

C: 我想请你们两位加入我，共同见证卢卡——磐岩镇的搏击冠军——下一步的成长！
E: I want you to join me in witnessing the next steps in the development of Luka, the Boulder Town fighting champion!

C: 但是机器人失窃的时候，我压根没听见「小飞」的报警声…这事我到现在都想不明白。
E: But I didn't hear Little Fay's alarm at all... I still can't figure out how that happened.
You...

C: …好。无限制级别搏击，一局一胜制，以一方选手失去比赛意愿、或裁判判罚视为对局结束……
E: ...Okay. This is a no holds barred contest. One round only. Victory will be declared when one contestant submits, or the fight is stopped by the referee...

C: 对了，你们是怎么跟史瓦罗和解的？说说细节呗。
E: Say, how did you settle your beef with Svarog? Tell me the juicy details.

C: 我想找他聊聊。
E: I kinda wanna talk to him about it.

C: 还真是热闹啊，才从家族的「谐乐大典」中抽身，这么快就有了新的邀请。
E: Well, things are getting lively. We've barely recovered from The Family's Charmony Festival, and we're already being invited to another special event.

C: 两个成年人的交谈中充斥着复杂的术语，从「假定型天体生物化学」到「跨维度演化论」，车厢中充满了沉闷费解的空气。
E: The conversation between the two adults brims with complex jargon, from "Assumptive Astrobiological Chemistry" to "Trans-dimensional Evolutionary Theory," filling the carriage with an air of dense perplexity.

C: 我和这些人都拜在爷爷的名下学习匠艺和剑术。所以外人才会有如此称呼吧？
E: We all train under Grandpa's guidance, learning the art of craftsmanship and swordplay. That's how we got that title, I guess.

C: 可你确实带走了他的剑…
E: But you did take his sword...

C: 我去帮你要回来吧。
E: I'll go get it back for you.

C: 若不是将军阻拦就凭那女孩大言不惭的口气，我一定要让她好好领教一番我的剑法…
E: If it weren't for the general's interference, I would have taught that shameless girl a lesson in swordplay...

C: 似乎听见了狗叫。
E: Did I just hear a dog barking?

C: 看来这位斯科特先生非常顽固，不是很容易说服。唉…彦卿实在不希望和公司闹到撕破脸的地步……
E: This Mr. Skott seems stubborn and difficult to persuade. Honestly... I really don't want to have a vicious confrontation with the IPC...

C: 至于货物本身是否会对目的地产生安全威胁，这个责我们可担不起。嘿嘿，触及到你们知识盲区了吧？法学难着呢！
E: As for whether the cargo itself poses a security threat to the destination, that's not our responsibility. It appears we have reached an area beyond your expertise, doesn't it? The complexities of legal studies are indeed challenging!

C: 谈谈未来黯淡的仕途
E: Talk about his unpromising career prospects.

C: 哼，彦卿自然是有正事要忙，不像云璃姑娘这么闲，有空逛街，却没空还剑。
E: Of course not. Unlike you, Miss Yunli, I have important things to take care of. You, on the other hand, seem to have all the time in the world to wander around without returning my sword.

C: 不过我有个小小的建议，与其在外私斗，我更想看两位小朋友借着演武仪典的机会，上擂台堂堂正正地把对方打个半死，如此一来，什么仇怨都一笔勾销了。
E: However, I have a small suggestion for you. Why don't you settle this dispute fair and square in the Wardance's ring? That way, you can resolve your differences with a proper duel, and put your grudges behind you.

C: 对，就是这个匣子。
E: Yes, it's this case right here.

C: 云璃姑娘有爱剑之心，彦卿是知道的。只可惜剑总会选择与它相配的主人。
E: I know you're all about swords, Miss Yunli. It's just a shame that it's the sword that ultimately chooses its rightful master.

C: 瞧见了吗，你拿什么和我比？我会让三月七学到朱明剑术的要义，让她以我的剑胜出擂台，哼哼。
E: See? See? How can you compete with me? I'll teach March 7th the essence of Zhuming swordplay, so she can win the contest with my sword skills.

C: 演武仪典是个彰显武德，结交四方盟友的好机会。悬剑于仪典之上，出鞘而不伤，展示的不仅是剑，也是云骑的武德威仪。
E: The Wardance is the perfect chance to showcase martial virtue and forge alliances from all over the cosmos. When we unsheathe the sword without drawing blood, we not only display our might but also the martial virtue of the Cloud Knights.

C: 说来也怪，看到竞锋舰的轮廓，我突然有了信心。所以我打算养精蓄锐，等待明天。
E: For some reason, seeing the Skysplitter has boosted my confidence. So, I've decided to conserve my strength for tomorrow.

C: 叔叔们没有责问你们的意思。但是，这儿不对一般居民们开放。
E: Well, I'm not trying to tell you off, but this place is off-limits to the public, you know?

C: 很遗憾，箱子里塞满了各色小巧的机关装置。
E: Unfortunately, the crate is crammed with an assortment of petite, intricate mechanism devices.

C: 不行，进不去…得换个箱子。
E: Nope, won't fit... Better try another.

C: 等脱离关口后，会有接应的兽舰。
E: Once we're past the checkpoint, there will be beast ships waiting for us.

C: 有步离人潜入仙舟…
E: The borisin have infiltrated the Xianzhou...

C: 太卜符玄目击了全过程
E: Fu Xuan, the Master Diviner, witnessed everything firsthand.

C: 东西？
E: An "entity"?

C: 我相信。所以我来了。
E: Yes, I do. That's why I'm here.

C: 语言可以掩饰，但你说话时的目光，呼吸节奏，还有气息都在代你开口。
E: While words can be deceiving, your gaze, your breathing, and your scent... they reveal more than your words do.

C: 幽囚狱…时隔多年，没想到再次回到了这里。
E: The Shackling Prison... I didn't expect to be back here after all these years.

C: 经由此处做出的审断，足以令其他仙舟的管理者信服…至少他们不会妄加推翻。这也是飞霄执意需要我们来此的缘故吧。
E: Therefore, the judgment made here will be sufficient to convince the other administrators of the Xianzhou... At least they won't attempt to challenge the conclusions. Perhaps that's why Feixiao insisted that we come here.

C: 此地关押的多是些大奸大恶，触犯仙舟律条的犯人。这班人中又以步离、慧骃、{RUBY_B#造翼者}羽夷{RUBY_E#}之类的丰饶孽物居多。这些丰饶民，说句不妥帖的，各个身怀绝技…谋划脱狱之事时有发生。
E: Most prisoners locked up here have committed serious crimes violating the Xianzhou Legal Code, and many of them are Denizens of Abundance like borisin, houyhnhnm, and {RUBY_B#featherines}wingweavers{RUBY_E#}. To be honest, these abominations... are pretty good at trying to break out.

C: 两位，路已开启。一旦下到幽狱之底，绝不要轻举妄动。
E: The path is open. Once we descend to the bottom of the prison, please do not do anything reckless.

C: 不，他是曜青仙舟的使节。请您暂时忍耐爪牙，他还有作为人质的价值。带上他，咱们走！
E: No, he's an envoy from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. I plead you to endure him a bit, my Lord, as he's more valuable as a hostage. Take him, guys! Time to move out!

C: 已清点尚能战斗的狱卒，即将开赴各层搜捕。
E: We've gathered all the prison guards who can still fight, and we'll split up and secure each floor.

C: 丹士们从他的遗骸中检测出了一些…复杂的药物成分，似乎能解释这些步离人为何可以变形成狐人。
E: My alchemists detected some... complex ingredients in his remains, which might explain how these borisin were able to disguise themselves as foxians.

C: 唉，「药王秘传」除之不尽，这回丹鼎司怕是又脱不了干系了。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Looks like the Alchemy Commission is involved once again.

C: （检查伤势）
E: (Examine his injuries)

C: 这颗心月世世代代跳动在步离战首们的身体里。因为步离人决出战首的仪式，正是由继任之人剖开前任战首的胸膛，吃下这神肉，让强者拥有它！
E: This moon heart beats within the body of every generation of the Borisin Warhead. In the ritual that decides the new Warhead, the successor cuts open the previous Warhead's chest and consumes the divine heart, thus possessing it as their own!

C: 步离人会不会察觉到了？
E: Will the borisin notice something?

C: 你答应了爷爷还想跑？快走！
E: You made a promise to my grandfather and now you want to run away? Get out there, now!

C: 等等，师父为了让徒弟出人头地而身受重伤退赛？哦哦，如此爱惜弟子的师父可不多见啊。
E: Wait. Your master got himself seriously injured so he could withdraw from the competition and allow you to compete in his place? Wow, not many masters would show such devotion to their disciples.

C: 三月，准备永远是不充分的。
E: March, there is no such thing as completely ready.

C: {NICKNAME}，请你像建木重生时那样，助仙舟一臂之力。我要拜托你和貊泽在这儿搜寻椒丘的下落。
E: {NICKNAME}, please lend us your strength as you did when the Ambrosial Arbor was reborn. I need you and Moze to go in search of Jiaoqiu.

C: 椒丘还活着吗…
E: Is Jiaoqiu still alive...?

C: 云骑的布置情况怎么样了？
E: How are the Cloud Knights doing?

C: 等等！
E: Wait a second!

C: 看来你们早有准备了。
E: I see you were ready for me.

C: 可是战首也将自己的秘密告诉了我，我已了如指掌。
E: But you have told me all of your secrets too, Warhead.

C: 飞霄为什么还不来？这些小崽子实在无趣！
E: Why is Feixiao still not here? I grow bored of these cubs!

C: 死！死！死！
E: Die! Die! Die!

C: 想象一下，如果有一种方法能将其他生命转化为持明。联盟便有了源源不绝的士兵，无需为死伤减员所苦。
E: Imagine if there were a way to transform other life forms into Vidyadhara. The Alliance would then possess an endless stream of soldiers and would not need to worry about casualties.

C: 长老一路高谈阔论，看似忧国忧民，头头是道，结果最后关头还是将一个小女孩来当作保命符，实在是可笑可悯。
E: You talk a big game, as if you have the nation and people's best interests at heart. But when it really matters, you use a small girl as your shield. It's ridiculously pitiful.

C: 三月小姐！我的三月小姐！
E: Miss March! My dear Miss March!

C: 你们若想探望，可以去波月古海边转转，我瞧见她向那儿去了。
E: If you're looking to meet her, the Lunarescent Depths might be your best bet. I spotted her heading that way earlier.

C: 她说，她的船上有一名罗浮仙舟的接渡使，因为遭逢意外漂流在外。出于道义，她将此人送回故乡——
E: She mentioned she has an amicassador of the Xianzhou Luofu on her ship. They were cast adrift after an accident. She's bringing this person home out of a sense of duty —

C: …到处都找不到那条傻狗…陛下，我以前没怎么来过「黄金的时刻」，实在不知道他会跑到哪里去……
E: ...Can't find that idiot pooch anywhere... Your Majesty, I've never really been to the Golden Hour before, so I really don't know where he could have gone to...

C: 别着急，朕会帮你找到他的。唉…不过这城市确实大得出奇，朕以前的首都都没这么大。
E: Worry not. I will help you find him. *sigh* This city is a sprawling maze though. Even my capital was not this vast.

C: 哈哈，您看起来确实身手不凡。
E: Haha, you look like you've got some skills.

C: 报警会不会更好一些？
E: Isn't it better to call the police?

C: 朕很清楚，朕已经越来越不像一个称职的傀儡了。
E: It was clear to me that I was fast losing my position as a puppet ruler.

C: 一个好人…应当敢于直面她曾犯下的罪，坦然接受惩罚。
E: A good person... should be brave to face her former crimes, and stoically accept punishment.

C: 你说对了！
E: You got that right!

C: 你好，年轻的无名客。
E: How are you doing, young Nameless?

C: 你拥有的那份能量…源源不断…似乎在不断向外流溢，超出了任何我所知晓的生物心脏所能负荷的界限。
E: That energy you possess... is inexhaustible and seems to be constantly overflowing. It's more than most beings I know can take.

C: 抱歉打扰，查德威克博士。猎犬接到消息，听说您正在遭受不明人士的骚扰。我们是来帮您驱逐滋事者的。
E: Sorry for disturbing you, Dr. Chadwick. We have received word that you are being harassed by an unknown individual. We're here to help you evict the intruder.

C: 听到「螺丝咕姆」四个字的瞬间，艾丽的五官微微抽动了一下，随后还是维持住了镇静。你对她的职业精神感到由衷的敬佩。
E: Alley's face twitches slightly upon hearing the name of Screwllum, but she is quick to compose herself. You really admire her professionalism.

C: …请给我一些时间，我需要请示一下家主。
E: ...Please excuse me for a moment. I need to consult our family head.

C: 你们管理还挺严格。
E: You guys have stringent regulations here.

C: 螺丝咕姆…？螺丝……
E: Screwllum? Screwy...

C: 士兵——动手。
E: Hey, you. Do it.

C: 我害怕看到一个恶魔…一个夺走无数人生命和家园的凶手。
E: I'm worried I might see a monster... A murderer who has killed countless people and ruined even more lives.

C: 他似乎感受不到你的存在…或许你该先在四周转转，观察一下这个房间。
E: He can't seem to sense your presence... Perhaps, you can take a look around the room first.

C: 你本期待着世界会对这位天才的逝去做出回应……
E: You hoped for a response from the world to the departure of this brilliant mind...

C: 在我的计算中，卡尔德隆•查德威克的研究本能拯救数以亿计的生灵——现在看来，这一计算结果有极大概率将会应验。
E: According to my calculations, Calderon Chadwick's research could have saved hundreds of millions of lives. Now, it appears that this outcome has an extremely high rate of becoming reality.

C: 但你说话不像折纸小鸟。
E: But you don't talk like an origami bird.

C: 那是一个无数梦想萌发的时代。费歇尔先生曾跟我讲述过那个年代——
E: That was a time when countless dreams sprouted. Mr. Fischer once told me of that age...

C: 别瞎想了。现在咋办？直接撬门？
E: We need to focus. What now? Do we break the door open?

C: 你的视线下移——不知何时，男人的身上已然遍布伤口。他早已无法继续挪动双腿了。
E: You look down — at some point, the man's body got covered in wounds. He can no longer move his legs.

C: 要上去看看吗？
E: Do you want to go up and take a look?

C: 不是，等一下，按理说其他折纸鸟应该不知道流梦礁的位置——
E: Wait. Hang on. Normally, other origami birds shouldn't know the location of Dreamflux Reef...

C: 呵呵，从你的表情能够看出，这并不是一个令人感到轻松的故事。
E: Hehe, from your expression, I can tell this isn't going to be a light-hearted story.

C: 拉莱德大人，此言差矣。虽然这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}的言辞稍显朴素，但道理并没有错。
E: Lord Liluder, you are mistaken. This {F#lass'}{M#lad's} words may have been candid, but the reasoning is sound.

C: 我听说过你，来自异邦的战士。圣城当下面临的问题，似乎也与你息息相关。
E: I have heard of you, warrior from the outlands. You also appear to be involved in the problems plaguing the holy city.

C: 很可惜，只有坏消息——不久前，城门口来了一群外邦人。他们没有尝试进城，而是直接往命运重渊去了，现在不知情况如何。
E: Unfortunately, I have only bad tidings. An outlander group arrived at the city gates not long ago. They did not attempt to enter the city, their course set directly for the Abyss of Fate instead. Their circumstances are unknown right now.

C: 要是哪天我没力气走下去了，你还得接过我的衣钵，继续教化奥赫玛人民。
E: If there comes a day when I haven't the strength to walk a step farther, you'll have to take my mantle and carry on guiding the people of Okhema.

C: 现在，是你们表达态度的时候了。请继续吧，伊特罗元老。
E: Now, it's time to declare your stance. Please continue, Elder Etro.

C: 地图上没写。
E: It's not on the map.

C: 这…人家没看到她的嘴长在哪里呀。
E: Uhh... I don't even know where her mouth would be.

C: 那兄弟，要是咱们以后打了败仗，是不是也要挨悬锋城的铁矛啊？
E: Does that mean, brother... That if we are defeated in battle, we will suffer the spear of Castrum Kremnos, too?

C: 帕里斯用臂铠砸在天谴猎手的头盔上，顿时让本就负创的她昏死了过去。
E: Paris smashes his gauntlet against the Furiae Archer's helmet, causing the already injured Titankin to pass out immediately.

C: 等等，我刚刚就想问…阿卡迪亚是什么？
E: Wait, I meant to ask... What is this Arcadia?

C: 因为她有墨涅塔的力量吧。
E: Probably because of Mnestia's power.

C: 戍卫长，你怎么能这么说！
E: Captain, how could you say such things!?

C: 我诅咒你们…得不到{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的指引…得不到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的启示…被{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}予以严正的审判……
E: I curse you... to never gain {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s guidance... to never gain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s guidance... to face stern judgement at the hands of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}...

C: 伙伴，她的记忆…消散了……
E: Partner... her memory... It's disappeared...

C: 嗡？怎么了？
E: Buzz? What's wrong?

C: 不好了！献给尼卡多利的祭品逃跑了！
E: We've got big trouble! The sacrifices to Nikador have escaped!

C: 被怪物袭击的同胞，迷失的逃难者，迄今为止，许多人因她的预言活了下来。
E: Citizens that were attacked by monsters, lost refugees... So far, many have been saved by her prophecies.

C: 如果您是来寻求神谕的，还是改日为好——没能见到她，本身就是一种命运。
E: If you're here seeking a prophecy, it's better to do it some other day — it's probably fate's decree that you're not being able to meet her.

C: 帮帮我，超级迷迷！
E: Help me, Super Mem!

C: 不对，我是缇宝。
E: Nope, I am Tribbie.

C: 「开心点，帕西提亚，以后你就再也不必挨饿了。」
E: "Cheer up, Pasithea. You won't ever have to go hungry again."

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，是你吗？我听到了你的脚步声，还有它的声音。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, is that you? I heard your footsteps and the Titan's sounds.

C: 感觉看到了好多隐私内容。
E: I felt as if I had glimpsed many confidential details.

C: 大祭司，请您告诉我们，圣女大人究竟得到了怎样的谕示？雅努萨波利斯，不，翁法罗斯的命运，将何去何从？
E: High Priest, please tell us. What order did the Holy Maiden receive? As for Janusopolis... no, the destiny of Amphoreus... how would it be?

C: 杂乱的回响，像是很多人哭泣的声音……
E: It's lots of chaotic echoes... Like the sound of many people crying...

C: 一次寻常的开拓。
E: Just another Trailblaze.

C: 列位看官，生死关头，你道是谁力挽狂澜？是那游云天君的后继者、灰色的救主，身携三千万世追忆，驱使万亿黄金火种，将那已近成型的大敌彻底击溃。
E: Good sirs and ladies, at that brink of life and death, who do you think turned back the tide? It was the successor of the Cloudstrider, the Gray Savior, bearing the memories of thirty million lifetimes, wielding the power of trillions of golden Coreflames, who struck down the enemy just as it neared completion.

C: 就让年轻人继续闹腾下去吧。万一哪天，{F#她们}{M#他们}真的能改变寰宇呢？
E: Let the young folks keep stirring things up. Who knows? Maybe they will actually change the universe one day.

C: 但它的「因」呢？在那一天到来前，旅途仍将继续。无穷的可能性在你脚下铺开，只有「记忆」……
E: But what about its "cause"? Until that day comes, the journey continues. Endless possibilities unfold beneath your feet, and only "the memory"...

C: 只有「记忆」，仍被留在昨天。
E: Only "the memory" remains in yesterday.

C: 呜呜伯将一个特殊的坐标标注在了你的终端地图界面上。
E: The Wubbaboo marked a special coordinate on your terminal map interface.

C: 哎呀呀，这不就是老师您亲自给我制定的学习计划吗，我可都一一实践了哦。你怎么说我怎么做，这都还能「学废」，那这是谁的问题呢？
E: Hey hey hey, didn't you give me that curriculum yourself? I did exactly what you told me to do! If you call this "led astray," then whose problem is that?

C: 那倒不是，她还帮过我几次，只不过…她说话比较伤人。
E: Not at all. She helps me often. It's just... she's pretty harsh with her words.

C: 我可以教你。
E: I can coach you.

C: 您继续。
E: Please, go on.

C: 可能是因为大脑没反应过来，说话也总是慢一拍。
E: Maybe it's because my brain hasn't adjusted to it yet, and it's still a beat behind my mouth.

C: 我们正在想办法……
E: We're trying to figure it out...

C: 定位装置信号丢失。
E: Positioning device's signal is lost.

C: 停停停，直接说重点！
E: Hold up. Just tell me the important bits!

C: 你说得对，不过…
E: You're right, but...

C: …别紧张，我只是在测试这玩意的重力感应系统。
E: ...Don't worry. I'm just testing its gravity sensor system.

C: 我的科研生涯怎么会变成这样啊…空间站是不是只有我还混得这么差啊？
E: How did my research career end up like this... Am I the only one in the space station having such a bad time?

C: 嗯，棕色是绝对不会出错的颜色。
E: Mmm, you can't go wrong with brown.

C: 嗯，有点道理…如果「朋友」是东西的话，那我直接用钱买就行了。
E: Well, that makes sense... If "friends" are things, then I can just buy them with money.

C: 你对「真诚」的定义很特别…
E: Your understanding of "sincerity" is pretty unusual...

C: 这是你要的线索。
E: This is the clue you are looking for.

C: 全听你的，老大。
E: It's all up to you, boss.

C: 你就顺着这小鬼的话说吧…
E: Just play along...

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 哦？送「七彩虹」给长辈，还真是…另类的选择。
E: Oh? Rainbows for a parent is... quite a unique choice.

C: 但我可从来没那么想过。他努力做好自己的工作，让我过上了比一般人都好的生活…光是这一点，我就已经非常感激了。
E: But I've never cared about that. He's always worked hard to give me a better life, better than most... That's already enough for me to be truly grateful for him.

C: 「七彩虹」的花语是「平凡的美好」。活在这个年代，还有什么比「平凡的美好」更值得珍惜的呢？
E: In the language of flowers, Rainbow means "simple beauty." In times like this, what else is more precious than "simple beauty?"

C: 这是…七彩虹？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
E: These are... Rainbows? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?

C: 教育部认真审阅过这篇…论文。必须得承认，这篇论文是我见过文笔最好的梦话。
E: The Ministry of Education has carefully reviewed this... thesis. I have to admit, this thesis is the most profound nonsense I've ever seen.

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: …希望你能耐心等候。
E: ...Hope you can exercise some patience.

C: 这下你知道我平时有多憋屈了吧！
E: Now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

C: …不是，这也能答错？答案这么明显，简直呼之欲出啊！
E: ...No, you got that one wrong? But it's so blindingly obvious!

C: 我想让你再去敲打一下教育部的那群喽啰，看看他们的智库里还藏着什么稀奇古怪的题目。怎么样，这事你能搞定吗？
E: I'd like you to go chase up those boffins at the Ministry of Education and see if they have any other weird content inside their archives. How about it, can you help me out?

C: 我的时间非常值钱…
E: My time is very valuable...

C: 不过呀…我有时也禁不住会想，如果能像塔米拉小姐一样，站在聚光灯之下…那该有多美妙……
E: But yeah... I can't help thinking sometimes how wonderful it must be to stand in that spotlight like Tamila... how wonderful it must feel...

C: 给我一束吧，剩下的帮我送到家里，谢谢。
E: Give one bouquet to me now, and send the rest to my place. Thank you.

C: 和你这种大明星还是没法比啦，最多算是爱好。
E: I'm nothing compared to a big star like you! It's just a hobby of mine.

C: 哈哈，年轻人的悟性就是高啊。
E: Hahaha, you young people are pretty sharp.

C: 咳咳，也是。让你看我们父子俩闹这么一出实在是不好意思啊。你先走吧，我们自己解决……
E: *cough* You're right. I... I shouldn't let you see this debacle between my son and I. Go ahead and leave. We can deal with this ourselves.

C: 没错。毕竟我们平时都需要隐秘行动，所以不能在外声张自己的身份——这也是我最初请你帮忙时有所犹豫的原因。
E: That's right. We usually act in secrecy and don't announce our identities, which is why I hesitated to ask for your help.

C: 想请问你能否开具医生证明…
E: Can you write a sick leave letter...?

C: （去找查威问问看吧……）
E: (I'll ask Chavez about it...)

C: 哈哈，一般般啦。只是我工作之外的休闲时间不多，平时只能来这歌德宾馆坐坐，自然也就对各种菜式熟悉了。
E: Hahaha, not really. I don't have a lot of free time, so when I do have the time, I usually come here and sit. That's how I got familiar with the food on offer.

C: 等、等会！你别往我嘴里塞啊呜咳咳咳……
E: W—Wait! Don't shove it in my mouth argh... *cough*

C: 你失去了物理意义上的身体。
E: You have lost the physical body forever.

C: 可能因为你只是裂界的残影…
E: Maybe because you're only an echo of the Fragmentum...

C: 一定、一定！我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
E: Definitely! I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.

C: 要是有了这个，战场上应急抢救的存活率说不定能翻倍。而且也可以在野战医院里推广……
E: With this, the survival rate for emergency treatments on the battlefield could be doubled. And it would also be used in field hospitals...

C: 他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。
E: As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.

C: 不瞒您说，我这身后的酒坛里面装满了五谷精华。仙舟人讲「民以食为天」，这五谷精华赐予了我们体肤、滋润了我们的灵魂和性情。
E: I'll be honest, the jars behind me are filled with the essence of grains. The people of Xianzhou believe that food is the paramount necessity of the people, and this essence nourishes our bodies, moisturizes our souls, and shapes our temperament.

C: 不老的容颜。
E: To always look young.

C: 我…忘情了？
E: Did I... forget anything?

C: （告知你刚才看到的一切）
E: (Tell him what you just saw.)

C: 细腻而富有肌理，就像红烧肉一样…依稀记得在公司的拍卖会上，有某种古玩的卖点也是如此。不知道从翁法罗斯出去之后，你能不能为它也附加上可以参加拍卖会的价值？
E: Sinewy and full of texture, just like braised meat... You vaguely recall such a characteristic for a certain antique at an IPC auction. You wonder whether you could tack an auction-worthy price on this after you leave Amphoreus?

C: 如果自己去拨动一下琴弦，能发出不同的声音吗？说干就干。
E: If you twang the strings yourself, will they make different sounds? Let's try it.

C: 疲惫的迎宾员重新回到了它的岗位，有趣，连浴场的灯柱都需要休息——说到底，这里可是法吉娜的地盘。
E: The exhausted usher returns to their post. That's interesting — even the lampposts in the baths need to take a rest. After all, this is Phagousa's turf.

C: 星际通缉犯「千楼冢」伏案自首，声称自己是波尔卡•卡卡目的目标。
E: The interstellar wanted criminal "Mausolea" has turned herself in, claiming to be the next target of Polka Kakamond.

C: 激雷乐队的告别演出在多世界圆满落幕，「记忆」得以延续。
E: The farewell performance of the band Sizzling Thunder has come to an end on multiple worlds, but the "memories" continue.

C: 它们在岁月的长河中相融又分离。
E: They unite and separate in the river of time.

C: 世界向我倾泻而来，如山泉；我双目清明，却看不清自己。
E: The world pours itself upon me like a spring. My eyes are clear, yet I cannot see myself.

C: 雅努斯的火种存放于此，
E: The Coreflame of Janus is housed here.

C: 你记住了「曾在明亮时得到过火柴」
E: You remembered "Receiving Matches When It Was Bright."

C: 青草已悄然爬上雕像的衣褶，蓝花在它脚下绽放。这尊无面的守护者像是已经在此驻足了千年，静静旁观着一代又一代学者经过。
E: Grass has quietly crept up the folds of the statue's garments, and blue flowers bloom at its feet. The faceless guardian appears to have stood here for millennia, silently observing generations of scholars as they pass by.

C: 在王的治理下，想必人们会如此形容——那是个「开拓时代」。
E: Under your rule, it would surely be described as an "Era of Trailblazing."

C: 我们的，心血，和翁法罗斯的，未来。
E: Our... efforts, and Amphoreus'... future.

C: …必不负所托。愿{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}捍卫您的思想，卡林尼库斯大人。
E: ...I will not let you down. May {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} protect your mind, Master Callinicus.

C: 余音绕梁，声音特别长。这个声音消失了以后，你感觉到它还在……
E: The echo lingers, its resonance especially long. Even after the sound fades, you still feel its presence...

C: 有的，但是我们不必参透。
E: Yes, but we don't need to uncover it.

C: 呼呼…也就是说，不管遭遇怎样的危机，程序上的合法性对于做事来说都最重要吗？
E: Phew... So, no matter the crisis, legal legitimacy is the most important thing when taking action?

C: 所有话语都是本狮经过深思熟虑，谨慎做出的回应，不存在错误的可能吼！
E: Every word I speak is a carefully considered, deliberate response. There's no room for error!

C: 那我问你……
E: Now, let me ask you...

C: 除我以外，还有些衣匠也获得了这份恩赐，比方说书记衣匠。我们都继承了阿格莱雅大人的某项天赋……
E: Aside from myself, other Garmentmakers have also received this blessing — the Scribe Garmentmaker for instance. We inherited certain talents from Lady Aglaea...

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「那我问你！你是人类的话…那我问你，你是…你是…」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "If you're a human, then, have you ever had a hairstyle th—that you uh, you had... y—you would, you could... to..." )∋

C: 给朋友们发短信。
E: Send a message to friends.

C: 别，别的我不管。这个确实属于我，我花大价钱从收藏家那买的所有权，有权契的。
E: No, no, that's not the issue. This really is mine — I paid a lot to buy it from a collector, and I have the deed to prove it.

C: 咦？木马里有声音！难道是我妈妈也来了？
E: Huh? It's coming from inside the wooden horse! Has my mom also arrived?

C: 赛飞儿大姐头，这可不是假货…您就别消遣我了，从哪儿来还哪儿去吧，我先溜为敬……
E: Boss Cipher, this is the real deal... Please, leave me alone with this. Just return it where it came from... I'll take my leave...

C: 正是如此。不过，我还是要警告你，要是你敢掖着火种临阵脱逃……
E: Yes. But I must warn you — if you dare hide the Coreflame and run when the time comes...

C: 也许我该庆幸…庆幸自己还是等来了这一刻啊。
E: Maybe I should be grateful... grateful that I've reached this moment.

C: 壁画以金线勾勒出天文仪器、星座图谱与天象变化，艾格勒对翁法罗斯的观测与掌控跃然壁上。你不禁思考，当百眼凝视星空时，它看到了什么？
E: The mural, outlined in gold, depicts astronomical instruments, constellation charts, and celestial phenomena. Aquila's observation and control of Amphoreus come alive on the wall. You can't help but wonder: What did the Hundred Eyes see when it gazed upon the stars?

C: 不知道其中的卫兵如何了…你有些关心，毕竟那恐怕也是你即将面临的命运。
E: What happened to the guards stationed here? You wonder for a moment—perhaps because their fate might soon be yours.

C: 你从哪进的货？
E: Where do you get your stock from?

C: 酣醉的众人正围着同样酩酊的飞天坛递起舞…好怪哦，还是绕路吧。
E: The drunken masses are dancing around an equally besotted Flying Amphora... it's weird. Let's take the long way around.

C: 那么为何…你的眼中，仍是沉沦与悲疑？
E: Then why... are your eyes full of despondency and sorrowful uncertainty?

C: 水系当然克制电系了！不对，可能记混了…总之我们有最真实的物理引擎喀！
E: Of course! Water beats electric! Wait, I might've got my facts mixed up... Anyway, our physics simulation is absolutely flawless, crrk!

C: 浑身舒爽喀！
E: Ahhh, so refreshing!

C: 你也一起来找吧，一定要找出来。
E: Help Pom-Pom look for it. We have to find it.

C: 破了也不修修？
E: The mirror is broken. Why isn't it repaired?

C: 这是个非常棒的问题，可惜镜子无法回答你，你甚至不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
E: That's a great question, but the mirror can't answer it. You don't even remember there being such a mirror on the Express.

C: 以后，你只需要定期进入「忘却之庭」就可以了。我们会给予你丰富的回报。
E: From now on, all you have to do is enter the Forgotten Hall periodically, and we'll give you an abundant amount of rewards.

C: 进入。
E: Enter.

C: 相信我，这次你想穿过铁卫的防线，难度绝对要大上好几倍！
E: Trust me, you'll find it several times tougher this time if you want to break through the defensive line!

C: 这次行动的目标简单明了——扫荡「残响回廊」，把一路上撞见的裂界怪物全都清理干净。
E: This next goal is simple and clear — charge the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all the Fragmentum monsters there.

C: （那是？佩佩？）
E: (Is that... Peppy?)

C: （这不是很正常吗？）
E: (Is that not normal?)

C: 可惜我们走散了，或许…你可以去找找看，或许它们会知道点什么。
E: It's a pity we all got scattered, or... You could go look for them — they might know something.

C: （被发现了！快跑！）
E: (We've been made! Run!)

C: 这家伙信众很多，你得<color=#dbc291ff>当面揭穿它的谎言</color>才行。
E: This fellow has many believers, so you'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>expose its lies</color>.

C: 一个平平无奇的冲水马桶，你决定——
E: An ordinary-looking toilet. You decide to...

C: 但很可惜，它连冲水按钮都够不着。
E: What a pity! It can't even reach the flush.

C: 你干脆说我能膨胀变大，瞬间长成五米高算了，反正都是污蔑，没差。
E: You might as well say I can expand and grow 5 meters tall instantly? It's all slander anyway. Who cares?

C: 威胁有用的话，还要安保机器人做什么。
E: If threats worked, we wouldn't need security robots.

C: 我也没头绪。
E: I have no idea.

C: （那家伙应该不在这个舱段，我得回去查查它在哪儿。）
E: (That guy can't be in this zone. I have to go back and find out where he is.)

C: 只是先预习一遍。
E: Just sneaking a peek for now.

C: 她的拥抱一样温暖。
E: Her embrace was just as warm as anyone else's.

C: {NICKNAME}来说的话，的确很可信呢！人家也很想被她抱抱呀。
E: If you say that, {NICKNAME}, then that's a trustworthy statement! I'd love a hug from her, too.

C: （不知道会有怎样的货运星槎到港，有点期待了……）
E: (I dunno what kinda freight starskiff is gonna dock at the port. But not gonna lie, I'm low-key excited to see what random things they'll bring.)

C: 在梦里，我是一名负责轨道矿车的老师傅，带着一个小徒弟…怎么会有这么奇怪的梦呢？
E: In the dream, I was a master craftsman in charge of railway mine carts, with a little apprentice... How could I have such a strange dream?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我就知道，咱俩可是好朋友啊。
E: I knew we were good friends.

C: 您是我们「寻圈」的大名人，哪一个玩「寻径指津」的认不得您的脸？
E: You're a big name in the community. Everyone that plays "Pathfinder" recognizes you.

C: 不不不，您误会了！我把架设私服的人找了出来，然后以暴制暴……
E: No, don't just jump the gun! I found the culprits responsible for making the private server and punished them through violent means...

C: 你就直说吧，什么事情？
E: Let's cut the chase. What do you need?

C: 恭喜您在「枘凿六合•Remake」测试活动中获得以下奖励，请注意查收。
E: Congratulations! You've obtained the following rewards from the "Hexanexus: Remake" beta. You may check them in your inventory.

C: 其他部分会在哪里呢？这里已经没有更多预言了…
E: Where are the other parts? There aren't any more prophecies here...

C: 不给~
E: Not for you~

C: 嗯…有位织者通晓各种偏门知识。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的升降梯井</color>，把自己伪装成了墙壁的一部分。要抓住时机才能见到它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who possesses knowledge of all unorthodox sorts. The golden thread brings tidings: They now secretly reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the Marmoreal Palace's elevator shaft</color>, disguising themselves as part of the wall. You need to catch the right opportunity to see them.

C: 嗯…有位织者天真地向壁上浮雕施以援手。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>墙壁的浮雕上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who naively offers assistance to the frescos on the wall. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>upon the wall relief</color>. Go there and look for them.

C: 嗯…有位织者倾心于搜集往世流传的诗篇，常为其中的桥段心潮澎湃。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>蛇头雕塑的口中</color>小憩，不知它是否又有新的见闻？
E: Hmm... There is a weaver devoted to collecting poems passed down through generations, often touched by their words. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>in the mouth of a serpent-headed statue</color>. I wonder if they have witnessed something new once again.

C: 我找到了许多若虫。
E: I have found many nymphs.
Four warriors.

C: 大敌当前，我自然也想为奥赫玛出一份力啊。
E: With the enemy at our gates, I naturally also wish to do my part for Okhema.

C: 塔兰顿管不管不要紧，我是管定了——桀桀，敢拦在我的面前，就准备付出代价！
E: I don't care if Talanton has no interest, but my interest is fixed now! Hehe. If you dare stand in my way, you'd best be prepared to pay the price!

C: 唉，到此为止吧。宝箱您尽管拿去，我今天没有和您争抢的心情。
E: Ah, I've had enough. Just take the chest. I'm not in the mood to fight with you today.

C: 当防盗大使。
E: Become an anti-theft ambassador.

C: 桀桀桀，您在说什么笑话呢？我，唯唯诺诺、正直礼貌、好奇又充满干劲，被欺负之后，无能狂怒地放着狠话？
E: Crrkk, whose leg are you pulling? Me? Obsequious and earnestly polite? Curious and full of energy? Only unleashing harsh words in a fit of powerless rage after being bullied?

C: 闲聊而已，别太慌张。
E: We're just chatting, don't get antsy.

C: ……是我。
E: It's me.

C: （随便挥手打发它走。）
E: (Wave them away.)

C: 嗯？诡计之泰坦也是泰坦吧？如果说的都是大白话，那还怎么维持泰坦的威严啊？
E: Of course! The Trickery Titan is a Titan, right? If they're all just talking nonsense, then how do Titans maintain their dignity?

C: 人们都说，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}老祖能在死人的世界来去自由——但要我说，这事情也没他们讲得那么特殊。
E: They say ancestor {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} could freely traverse the world of the dead — but honestly, it's not as remarkable as they make it out to be.

C: 咱们这个世界啊，活着的人不像活着，死了的人不像死了——但只有骗子永远都是骗子，因为他就算说了实话，你们也没人敢信！桀桀桀桀。
E: In our world, the living don't quite seem alive, and the dead don't quite seem dead — but a trickster is always a trickster, because even when telling the truth, nobody dares trust them! Hehehe.

C: 桀桀桀…原来你是这么看呀。
E: Hehe... So that's your theory, is it?

C: 和…你…玩…玩……
E: Just... wanna... play... with... you...

C: 没错没错！这正是江洋大盗最重要的精神。
E: That's right! This is the true spirit of being a master thief!

C: 巴特鲁斯会买下奥赫玛的一整条街，以后想偷哪家就偷哪家；您呢，以后要是想回来坐坐，举会儿黎明机器玩玩也不在话下……
E: I'll buy a whole street in Okhema to rob any place whenever I want. And you, if you ever want to come back and visit, you can play with the Dawn Device all you want...

C: 真让人恍如隔世
E: It really feels like a lifetime ago.

C: 我倒是也希望…不过那位学者前辈专门叮嘱过我，此事或许与世界背后的本质规律有关，在真的发现什么之前最好不要张扬……
E: I would like to, but the scholar specifically warned me that the research might be linked to the underlying rules of the world, and that we shouldn't talk about it openly before we make concrete discoveries...

C: 绿灯的确变成了红灯。只是除此之外，你也感受不到任何其他的变化。看来，只有来古士本人才能对结果加以解析……
E: The green light indeed turned red. Other than that, you couldn't sense any changes. It seems only Lygus can interpret the results...

C: 有够敷衍的。
E: Quite unhelpful.

C: 能够使它显现的谜题已经在刚刚的房间里布置好了，但解答的方式好像和之前不一样。感觉<color=#dbc291ff>相关的线索压根就不在这两个房间里</color>……
E: The puzzle to reveal it is set up in the previous room, but the solution seems to differ from before. It feels like <color=#dbc291ff>the clues aren't even in these two rooms</color>...

C: 风——好——喧嚣——啊——哗啦——
E: The wind—so—loud—ahhh— *whoosh*

C: 早说有奖励嘛！
E: You should've said there was a reward sooner!

C: …「愚不可及」。
E: ...Unsurpassed idiocy.

C: 呃啊…还没有起效吗…你…你是……
E: Ngh... It's still not working... You... who are you...?

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您用欧洛尼斯的力量，打开最后一重秘术锁吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!

C: 按「十王司」律条，吾身为判官，不牵外缘。但你们助吾脱身，吾便规劝一句：趁早离去。
E: As a judge in the employ of the Ten-Lords Commission, I am forbidden from interfering in the affairs of outsiders. However, seeing as you came to my aid, a word of advice: Leave as soon as possible.

C: 我该做什么？
E: What should I do?

C: 你的伤痛和疲惫一扫而空……
E: Your pain and exhaustion have been swept away...

C: 第一个诱饵是你，你假扮星神阿基维利，看看能不能招来几个认识的；第二个诱饵是命途，根据你在战斗中表现出的倾向，对应的命途会产生回响……
E: The first piece of bait is you. Pretend to be the Aeon Akivili and see if you can attract a few of their acquaintances. The second piece of bait is the Paths. Based on the combat tendencies you've demonstrated, the corresponding Path should produce a Resonance...

C: 「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」黑塔回答，「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」
E: "Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade," Herta replies. "Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."

C: 我还是有很多困惑。
E: I'm still very confused.

C: 「你听见了吗？」黑塔激动地拍起了手，「『秩序』向『存护』发起了邀请！要命，塔伊兹育罗斯是被众神合力置于死地的！克里珀的反应很有趣——看来『秩序』和祂有什么交易，我想八成也跟奥博洛斯相关！凭我对太一的了解，这家伙容忍不了任何『无序』。」
E: "Did you hear that?" Herta claps her hands excitedly. "The Order has extended an invitation to the Preservation! Tayzzyronth was put to death by the joint efforts of all Aeons! Qlipoth's response is intriguing. It seems like Qlipoth has a secret deal with the Order, and I'm eighty percent sure it is related to Oroboros! As far as I know about Ena's character, THEY could not tolerate any disorder."

C: 站远一点。
E: Stand further away.

C: 你相信祂的指间抹起彩虹色的水波——你的心绪被抚平，游走于拼图碎片、现代性的多重面孔与主义里，你相信祂已经抱住你，你也已成为意志集结的孩子！你有些迟疑，却又无法拒绝，甚至渴望更多地得到祂、拥抱祂……
E: You believe that rainbow-colored ripples stir to life between THEIR fingers. Your emotions are soothed as you navigate through the puzzle pieces and the multiple facets and ideologies of modernity. You believe you are in THEIR arms, and you have become one of the children of this united will! You hesitate slightly, yet you cannot resist, and even yearn for more of THEM and THEIR embrace...

C: 一只放声大笑的虫子曾与无数人擦肩而过，一位试图自灭的士兵因此获得「喜悦」，转而变成求生的欲望。可一只虫子所能散播的快乐太少，其总在三天内波动、稀释、再次凝聚。
E: A worm who lets out a bellowing laugh once rubbed shoulders with countless people. A soldier who's trying to kill himself thus gains "joy," which in turn becomes the desire to live. But the joy that a mere single worm can spread is limited; it is always fluctuating, diluting and coalescing in three days.

C: 阮•梅…可能…但也不一定。
E: Ruan Mei... may have... but I can't be sure.

C: 「当然。」螺丝咕姆说，「星际和平公司因两次帝皇战争而戒备无机生命，我一直致力于维系机械与人类之间的桥梁——直至今天。」
E: "Naturally." Screwllum says. "IPC is wary of inorganics due to the two Emperor's Wars. To this day, I have always endeavored to bridge relations between machine and man."

C: 「嗯，不必深究，在这儿观赏也挺好。」黑塔闭上了眼睛，哼唧起小调，「影响又怎样？我知道那个机器头，祂的时刻是不会被扰乱的。『善见天』在哪儿？也许在宇宙之外也说不定。不知道战争年代的生命如何抵达了那里——可能是浮黎留下了些什么。」
E: "Mm, don't think too hard. Admiring the sight from here is pretty nice too." Herta closes her eyes and starts humming a tune. "So what if it affects us? I know that Droidhead. THEIR moments will not be disrupted. Where is the Eden of Blessed Insight? Maybe it's beyond the universe, who knows. How lives who have never seen war arrive at that place... Maybe it was something that Fuli left behind."

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我在此地…可以洞悉一切。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I can perceive everything here.

C: 法恩莎手下的「护卫队」将惑神星的「精神调控」运用到极致，通过曼妙浪漫，如香料般的语调，将古老『政宣部』反抗无机生命的行为进行层层包装。
E: The Guardians under Farnsha have been utilizing Planet Temptra's Psychological Manipulation skill to its fullest. Through an alluring, spice-like tone, they intricately package the ancient Outreach and Engagement Division's resistance against the inorganic lives as something else.

C: 平等的痛苦在无数个夜晚回到他们的梦中。有时它们幽暗如一缕缕烛火，有时它们跳出来，几乎要产生人形，变成一种「神秘」的造物。
E: Equal pain returned to their dreams on countless nights. Sometimes, they were as dim as candlelights. Other times, they jumped out and almost took on a human form, turning into a mysterious creature.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我救不了它。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I can't save it.

C: 绝对不会。
E: Not a chance.

C: 击灭虫群的侧翼。
E: Smash the flanks of the Swarm.

C: 他们都听话了。
E: They all listened.

C: 惊讶之余，客人们逐渐理解，那些关于你的流言蜚语多半具有很高的真实性。一位年轻的学者斗胆询问你的研发思路，哦，真是个不错的问题。
E: Not only were they surprised, but the guests gradually came to realize that the rumors regarding you were most likely true. One young scholar boldly inquired about the reasoning behind your research. Oh, what a fantastic question.

C: 降低高度。
E: Decrease your altitude.

C: 完美社会的发动机？
E: The engine of a perfect society?

C: 后面肯定还有机会。
E: There will be more opportunities.

C: 帝皇陨落后，针对无机生命的清算和复仇使帝皇的遗产严重受损。
E: After the Emperor's fall, the cleansing and revenge against inorganic beings severely damaged the Emperor's legacy.

C: 但这不是问题，「在物理空间上，用引擎和管线，将学派拥有的数十台『权杖』直接相连！」<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹造物学派</color>的首席学士，莫利特振臂高呼。引擎点火，「权杖」逐渐在空间凹陷中沉没，等待自宇宙的另一端出现。
E: But this isn't the problem: "Directly link up the dozens of Scepters among the schools using the engine and cables in physical space!" Mollett, Chief Scholar of the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Pure Creation</color>, raises his arms and hoots. The engine ignites, and the Scepters gradually sink into the spatial depression, waiting to appear on the other side of the universe.

C: 「之前有说过吧？<color=#dbc291ff>知识圆圈</color>，每当我想要走出它，创造更大的圆圈时，就会有意外发生。」
E: "I think I mentioned it before, right? The <color=#dbc291ff>Circle of Knowledge</color> — each time I try to exit it and create a bigger circle, there would be an accident."

C: 为已死的帝皇而建。
E: Built for the deceased Emperor.

C: 那就…如她所愿。「权杖」高扬，轻点凡人颅顶，赞颂求知之人，她必偿所愿。
E: Then... As she wishes. The Scepters rise high and gently tap themselves on the mortal's head. Those who seek and glorify knowledge shall receive what they desire.

C: 她将糕点徐徐吞下，「不过，即便是寂静领主也不会想到，底层代码里还藏着一段微型切片。」
E: She nibbles on the cake slowly, "But even the Lord of Silence won't guess that a minuscule slice is hiding in the system's root."

C: 「怎么会，我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。知道答案就够了。」
E: "Of course not! We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. Knowing the answer is enough."

C: 「……不愧是天才们的杀手。只是一次现身，就几乎让整个项目瘫痪报废。」
E: "...A real killer of geniuses indeed. With just one appearance, she nearly brought the entire project to a grinding halt."

C: 他们并不分享你携子嗣带来的猎物，相反，你乐于见到他们为你引来更多的蠹虫。「乐于」，这是你在演化中得到的，最具智慧的态度。
E: They do not share in the prey that you bring in with your offspring. To the contrary, you are pleased to see that they are attracting more insects to your location. This act of "taking pleasure" is the most intellectual attitude function you have developed during evolution.

C: 不就是个拼装骰子嘛……
E: It's just a customizable die...

C: 你骰运不行。
E: The dice is not with you.

C: 「这种商店该由斯蒂芬看管，可惜他不愿露面。我把藏品使用权限都为你打开了，不错吧？」黑塔叉腰，「得拿<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>来换，这是基础游戏规则。」
E: "Stephen should manage stores like this, but he refuses to make an appearance. I've given you permission to use all the exhibits here. Isn't it great?" With her arms on her waist, Herta continues, "You still have to exchange them with <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>, though. That's a basic rule of the game."

C: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她手拿几枚画满「斯蒂芬•劳艾德戳记」的扑满手办。
E: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She is holding a few Trotter figurines stamped all over with "Stephen Lloyd's seal'."

C: 「热夜之都电视购物频道，在节目开始，我们先回复观众来电，对于测不准匣的投诉。众所周知，如果测不准匣可以测得准，那么它应该名叫测得准匣……呲……」
E: "You're watching the Capital of Passion infomercial channel. Before we start, we'd like to respond to the complaints on the Casket of Inaccuracy lodged by our viewers. As you know, if the Casket of Inaccuracy is accurate, it should be called the 'Casket of Accuracy' instead... *crackle*..."

C: 这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你感到自己被抽走了生命力。
E: This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you can feel your vitality being drained.

C: 她远远地向你开口：「克里珀注视着我们，祂的视线很温暖。你可以从多余的材料里挑选你喜欢的。」
E: She speaks to you from a distance, "Qlipoth is gazing at us with a warm look. You can pick whatever you like from the excess materials."

C: 「我非常抱歉。」你的记忆被打断。你抬头，看到荷官十支机械手臂缠绞在一起，组成旋转矩阵，重力波正在汇聚成子弹，你已经成为他的敌人。
E: "I'm very sorry." Your memory has been interrupted. You look up at the dealer, whose ten arms twist together, forming a spinning matrix and making bullets by converging the gravitational waves.

C: 你获得了1个组件。
E: You obtained 1 component.

C: 你接过它…「纯美」的花瓣感动了你。
E: You receive it... The petals of Beauty melt your heart.

C: 你怀疑起接待员的职业素养。
E: You start to doubt the waiter's professionalism.

C: 「潮流扭蛋人」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
E: The trendy gachapon figure drops from the claw. You get nothing.

C: 你还想继续玩…但这个街机坏掉了。下次再来吧。
E: You want to continue playing, but the arcade machine has broken. Just come back next time.

C: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
E: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

C: 千万不要是惊吓。
E: It'd better not be an unpleasant one.

C: 「否则，本机有理由判断，对您的支援无法使公司利益最大化，并拒绝您的消费要求——哔嘟，即将开始对您进行战斗力检定。」
E: "Or else, this machine will have justifiable cause to decide that supporting you will not stand to maximize the benefit for IPC and reject your request. Beep. Beep. Commencing your combat capability test."

C: 食虫菌毯。
E: Insect-eating fungi.

C: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
E: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

C: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
E: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

C: 你深刻明白一个道理，再多的钱也要有命来花。
E: You become deeply aware of a great truth: That no matter how much money you have, you have to be alive to spend it.

C: 「简单来说就是，只要献上祭品，你能在这里钓上任何东西，甚至包括鱼。」向导毫无敬畏地翻译道。
E: "Simply put, as long as you offer tribute, you can catch anything you want here, even fish." The guide irreverently translates.

C: 同理，尝试对虚数进行相同测算……
E: Similarly, we're trying to perform a similar observation and calculation on the Imaginary element...

C: 岁月流转，伤痕累累的你已重新回到自己的故乡。你看向窗外，刻法勒的光辉仍庇佑着圣城，而风中流传的诗句，已将你的名字传扬。
E: As the years pass, you return to your hometown once more, battered and scarred. You look out the window. Kephale's radiance still embraces the holy city, yet poems carried by the wind have already spread your renown far and wide.

C: 你身处某张怪异的棋盘，两个模糊的身影在高处摇曳，依照顺序投掷手中的木棍，将你的位置挪动。你的身子圆滚滚的，就像…一颗轮回棋的棋子。
E: You find yourself on a strange chessboard. Two hazy figures sway above, throwing out wooden sticks from their hands in order, and moving your position. Your body is round and smooth, just like... a Cyclicality chesspiece.

C: 前来协助盟友的法吉娜，将雨水都化作蜜酿，让数万的兵士陷入酣醉。愤怒的战争之神点燃了天空的酿池，令火烧的残云遍布黄昏。
E: Phagousa, arriving to aid their ally, transformed the rain into honey brew, intoxicating tens of thousands of soldiers. The enraged god of war set celestial brew ponds ablaze, covering the twilight with burning clouds.

C: 赌徒的泄愤。
E: The gambler's rant.

C: 没人真心爱戴它。
E: No one truly loves them.

C: 她派遣仆人带来一瓢浑浊的河水，将它偷偷倒进国王的陶碗，希望以此杀死令他魂不守舍的情人。
E: She sent her servant to retrieve a scoop of the river's muddy waters, secretly pouring it into the king's clay bowl in hopes of killing the lover who captivated him.

C: 它是一条巨龙。
E: They may show as a dragon.

C: 所以海洋的风讥讽大地。
E: Thus, the ocean's winds mock the land.

C: 闪电撕裂天空，空气散发出焦灼的气味，这是艾格勒在震怒。他那一百只眼睛都没能发现你，于是便降下漫天神雷企图将你击碎。
E: A bolt of lightning splits the heavens, the air thick with the sharp tang of scorch — Aquila is furious. Their hundred eyes have failed them, and in a fit of rage, they unleash a relentless storm of divine thunder, determined to obliterate you.

C: 「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
E: "So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.

C: 「这一定是雅努斯的阴谋！」你嘟囔着消失在迷宫的黑暗中。
E: "This has to be one of Janus' tricks!" you mutter before disappearing into the labyrinth's shadows.

C: 是谁于智慧觉醒之时，制定约束行为的道德，令伦理照耀人心。
E: Who, at the dawn of wisdom's awakening, decreed the morals that bind our deeds, letting ethics illuminate human hearts?

C: 在人类狭隘的道德观念中，公平意味着付出有所得，行善有所赏，施恶有所惩。
E: In the narrow morality that rules humanity, fairness means to give and receive in turn, getting rewarded for doing good, being punished for doing wrong.

C: 在瑟希斯的赐福下，密密麻麻的麦穗从土里长出，春天也回到翁法罗斯。
E: Under Cerces's blessing, dense ears of wheat sprouted forth from the soil, and spring returned to Amphoreus.

C: 当加蒂尔的首领在梦中遇到那阳光般的伟岸身影，他并不知晓自己即将受赐跨越海洋的智慧。
E: When the leader of Kadir encountered that towering, sun-like figure in his dream, he did not yet realize that he was about to be granted the wisdom to cross the ocean.

C: 伟大的启示。
E: A great revelation.

C: 现在的年轻人啊，还是太心浮气躁了点，给你机会你要珍惜啊！
E: Young people these days always have such high aspirations. They don't know how to cherish a great opportunity right in front of them!

C: 「你看看她…这就是我们曾经的家。这就是曾经的我们。在这里曾经生活着每一个人——你爱的人，你认识的人——每一个人！无论是谁，都将在此度过一生……
E: "Look at her... This used to be our home and our past. Everyone, including the people you love and know, stayed there! People were originally bound to spend their entire lives there regardless of who they are..."

C: 你注意到机器人身上有一个凸出的按钮，看上去像是电源标志，你决定——
E: You notice a button sticking out of the robot, looking like it might be a power button. You decide to —

C: 陶瓷质地的表面上贴着张便条：「奇物『新世界大门』已被应物科████实验借用，非实验人员眼看手勿动。」
E: There's a note stuck to the ceramic surface: "Curio: Door to A New World, loaned to ████ at the Department of Implement Arts for experiments. Non-research personnel should not touch this object."

C: 冠军！请给我签名！
E: Champion! Could I pleeeease get your autograph?

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：理性的溃败。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The fall of rationality."

C: 在那大理石柱下列席的本该是来自星系各地最智慧的头脑，可如今只充满无数嚣叫的钢铁身躯。他们高举铁拳，激昂，愤懑，用电流模拟刺耳嘈杂的通用语：
E: The seats below the marble pillars were supposed to be filled by the most brilliant minds of the star system, but are now occupied by countless screaming steel bodies. They raise their metallic fists in the air indignantly and use electrical currents to noisily and shrilly imitate the common tongue:

C: 我一眼就看出你不是人！
E: It's obvious that you're not a real human!

C: 这地方光秃秃的，简直一点也不美观嗡…所有柱子上都该有一盏灯才对嗡！
E: It's basically barren in here, nothing to write home about... They don't even have lamps for these pillars!

C: 没想到如今还能见到此种情景，我也要燃起来了喀！
E: I never thought I'd get to witness such a thing today. It's really getting me fired up!

C: 给我讲讲这个「大胃王挑战赛」。
E: Tell me about this Competitive Eater Championship.

C: 「幸」或「不幸」…都是绝对的私人体验。他者无权干涉。
E: Good or bad luck... is all a matter of personal experience. No one has the right to interfere.

C: 你微微俯下身去，想看清纸张上潦草的手写字迹——
E: You lean down slightly, trying to make out the messy handwriting on the paper...

C: 火焰是最棒的…
E: Fire is the best...

C: 这世上曾经有牛吗…
E: Were there cows in this world...

C: 瑟希斯？在哪呢？
E: Cerces? Where?

C: ——这小小的一捧，恰好代表了一人份的「幸运」。恭喜你，{NICKNAME}。
E: This small treasure represents enough good luck for one person. Congratulations, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你不会是被那个东西给…
E: Could you have been... by the thing...

C: 在你的脑海中，关于「后巷」的一切记忆似乎正在快速消褪。你已经无法回忆起许多细节，但有一点你却无比确信——
E: In your mind, all memories of this "back alley" are seemingly being quickly purged. You already can't recall many details, but of one thing, you are certain...

C: 一个人在那种暗巷里昏倒…这已经是最好的结果了哦？
E: If someone passes out in a dark alley... that's about the least concerning thing that could happen.

C: 老实说，你这姿态着实有些奇怪…如果要扮演商人，你总该吼两嗓子，佯装叫卖一下吧？
E: To be fair, there's something off about how you're doing this... If you're pretending to be a merchant, you should have to hawk a bit — maybe act like you are selling something?

C: 瞧啊，群山绵延起伏，负世泰坦屹立于天地之间…每每看见这景象，我都不由感叹：大地何其壮阔、而虫何其渺小……
E: Behold! Endless mountain ranges, and the Worldbearing Titan towering between heaven and earth... Makes you realize how immense the world is, and how tiny we bugs are in comparison...
Five...

C: ヾ(｡｀Д´｡)ﾉ彡
E: ヾ(｡｀Д´｡)ﾉ彡

C: 左边这棵。
E: The one on the left.

C: 答错了嗡！别灰心，能识破本蝶走位的人，屈指可数嗡！
E: Wrong, buzz! Don't be discouraged. Only a rare few can see through my moves, buzz!

C: 竟然识破了我的走位！织者的尊严和连胜记录，都被打破了嗡……
E: You've seen through my moves!? My honor as a Weaver and my winning streak, both shattered, buzz...

C: 既然如此，我便向你揭露这座古城内隐藏的房间吧。
E: In that case, I'll reveal the hidden room within this ancient city to you.

C: 「Mi」…这应该是第四个音。到底是什么旋律？
