E: "Mi"... this is likely the fourth note. What melody is this?

C: 怎么，你还想再劝我两句？
E: What? Are you still trying to talk me out of it?

C: 你不是说不要劝你了吗？
E: Didn't you say you refused to let me change your mind?

C: 哎，人亦如此，何况鸟乎？
E: Indeed, the same is true with humans. How much truer could it be for birds?

C: 比如说星槎，「星槎人——随时变形状——」，我觉得那还要更厉害一些……
E: For example, a starskiff. A starskiff that could transform at will would have been far more impressive...

C: 同意两票、不同意一票，赌约成立。嘿嘿，要是我还像过去一样做着物流工作，哪能像今天一样为自己命运买单呢。
E: Two for and one against — the bet's settled, then. Heehee, I'd never have control of my own destiny if I were still running around as a courier these days.

C: 你只说真话吗？
E: Are you telling only truths?

C: 哎，这都怪我太贪心了，我这鸟从来不相信什么在线流媒体，要是遇到了喜欢的幻戏，就一定要自己下载下来，哪怕存着不看，我也必须下载下来。
E: Ah, I got too greedy. I don't believe in streaming online media. If I find an immersia I like, I have to download it myself. Even if I don't end up watching it, I must download it.

C: 都能下载回来的嘛。
E: You can download them all again.

C: 在你面前的是，是一只勇敢无畏的机巧鸟，它张开双翅像母鸡护住小鸡一样，将你保护在它的身后。
E: Standing before you is a valiant, fearless cycrane, wings spread wide open as though defending its clutch as it defends you behind it.

C: 这只机巧鸟愤怒地扇动着它的翅膀，仿佛整个洞天的疾风都在它的双翅下汇聚，它的越扇越快，越扇越快，你的眼睛已经追不上它扇动的频率了！
E: This cycrane flaps its wings angrily, as if all the zephyrs of the delve are funneling into his wings. They beat faster and faster, and your eyes can no longer keep up with their frequency!

C: 要想让我回去，就必须接受我的挑战。
E: You'll have to take on my challenge if you're trying to convince me to return.

C: 让我想一想……
E: Let me think it over...

C: 对呀，我们喜欢老大，不需要这些理由，帮我们写作业，就是好老大。
E: Exactly. We don't need any reason to like you. Any boss who can help us with our homework is good in our books.

C: 这儿是司辰宫，是天舶司处理公务的机要中枢，你这样随便动手动脚——等等，怎么又是你啊，之前乱翻公文的时候，我不是警告过你了吗！
E: This is the Palace of Astrum, the private hub for the Sky-Faring Commission where important affairs are handled. You can't just muck about here like that — Hang on. What are you doing back here? Didn't I warn you last time not to mess around with official documents?

C: 只要你出现在司辰宫里，我就会一直、一直盯着你，明白了吗？
E: So long as you're anywhere around the Palace of Astrum, I'll be watching you, capiche? A-n-y-w-h-e-r-e.

C: 勿要以为{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}的目光会有死角，这里的一切风吹草动都无法逃过它的注视。
E: Don't mistakenly think that {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} has blind spots. Everything here is under their watch. Every little movement doesn't escape their gaze.

C: 不许再打了啊！赶快离开，听到没有？
E: Stop it already! Get out of here, you hear me?

C: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
E: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

C: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
E: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

C: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
E: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

C: <size=36>拿来吧你！</size>
E: <size=36>Give it to me!</size>

C: 到底是怎么一回事呢？
E: Just what on earth happened?

C: 我也不知道啊，我跟他说得清清楚楚呢，「工造司最大的货运星槎上」，你看这里不就是吗？可能是这个冒牌货心虚不敢来吧！
E: How would I know? I told him very clearly to meet at "the largest freight starskiff in the Artisanship Commission." Isn't that here? Maybe this impostor is too scared to come!

C: 什么？居然有这种事。
E: What? Is that real?

C: 啧啧，你也是来看笑话的吧？不过你看起来有些面生啊，看起来像是化外民，难道他们约架的事传这么广了？
E: Tsk. You're here for a laugh too, aren't you? But you don't look familiar. I think you're an outworlder. I didn't think these fights were known to so many people?

C: 多美的空间扭曲。
E: What a beautiful space-time distortion...

C: 大哥，这个我不敢抢。
E: Bro, I'm scared to rob them...

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then don't mind if I do.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 但你已离电视机太远，信号渐弱，你隐约间看到了《小小哈努行动》游戏标题的退出按钮。看来你无法再向前迈出半步了。
E: However, you are too far away from the television. The signal is fading. You can vaguely see the "Exit" button in the title of Hanu's Adventure. It looks like you won't be able to move any further ahead.

C: 丹恒的床铺，严格来说是「地铺」。
E: Dan Heng's bed. Strictly speaking, just a bedroll on the floor.

C: 贵宾您这边请…
E: Dear guest, this way please...

C: 是怎么办到的呢？
E: How do they do it?

C: 嘘，要被发现了啦。
E: Shh, we're going to get discovered.

C: 怀着敬意前行吧…
E: Proceed with respect...

C: 公民大会的结果已定！
E: The results of the citizens' assembly have been determined!

C: 莫非遭遇了意外？
E: Is it possible an accident has happened to them?

C: 战斗，惨烈…
E: The battle... it's brutal...

C: 我交罚款吧…
E: I'll pay up...

C: 之后帕姆也会见证你的进步，并给你准备一些小礼物的哦。至于具体是什么礼物…到时候就知道啦！
E: Pom-Pom will keep an eye on your progress and keep preparing some small rewards for you. As for what those will be... You'll find out soon enough!

C: 好啦，列车长给你准备了一份材料，你去用一下合成机试试吧！然后让列车长检验一下你的成果哦！
E: Okay, here're some materials for you then. Go try synthesizing something, go on! Pom-Pom shall be the judge of your labor!

C: 谁给你打一分我去揍谁！
E: Who rated you that? I'll whack 'em!

C: 去做点别的，消耗下体力？
E: Go do something else and burn up some energy?

C: 还…还差一点就能测到了…哎！又失败了！呜，自己测量自己的身体数据果然无法完成帕！
E: ...Almost ready to measure it... Oh no! Failed again! Hoo boy, it sure is hard to measure accurate data about yourself!

C: 怎么回事呢？
E: What's up?

C: 为什么和帕姆的名字这么像啦！
E: Why does that sound so familiar to me!

C: 还是喝果汁吧。
E: I think I'll stick with fruit juice.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 让我试试…呜呜，稍微按一下就好痛哦！
E: Pom-Pom's gonna try... Ouch, the slightest touch hurts so much!

C: 哪有脚印，我怎么没发现！
E: Footprints? I see nothing here!

C: 你反复观察，不断尝试，在侧身<unbreak>45</unbreak>度注视下仔细搜寻，终于发现——
E: You glue your eyes on the floor, trying to find the footprint. Under a <unbreak>45</unbreak>-degree sideways glance, you finally notice...

C: 请教管理经验…
E: Please give me some management advice...

C: 你这样做等于变相拯救了许多新兵的性命。我谨代替禁区全体铁卫，向你致以最崇高的敬意。
E: In doing this, you've actually saved the lives of many new recruits. On behalf of all the Silvermane Guards in the restricted zone, I would like to extend my highest respects to you.

C: 但、但是我们根本不可能打赢那位教官啊……
E: B—But there's no way we can beat that drillmaster...

C: 我享受和裂界战斗。
E: I enjoy fighting the Fragmentum.

C: 我有个大胆的猜测——它也许是模拟了「云吟术」。
E: My best guess is that maybe they've somehow imitated cloudhymn magic.

C: 得了吧你。别做梦了，想点儿实际的吧。
E: Alright, you. Quit dreaming. Let's think more realistically, huh?

C: 出布！
E: Paper!

C: 但你很清楚一件事：你输了，而且输得心服口服。
E: But you know one thing: You lost, and decisively.

C: 呃…我……
E: Uh, I...

C: 今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
E: We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!

C: 但是，你给我记住——有朝一日，等我修炼归来…我一定会为被无端破坏的补给容器们报仇！你给我等着！
E: But I'll be back one day to avenge the broken supply vessel. Just you wait!

C: 你能看看这些通缉令吗？
E: Can you take a look at these wanted posters?

C: 找到贝洛伯格的位置。
E: Find the location of Belobog.

C: 把视线带回贝洛伯格。
E: Now back to Belobog.

C: 沙漠…紧邻着森林和湖区，真是神奇的地理地貌。沙漠里也散布着几座带有名字的城市，养活它们的可能是地下丰富的地髓资源促进的贸易。
E: A desert very close to lakes and forests... What a peculiar landscape. There are a few named cities scattered in the desert. What sustains them must've been the trade fueled by the rich Geomarrow resources found underground.

C: 桌上放着几册装帧精美的书籍。你趁没人注意，便将其翻开随意浏览了起来——
E: Several beautifully bound books are on the desk. When nobody's looking, you crack one of them and browse through at random...

C: 当然了，毕竟这书桌只是个装饰。
E: Of course, this desk is just for decoration.

C: 哇，这就是我一直在找的零件！只要有了这个……
E: Wow, this is just the part I've been looking for! As long as I have this...

C: 我在…贝洛伯格的商业街上。
E: I'm... in the business district of Belobog.

C: 我累了。我要去睡一会儿…我不想再争吵了。我没有力气……
E: I'm tired and want to go to bed. I don't want to fight anymore... I don't have the energy...

C: 拿着，别再干这行了。
E: Take it. Just quit doing this.

C: （再打一下。）
E: (Whack it again.)

C: 甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
E: Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.

C: 我带来的绝不是这东西！
E: This is not what I brought!

C: 不了，我向来遵纪守法。
E: No, I've always obeyed the law.

C: 你一定就是{NICKNAME}吧？久仰大名了！我叫文雯，是鹤运物流的专员。
E: You must be {NICKNAME}, right? I've heard a lot about you! I'm Wenwen, a specialist from Heron Express.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。
E: {NICKNAME}, we meet again.

C: 那是我父亲工厂里生产的零件…可惜后来无良银行对我们的工厂撤资，最后工厂倒闭了，父亲也受了打击卧床不起。
E: It's a component that used to be made in my dad's factory... It's a shame that those heartless bankers pulled their investments from the factory which directly led to its shutdown. My poor dad fell ill then and never really recovered.

C: 现在终于可以卖废品了。
E: Now it's finally time to sell some scrap.

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: 很好，闲聊就到此为止，首先，我要授予你「秘社终身社员」的称号，恭喜你。
E: Great, that's enough chit-chat. First off, I'd like to confer the title of Lifetime Hex Club Membership onto you. Congratulations.

C: …哼，我才不跟你一般见识！我好歹也是博识学会的成员，必须保持涵养……
E: ...Hmm, I'm not stooping to your level! I'm a member of the Intelligentsia Guild and ought to maintain self-discipline...

C: 呵，怎么可能？公司员工虽然能穿越星海，待遇却跟留在母星上没什么两样。那些怀着一腔热血的年轻人，最终达成愿望的少之又少。
E: Er, no? IPC workers might have access to space travel but the pay is hardly better than staying on-planet. Very few of those youths brimming with enthusiasm ever get to achieve their dreams in the end.

C: 哈，那当然！这可是我问了好几个朋友以后才凑出来的搭配。
E: Ha, of course it is! I only put this outfit together after asking several friends about it first.

C: 要不你去加入悲悼伶人吧…
E: Have you ever considered signing up with the Mourning Actors...?

C: 我小时候做的习题都比这好玩一千倍！
E: The schoolwork I did as a kid was a thousand times more fun than this!

C: 怎么说，你见到阿然了吗？她平时一般都在钟表小子广场附近转悠。
E: How's it going? Did you see Ran yet? She's usually hanging out near Clockie Plaza.

C: 原来如此…可惜！不过没关系，我们早晚会找、到、她、的！
E: Is that so... What a pity! But not to worry, because we're going to find. Her. Soon!

C: 动不动就摆出一副受害者的嘴脸，到处索求关注、博取同情——简直是一群精神蠹虫！
E: Always playing the victim at the drop of a hat, milking sympathy and attention all over the place... they're positively a swarm of mental lepisma!

C: 《审判之日》？就这叙事、这运镜，还百亿级知名导演，我看是知名现眼！
E: Judgment Day? With this description, this camerawork, and the ten-billion-dollar director attached, I'm sure it will be a famous source of embarrassment!

C: 自私自利的恶毒女人…我宁愿跟一块顽石当姐妹，也不想和她多相处一秒。
E: What a vicious, calculating woman... I'd rather be sister to a stubborn donkey than spend another second with her.

C: 这幅奇景勾起了我的兴趣——哪个无名客能拒绝探险的邀请呢？
E: The sight piqued my interest — which of the Nameless could ever refuse such an invitation to explore?

C: …那样艰苦的努力却不能为人所知，未免太可惜了些。
E: ...It would be a great pity for such hard work to go unrecognized.

C: 有机会的话，你真该亲眼见识下那副景象…也许可以把它做成梦泡？
E: If you get the chance, you really should try and see that sight with your own eyes... Maybe you could make it into a dream bubble?

C: 如果已经有许多人想要杀你，就别让自己陷入众叛亲离的境地。
E: If you already have people who want your head, don't let it get to the point where you've alienated your own family.

C: 后来我们得知：早在这场战斗发生前，韦兰就把自己手头的提取液全卖掉了，买家是一位出价颇高的面具人。
E: Later on, we learned that Wyland had sold off all the extract he had well before the battle to a masked buyer who paid very good money for it.

C: 如果你愿意帮忙，我可以把资料上的信息与你分享。哦，我还可以告诉你一些关于我自己的秘密……
E: If you're willing to help, I can share the info with you. Oh, and I can tell you a few secrets about myself, too...

C: 那我先走了。
E: I'm off then.

C: 于是我连忙解释说：这是人类历史上最古老的笑话之一——不管往哪儿走，你都是在向前啊！
E: So I hurried and explained to them that this was the oldest joke in the history of mankind — no matter where you're heading, you're walking forward!

C: 我第一次去时没有经验，一下船就呼吸不畅，差点窒息…幸好路人及时找来了医生。
E: When I was there the first time, I was inexperienced and couldn't breathe when I got off the ship... Luckily, a passerby managed to bring me to a physician in time.

C: 我就直说了吧，之所以接下匹诺康尼这个活，就是因为奇迹本杰明需要打一场漂亮的翻身仗，而且必须是一场大胜仗才行！
E: Let me be straight with you — I accepted this job in Penacony because our studio needed a successful project to turn this all around!

C: 这…你看看他们这一个个的，给的算是什么理由？我的团队付出了这么多时间和心血，他们就不能表达出一点儿感激之心吗？
E: Look at the ridiculous things they said about my project! My team and I are so committed to this project. Why can't they just be grateful for what we've done?

C: 随便让外面的人说去吧…我相信我的团队。我们只管稳步把项目做完就行，别的什么都别想。
E: The outsiders can say whatever they want... I have faith in my team. We should focus on completing the project without letting other things distract us.

C: 班尼陷入了一阵思考，他的沉稳冷静令你觉得有些不适应。
E: Benny is absorbed in his thoughts. You aren't used to his composure and calmness.

C: 奇迹本杰明一定会逆转风评！我们要把所有资源都投入到我们的下一个项目——《班尼古堡：海底新生》。看扁我们的人，都给我等着吧！
E: We'll turn the table eventually! We're going to channel all our resources into our next project: Benny's Castle: Seabed Rebirth and prove those who look down on us wrong!

C: 虽然还只是个刚步入职场的新人，但我的梦想是成为像奥斯瓦尔多主管那样的成功人士！
E: Although I'm just a rookie now, I aspire to become as successful as Oswaldo, head of my department, one day!

C: 为了改善那些可怜人的生活，他用狱中简陋的食材与传说中的「梦乐草」，调配出苏乐达这种甜美绝伦的饮品。
E: To improve the life of the miserable bunch, he used the humble ingredients found in the prison and the legendary Dreamleaves to produce a sugary and yummy concoction — SoulGlad.

C: …哦，对啦，您辛辛苦苦替我跑了一趟，我理应给您报酬的。
E: ...Oh, by the way, I should reward you for your help.

C: 什么乱七八糟的…
E: What the heck are you harping on about...

C: 如你所见，我失败了…一败涂地。她是忠诚的猎犬…而我永远当不成她眼里那只兔子。
E: But as you see, I failed... big time. She's a loyal Bloodhound... and I'll never be the rabbit she's after.

C: 将莫里斯的事转述给了科蒂……
E: You tell Coty about Morris...

C: 我二十分之一的工资就此打了水漂，公司无法帮我找回账号…那之后的很长一段时间，我都忘记了快乐为何物……
E: So, I lost one-twentieth of my paycheck, and the IPC wouldn't help me recover my account... I forgot what happiness was for a long time after that...

C: 我的梦想就是成为明星！
E: My dream is to become a star!

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 一个青春偶像派的好苗子去演喜剧片，这不是在梦里做梦吗？我让他死心，维持纯真可爱的人设，今后必能成为巨星——他却说我是在绑架他的梦想，真没良心！
E: Can you imagine that? I told him to stick to his innocent and adorable persona and assured him he'd become a superstar soon. But he had the nerve to accuse me of crushing his dreams! Ungrateful little punk, right?

C: 不，我不认识{M#他}{F#她}啊……
E: Nope. I've never met {M#him}{F#her}...

C: 啧，没想到在华贵的美梦之星，还会出现这种蛮横无理的人。
E: Tsk, I didn't expect there would be such brusque and unreasonable people like you on this extravagant planet of dreams.

C: 不愧是部长，出手真大方！
E: I expected no less generosity from you, leader!

C: 反正要离开匹诺康尼了，这些东西就作为同行挖角的赔礼送给你吧——下次别再把这么有潜力的小明星放跑了。
E: Since we're leaving Penacony, you can keep these as compensation for poaching your talent. Don't let an artist with such great potential go next time.

C: 唉，波波特，如果我早点明白你的想法就好了。是我的傲慢葬送了一个年轻人的未来，让宇宙中少了一位本应流芳百世的巨星。
E: Alas, Popott, if only I could understand you earlier. My arrogance has deprived a young man of a bright future and the universe of a future superstar.

C: 抱歉，我得去继续宣传演唱会了，这可是您给我的工作，再见——
E: Sorry, I've got to attend a promotional activity for my concert — a job you scheduled for me. See you...

C: 人总是要朝前看。
E: We can't always live in our past.

C: 这两者都是意识的投影，并无本质区别，当然可以出现在同一片舞台上。
E: Both are the projections of consciousness with no fundamental differences. Of course, they can appear on the same platform.

C: 感觉真是讽刺。
E: Sounds ironic.

C: 真是不见棺材不落泪！恐怕只有等出现了不可挽回的后果后，他们才能明白保护环境的重要性。
E: They'll only realize the importance of preserving the environment when they suffer the consequences!

C: 我需要一些帮助…来补救我的过去。
E: I need some help... reconciling my past.

C: （刚才的那个怪物…难道它就是麦考先生的兄弟吗？）
E: (That strange creature just then... Don't tell me it was Mr. McCoy's brother?)

C: 孩子，有兴趣了解下银河系战区救助基金会吗？
E: Hey, kid, would you like to learn about the Galactic Warzone Relief Foundation?

C: 于是大家笑着，手牵着手，不分种族，也不分贵贱。
E: And so everyone will come to laugh again and hold hands together, indiscriminate of species or class.

C: 别担心小家伙，她可逃不出猎犬的鼻子。
E: Don't worry, buddy. She can't escape from the nose of a Bloodhound.

C: 然后是财富学院的<color=#dbc291ff>查德</color>。那小子自称什么…折纸大学派对王？哼，说得好听，不就是不务正业？
E: After that, find <color=#dbc291ff>Chad</color> from Fortune Academy, the one who proclaims himself to be... Paperfold University's "Party King," I believe? Hah, by giving himself that ridiculous title, isn't he just admitting how negligent he is of his studies?

C: 这可不是我们不努力，我的分数也不低。但课上教的跟工作要用的，根本不是一回事！
E: It's not because we're not hardworking enough. After all, my grades are pretty decent, if I say so myself. However, the stuff that we're being taught won't even be useful in the workplace!

C: 老鸟执教时见识过不少带伤飞翔的孩子。有时我会帮那些小鸟一把，但更多时候我会选择沉默，等待他们靠自己的能力飞上天空。
E: When I was still teaching, I witnessed many children who flew with injured wings. Sometimes I would give those fledglings a hand, but more often, I would remain silent and wait until they were able to take to the skies by their own power.

C: 居然有人把它当成了垃圾桶？真差劲。但也许这正是它吸引你的原因。
E: Someone used this barrel as a trashcan? How outrageous! But perhaps, this is precisely why it appeals to you.

C: 这个箱子被放在了不起眼的角落里。它的盖子并未合拢，似乎有人动过手脚。
E: The box has been tucked away in an obscure corner, and its lid has been left open as if it was tampered with.

C: 也许这枚忆泡在外面太久、已经失去了活性；也许是留下这段信息的人认为你已经看完了关键部分......
E: Perhaps this Memory Bubble was left out for too long and has lost its vitality... Or perhaps, whoever left it here feels that you have already seen what is important...

C: 风景固然美好，但生命更宝贵啾。请退后一些，这样我也能安心啾！
E: The view may be stunning, but your life matters more. Please step back, so I don't have to worry, tweet!

C: 遇到我这样的贵宾～是不是很开心～
E: Aren't you glad you found me?

C: 你向来心善，如果视野内的物品头顶挂着感叹号，无论大事小事，你都会仗义出手。
E: You've always been kind. No matter how big or small the job is, if you ever see an exclamation mark hanging over the top of something, you'll always take action.

C: 抱歉，我身上不干净，我得找个地方清理一下了，这点小礼物就送给你吧。
E: Sorry, I'm filthy. I need to find a place to wash up. Here's a little something for you.

C: 礼花炮。
E: A firework cannon.

C: 这项技术已经在机兵「甲虫」身上得到了验证。我们只需要把它放大，然后装在造物引擎的背上就好了。
E: This technology has already been tested on the automaton "Beetles." We just need to enlarge it and equip it to the back of the Engines of Creation.

C: 其实就是我偷的。
E: It was actually me that stole them.

C: 大家的审美一天一变，作为小镇宾馆的筑梦鸟，必须要跟紧时代的节奏啾~
E: People's preferences with styles seem to be changing by the day. It's imperative to keep up with the pace of the times as a dreambird in a small-town hotel, tweet~

C: 这么有自信，不愧是哈努兄弟啾，好想和你并肩作战啾！
E: You're so confident, and that's Brother Hanu for you! I really want to fight alongside you!

C: 啾，看来在梦里沾满冰激凌也没法改变羽毛的颜色啾。
E: Tweet, looks like even filling the dream with ice cream won't change my feathers' colors, tweet.

C: 外面的世界好可怕，我还是回到大家身边去吧啾。
E: The outside world is scary. I'd better return to everyone's side, tweet.

C: 我们折纸小鸟都是猫头鹰老师的学生啾~猫头鹰老师说，折纸小鸟诞生的使命就是让美梦小镇更加繁荣啾。
E: We origami birds are all students of Professor Owl's, tweet~ Professor Owl always says, the mission of origami birds is to create a more prosperous Dreamville, tweet.

C: 啾？还有这种好事啾…？
E: Tweet? Do such nice things still happen, tweet...?

C: 难不成…你根本就上不来啾？啾…亏我还特意停在梯子上呢啾。
E: Unless... You can't come up, tweet? Tweet... And I still deliberately stopped on the ladder, tweet.

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 呼哇，助手们回来得这么快，这下广场很快就能修好了啾~
E: Wow! All the helpers returned in such a short time. The plaza will be fixed in no time, tweet!

C: 教教我，真理小鸟！
E: Teach me, O' Truth Bird!

C: 就如同上面的标本，对称，和谐，啾！
E: Just like this, symmetrical, harmonious, tweet!

C: 快来快来，这里出大事了啾！
E: Come, come, we have an emergency, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个爱凑热闹的小助手最近在寻找适合放在派队上的饮料呢~或许可以在<color=#dbc291ff>「有汽水招牌」的地方</color>见到它啾？
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant that loves a celebration. They were recently looking for the perfect drink for a party~ Maybe you can find them <color=#dbc291ff>somewhere with an ad for soda</color>?

C: 我已经能想象它是怎么修理下一位——我那么大一只甜猿泰山呢？啾啾？
E: I can already foresee how it's going to thrash the next... Where's that giant Sweet Gorilla? Tweet tweet?

C: 没声儿啊。
E: There's no sound.

C: 这是贝洛伯格最常见的铁栏，因室外的低温而蒙上了一层白霜。
E: This kind of iron fencing is seen all over Belobog. It is coated with a layer of white frost due to the low temperatures.

C: 你的声音在空气中徜徉，却没有得到回应。
E: Your voice lingers on the air, but a response never comes.

C: 向随便哪个星神祈祷。
E: Pray to a random Aeon.

C: 店主旅游去了。
E: The shop owner is on vacation.

C: 哎！我怎么成这样了啾！
E: Aish! Why am I like this, tweet!

C: 还有危急时刻做好准备背锅被开除啾……
E: You will also need to be prepared to take the fall during critical times and get laid off, tweet...

C: 别害怕啾！
E: Don't be afraid, tweet!

C: 像你这样的高手，一般玩家果然只能仰望、根本没办法超越...太棒了。
E: Regular players can only look up to you. There is no way for us to surpass a master such as yourself... You're amazing.

C: 每次看到你比赛中的完美表现，我都忍不住用镜头把一切记录下来——我家马桶盖上都贴着你的海报呢！
E: Each time I see you performing flawlessly in tournament, I can't help but record every moment on my camera. Even my toilet seat has your picture on it!

C: 对呀，你会说话，我也会说话，花花草草会说话很正常呀。
E: Of course. You can talk, I can talk, so isn't it totally normal for flowers to talk, too?

C: 对了，我这是睡了多久…怎么只剩下我一个了，我的小伙伴呢？
E: That's right. How long have I been out for... Why am I the only one left? Where are my little friends?

C: 我明白了，我会等你，就等一小会，你快些决定跟不跟我走。
E: I see. I'll wait. Just for a short while though. Hurry. Decide whether you want to come with me.

C: 好啊，去跟神策府说啊…
E: Yeah, you can tell that to the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 曾有狂妄之人阅读此书。但此人只翻开这本书看了一眼，便双目圆瞪、全身痉挛、不省人事了。
E: Once, a reckless person tried to read this book, but as soon as they opened it, they started convulsing and then passed out.

C: 咪咪你怎么了？
E: What's going on, Mimi?

C: 很简单啊，因为自然数和质数都有无穷多个，且自然数集和质数集是等势的，所以自然数和质数一样多。
E: It's quite elementary. There are innumerable amounts of natural numbers and prime numbers, and the set of natural numbers and the set of prime numbers have the same cardinality. Hence, there are as many natural numbers as there are prime numbers.

C: 咪咪说话真是有理有据…看起来确实是变得聪明了。
E: Mimi is speaking so logically... it really does seem like it's become smarter.

C: 成了，是「罗浮」签！这可是大大的吉签啊！来吧，咱们再试一次。
E: It's the "Luofu," a very auspicious stick! Awesome, let's try again!

C: 朋友，你能不能别吓人了？
E: Friend, can you say anything that isn't scary?

C: 你这戏太吓人了。
E: This opera is too freaky.

C: 那确实是吓人啊。《合巹记》可是朱明花鼓戏里最有名的一出！
E: Yes, it's quite freaky. Wedding Wine is the most famous of all the Zhuming flower-drum opera!

C: 今日到此为止，下课！咱们<color=#dbc291ff>改日</color>再会～请记住，下次见面我可得考考你了……
E: That's all for today, class dismissed! Let's pick up again <color=#dbc291ff>another time</color>~ Remember, I'll be quizzing you on this the next time we meet...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>朱唇如血肤如霜。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>To be known by you, my love, in return.</color>

C: 总之…我把这个给你吧，虽然有些臭臭的，但是很好用。
E: Anyway... Here's something for you. It might be a bit stinky, but it's also very useful.

C: 因为没有一点创意啊！
E: Because it's completely devoid of creativity!

C: 我猜，你是想让我带你过去？
E: So, you want me to take you there?

C: 绥园里实在太无聊啦，不然呢？
E: It's so boring in Fyxestroll Garden. What else could I do?

C: 既然他们能把钱从外面带到梦境里来，就别怪我把钱从他们口袋里带到外面去。
E: Since they can bring their money from outside into the Dreamscape, then don't blame me for taking their money from their pockets back to the outside.

C: 谢谢你，小佩……
E: Thank you, Pennie...

C: …那小佩呢？为什么，为什么你要在那个时候和我说——
E: ...Then what about Pennie? Why, why did you ask me—

C: 谁知道他们发什么疯啊？我本来是受家族邀请，来这里赴一场生死赌局，结果时候还没到就被人废掉了一只手。别说是施展绝技，现在怕是连牌都抓不稳了。
E: Who knows what's going on in their minds. The Family invited me to take part in a life-or-death gamble, but before it even started, someone messed up my hand! I can forget about pulling any of my special tricks, I don't think I could even hold the cards straight now.

C: 好了，愿赌服输。我要的东西，该乖乖交出来了。
E: Alright, time to pay up. Be good and hand it over.

C: …确实很可怜啊。
E: ...That is really sad.

C: 事实上，他们是始终陪伴我的两位长辈。我们共同生活了许久，关系极为亲密。
E: They are actually two elders that were always by my side. We lived together for so long, we became extremely close.

C: …你没事吧？
E: ...Are you okay?

C: 看来无法通过常规操作获得钞票。或许你还有其他好点子？
E: Looks like you won't be getting cash through the conventional way. Maybe you should try another way.
(Rumble!)

C: 询问红色酒瓶。
E: Talk to the red wine bottle.

C: 只要能得到水晶杯的青睐，我就能一举打入上流社会！我会让全世界看见，一瓶被人看不起的廉价葡萄酒也能靠着奋斗走到这一步！
E: By winning the crystal chalice's heart, I'll be on my way to joining the upper class of society! I want everyone to see that even a cheap red wine can make it that far through sheer hard work!

C: 这也是为什么那位水晶杯注定会和我成为一对——因为那就是我们被赋予的使命，「门当户对」大抵如此。
E: That's why that crystal chalice is meant to be with me. We're a match made in heaven, given our missions.

C: …好吧，可能是我太心急了。
E: ...Alright. I shouldn't be rushing you.

C: 里面那是什么情况？
E: What's going on in there?

C: 离间黄酒瓶。
E: Set Yellow against the others.

C: 呵，就你这骗汽水的鬼话，还能糊弄到本酒不成？
E: Hah, you think you can fool me with the same lies you would a cheap soda?

C: 犯人就是，你！
E: The culprit is... you!

C: 如不出意外，这位持明女孩现在应该在丹鼎司深宫中仰望天空…她真的有办法溜之大吉吗？
E: If everything is as usual, the young Vidyadhara girl is most likely at the Alchemy Commission depths, looking at the sky... Do you think she'll be able to sneak away?

C: 肤浅！桶王是这样的神吗？祂是在拯救你们！金钱是邪恶的，你所遭遇的一切不幸，都来源于这份有毒的诅咒。
E: How shallow! Is that how you see our King of Cans? THEY are saving you! Money is the root of all evil. All your misfortune originates from that toxic curse.

C: 我现在才知道，并非是我杜撰了这位神明——是我被选中了，所以才知晓了祂的一切！
E: Now I realize that it's not me who has chosen this God — I am the chosen one, and this is why I know everything about THEM.

C: 触摸了神体之后，我在赌场连赢了三回，又有钱买酒喝了。
E: After touching the holy body, I won three times in a row at the casino. I now have the money to buy booze again.

C: 说到底，敬畏之心这种东西，我早丢掉了，只要能赚钱，改信扑满我都愿意。
E: At the end of the day, reverence is something I lost a long time ago. I'm even willing to believe in Trotters if that can bring me money.

C: 你在铁桶内发现了一个小小的梦泡，不知道是哪个帮派的手笔。
E: In the iron can, you discover a tiny dream bubble. You wonder which lineage made it.

C: 的确，把分散的资源集中起来，就能有效降低流浪生活的成本。
E: You're right. If we gather our scattered resources, we can effectively lower the cost of life.

C: 等我反应过来，我最大的竞争优势——强悍的炸裂气泡已经空空如也了！
E: When I realized what had happened, my biggest competitive edge — my powerful bursting bubbles — were all gone!

C: <size=28>我就是不愿意看那些倒卖贩子赚到钱！</size>
E: <size=28>I don't want to see any of those scalpers earn a single cent!</size>

C: 你心里危险的预感是对的，包里恰好装着三张知更鸟的新专辑。
E: Your gut feeling is right, and there are three copies of Miss Robin's new album inside the bag.

C: 我就先不打扰您了，有什么问题请随时联系我。
E: I'll leave you to it now. Call for me if you need anything!

C: （既然是恭贺「星穹列车」的，还是跟大家说一声吧……）
E: (Given that this gift was meant to congratulate the Astral Express, you should let the others know about this as well...)

C: 就只能是住客吗？
E: Does it have to be a guest on board?

C: 记忆深处的恐惧。
E: A deeply terrifying memory.

C: 准确！你到底是怎么判断的？
E: Critical hit! How did you know?

C: 喂——是我呀，是我。
E: Hey! It's me. It's me!

C: 你猜猜为什么我们会在幽囚狱见面？
E: Why don't you make a guess as to why we're in the Shackling Prison?

C: 剧本已经想得差不多了。故事讲述一名步离银行家含冤入狱，又在监狱中重振旗鼓步步为营自我拯救，最终逃出幽囚狱重获自由，自证清白。
E: The script is almost ready. The story will be about a borisin banker who was wrongfully imprisoned and his journey of self-salvation within the prison. In the end, he regained his freedom by escaping from the prison and managed to prove his own innocence.

C: 我不信，仙舟的鬼魂都是岁阳！
E: I don't believe that they exist. The ghosts on Xianzhou are perhaps all heliobi!

C: 我就靠你的声音了哦，保持联系。
E: I'm counting on you to tell me where to go. Stay in touch!

C: 您原路返回就可以回去了！
E: To return from where you came, just double back!

C: 这里好像什么都没有，不太对呀，会不会是密文的解读有问题？
E: Something's not right. There doesn't seem to be anything here... Is there a mistake with the decryption?

C: 一、二、三、四、五…怎么才六个？难道那个灰毛也是？
E: One, two, three, four, five... Why are there only six? Is that one with the gray hair yours as well?

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 要不我们商量一下……
E: Why don't we talk this out...

C: 这里只剩下我了。
E: I'm the only one here.

C: 我是来检查教学质量的。
E: I'm here to evaluate the teaching quality.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*.

C: 啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet!

C: 哎，才挂到论坛上没多久呢，就有个自称是什么忍徒的家伙把我给举报了，帖子被删了，我也被喊来校长室，挨了好久的批评……
E: Well, not long after I posted the listing to the forum, somebody claiming to be a ninja initiate blew the whistle on me, causing the post to be deleted. I was also summoned to the dean's office and given a stern talking-to...

C: 评判电影好坏的标准不在于成本，而是质量。你瞧瞧克劳克影城那么大的面积，不也没拍出几部传世佳作嘛。没事的，要相信导演的能力。
E: The standard for film evaluation is in its quality, not its budget. Take a look at how big Clock Studios is — they haven't really made any major hits, have they? Don't worry. Trust in the director's eye.

C: 是的。在最终对决的舞台上，小金爆发出了惊人的气势——她喷出的气泡，足足掀翻了舞台上方的巨大气球！谁能想到她其实是一瓶红酒呢？
E: Yes. In the final battle on stage, Goldie explodes with shocking poise — she spits out enough bubbles to topple a giant balloon above the stage! Who would even have thought that she is actually just a bottle of red wine?

C: 你没事吧？方才你在高温浴池区晕了过去，还好其他浴池的客人发现了你……
E: Are you alright? You're passed out in the hot pool area. Luckily, other guests in the baths found you...

C: 说个笑话吧。
E: Tell me a joke.

C: 像一滴冰水划过脊背，异样的酸麻感从脑髓扩散至头皮，荡起一阵涟漪。
E: Like a drop of cold water rolling across your back, a strange feeling of tingling stirs ripples from your cerebral fluid to your scalp.

C: 关上灯，好好睡一觉吧。
E: Turn off the light and have a good sleep.

C: 稍微睡一会儿吧。
E: Just a smidgen.

C: 白厄的看法是？
E: What does Phainon think?

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 哦吼？岂不知多少悖论都是由数学家发现的？
E: Oh-ho? I wonder how many paradoxes were discovered by mathematicians?

C: 好吧，最天才的喜剧大师也有词穷的时刻，你的幽默感已经山穷水尽，再想下去只会有烂梗，还是放过自己吧。
E: All right, even the greatest comedic geniuses will sometimes be at a loss for words. Your sense of humor has already been exhausted — all you have will be terrible jokes. You should just give yourself a break.

C: 妙答！妙答！本狮认可你的幽默感了，快快快——把手拿出去吧！
E: What an answer! Amazing! I acknowledge your sense of humor! Quickly, take your hand away!

C: 还是相信自己吧！
E: It's better to believe in yourself!

C: 吼，可恶，你还真行啊……
E: Ho, dang, you're good...

C: 太老套了吧！
E: That's such an old-fashioned answer!

C: 不知道缇宝有空吗？
E: I wonder if Tribbie is free?

C: 值勤的卫兵阿扎说：「我早跟城主讲过了！扎格列斯昨晚给我托梦，践行时桥会断裂，可他没听我的。」
E: The on-duty guard, Aza said: "I already told the lord! Zagreus came to me in a dream last night, saying that the bridge would falter at the Action Hour. But he didn't listen."

C: 果不其然，你的零食和饮料可怜巴巴地堆在一个狭小的角落，而几件你不认识的东西则登堂入室。
E: Just as you expected. Your poor snacks and drinks are mercilessly crushed into a corner, and the rest of the refrigerator is stacked to the brim with things you do not recognize.

C: 杯子上用清秀但略显幼稚的笔迹写道：三月七的自制冰淇淋ԅ(¯﹃¯ԅ)
E: There is elegant but slightly childish handwriting on the cup that reads: March 7th's homemade ice cream ԅ(¯﹃¯ԅ)

C: 我…我本是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}神躯的碎片，呼呼，看过大地的漫长变迁，也能熟记每块岩石应在的位置。
E: I... I was once a fragment of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios's{RUBY_E#} divine body, watching the land transform over the years, and I remembered where every boulder was. *crackle*

C: 我可不是普通的石头，我是有神性的石头，是从{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的身躯里掉下来的石头。呼呼，看在帮了忙的份上，就不跟你计较了。
E: I'm no ordinary rock. I am a rock with divinity, because I fell from the body of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. *crackle* Since you helped me, I'll let this one slide.

C: 要永远住在这吗？还要继续在旅途奔波吗？灵火不会回答，只是安静燃烧，但若是你向火中投入材料，或许会有未来的征兆显现。
E: Do you want to live here forever? Or do you want to keep journeying? The spiritual flame burns quietly and does not answer, but if you offer substance to the fire, you might have a glimpse of the future.

C: 反正不等于<unbreak>14</unbreak>。
E: Anyway, it's definitely not <unbreak>14</unbreak>.

C: 桶生没有意义…
E: A trashcan's life is meaningless...

C: 看你一眼就能识得本王的尊驾，估计也是个心思灵敏之人，本王就给你一个机会吧。
E: Considering you can appreciate your King's greatness, it seems you've got some sharp wit.

C: 本王乃是垃圾桶中最为殊贵的身躯。可惜梦境的规则不同于现实，本王只得随手捏造了一个新身躯。
E: I may be the king of all trashcans, but unfortunately, the rules of the Dreamscape differ from those of reality, so I had to come up with this makeshift new body.

C: 倘若在现实，本王一定会封你为「垃圾桶大将军」。
E: If this were the real world, I'd gladly award you the title of "Trashcan General."

C: 努力工作，勤劳致富。
E: Stay dedicated to your job and work hard.

C: 加点白云和飞鸟。
E: Some clouds and birds in flight.

C: 走吧，活着离开，然后将禁地的故事告诉其他人——让他们知道，对噩梦和美梦都要保持同等的敬畏。
E: Leave with your life, and tell others about the story of this forbidden ground. Let them know that reverence must be paid to both nightmares and sweet dreams equally.

C: 假设现在，新的垃圾帮已经初具规模，我们下一步应该做什么？
E: Let's pretend the new Trash Gang has already been established: What's our next step?

C: 起初我还半信半疑，但现在我敢肯定…你就是传说中的高手！
E: Initially, I was doubtful of your abilities, but I am now certain that... you are the legendary master!

C: 你是不是克劳克影业的家庭伦理剧看多了，这么恶心的话你是怎么说得出口的？！你清醒一点，人不能活在荧幕里！
E: Did you watch too many of Clock Studios' family dramas? How could you say such disgusting things!? Wake up! Humans shouldn't spend their lives addicted to screens!

C: 哀丽秘榭果然是个熟人社会。
E: Aedes Elysiae really is a small world, huh?

C: 从咪发迷飞扬的字迹里，可以看出它跃然纸上的欣快心情。
E: Mifamem's handwriting is literally leaping off the page, their delight radiating through the paper.

C: 唔，是从没见过的客人迷！
E: Mmph? A visitor I've never seen before, memi!

C: 不要，好奇怪。
E: No way! That's too weird!

C: 在想哀丽秘榭的事。
E: I'm thinking about Aedes Elysiae.

C: 你有很多烦恼吗？
E: Do you have a lot of troubles?

C: 「其实是因为在记忆中留下了你的照片，所以感到特别安心哦？」——你仿佛听见昔涟这么说了。
E: "Actually, it's because your photo was left in the memory, there's a certain sense of safety to it." ...It felt as if you've heard Cyrene say that.

C: 水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
E: Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!

C: 车轮只是装饰，那些古板的祭司怎会明白？
E: The wheels are just for show — those stubborn priests wouldn't understand.

C: 伟大的雅努斯，什么时候能对我敞开你神秘的大门呀……
E: O great Janus, when shall your mysterious gates open for me...

C: …睡着了？
E: ...Have you fallen asleep?

C: 但…这个虚假的目标，却要耗费掉神驹近乎全部的生命。
E: Yet... this futile quest will drain almost all of a divine foal's life.

C: 但…这个虚假的目标，却要耗费掉神驹近乎全部的生命。
E: Yet... this futile quest will drain almost all of a divine foal's life.

C: 你感到天旋地转，再次睁眼时——
E: The world whirls around you, and upon opening your eyes —

C: 进入潮汐的馈赠。
E: Enter Tidal Bounty.

C: 比空间站的有些大人，要好多了……
E: They are so much better than the grown-ups in the space station...

C: 灾后复兴工作，主要是围绕哪几个方面？
E: What are the main aspects of the work regarding post-disaster recovery?

C: 无论如何，请你赶快前往避难。只有见到大家幸福的笑容，我才能安心。
E: Anyway, you should take refuge as soon as possible. I will be relieved when I see the smile on people's faces.

C: 任何的架构都是不完善的，稍有不慎随时都会有坍塌的风险。
E: No structure is perfect. There is always a risk of collapse at any time.

C: 我最亲爱的仰慕者，你的信件我已经收到…你最珍重的唯一偶像，卡波特。一个字不许多，一个字不许少，以免让粉丝觉得差别待遇。封缄复信的火漆要用金银复色的蜡粒，再盖戳「波少」字样的章头。
E: My dearest admirer, your letter is well received... Your most cherished idol, Master Capote. Not one word more or one word less, or the fans might find it unfair. Gold and silver color wax should be used to seal the letters, and then stamped with the name Capote.

C: …你最珍重的护法骑士，卡波特…封缄复信的火漆要用朱红色蜡粒，再盖戳「卡少」字样的章头……
E: ...Your most cherished hero, Capote... Red wax should be used to seal the letters, and then stamped with Capote...

C: 尽管问吧，我的伙伴。我一定知无不言言无不尽，解答你心中所有的疑惑。
E: Any questions you have, my friend. I will tell you everything I know to solve all the questions in your heart.

C: 相信未来，我们一定可以改变这个冰冷的现状！
E: Have some faith in the future. I'm sure we can change this cold-blooded status quo!

C: 我是应物科的科员温世玲，这些奇物……是我根据规定，需要交给波少的。
E: I'm Wen Shiling, a researcher from the Department of Implement Arts. According to the regulations... I'm supposed to give these Curios to Master Capote.

C: 科员们现在还好吗？
E: How are the researchers doing?

C: 我找到了你的私人物品…
E: I found your personal item...

C: 我在那个房间里放了留言条…嘿嘿，上面的内容是我开的玩笑，你别在意。
E: I left a note in that room... Hehe. I wrote a joke on it. Don't mind me.

C: 我听说过，科员通常都是一种叫「人类」的物种，听呜呜伯说，照顾它们的科员是个小不点儿，跟我们差不多高。
E: I hear that researchers are typically humans. Wubbaboo says that their caretaker is kinda short, about the same height as us.

C: 你猜我猜不猜。
E: Guess if I'll take a guess.

C: 它发出了一声不满的叫声，但在你听来倒像是某种小型猫科动物从喉咙间挤出来的咕噜声。
E: It lets out a disgruntled snort, which sounds like a purr coming from the throat of a small feline creature.

C: 是了，呜呜伯说你们要经常做实验来着…原来如此…空间站上面真有意思，连气味都这么复杂，真好啊…不像我，成天困在这个破地方，什么都做不了……
E: Yes, Wubbaboo said you guys have to do research regularly... I see now... The space station is really fascinating, even the smells are so complex. It's amazing... Unlike me, stuck in this lousy place all day with nothing much to do...

C: 而且…这么一点小事就要麻烦别人，阮•梅女士看了多不好，明明是她亲手创造出来的生命，却这么无用…所以，我们得打起精神来好好干活！
E: Also... asking for help over such a trivial matter won't make us look good in Miss Ruan Mei's eyes. As her creations, we can't be so useless. We must buck up and work hard!

C: 大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
E: Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.

C: 有什么有趣的事吗？
E: Is there anything interesting going on?

C: 比如说，有的很讨厌小机器人，也很讨厌工作，只知道睡懒觉，还给小机器人乱取外号排斥人家。但有的又很喜欢小机器人，还会主动维修……
E: For instance, some of them dislike the little robot, are reluctant to work, spend their days napping, and bully the little robot by giving it nasty nicknames. Meanwhile, some are fond of the little robot and even take the initiative to repair it...

C: 如果您只是想聊聊天，也可以告诉我。请放心，隐私模式已开启，我会为您提供一个安全和私密的空间。
E: If you are just here for a chat, please be rest assured that the private mode has been activated. I'll provide a safe and private space for you.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: （尝试按下通讯I键。）
E: (Press the Communication I button.)

C: 通讯似乎幸运地接通了。
E: Luckily, the call goes through.

C: 好像有点为难……
E: That's quite a pickle...

C: 两位小贩按照哈托努斯的指示，摆放好了盾牌。
E: Both merchants follow Chartonus' instructions and position a shield.

C: 您轻点，可千万别伤着手！
E: Not so hard! You'll hurt your hand!

C: 当我提起「阿卡索斯」的时候，所有人都知道说的是什么。当包裹寄往「阿卡索斯」的时候，信使绝不会弄错目的地。是我的故乡，这点永远不会改变。
E: When I mention "Icatus," everyone knows what that is. When you send a parcel to "Icatus," there is no way that the messenger would go to the wrong location. It is my hometown. That will never change.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」必然存在</color>，否则当我们谈论「阿卡索斯」的时候，为何能理解彼此想表达的内容？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Icatus" must exist</color>. Otherwise, when we discuss "Icatus," how could we possibly understand what each other is referring to?

C: 学者看到阿卡索斯，会联想起它悠久辉煌的历史。但我们都清楚，他们脑海里的阿卡索斯，绝不是「阿卡索斯」，总是在这方面或那方面有些差别。
E: When a scholar sees Icatus, they will think of its long and glorious history. However, we understand clearly that the Icatus in their minds cannot be "Icatus." It is always different depending on which aspect they are looking at.

C: 那么这座虚构的城邦，是否也有对应的的「概念」？毕竟，按你的说法，阿卡索斯能否找到并不重要，你思想中的那座城邦才更为真实可信。
E: Does this fictional city then become the same kind of "concept"? After all, according to your argument, it is not whether one can locate Icatus that matters. To you, it is the concept of the city that you have in your mind that is more credible and true.

C: 智者啊，你似乎到现在都未明白我的论点。「圆」的概念起初便在我们的思想中了，否则该如何说明我们从未见过完美的圆，却能在脑海中构想出来？
E: Wise one, it seems that you still have not grasped my point. The concept of a "circle" was in our minds from the very beginning. Otherwise, how do we explain our ability to imagine a perfect circle despite never having seen one?

C: …虽然没太听懂，但年轻人，你这是答应了，对吧？
E: ...I don't really understand what you're saying, but I believe you're in agreement, aren't you, youngster?

C: 依我之见，波瑟芬妮应该并没有死在哈德斯手上。
E: The way I see it, Possephone probably wasn't killed by Hadez.

C: 总归是要瞒不住的。
E: It can no longer be kept a secret.

C: 这些人我一个都不认识。
E: I don't know any of these people.

C: 你猜你可以将它交还给老费贝尔。不过在那之前，你还记得那位老人的委托——该去找找提图斯了。
E: You decide to bring this back to Old Fabio. Though first, there's the old man's request to tend to — You should go find Titus.

C: 呀，灰宝！你来啦。
E: Oh, Grayie! Good to see you!

C: 当时他的伤势太重，我抽不开身，如今稍得了些空闲，便打算亲自将信送过去。
E: His situation was critical and I couldn't step away, but now that things are quieter, I'd like to personally deliver this letter.

C: 对故乡的眷念，对价值的渴求，对王的依赖，还有被迫融入死敌城邦的隔阂…我们只有继续跟在科可波阁下的身后奔跑，才能稍微化解心头的苦闷。
E: Yearning for our homeland, for meaning, for our king... Being forced to integrate into the city of our enemies — there's a gap too wide to bridge. Only by continuing to run after Kokopo can we soothe the turmoil in our hearts.

C: 别想了！我就算死在外面，也不愿在异邦的庇护下苟且偷生。悬锋的古训都被你们丢到脑后了吗，在那温热的浴池里泡得软烂不堪了吗？！
E: No more thinking! I'd rather die outside than survive under the protection of a foreign land. Have you forgotten the ancient creed of Kremnos? Have you soaked in those warm baths so long that you've gone soft!?

C: 从出生起，我被丢弃在海岸礁石之上；自记事起，我便度过了痛苦的童年时光！
E: From birth, I was abandoned on a rocky shore. For as long as I can remember, my childhood is miserable!

C: 说归说，闹归闹，别拿生命开玩笑。
E: Say and do what you will, but don't play games with lives.

C: 怎么可能是演戏？我刚才差点被这混蛋掐到断气。喂，伊俄，你得给我个说法！
E: How could it be acting? That lunatic nearly strangled me! Hey, Eio, explain yourself!

C: 是你的剧情设置让埃德加家破人亡，他对此感到不满，想要报复，有充分的犯罪动机！
E: It's your plot that drove Edgar's family to ruin! His resentment towards you gave him plenty of motive for revenge!

C: 没关系，{F#女士}{M#先生}，像你这样的大英雄，一定有机会和它说上话的。说不定到时候，刻法勒大人反而会紧张呢！
E: It's okay, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Someone as heroic as you will definitely get a chance to speak to them someday. Who knows. Maybe the great Kephale will be the one getting nervous then!

C: 哈哈…我…有些没力气了……
E: Haha... I don't... have much energy left...

C: 自从接受了刻法勒的信仰，我现在是全新的希瑞雅了。每天晚上我都在梦里重游云崖，一遍遍观览那些好大好大的壁画。
E: Since finding Kephale's light, I've become a brand-new me! Every night I spirit-walk Dawncloud, memorizing those cathedral-sized murals.

C: 没错，赞美仁慈的父！
E: Aye! Praise the merciful Father!

C: 你们接受了他的帮助，却忘记了问一句这位好心人的名字。
E: You accepted his help but forgot to ask this nice guy his name.

C: （再多的信息就暴露了，希瑞雅不想给那位守卫带来麻烦……）
E: (If you give any more details, you'll expose things. Serena doesn't want to cause that guard more trouble...)

C: 不能让孩子们失去笑容！
E: We can't let the kids lose their smiles!

C: 真的吗…我们现在再祈祷一次，天父还会回应我们吗？
E: Really... If we pray again now, will the sky father still respond to us?

C: …啊，{NICKNAME}！你是回、回心转意了吗？
E: ...Ah, {NICKNAME}! H—Have you had a change of heart?

C: 「树影衬着智者的背影，像一颗巨石在背负年轮。」
E: "The shadow of a tree frames the sage's back, like a boulder bearing the rings of time."

C: 残像…说明阿波罗尼确实来过这里。看看他之后往哪里走吧。
E: An afterimage... So Apollonius was definitely here. Let's see where he went next.

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 恕我直言，就是白水。
E: In other words, it's glorified water.

C: 或许，她能为我们求来海瑟音大人的权能。
E: Perhaps she can channel Lady Hysilens's power to help us.

C: 呵呵…哈哈…呵哈哈哈…诶呦，好大一只海蛞蝓……
E: Heh... Hah haha.... Hahaha... Whoa, what a huge sea slug...

C: 我很期待哦。
E: Looking forward to it!

C: 所以，克拉拉正在想办法把这里看到的风景记录下来…但是，可以说的东西实在是太多了，克拉拉的眼睛都要看花了……
E: That's why I want to find a way to record the scenery, it's just... there's so much to see. My eyes can't take it all in...

C: 好像不是什么坏事？
E: That's not a bad thing, right?

C: 这是铁卫全体的心意……
E: The Silvermane Guards wish to express their gratitude...

C: 没有没有，毕竟我是受到邀请才有幸来到列车，贸然带一只狗狗过来，或许会给你们添麻烦。
E: No, no, I wouldn't bring Peppy without letting you guys know first. You have a lot on your plate — I wouldn't want you to worry about having to take care of him.

C: 你怎么会在这里？！
E: What are you doing on the Express!?

C: 要不要玩点什么？
E: Want to play a game?

C: 有点意思，这车里的设施还挺齐全：前厅、休息室、还有每个人的包间，难怪无名客能四海为家。
E: Interesting. The facilities on the Express are quite extensive: With a reception room, a lounge, and a private coach for each passenger, it's no wonder the Nameless are able to call the four corners of the galaxy their home.

C: 似乎看到了虚空鲸……
E: I think I just saw a void song whale...

C: 既然是散心嘛，早点走，早点回来～
E: I just wanted to head out early and get back early...

C: …那饮料呢，浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶有吗？
E: ...What about drinks? Puffergoat milk? Immortal's Delight?

C: 嗯，她是法政科的向导，法政科的工作可少不了她。
E: Yes. She's a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and the Department can't function without her.

C: 猫猫啊…谁会不喜欢猫猫呢，可爱又迷人…它们的呼噜声还有安眠的效果。
E: Cats... How can anyone resist cats? They are so cute and charming, and their purring even helps with sleep.

C: 你瞧我现在这个倒霉样，不就是被他们给折腾的嘛！
E: I'm in such a pitiable state because of them!

C: 但很快我发现，曾经的波少粉丝，也和我有相同的情况。大家都是一下子被强行挖去了生命中的一个环节，难免会觉得空落落的。
E: But I soon realized many previous Capote fans were in the same boat as me. We all felt a part of our lives was forcibly taken from us, and we can't help but feel empty.

C: 哎，别提了，昼夜连轴转，最后直接累趴下了。
E: Ooh, don't get me started. I'd been working <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7 before I burnt out.

C: 另外，我也发自内心地喜欢情报官这份工作——对我而言，比起旅行，还是脑力活动更让人愉悦啊。
E: Besides, I genuinely like the job of an Intelligence Officer — for me, using my brain is a lot more fun than traveling.

C: …好期待以后的列车生活。感觉一定会很有趣。
E: ...I'm really looking forward to my future here. It's gonna be so much fun.

C: 列车上有点太暖和了……
E: The Express is a bit too... warm.

C: 晚点我就去找姬子小姐聊聊，看看她有没有什么改装机械手的建议。
E: I'll go chat with Himeko later and see if she has any advice about modifying my mechanical hand.

C: 据说贝洛伯格曾经很流行这种饮品。但自从寒潮来临之后，能够种植咖啡豆的土壤就变得越来越稀有了。
E: I heard this drink was once very popular in Belobog. However, the advent of the Eternal Freeze brought harsh conditions, and the soil necessary to grow the coffee beans became extremely rare.

C: 如何在不透支地髓资源的前提下解决供暖问题，这是我首先想要攻破的课题之一。我和希露瓦聊过了，未来由她来主要负责……
E: One of the problems I want to solve is tackling the heating issue without exhausting Geomarrow reserves. I've discussed this with Serval — she'll be the one responsible for handling this matter in future...

C: 别着急，你听我说……
E: Well, let me tell you...

C: 贝洛伯格就更加渺小了，从车上甚至完全看不到……
E: Belobog is even smaller... I can barely even see it from the Express...

C: 以后得空，我想能常来坐坐，与各位闲谈。{NICKNAME}，你到时候该不会嫌我烦吧，哈哈！
E: I very much enjoy our idle conversations here... I hope to start visiting more frequently, when my schedule allows. Haha, you won't find me to be a bother, will you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不知镜流是否向你提起过，我们曾有位共同的故友和你们一样，也是无名客。
E: I'm unsure if Jingliu has ever mentioned this to you, but we had a mutual friend who was a Nameless, just like you.

C: 曜青仙舟的狐人中不乏到处探险考察的飞行世家。其中最有名的当属我这位朋友的家系。
E: The foxians of the Xianzhou Yaoqing are known for their adventuring flying families. The most renowned of these families was that of our mutual friend's.

C: 哼，老子本来就没想可爱！
E: Hmph, well... good!

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: 真想和大家一起在银河间旅行啊。
E: But... I really want to travel through the cosmos with you all!

C: 走了，有缘再见，朋友！
E: I'm going. Till we meet again, friend!

C: 谢谢你。列车上的温馨布设和安静氛围，让我感到十分安心。
E: Thank you. The cozy furnishings and peaceful atmosphere on the Express put me at ease.

C: 哎呀，我哪有这么不识趣啦~
E: Ugh, I'm not that big of a baddie you know...

C: 等你有空，我带你去本乐子人亲自认证的恐怖圣地体验一下！锻炼锻炼胆量，怎么样？
E: When you are free sometime, I'll take you to one of my favorite scary places to test your mettle — what do you say?

C: …好吧，看你这个表情是不会相信我的…没事，我可以明天再来问你一遍！
E: ...All right, looks like you don't believe me... That's fine, I'll ask you again tomorrow!

C: 别急，{NICKNAME}。待我将这些碎片中的记忆一一复现，会与你一同分享的。
E: Settle down, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to manifest the memories from these fragments, and I'll share them with you.

C: 温馨的房间…
E: A cozy room...

C: 惊险刺激的飞行竞速比拼，能让紧绷的情绪更加放松。
E: A thrilling race among the stars can help calm high-strung emotions.

C: 我会常来的！
E: I'll be coming often!

C: {NICKNAME}，你可太懂我了！待我回了朱明，定当给你准备一份「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」送给你。
E: {NICKNAME}, you know me too well! When I go back to the Zhuming, I'll make sure to get you a Giant Smoked Jujube Cake.

C: 我什么都吃！
E: I'll eat anything!

C: 你可以再表演一下那个吗……
E: Can you do an encore of that one...

C: 这个概念很不错，可惜以你和我的体量，恐怕不能做到尽善尽美……
E: It's a brilliant concept. What a shame that with our size we won't be able to get things perfect...

C: 男的，活的，有钱的那个。
E: Male? Still alive? ...Rich?

C: 嘘——这里边，每首都有故事。有空的话你也多听听呗？
E: Shh... Listen, each song has its own story. Maybe you can listen to some when you have the time?

C: 这种好东西我怎么能错过！所以我提议，拿三套宅子跟他换那块表……
E: How could I miss out on such a rarity! So I offered him three houses for it...

C: 以后你要是有幸见到了什么珍惜的生物，记得要告诉我哦~
E: If you see any rare species in the future, remember to tell me about them!

C: 哪怕是休息时间，我脑子里也在一刻不停地规划各种工作的细节。所以，请不要打扰我的工作，谢谢。
E: I'm going through work details in my brain even during my breaks. So, please don't interrupt my work, thank you.

C: …咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
E: ...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.

C: 关于写作…
E: About writing...

C: 细节不能透露太多，这事牵扯太大——你是明白人，应该知道我的意思。我只能说懂的都懂。
E: I can't go into details, as many are involved if you see what I mean. I trust we understand each other. All I can say is if you are in, you won't regret it.

C: 还是说，你还有些什么别的事儿要来找我？
E: Or is there anything else you want to talk about?

C: 我的时间非常宝贵——要么有话赶紧说，要么就别妨碍我研究「大宇宙时间隧道」理论。
E: I don't have much time to waste. Tell me what you want or step aside and let me continue my research on the big universe time tunnel.

C: 最近有什么研究进展吗？
E: Have you made any progress with your research?

C: 请问你是音乐剧演员吗？
E: Are you an actor in a musical?

C: 啦啦啦～「追逐着泡沫幻影～看不清雾中小径～只愿此生长路慢慢行～」
E: La la la. "Chasing a mirage, I lose sight of the path in the fog. I only wish for a steady journey through life."

C: 你自己看看，这都写的什么烂玩意：「文化和教育大臣波瓦今日出席……」
E: Listen to this malarkey: "Today, the Minister of Culture and Education, Mr. Bova, attended..."

C: 行吧，你说的对。
E: Alright. You've got a point.

C: 这个嘛…金额不是重点。重要的是你得留神，别让同样的骗局发生在自己身上。
E: Uh... the price isn't important. What's important is that you need to be careful, so the same scam doesn't happen to you.

C: …嗯？以前好像没见过你。是第一次来买书吗？
E: Hmm... I don't think I've met you before. Is this your first time visiting the bookstore?

C: 啊，说到这个…你听说了吗？据说那本《雪国冒险奇谭》可能有机会重新公开发售了哦！
E: Ah. Well... have you heard? Supposedly, there's a chance that the Tale of the Winterlands can be openly sold again!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑！您就甭拿我打趣了。瞧瞧告诉您，我跟报社的人确认过了，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人……
E: Haha, just kidding! Don't make fun of me. On the down-low... I had it confirmed from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya...

C: 哎，这些「地火」的人…还有那些流浪者，没完没了的好烦啊…就不能安分点吗。
E: Ack, these Wildfire guys... and the vagrants, they're so annoying... can't you just chill out?

C: 尤其是「地火」和流浪者那帮人，之前成天就知道抱怨大守护者抛弃了下层区…这下把她盼回来了吧？哼，回头我倒要看看那帮人怎么解释！
E: Especially that Wildfire and the vagrants, endlessly complaining about how the Supreme Guardian abandoned the Underworld... Now she's back. Hmph, I'll have to see how they spin this one.

C: 为了让工程进展顺利，我把一部分积蓄捐给了施工队——这是我最正确的一笔投资。
E: In order to keep the construction underway, I donated a portion of my savings to the construction team. It's the best investment I've ever made.

C: 给你打拳的都是什么人？
E: Who are the fighters?

C: 阿丽娜一定很讨人喜欢吧？
E: People must like you a lot, Alina.

C: 嗯…那我最近也没什么别的事情呀。跟着虎克老大执行任务，还有修炼我的伪装技巧！除此以外就没了。
E: Oh... well, there's nothing much going on with me. Just questing with Hook, and practicing my camouflage skills! That's about it.

C: 发生这种事，你要我怎么冷静下来！
E: How can I calm down when something like this happened!

C: 别打断我，我好不容易才把名字想起来……
E: Don't interrupt me. I had a hard time just remembering my name...

C: 我找到她了就来告诉你。
E: I'll let you know when I see her.

C: 你怎么反应那么大？
E: Why are you acting like it's a big deal?

C: 哈哈，这你可说对了！奥列格大哥虽然平时总板着脸，但其实可照顾大家了。
E: Haha, that's true! Although Oleg usually looks quite serious, he takes good care of everyone.

C: 是啊，自打大守护者封锁上下层区之后，别说人想往返地面，就连信都不让寄咯。
E: Yeah, ever since the Supreme Guardian blockaded the Underworlds, nobody was allowed to go back and forth between them — not even the mail.

C: 「矿灯」已经停止鉴定服务了，详情都在公告上面，请您挪步……
E: "Miner's Lamp" has stopped all appraisal services. The announcement has all the details. Please leave...

C: 原来如此，谢谢你。
E: I see. Thank you.

C: 好像有什么东西钻出来了…
E: Something's coming out...

C: 有些话我不会对满腔热情的年轻成员说——但对你，我可以完全坦诚。
E: There are some things I can't say to our younger members — but with you I can be completely candid.

C: 什么样的机械都能修？
E: You can fix all kinds of machines?

C: 将来要是有机会的话，一定请你来我家做客，尝尝她的手艺。哈哈哈！
E: You have to come to my place someday to try her cooking. Haha!

C: 摇滚乐队不需要贝斯吗？
E: Doesn't a rock band need a bass player?

C: 或者，以你们对这个世界的称谓来说——希望你能享受此次雅利洛-Ⅵ之行。
E: Or, as you all call this world — I hope you will enjoy this trip to Jarilo-VI.

C: 根据演算，在保护程序的影响下，该个体产生异常行为的概率已回落至约<unbreak>2.1%</unbreak>。
E: According to calculations, under the effects of the protection program, the probability of this machine's abnormal activity has been reduced to approximately <unbreak>2.1%</unbreak>.

C: 和公司的人相处得如何？
E: How are you getting along with the IPC's people?

C: 但无论未来引向何处，我将尽己所能执行「存护」，直到系统彻底失去响应之日。
E: However, no matter where the future takes us, I will do all I can to execute "preservation," until the day that my systems become completely unresponsive.

C: 即便这赔偿不是立即支付，也足以看出公司滴水不漏的做事风格。或许他们真能成为不错的合作伙伴。
E: Though this repayment will not be made immediately, it shows the IPC's meticulous style of handling affairs. Perhaps they will genuinely become great partners.

C: 怎么，肚子饿了，想来点磐岩镇特色小吃垫垫胃？
E: What's up? Hankering for some local Boulder Town snacks to fill your belly?

C: 四千个孩子们回不了家，悲惨~
E: Four thousand kids with no home / that's stark~

C: 屋外掠过了，正直的影子
E: Sweeping past outside, an honest shadow — take a look

C: 创作才不是简单的过家家
E: Creation isn't just some kind of simple game

C: 哎~在世界中心等你回来~
E: Hey! Waiting in the center of the world for your return~

C: 呵欠…温度好像升高了，好困……
E: *yawns* I'm so drowsy, it's so warm...

C: 日常的放哨巡逻当然不能落下，偶尔还要帮街里街坊的解决些小矛盾…哦，对了，最近还要配合铁卫搞几场联合演练，这事不能忘。
E: Of course, we don't slack off on our daily patrols, and sometimes we help the neighborhood resolve conflicts... Oh, and we need to hold some joint exercises with the Silvermane Guards soon. I mustn't forget about that.

C: 而我们，星际和平公司，将会收拾他们的烂摊子！
E: That's why we of the IPC are here to clean up their mess!

C: 常来光顾啊。
E: Drop by anytime!

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 和扑满说话。
E: Speak to the Trotter.

C: 你就把柠檬汁加到鲜奶油里搅拌均匀，再静置半个小时……
E: Just mix the lemon juice with whipped cream well, and let it sit for half an hour...

C: 真敢写啊。
E: Wow. Audacious.

C: 又得收拾一阵子了……
E: Gotta tidy things up again...

C: 写错的那张就在这里面？
E: That incorrect one... Is it in here?

C: 前方危险，请勿靠近。
E: It's dangerous up ahead. Keep clear.

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 头晕…难道是地髓辐射？
E: I've got a headache... Could it be the Geomarrow radiation?

C: 你们这原料安全吗……
E: Are these ingredients safe...

C: 啧啧，这诗写得真有文采……
E: Tsk-tsk, this poem is beautifully crafted...

C: 哼，我就知道，这群流浪者没一个好鸟……
E: Hmm, I knew it. These vagrants are without fail a bunch of bad eggs...

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 哈…露出破绽了吧……
E: Ha, I found your weakness...

C: 放心吧，他可是镇上最厉害的。
E: Don't worry. He's the best player in our town.

C: 想了解艾丽斯小姐…
E: I want to know more about you, Eris...

C: 你有些怀疑她到底有没有搞清楚志愿导览员的工作究竟是什么。
E: You're not sure if she even understood what the job scope of a volunteer tour guide entails.

C: 我想成为银河棒球侠！
E: I want to become the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 你比地髓矿石还要耀眼…
E: You who art brighter than a Geomarrow ore...

C: 大概一百年前吧，星际和平公司有个卖陆地履带的子公司，搞了个什么「星际美食家协会」。他们就在银河内，给各种餐厅评定星级。
E: The IPC had this subsidiary company a hundred years ago which sold conveyor belts, and they had an "Interastral Gourmet Association" that went around and rated all the eateries throughout the whole cosmos.

C: 那个主厨还在那里装腔作势地和来吃饭的化外民说：「我们持明生性淡泊名利，就爱吃这一口儿。」哎，真是一言难尽……
E: That chef even put on this pretentious air and told Outworlders, "We Vidyadhara are indifferent to the trappings of fame and fortune, which is why we eat like this." Ack, that was too much...

C: 然而仙舟人的生命像死水一样漫长，但仙舟上的一切物品却又在高速地新陈代谢，就像死水里面朝生暮死的小虫。
E: But these Xianzhou people live on and on, just like stagnant water. Yet all the stuff aboard Xianzhou metabolizes super-fast — like bugs in that stagnant water, flailing about fleetingly.

C: 想和你再随便聊聊。
E: I'd like to chat with you some more.

C: 不过老板说过，无论是什么光怪陆离的世界，人们总是需要故弄玄虚的故事。
E: But the boss says that no matter how brilliant this world is, people always need to have dark and ghostly stories.

C: 但我不过是一介看店小童，只希望这东西别妨碍我做生意就好……
E: But I'm just a kid helping out here. Hope this thing doesn't impact my work...

C: 实际上也的确很先进。
E: Actually, it really does use quite advanced tech.

C: 我知道你是在说气话，但是…这未必不是一个方向。依我看，公司格局还是太小了。不断有新内容产出的「托蝶幻境」，不应该止步于娱乐。
E: I know you're angry, but... It's not necessarily taking things in a different direction. In my opinion, our company is too small scale. Butterfly Immersia has a constant stream of new content being released, and shouldn't stop at just entertainment.

C: 你这个艺术品味啊……
E: You really have no taste...

C: 这种机会可不多见，趁大家现在还在念叨这事，可以多编排几部，自带热度还省下不少宣发的费用呢。
E: Such a great opportunity is hard to come by! You should make immersias about it when the topic is still the talk of the town. In this way, you don't even need to spend much on promotions.

C: 请您尽管问吧！为客人答疑解惑也是我应尽的义务。
E: Ask anything you like! Answering customers' questions is also part of my duties.

C: 我们老板说了，开这拳馆不为了赚钱，为的就是让星际间更为广大的旅客们都能接触到仙舟上长生不老的生活方式。
E: Our boss always says that he didn't open this gym to make money, but rather to let more interstellar travelers access the hyper-immortality way of life found aboard the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 你这拳馆只收化外民？
E: Your boxing gym only accepts Outworlders?

C: 这么大一棵建木长起来了，我能注意不到吗？
E: How could I miss it — the thing's absolutely enormous!

C: 其实他本不负责这片辖区的事务，两百年前不知因何种原因被调来此地，我们的缘分也就此开始……
E: Actually, he never used to work in this jurisdiction. He was transferred over for some reason about <unbreak>200</unbreak> years ago, and that's when our fates became entwined...

C: 如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了，懂吗？
E: If I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, then I won't be considered an adult. Do you get it?

C: 想清楚了吗？我们宝饵堂的长生保健产品，用过的人都说好。要不，我再仔细给您介绍一下？
E: Have you come around yet? NutriTreasures' longevity supplements are highly rated by people who've used them. Why don't I tell you the more detailed benefits about our products?

C: 不认识，但我可以想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
E: I don't know him, but I can think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.

C: 可持续发展？
E: "Keep on spinning this side-hustle?"

C: 想了解神策府…
E: I'd like to learn more about the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 哈哈，别说是您了，卑职也时常有这种想法——将军虽不以武名世，但他毕竟曾是「云上五骁」中的传奇……
E: Haha, you're not the only one to say so. I'm always thinking the same. He's not exactly famous for his martial prowess, but he was still one of the legendary High-Cloud Quintet...

C: 卑职听完深自惭愧，又大受鼓舞。将军真不愧为统帅罗浮的人杰啊！
E: Hearing these words gave me both great shame and also great inspiration. No wonder the general is a legendary figure of Luofu!

C: 要知道，老之将至啊！仙舟人也不例外。只是这衰老的过程被拉长到难以感知的境地，以至于他们都觉得自己永远也不会老。
E: As you know, age has a way of catching up with people! The Xianzhou people are not immune either. It's just that our aging process is stretched out to an impossibly long duration, we feel like we're never getting older.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 有什么可以帮助我的？
E: What can you help me with?

C: 我向景元将军申请了调任，他允许我到地衡司里做一个小执事。
E: I applied for a transfer. General Jing Yuan let me come and be a minor officer at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 为感念祂的恩德，先祖们遴选勇士，踏上漫长的开拓之旅，将一个个死寂星球改造成宜居世界……
E: In gratitude for THEIR kindness, my ancestors selected warriors and embarked on trailblazing expeditions to transform dead worlds into living ones...

C: 我老了，多少也有些糊涂了，但每一个承诺都记得很清楚…恐怕再也没有时间去实现它们了……
E: I'm old, and somewhat confused, but I remember every promise well... I'm afraid I'll never have time to fulfill them...

C: 结果到最后只有我一人来到了这仙舟罗浮，这也不打紧，只要我能把生意谈成了，家乡那几位也不会觉得血本无归。
E: I ended up being the only one who made it to the Xianzhou Luofu, which was no big deal. People back home wouldn't feel like they were losing their shirts as long as I can get some business going for us.

C: 这位叫茂贞的小哥愿意帮我解决问题，我也相信他能帮我处理批文…我就待在这里，关键是那个麦尔彦…要是能识相点就好了。
E: There's a guy called Maozhen who's keen to help me solve things. I trust he can help me with document approval... So I'm staying here. The key is Maryam... If she could just be a little more sensible.

C: 结果枪手从棺木里掏出了一挺连射型重型能量机枪！哈哈哈哈哈，真是太令人意外了，仔细想想，他就是一名枪手，棺木里还能是什么呢？
E: So in the end, right, what does the gunslinger pull out of the coffin? A fully-automatic heavy energy machine gun! Ahahaha, what a surprise. Think about it! He's a gunslinger, so what else could be in the coffin?

C: 我在家乡的时候，获取经商营业许可就已经够繁琐了，经常一等就是一年，一开始我还会有些愤怒还有焦虑，可是后来我也心态平和了。
E: When I was back on my home planet, getting a business license was always a real pain. It usually took a year. At first, I was pretty angry and anxious. But later on, I became more calm about it.

C: 好的，大人若还有问题随时找我。
E: Very well. If you have any more questions, please come and find me.

C: 我也不知道啊，上头说要我来那我就来了呗。哎，说到这个就来气。
E: Your guess is as good as mine. If the higher-ups say they want me here, then I'm here. *sigh* Talking about this is starting to make me angry again.

C: 云骑军在此执勤，请勿随意走动。
E: The Cloud Knights are on duty here. Please refrain from wandering around.

C: 他会为你骄傲的。
E: He would be proud of you.

C: 我好像在哪儿见过你。
E: Where have I seen you before?

C: 转世重生，「我」早已不是当年的「我」了。谁又会记得上一世的活法和建议？倒不如留个值钱的坠子，也好利益同胞嘛~
E: After rebirth, "you" are not the same "you" as before. Who even remembers their previous life, or what suggestions might get passed on? You're better off bequeathing a valuable pendant or whatever for the future benefit of the race!

C: 转念一想，这就是持明轮回的神圣之处。龙祖赐予了我们肉体的永生，但也给了我们不受往日罪孽枷缚的机会。
E: On second thought, this is the reality of the sacred Vidyadhara reincarnation cycle. Long granted us eternal life of the flesh, but also blessed us with the opportunity to absolve ourselves from the sins of our previous lives.

C: 到了这份上，我就别惦记着评医士长了…只希望抓那些药王秘传的时候可不要牵连到我……
E: At this point, I should forget about becoming the chief healer... I just hope that I won't be implicated when they're hunting down those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 那种破解难关时的妙趣横生，躲避抓捕时的紧张刺激，重获自由时的酣畅淋漓。啊！世界上还有比越狱更美妙的事么。
E: The fun of solving a challenging problem, the excitement of escaping the guards, the joy of regaining your freedom... Ah! Is there anything more wonderful in this world than escaping from prison?

C: 哦，你是刚来的，可能不知道阿合马铁窗集团。没关系，后面你就慢慢知道了，在幽囚狱总有需要集团的时候。
E: Oh. You're new here, so you probably don't know about the Arma Correctional Group. It's fine. You'll come to understand that, in The Shackling Prison, there will always be times when you need the Group.

C: 当时场面一片混乱，很多犯人乘机逃了出去。哼，浑水摸鱼算什么好汉，有本事就靠自己的技术出去。
E: The entire place was in chaos. Lots of prisoners used it as their chance to escape. Hmph, what kind of hero tries to capitalize on an advantage like that? If you've got the skills, then you should rely on nothing but yourself!

C: 别这么不近人情嘛…
E: Don't be so rigid...

C: 前段时间，地区主管让我们去给现有商铺做估值，然后与商户们商量一下预期转让金额，没想到这些老家伙狮子大张口……
E: Some time ago, the regional administrator wanted us to assess the value of the stores in the alley and negotiate with the owners on how much they'd want if we decided to buy them out. But those old geezers just threw out a ridiculously high number...

C: 至少目前，我们两个相处得不错。她有过一段深刻的过往，克制自己、压抑自己，最后却只能等来背叛，那件事改变了她。
E: We're getting along pretty well for now. She has a troubled past where she had to suppress and restrain herself, only to be betrayed in the end. That experience has changed her.

C: 我放生过的…太多啦，那可数不清。以前刚了解放生的时候，我还放生过一些生物，好在我很快就意识到这样不好……
E: Well... I've released so many things already. I was releasing animals when I first started, but luckily I soon realized it was not a wise choice...

C: 哎，你看我这跟你说话的功夫，差点忘了统计要准备的放生材料呢。好了不说了，回头再跟你聊！
E: Oops, I almost forgot to look over the materials for releasing. All right, maybe next time!

C: 金人巷到底有什么特别的？
E: What's so special about Aurum Alley?

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 哎哟，老板，又见面了。
E: Ah, we meet again, dear customer!

C: 找你随便聊聊天。
E: I just want to chat with you.

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I'll leave you alone, then.

C: 也许到了那个时候，金人巷就再也不需要我了。但那样更好，真的。
E: When the time comes, I might no longer be needed here. That's not a bad thing though.

C: 同事们都觉得公司就像是「只会入侵和破坏的商业野兽」…但是，我每天都用着公司的产品，也听说过公司的故事，我总觉得这之间很矛盾。
E: In their eyes, IPC is no different than a ruthless beast that leaves only devastation in its wake in the business world... However, as a customer who uses IPC products every day and knows about its origins, I don't think my colleagues' claims really make sense.

C: 你这都卖些什么？
E: What have you got for sale here, then?

C: 老师所开启的课题，我恐怕难以为继。学会将另一项重任托付给了我。
E: I'm afraid I can't, as currently I'm occupied with another subject commissioned by the Guild.

C: 看来店里的东西未必合你眼缘，没关系，以后你可以常来，等我进完货，说不定哪次你就遇到心头好了。
E: Nothing is destined to become yours this time, it seems. But don't worry, you can come here later and look around as much as you like, and perhaps one day you'll find something that hits the spot.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「岱舆」，它与视肉为战，终结了无数孽物的灾患，它虽坠落，但有新生正在破碎的摇篮里萌芽。
E: You see the Xianzhou Daiyu combating against the viscorpi and ending the cataclysm of countless abominations. Though it had fallen, new life now blooms from that shattered cradle.

C: 何况你是仙舟盟友，来到神策府，岂有被晾在一边的道理？
E: Besides, you're a pivotal Xianzhou ally. How can I give you the cold shoulder when you're here?

C: 青镞平日里是个说话逗趣的人，可惜她只要站在这儿对我开口，就是正正经经的报告腔，条分缕析，字字不离数据，乏味得紧。
E: Qingzu is fun to be around when she's not working, so it's a shame that she always speaks very seriously to me here. Her analytical and no-nonsense tone can be a bit dry.

C: 不想，那压力太大了，不适合我。
E: No. That's too stressful for me.

C: 但我现在觉得这是好事，真的。高飞的鸟不该有什么地面上的牵绊，既然我狠心放手让她飞，那就希望她能飞到最高远的地方。
E: However, I think it's good to set children free. A soaring bird shouldn't be tied down. Since I have decided to let her go, then I hope she will fly as high and far as possible.

C: 反正应该是不到十年吧！哈哈，不过感觉已经在这里住了很久了，毕竟我这辈子大部分想记住的回忆都发生在这里。
E: Either way, under a decade! Haha! Although I feel like I've lived here for ages already, since most of the memories I want to hold onto were made here.

C: 造化洪炉中逃出的岁阳数量庞大，想要全部收回，还得花上很长的时间。
E: The number of heliobi that escaped the Creation Furnace was immense. It will take a very long time to capture them all.

C: 我、我可能看上去挺没有威严的，但是十王司是一个有威、威严的部门。
E: I—I may not seem very authoritative, but the Ten-Lords Commission is a very, very serious department.

C: 比如那个藿藿家的岁阳、比如素裳、比如桂乃芬，还比如汝。也许是吾的错觉，但她似乎稍比以前开朗了些许。
E: Like that heliobus Huohuo has, Sushang, Guinaifen, and you. I could just be imagining it, but I find her more cheerful compared to before.

C: …希望{NICKNAME}能理解。
E: ...I hope you understand, {NICKNAME}.

C: 在绥园执勤也挺好的，至少不用看人脸色……
E: Working in Fyxestroll Garden is actually quite nice, at least I don't have to deal with people's moods...

C: 我印象里…六七百年前的时候？我那时候还在读书，家就住在这附近。
E: It's about... six or seven hundred years ago, I think? I was still studying then, and my house was around this area.

C: 高定和成衣有什么区别？
E: What's the difference between haute couture and ready-made?

C: 款式选简单的，切不可盲目追求繁复。以我们店来说，你买高定就别买最花里胡哨的，买那些低调不起眼的，这才叫仙舟式的得体与贵气。
E: Pick a simple style, and never blindly go for the complicated. Our shop's advice is to stay away from the gaudy when buying haute couture pieces. Get the more obscure ones instead. That is the style befitting Xianzhou's elegance.

C: 正巧，设计师那边做出几件「一览芳华」的成品，这是我们即将推出的高定系列，还没正式对外公开发售呢。
E: Incidentally, our tailors have come up with a few pieces from the Everyouth line. It is a custom line that we are about to launch; it hasn't been officially released to the public yet.

C: 你们可能没见过我们的科技…
E: You may not have seen our tech before...

C: 嗯，亲亲多考虑考虑，欢迎随时光临。
E: Have a good think about it, sweetie. You're welcome back, any time.

C: 这囚徒体格惊人，身高过丈，腰大十围，独大体胖，方面大耳，天生金甲覆身，刀枪不入…为了抓它，十王司还派了几名判官协同抓捕。
E: This prisoner's physique was shocking, standing over ten feet tall with a girth of over five feet. Everything was huge about him: His weight, visage, and facial features. His body was covered in natural golden armor, and impervious to weapons... To capture him, the Ten-Lords Commission had to dispatch its Judges to assist.

C: 我也是有样学样，说得不对的地方，还请客人多多批评。
E: I'm also only learning and invite you to call me out if anything I've said is wrong.

C: 我看你对美食也有一定的兴趣，有什么想问的，随时欢迎。
E: I see you have some interest in the arts of culinary persuasion as well. You're welcome to ask me anything.

C: 我们应该是初次见面。
E: No, we haven't met before.

C: 你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，再考虑是否拒绝也没有关系。
E: Once you know about my condition, it's okay if you decide to reject me.

C: 救命啊，这种蠢事我再也不干了。逃生鞘差一点点就砸到了有人居住的村子。
E: Gosh, I'll never do such a dumb thing ever again. The escape sheath almost crashed into a village full of people.

C: 你选择逃避！
E: You chose to run away!

C: 看来你脑中的肌肉还不够，还没有领悟到肌肉的境界。
E: It seems your cognitive muscles aren't developed enough to appreciate the beauty of brawn.

C: 所以，向肌肉许愿吧！肌肉会回应你，我也会回应你的！
E: So, make a wish upon my muscles! They will answer your call, as will I!

C: 筋肉祸祖会满足每一颗肌肉细胞的愿望，问吧，肌肉会告诉你一切的。
E: The Brawn Author will fulfill the wishes of every muscle cell. Ask away, for the muscles hold all the answers.

C: 再后来，有几个穿着盔甲的天兵发现了咱。他们给咱扎了一针，咱突然就能听懂仙人仙话啦。
E: And then, some celestial soldiers in armor discovered me. They gave me a poke with some needle, and I could suddenly understand celestial speech.

C: 所以，仙舟人不太珍视他们的古迹，就如同我们不太珍视自己城市里的旧房子。他们也不太重视整理成文史，因为「历史」还活在每个当事人的脑中。
E: That's why the Xianzhou natives don't really value their own cultural relics, just as we don't really care about dilapidated buildings back home. They also don't really get the concept of written history, because "history" still lives within their memories.

C: 我看你也不像等闲之辈，见识过那些摧枯拉朽的反物质军团吧？它们不仅威胁你我、威胁仙舟、也同样威胁银河中的有情众生！
E: You look like someone who gets around. You've seen the destructive Antimatter Legion, right? They threaten every sentient creature in the cosmos!

C: 机会不是天天有，该出手时就出手。买的越多，实惠越多！
E: Such a golden opportunity doesn't come every day. Get it while it's hot! The more you buy, the greater your discount!

C: 又见面了朋友，这次是想看比赛还是想赚钱？
E: We meet again, friend. Are you here to watch the competition, or do you want to make some money?

C: 慢走，有需要随时找我。
E: See you. You can look for me any time you need something.

C: 吃饱上炕！
E: Eat. Lots. Then. Sleep!

C: 客官，不买些水果吗？
E: Ma'am, won't you buy some of this fruit?

C: 说书这东西，过时的艺术…
E: Minstrelsy, now that's a dated art form...

C: 这种程度就是一般的体育八卦，热点嘛！大家都知道它不是真的。
E: Nah, it's nothing beyond the standard of usual gossip in the world of sports. It's just clickbait! Everybody knows not to take it seriously.

C: 诚然，你可以给塔拉萨的希望小学捐款，帮那些勤奋勇敢的小鱼人们游出海沟。但你需要很多年才能看到成效——现代人最没耐心了。
E: Indeed, you can make donations to Thalassa's Hope Elementary School, to help those brave little merkids escape the treacherous trench. But that will take many years before you see results. Modern folk require more instant gratification than that.

C: 其他二位我瞧不上，这南帝可不简单。他很少说话，却有一种不言自明的说服力，难道他真是什么大人物？
E: I scoff at the other two, but this Southern Emperor is a mysterious one. He rarely speaks, but has some sort of inexplicable persuasiveness to him. Could he really be some big shot?

C: 虽然你说你喜欢我。
E: I know you said you liked me.

C: 好想再和它聊聊天……
E: I really want to chat with it again...

C: 那个星球自转周期比较长。
E: It's a planet with a slow rotational period.

C: 来罗浮的游客变多了…
E: We're getting more and more tourists coming to the Luofu...

C: …不过，如果我比别的岁阳更好说话，我猜是那艘星槎主人的原因吧。
E: ...But if I'm more easy-going than other heliobi, I guess it might be related to the owner of that starskiff...

C: …后来，这个棋盘被一位臭屁小孩捡到了，他讨厌学习，对什么事情都不热衷。这可怎么行啊，我便从棋盘上显现，要求这位少年好好学习下棋！
E: ...Later on, the chessboard was picked up by this snotty little brat who hated school and who wasn't showing any interest in much at all. This would not do — I appeared from out of the chessboard, and asked this kid to knuckle down and learn some chess!

C: 因为你的颅顶被一片深重的阴影所覆盖。就连岁阳的火光都无法照亮的黑暗。
E: Because the top of your skull is enshrouded in a grave fog. This kind of darkness can't be illuminated even by the blaze of a heliobus.

C: 你知道我是对的。
E: You know I'm right.

C: 你当我傻呀？
E: Do you think I'm stupid?

C: 再告诉你个小秘密好了…你再贴近一些……
E: I'll let you in on a little secret... Scoot closer just a little...

C: 别以为我听不出你语气中夹枪带棒，我不在乎，我就是骄傲～
E: Don't think I can't sense the sarcasm dripping from your words, not that I care. Smug is my middle name.

C: 哎…很难谈得上顺利。在这小小的丹鼎司中，各种势力盘根错节，像微缩版诸侯割据似的，相当难应付。
E: Ah... I don't know if I'd say that. Though the Alchemy Commission is small, there are complicated relations running between various different forces. It's like a miniature feudal state. It can be quite challenging to deal with.

C: 嗯嗯，下次再聊吧～如果在罗浮遇到什么伤病，随时来找妾身就好～
E: Sure, I'll talk to you again next time~ If you get injured or sick during your time on the Luofu, come and find me any time~

C: 这才叫真正的文学！
E: This is the stuff of true literature!

C: 这里景色优美？
E: Because of the beautiful scenery?

C: 说得也是…
E: You're right...

C: 那是我出生之前的事了。
E: That was back before I was even born.

C: 这里和以前不一样了……
E: This place isn't the same as it used to be...

C: *仙舟粗语*活着真好…
E: *Xianzhou profanity*, life is great...

C: 我们前世关系很好嘛。
E: We were close in our previous lifetimes.

C: 我和云泓一起入伍两百年，大家都是托付生死的好兄弟…
E: I've been in the army with Yunhong for two hundred years now. We've trusted each other with our lives...

C: 呀！嘘，小伊卡，不可以乱说话……
E: Ah! Shh, Little Ica, you shouldn't say things like that...

C: 以为搓个核弹，结果捏个发夹。
E: Thought you were making a nuclear bomb, but turns out it was just a hairpin.

C: 而这位是索芙洛尼娅。或许你在奥赫玛城中见过她，那枚髀石护身符就是她送给我的。
E: And this is Sophronia. You might have seen her in Okhema. She's the one who gave me this knucklebone talisman.

C: 你是说…其他的｢缇宝｣？
E: You mean... other "Tribbies"?

C: 欸。小灰别急，缇宝老师还没念完呢。
E: Hey. Patience, Little Gray. Miss Tribbie hasn't finished reading yet.

C: 这下可以人手一只了。
E: Now everyone can have one.

C: 所以，*我们*有点忙，很可能， 没时间陪小小灰玩啦。先道歉！
E: So, we're a bit busy, and most likely won't have time to play with Little Gray. Sorry!

C: 明天见——
E: See you tomorrow—

C: 啊…不好意思，自顾自地回忆起来了。下次过来，我也给您准备点吧。
E: Ah... sorry about that, I got lost in my memories for a moment. Next time you come by, I'll prepare something for you.

C: 白厄，在外边见过了大世面，可别瞧不上妈的手艺哦。
E: Phainon, I know you've seen the world out there, but don't you dare look down on your mom's cooking!

C: 哈，拉比努斯，你的肚子还撑得住吗？看来这次是我要赢咯。
E: Ha, Labienus, can your stomach still handle it? Looks like I'm gonna win this one.

C: 请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
E: Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?

C: 看来，得给小伊卡，多准备些野苹果了呢……
E: Looks like I'll need to prepare more wild apples for Little Ica...

C: 灰宝，看诊时间结束啦。我看看，接下来的安排是…唔，下午茶时间！
E: Grayie, consultation hours are over! Let me see, next on the schedule is... Ah, afternoon tea time!

C: 现在的我，已经可以用这双手触碰生命了。与小大地兽们互动的方法，请完全教给我吧！
E: Now, with these hands, I can touch life itself. Please teach me everything about how to interact with little dromases!

C: 你说的是往生前配置。
E: You're asking for the allocations for the living.

C: 我已经做足了准备，撤退！
E: I'm already prepared... to retreat!

C: 干我们这行，要么两只眼都闭上，要么两只眼都睁开，因为…
E: In our line of work, we either judge everything fairly or we do not judge at all. Because...

C: 没搞头。
E: Nah.

C: 曼陀罗。
E: Jimsonweed.

C: 《嗔的容器》
E: The Vessel of Rage

C: 有人赞美食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。也有人诅咒食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。
E: Some laud the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard. Others curse the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard.

C: 自从找到那个怪人之后，我的心里舒坦了不少，这是你应得的奖励。看来我这鸟，今晚能睡个好觉了！谢谢你！
E: I've felt much better since we found that weirdo. Here's your reward. I will sleep soundly tonight! Thank you!

C: 不至于，你还是回家休息吧…
E: That's not good, you better head home and rest up...

C: 这是被称为「星槎种子」的复合构造体。
E: This is a composite named "starskiff seed."

C: 只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
E: The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.

C: 储存了太卜司机要的诸多展阅，若想阅读必须获得太卜许可。
E: It stores many classified flexible displays of the Divination Commission. You must have permission from the master diviner to read them.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 每首你都这么说…
E: You say that for every song...

C: 海上悬浮的巨大丹炉，没有找到能够烧火的地方，亦没有看炉子的小童。看来千年之前，仙舟丹士们就掌握了新能源技术，不需要燃料和人工，效果挺好。
E: The huge elixir crucible floats in the sea. There is no place to make a fire, and there is no one watching the crucible. It seems like thousands of years ago, the Xianzhou alchemists already mastered a new energy technology that does not require fuel and labor. Most impressive.

C: 不知这位持明蜕生前有什么舍不下的心结？无论如何，它最终都成了磨灭不去的悲伤，被你握在掌心。
E: Perhaps this Vidyadhara once had something they couldn't bear to part with prior to their rebirth. But now it has become an eternal sadness, held in the palm of your hand.

C: 你轻抚晶光灿然的外壳，恍惚间成了一位手执长枪的勇武云骑。你潜心武艺，在队中演练从无败绩。教习师父欣赏你的天赋，举荐你接替他的职务。
E: You stroke the shimmering shell gently. While in a trance, you transform into a valiant Cloud Knight wielding a spear. You train hard and never lose a match in training. Impressed by your talent, your instructor recommends you as his successor.

C: 「警告！警告！侦测到可能的盗窃行为——快递箱<unbreak>81010274</unbreak>已为您联系距您最近的地衡司公廨职员，请积极配合公廨调查，请勿擅自离开现场！」
E: "Warning! Warning! Possible theft detected! Package <unbreak>81010274</unbreak> has contacted the nearest Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery. Please cooperate with the investigation. Do not leave the scene without permission!"

C: 你假装无意翻看了快递箱内的书册，这是一本黉学中使用的习题册，看起来像是*假期作业*，习题部分一点进展都没有。
E: You pretend to idly flip through the notebook in the parcel. It is a lyceum practice notebook for "holiday homework." Not a single question was answered.

C: 学院代表正在冲向舞台。
E: The academy's rep is rushing the stage.

C: 让我们把镜头对准现场。
E: Let's aim our cameras at the scene.

C: 你拆开了两个标记着「铁块（1斤）」的箱子，里面各安静地躺着一个普通的铁块。然后你拆开了标记着「帝弓遗物（1斤）」的箱子。
E: You opened the two boxes with "Iron Block (1 kilo)" written on them. Inside each, you find a regular iron block. Then, you open the box marked with "Reignbow's Relic (1 kilo)"...

C: 那家伙情绪酸溜溜的。
E: That person's mood is so acidic.

C: 有个人类妄想与我合作！
E: There's a human who fantasizes about cooperating with me!

C: …让我做新能源炭火。
E: ...and asked if I could be his renewable flame source.

C: 你就不能干点正事？
E: Can't you just do something serious for once?

C: 仙舟人？得了吧，他们向来很狡猾，再说了哪有人会自称是「信徒」的，莫不是十王司那帮走狗设的局想诓你，你可千万别上当。就算上当了也别把我的位置供出来！
E: Xianzhou people? Forget it. They have always been cunning. Then again, why would anyone call themselves "believers"? Could it be a trap set up by the lapdogs of the Ten-Lords Commission? You better be careful. And don't you dare reveal my location!

C: 那几个学生最近在测体能，跑步的时候我推着他们跑得飞快，一连破了好几个仙舟记录。我帮人家上学呢，这叫什么玩闹啊，这不算正经事吗？
E: These students were having physical tests recently, so I gently nudged them along while they were running to boost their speed. There were even a few who broke the Xianzhou record. Look, I'm not just horsing around but helping these kids in their studies. How isn't this serious?

C: 轻轻握住房门把手。
E: Gently grasp the room door handle.

C: 斯坦威游隼，原产地匹诺康尼，以「美丽」之称闻名遐迩——既包括它美丽的外形，也包括它美丽的售价。
E: The Steinway Falcon, originating from Penacony, is renowned for its beauty — both in terms of its appearance and price.

C: 在这个望远镜里，你看见了浩渺群星，过去、现在与未来正交织为壮丽的图景——唯独没有对面的高楼。
E: In this telescope, you can see the stars, the past, the present, and the future — all weaved into a magnificent picture. You can see everything but the skyscrapers on the other side.

C: 匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
E: A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.

C: 等一下…我记得你！之前在大厅里，那群囚犯都围着你欢呼，难道你就是他们的头头？
E: Hold on... I remember you! The surrounding convicts were cheering you on at the lobby. Could you be their leader?

C: 越线的行动并不一定意味着会受到惩罚；而需要被制裁的行为在仍处于「念头」的阶段就应当被制止——这就是家族的行事方式。
E: When you do something that crosses the line, it doesn't necessarily result in punishment. In fact, behaviors that deserve punishment should have been nipped in the bud when they are still an "idea" — that's how The Family handles things.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，炽热的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his burning gaze piercing through your face.

C: 你知道吗？我从小就是个特别敏感的孩子。虽然我也一直在努力学习用理性思考，但到了关键的时候，那个感性的自我总是会占到上风。
E: You know, I've been particularly sensitive since I was little. Although I've been trying hard to think rationally, my emotional side always gets the better of me at critical moments.

C: 直到我真正置身于这座梦想之城，我才发现从前的自己有多么狭隘。你看，这座城市本身就是件绝妙的艺术品！
E: It wasn't until I stepped foot in this city of dreams did I realize how narrow-minded I used to be. Look! This city itself is a perfect piece of art!

C: 当我不知道背后都在搞什么勾当呢。那群高管看起来人模人样的，都是吸血鬼！白天开会研究骗钱，夜里到处寻欢作乐。搞什么末位淘汰，第一个就该把你们开了！
