E: You think I don't know what's going on behind all this? Those suits all pretending to be kind and caring — bloodsuckers, all of 'em! Formulating all sorts of scams in daytime meetings, and seeking decadent pleasure at night. And firing the lowest performers? How about I fire you lot!

C: 还有那个浑身劣质香水味的客户，见面就让我亲他手背，咋的不敢让我叫他一声父亲呢？穿件黑西装就真把自己当个大人物了不是？
E: And that client with the nauseatingly foul perfume, making me kiss the back of his hand every time we meet. How about I just call him my uncle and let him treat me like a dog? Think you're some big shot just because you're decked out in a snazzy black suit?

C: 有什么用呢？
E: What's the point of these?

C: 我就是传说中的钟表匠！
E: I am the fabled Watchmaker!

C: 说起来…您觉得星神究竟是什么呢？祂们强大、神秘，凡人在其面前脆弱渺小得彷如蝼蚁…可祂们之间也会往来争斗、也有爱恨情仇。
E: Speaking of which... What do you think the Aeons are exactly? All-powerful, mysterious, where mortals are no more than gnats to THEM... But even among THEMSELVES, there is conflict, love, hate, revenge, a cocktail of emotions.

C: 能与您交谈真是一件幸事。
E: It was my good fortune to be able to speak with you.

C: 不可能的，我没法接受一位非皮皮西的伴侣，可是我…我没法控制不去想他。种族该成为爱情必须考量的因素吗，不该成为吗？我不知道……
E: That's impossible. I could never accept a non-Pepeshi partner. But I... I couldn't stop myself from thinking about him. Should race be a factor when it comes to love, or should it not? I have no idea...

C: 啊，「黄金的时刻」又度过了安宁的一瞬…真好。
E: Ah, another instant of peace passed in the Golden Hour... Wonderful.

C: 念什么师生之情…以为我会相信这种话吗？那家伙，写下这几行字的时候脸上一定还挂着得意的笑吧。
E: Talking about teachers and students... as though I'd believe all that? This person must've had the biggest, self-congratulatory grin on their face while writing that.

C: 你父亲是什么样的人？
E: What kind of person is your dad?

C: …嗯，再见。
E: ...Yeah, bye.

C: 啊…她是如此令人过目不忘，等您见过她就明白了！
E: Ah... She is unforgettable, and you will understand when you see her for yourself!

C: 但似乎没人真正见过他的样子——说到底，<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>到底是什么人呢？
E: But it seems no one has ever seen him before... Just what kind of person is this <color=#dbc291ff>"Watchmaker"</color>?

C: …原来如此。「十二时分」的梦境构成表盘，而串联起十二个梦境的球笼成为在表盘上跃动的指针——或许，匹诺康尼本身即为「钟表匠」所造的最精密、最宏大的作品！
E: ...I see. The Dreamscape of the "Twelve Hours" form a clock face, and the Spheroids connect the twelve Dreamscapes as the clock hands dance between them... Perhaps Penacony itself is the Watchmaker's most meticulous and magnificent work!

C: 再见，也希望您度过一个美好的夜晚。
E: Farewell. I hope that you enjoy a wonderful evening, too.

C: 因为那是个皮皮西人——哈哈哈哈！
E: Because the robber was a Pepeshi! Hahahaha!

C: 你是被罚来站岗的吗？
E: Are you being punished with guard duty?

C: 已经没有这样的人了。现在大家都能控制好自己的情绪，而不是一天到头歇斯底里。
E: There's no one like that anymore. Everyone can manage their emotions very well now and isn't in a constant state of hysteria.

C: 慢走，咱们回见！
E: Have a good day, we'll meet again soon!

C: 哎呀，又一个新面孔…你好啊年轻人，愿意和我这个老太婆聊聊吗？
E: Ah, a new face... Hello, young one. Mind having a chat with an old lady like me?

C: 回见，年轻人。我还等着你给我讲更多的故事呢。
E: Another time, young one. I'm sure you have more stories to tell.

C: 财富对我这种生于商贾之家的人而言，比起享乐的源泉，更像是一种责任。
E: To one born into a merchant family like me, wealth resembles more of a responsibility than a source of pleasure.

C: 朋友，这些苜蓿币给你——答应我，拿它们去看场音乐会吧，台上全是活人的那种。
E: My friend, take these Alfalfa credits — just promise me, take these coins and go watch a performance where music is played by the living!

C: 所以您看…这款车是否合您的心意呢？暗金色的车身与您的气质极为搭配，专为速度设计的流线造型也能满足您对时尚的追求，价钱合理，买它不会错的。
E: Well... would this car pique your interest? A dark gold car would go really well with your style, and the streamlined model designed for speed would fit right in with your pursuit of fashion. Its price is fair too — you'd be missing out if you didn't buy it.

C: 不打扰您了，有需要随时喊我就行。
E: I won't impose any further, please feel free to reach out to me if you require any assistance.

C: …总算在梦境里找到了份稳定体面的工作，待遇还不错！我得好好干，绝不能浪费这个来之不易的机会。
E: ...I finally found a decent job in the Dreamscape with decent benefits! I'll have to do my best, I can't afford to let this opportunity go to waste!

C: 别担心，这只是一点小小的…兴奋过度。梦里的苏乐达，喝不坏身子的！
E: Don't worry about me. I'm just a little... over-excited. Inside a dream, drinking SoulGlad doesn't harm your body!

C: 谁没有过在夜幕下眺望高楼的经历呢？每每看着这座永不熄灯的城市，我就感到…安心。
E: Who hasn't stared up at the skyscrapers under the cover of night? Whenever I see this city that never sleeps, I feel... at peace.

C: 唉~再不快点出新地图的话，逐梦客们迟早也会厌倦这里吧……
E: Ugh, if they don't drop a new map soon, Dreamchasers will get bored with this place...

C: 好啊，我非常乐于与你交流。
E: Alright. I am very happy to communicate with you.

C: 这人来人往、熙熙攘攘，可谓是信息的川流、故事的沃壤。
E: With so many customers here, this place is a vast repository of information and a fertile ground for stories.

C: 那你听说过布洛妮娅•兰德吗？
E: Have you heard of Bronya Rand?

C: 她在紧张，那紧张中还带着些许窘迫与尴尬。
E: She looks nervous, with a tinge of embarrassment and awkwardness.

C: 不说了，我得找个真正懂的人来帮忙……
E: No, guess I'll need to find someone who knows Roboball to give me a hand...

C: 只需通过「梦境护照」提交申请，我们就会为您妥善处理好一切。
E: Simply submit a request using your Dreamscape Pass, and we will handle everything for you.

C: 客人您好，我是酒店的大堂经理丹尼斯。
E: Greetings, esteemed guest. I'm Dennis, the lobby manager of this hotel.

C: 于是我和几个小伙伴一起，研发出了粘土人专用的太空旅行方式——动力炮椅。
E: So, my friends and I developed the Kinetic Propulsion Chair, a special way for us Clayforms to travel through space.

C: 你再也拦不住自胸口上涌的热流，一把揽过师妹的肩膀，嘴唇贴在她耳边说道……
E: A profound warmth fills your being. You tightly grasp her shoulders, drawing nearer, and softly whisper into her ear...

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 包治百病。
E: It can cure various diseases.

C: 「恶夜钻钻娃超可动素体，献给每个永恒少年！」
E: "The Diamond Doll action figure is designed for those who are forever young!"

C: 「乌通蓬自动车，成功人士的豪华尊享。」
E: "Utopon Motion Maverick, luxury indulgence for the successful."

C: 疾风——力量！！！
E: Speed is power!!!

C: 这场无声的角力还在继续。不知你们谁会是最后的胜者。
E: The silent staring contest continues. No one knows who's going to win.
...Hey.

C: 能看出来，毕竟我不瞎。
E: I can tell. I'm not blind, you know.

C: …好吧，不开玩笑了，你内心压根就没那么想。你能找到这扇门靠的完全是：一、瞎蒙；二、系统提示。
E: ...That won't fool anyone, you've never really had those thoughts. You find this door solely relying on your random guesses and the system prompts.

C: 但我从小在这里长大，再美的景色看多了也容易觉得单调…偶尔我也会想去看看匹诺康尼外的世界，看看那种挂着群星的天空。
E: However, having grown up here, even the most breathtaking sights can grow dull and monotonous... Sometimes I wish to visit the world outside Penacony and see the starry sky of reality.

C: 好的，祝您一梦平…啊不对，一梦愉快！
E: Very well, I wish you a safe drea — Ah, I mean a joyous dream!

C: 絮絮叨叨的布琳娜拉着你聊了许久，从公馆内部的神秘通道、宝库里被隐藏的小门，再到天天游荡在建筑中的恐怖幽灵……
E: Brina the chatterbox talks your ear off for quite some time. She talks about the mysterious passages in the building, the hidden door in the treasury, and the terrifying ghosts that roam within the structure every day...

C: 家族的邀请遍及寰宇、明察秋毫，所赠的都是够格之人。而这位告解者德行不佳，才干亦不见长，并没有收到邀请。
E: The Family's invites were sent all over the worlds, and their judgment was keen-sighted — all who received them were worthy. But this penitent's morals and talents were both lacking, which is why he did not receive one.

C: 曾经跟我一起追剧的好友们早就退坑了。大家都说自己有很多事情要忙，不能再把时间花在这些没用的东西上。
E: The friends who used to binge-watch the series with me quit way early on. Everyone says they've got a lot of stuff to do, and have no time to spend on such useless activities.

C: 看他们那表情，就好像我说要往松饼里加两片月亮似的…至不至于啊？！
E: From their looks of disdain, it's like I said I wanted to add two slices of the moon to my waffle or something... Was it really that bad a desire!?

C: 相信单从这些名字中你也能发现，我在艺术上的表达稍微有那么一点——好吧，对于一般人而言或许是过于——抽象和前沿。
E: I'm sure you've noticed from these names that my artistic expression is a little... All right, to most people, it might be overly... abstract and avant-garde.

C: …失礼了，我很少表现得像刚才那般失态。
E: ...My apologies. That behavior was out of line. I am not usually like that.

C: 真正的冒险，必是充满曲折险阻、惊心动魄，必是能够目睹最真实的宇宙……
E: A true adventure needs to be full of twists and turns, thrills and excitement, and allow you to witness the truest universe...

C: 梦里也不会饿。
E: You don't get hungry in dreams, either.

C: 象征家族权威的雕像，不知因何被推倒、拦住了你前进的路。
E: A statue that symbolizes the great authority of The Family has been knocked over, blocking your path ahead.

C: 这尊雕像象征着贝尔蒂埃，猎犬家系的第一位家主。传说他是里奥撒缪斯的左膀右臂，忠贞不二，枪术高超。当橡木家主遭到背叛濒死时，是他陪伴这位家主到最后一刻。
E: This statue symbolizes Bediver, first Family Head of the Bloodhound Family. Legend states that he was Riothamus' right-hand man - faithful to the end and skilled in battle. When the Oak Family Head was betrayed and left to die, it was he that accompanied him in his final moments.

C: 象征苜蓿草家系的徽记，向心聚拢的叶片昭示着无与伦比的凝聚力。
E: A crest that symbolizes the Alfalfa Family. Leaves gathering together towards the center display an unparalleled cohesive force.

C: 哈哈，虽说我确实也有些情绪问题，不过还没到必须麻烦其他人的程度。有机会的话，还是让我尝尝您调制的饮料吧。
E: Haha, I admit that I may have some emotional issues too, but it's not to the extent that I need to bother others. I'll just try one of your drinks.

C: 这点小伎俩…想要动摇「同谐」的洪流，还是有点不自量力了。
E: They tried to divert the torrent that is Harmony... with that little trick. That was a serious overestimation of their strength.

C: 欧利马叹了口气，不知道该露出什么表情，最终还是停留在一丝浅浅的微笑上。
E: Olma sighs. She seems uncertain about what expression to make and just holds the faintest of smiles.

C: 但请别沮丧，我最近会时常流连于剧院，直到那些不可爱的「瑕疵」被修补完毕。
E: But do not despair — I will frequent the theater these days, till those unlovely "flaws" are fixed.

C: 呵呵，找个人说说话后感觉好多了…虽然改变不了什么，但还是谢谢你。
E: Haha, I feel so much better after talking with someone... even though nothing's actually changed: Thank you very much.

C: 没问题，回见！不过已经这个时间了吗…看来今天又要通宵赶稿了……
E: No problem. See you later! But it's late already... looks like I'll be pulling another all-nighter again...

C: 再见吧，该死的怪物、肮脏的魔鬼！祝你们在地狱里永远发烂发臭！别想抓到我，更别想把我变成你们的点心…你们抓不到我的！
E: Farewell, cursed monsters and foul demons! May you rot in hell for all eternity! Don't even dream of trying to catch me or turn me into your little snack... You will never catch me!

C: 男人似乎对你的打扰表示不悦。他静静地看着你，过了好一会儿才开口。
E: The man seems displeased at you disturbing him. He stares at you silently for a considerable while before opening his mouth to speak.

C: 没事，我很高兴有人愿意听我说话。
E: Alright! I'm very happy to have someone willing to listen to me.

C: 流梦礁的忆质， 越来越不正常了……
E: It seems like the Dreamflux Reef's memoria is becoming increasingly abnormal...

C: 这就意味着忆质会重新盈满流梦礁被腐蚀的空洞——如果能得到恰当的建设，那么它总有一天会变得繁荣而美丽。
E: This means the memoria will replenish the corroded void of Dreamflux Reef, and if it is properly constructed, the Dreamflux Reef will flourish and become beautiful one day.

C: 呸呸呸这些丧气话让您见笑了，您把我说的话忘了吧——钟表小子绝不言败，我也是！
E: Blah, what am I doing saying all these depressing words! How embarrassing! Just forget what I said — Clockie never admits defeat, and neither do I!

C: 作为致力于记录的学者，只是付出这种代价就可以见证更多历史，实在是太划算了。
E: As a scholar dedicated to documentation, paying this price to witness more great histories is worth it.

C: 时间流转，匹诺康尼从监狱变成荒漠，又从荒漠变成盛会之星。当年看星星的人，还能剩下几个人呢。
E: As time marched on, Penacony transformed from a prison into a desert and from a desert into a Planet of Festivities. How many of those who once gazed at the stars together remain in Penacony?

C: 早早预料到这一事实的人们，在文明死亡的最后，将所有的故事都刻到了芯片上，用尽全力扔进太空。
E: The people who anticipated this fact early carved all the stories onto chips at the death of civilization and threw them into space with all their might.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个贪玩的小家伙，最近又迷上了<color=#dbc291ff>赛道两边的转转机</color>，真希望它别给赛场的工作人员添乱啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a playful fella that's recently been obsessed with the <color=#dbc291ff>spinny machines flanking the racetrack</color>. I hope it doesn't cause trouble for the staff there, tweet.

C: 这是你的报酬，硬派鸟绝不会让朋友白跑一趟啾。
E: Here's your reward. Real hardcore birds will never let their friends' efforts be in vain, tweet.

C: 从现在起，你就是美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟了啾！这些报酬通通都给你啾。
E: From now on, you're the fastest bird in the Dreamville, tweet! All these rewards are for you, tweet.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 年轻人，你觉得呢？
E: Young one, what do you think?

C: 从少年时代起，我就一直幻想着能登上星穹列车，成为「开拓」的践行者。
E: Since my adolescent days, I've always dreamed of boarding the Astral Express and becoming an advocate of the Trailblaze.

C: 他决定离开匹诺康尼、奔向星际拓荒前线的那天，米哈伊尔把梦境世界托付给了我。但他离开了太久…实在太久。匹诺康尼又一次陷入了混乱，局面超出了我的掌控。
E: The day he decided to leave Penacony and head for the interstellar frontier, Mikhail entrusted the Dreamscape to me. But he left for too long... far too long. Penacony was once again plunged into chaos, with the ensuing situation spun beyond my control.

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 关于你的过去…
E: About your past...

C: …我偶尔会做些奇怪的梦——有时我缓缓沉入泥淖，喉头舌尖尽是铁锈味；有时我躺在狭窄逼仄的棺材里，被深埋泥土之下，而手边并没有连接钟塔的铰链……
E: Occasionally, I'll have some strange dreams... Once, I dreamed that I was slowly sinking into a bog, my whole mouth filled with the taste of rust. Another time, I dreamed that I was lying in a narrow coffin that had been buried deep underground, without any bell to ring...

C: 祝您在晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上玩得愉快。
E: May you have an entertaining time aboard The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 如今我们用它来形容至高统治，但在最开始，它的确是字面意思。
E: It comes from chef de cuisine, which refers to the head of the kitchen. In short, both a leader and a cook.

C: 据说，她以受到极为深重的伤害为代价，了却了一桩恩怨。
E: She paid a heavy price to settle a grudge, suffering grievous injuries.

C: 出门买了一串糖葫芦之后，她破产了。
E: She bought a skewer of candied hawthorn and went bankrupt.

C: 没问题。虽然有些唐突，不过打眼一看，就知道您颇有一些豪侠气质。
E: No problem. I don't mean to be rude, but I can tell just by looking at you that you're the chivalrous type.

C: 说到这里，她凑近距离，压低了声音。
E: She leans in closer and lowers her voice.

C: 如果是抱着这种想法，恐怕会很失望哦？忆域潜水和体验梦泡完全是两回事。
E: If that's what you were hoping for, you'd be sorely disappointed. Memory Zone diving is not the same as experiencing a dream bubble.

C: 噢，故乡，甜蜜的故乡。
E: Oh, home, sweet home!

C: 我想了解一下原始森林的甲虫。
E: I'd like to know more about the forest beetles.

C: 你的口味很别致！我告诉你甲虫在什么情况下更美味
E: You have a distinct taste! Let me tell you when beetles are at their most flavorful.

C: 她叹了口气，那种看似坚强实则濒临崩溃的架势顷刻间消散无踪了。
E: She takes a deep breath, and her facade of toughness — covering up an imminent collapse — immediately vanishes.

C: 好了，亲爱的，我们就先聊到这儿吧。
E: It was great chatting with you, sweetie.

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 喂喂喂？说话说话！
E: Hey! Hey, hey! Say something!

C: 顶着我的画像，生意怎么样？
E: How's business after using my portrait?

C: 上班时间说这个不妥吧…
E: Should you really be saying this at work...?

C: 第一种是命名为「开拓之尾号」，尾翼配以星穹列车列车长帕姆模样的涂装。
E: The first is the Trailblaze's Stern. It features an insignia designed after Pom-Pom, the conductor of the Astral Express, on the tail of the airship.

C: 第二种是命名为「塔塔洛夫号」，尾翼配以垃圾之王塔塔洛夫模样的涂装。
E: The second is The Tatalov. It features an insignia designed after Tatalov the Garbage King on the tail of the airship.

C: 冷芯按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
E: Caldwick sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.

C: 对不住，我的助听装置快没电了，{F#小伙子}{M#小姑娘}。不对…是{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
E: Sorry, {F#boy}{M#girl}, my listening aid is running out of battery. Wait... I meant {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 你是这里的学生吗？
E: Are you a student here?

C: 临别前，他手忙脚乱地从兜里掏出一盘录音带扔给我，说是写给我的歌。
E: Before he left, he hastily tossed me a tape recording from his pocket, telling me that it was a song that he had written for me.

C: 那晚，我们乐队溜进了囤放唱片的仓库。这张构思了整整四年的专辑，里面满是我们对未来的想象，对这个不公世界的呐喊。
E: That night, my band and I sneaked into the warehouse that stored our records. This was an album that we had spent four whole years preparing. All our anticipation for the future and our cries against this unjust world were encased within it.

C: 还有别的吗…噢！像尚恩那样进学生会吧，走路都带风，去哪都受追捧。
E: What else? Ah, what if I join the student council like Shawn? That kind of confidence really turns heads.

C: 可是…学生会所有工作都属于义务劳动，既不算学分，必要场合还得帮着学校说话。谁要和那群老古董打交道啊！
E: But... student council work is all unpaid. I wouldn't earn any grades or credits, and I'd have to advocate for the school. I want no part of dealing with those dinosaurs!

C: 或者，你觉得我的诡辩确实有几分道理？
E: Or, do you actually think my argument makes some sense?

C: 她——是世间一切美好的集合，是我这种游手好闲的学术垃圾所无法企及的存在。
E: She... she is the epitome of everything wonderful, a beacon of grace far beyond the reach of a floundering student like me.

C: 我最喜欢和人聊天了，你想从哪个话题开始？
E: Sure, I love chatting with people! What do you want to talk about?

C: 不过不是那个「仓鼠球骑士」效力的职业球笼赛哦，是折纸大学自己的校赛。
E: Oh, I should clarify. This party isn't for the professional Spheroid race that Hamster Ball Knight competes in, but for Paperfold University's very own Spheroid race.

C: 那这样…「哟，瞧瞧这是谁啊？看看这两张票吧，要是你实在想要，我也不是不能…」
E: How about... "Oh, look who's here! I have two tickets with me. If you really want them, I guess I could—"

C: 不管怎么说，你成功勾起了我的兴趣。自我介绍下：我叫尚恩，担任本届财富学院的学生会主席。以后就算认识了。
E: Anyhow, you've gotten my interest. I'm Shawn, current president of Fortune Academy's student council. Pleased to make your acquaintance.

C: 记着——把握机遇，赢得人生。
E: Remember this: Make the most out of every opportunity to win in life.

C: …你觉得什么是成功的生意？把食物卖给饿肚子的人，把药品卖给濒死的病人？
E: ...What's a successful business to you? Is it selling food to those who are hungry? Or selling medicines to those on the brink of death?

C: 哼，反正在梦里没事！没把他踹到苏乐达池子里都算好的了！
E: Humph, it doesn't matter, we're in a dream! He'll be lucky if I don't boot him into the SoulGlad pond!

C: 你是没见过我那些同学的简历，每一份看起来都像在闪闪发光。举几个例子，像是——「蝉联七十二届匹诺康尼历史知识竞赛冠军」……
E: You've never seen my classmates' resumes. They almost look like they glow! Let me give you some examples... "Champion of the Penaconian History Competition for seventy-two consecutive years..."

C: 你的调查结果就这？
E: That was the conclusion of your research?

C: 神色恍惚的丽姬娅向你走来，却左脚踩右脚，一头扎进大地母亲的怀抱。少女霎时眼圈通红，眼神却恢复了清明。
E: Ligeia walked towards you in a daze. Her left leg stumbled over the other and sent her crashing into the embrace of Mother Earth below her. The young girl's eyes redden with unshed tears, but she seems to have finally regained her senses.

C: 是的。现在我可以毫不迟疑地说，我喜欢乱破同学的音乐，也很享受和各位成员共同组乐队的时光。这将是我在折纸大学最难忘的经历。
E: I did. Now I can confidently say that I like Rappa's music, and I really enjoyed the times I shared with each and every bandmate. This will be the most unforgettable experience I've had at Paperfold University.

C: 嗯，我知道…所以，这才更让我自责。
E: Yes, I know... That's why I am filled with self-reproach.

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: 找到正式工作了吗？
E: Did she find a job?

C: 而且…嘶，我们得小点声——我跟你透点内幕吧，社里的东西呢，溢价太高了。以前我见预售行情火热，还会故意断货，然后把价格炒高了再卖。
E: Also... Shh, we have to lower our voices for this. Lemme share some insider info with you. The prices for items in the club are super inflated. In the past, if I saw the pre-sale market doing well, I would intentionally buy out the stock to increase the price and sell it again.

C: 这样看起来就显得我好像人脉挺广的…老爹要是看到了也会很开心。所以我想拜托你帮我写几句，随便写什么都行！
E: This will make it seem like I have many connections... If my old man sees it, he'll be happy too. I'd like to ask you to help me write a few lines, anything will do!

C: 所以啊——人活着还是脚踏实地一点比较好，钱是要赚的，但有时候也没那么重要，至少没有我以前想的那么重要。
E: That's why it's more important to be down-to-earth. Money has to be earned, but sometimes it may not be as important as it seems. Or at least it's not as important as I used to think.

C: 感觉我离成功又近了一步！
E: Feels like I'm one step closer to success!

C: 我、我也不是完全不能理解学校的想法，但如果他们能让学生少一点负担，大家是不是就不用天天焦虑学习，而是能拿更多时间思考自己的未来呢……
E: I—I don't claim to understand how the school thinks, but if they ease up on students, everyone wouldn't have to be mired in depressing academics every day, and have more time to consider their own futures...

C: 这样的生活简直就像「别太蕉绿」一样难下咽啊…{NICKNAME}同学，你也来尝尝这份甜品，应该就能理解我们这些学生的痛苦了！
E: Living like that is as hard to swallow as the dessert called "Don't Be Underripe"... {NICKNAME}, you come try this too, and you'll probably understand the hardships of us students!

C: 再见，亲爱的无名客。愿您旅途顺遂。
E: Goodbye, dear Nameless. Have a safe voyage.

C: 嗯…说是无所事事，似乎也不恰当。只是略微有些沉闷。
E: Hmm... I wouldn't call it boring... but, it's just been a bit uneventful.

C: 在这些窖藏出产的时候，它们还被叫做苏萨水，配方价格「高达」一万信用点。
E: When these were first stored, they were still called Sousa Juice, and their recipe was worth up to ten thousand credits.

C: 你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，但碍于你的身份，他只得劝说你离开。
E: While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor but due to your identity, he can only try to persuade you to leave.

C: 安提灵的冷冽早已被温柔淡去，而花香依旧。
E: The chill of Antila has long since faded into gentleness, yet the fragrance of flowers still lingers.

C: 外面发生了什么呢…
E: What happened out here during this time...?

C: 再不出货的话…
E: If I don't win something soon...

C: 钟表小子要过气了么？
E: Is Clockie losing popularity?

C: 终于就在眼前了……
E: And it's finally before my eyes...

C: 艺术是神圣的、思辨的…
E: Art is sacred and speculative...

C: 你可不能骗我…
E: You're not tricking me, right?

C: 给我，该我看了！
E: Give it to me! It's my turn now!

C: 骗小孩的故事吧？
E: Probably just stories to scare kids, you know?

C: 身材焦虑懂不懂？哪怕是在梦里，高热量的食物也会让人心里过意不去。
E: It's body image anxiety, you know? High-calorie food can make you feel anxious even in a dream.

C: 你笑什么，是我的分析有问题吗？果然，对我来说你们有机生命的情感表达方式还是太复杂了……
E: What are you laughing at? Is my analysis incorrect? Indeed, the way you organic beings express your emotions is much too complicated for me...

C: …最麻烦的是谣言已经在宾客之间传开了，多离谱的都有…要是再不赶紧处理掉那家伙，保不准要出什么大乱子。
E: ...The worst part is that super wild rumors have already spread among the guests... Things might escalate into a big mess if the culprit remains at large.

C: 我脑子里都记着。
E: I remember everything.

C: 影城有三个主题区域…
E: The theme park has three themed areas...

C: 要不我们再等等？
E: Why don't we wait a little longer?

C: 据说冠军有喝不完的苏乐达。
E: They say the champion will have an endless supply of SoulGlad.

C: 输给他，我心服口服。
E: I'm blown away by him. I concede.

C: 没办法，这多半是公司和家族的机密，估计我们也听不到了……
E: Not like there's much you can do. It's most likely a secret between the IPC and The Family. I doubt we'll even get to hear about them...

C: 我是皮皮西，不是未成年！
E: I'm a Pepeshi, not a minor!

C: 我还以为是什么大富豪呢。
E: I thought it would be some magnate.

C: 忆域的海鲜迷因不错。
E: The Memory Zone's seafood memes are pretty tasty.

C: 这桌子也太碍事了…
E: This table is blocking the way...

C: 听说我们领导…
E: I hear our boss...

C: 线上聊~
E: We'll chat online!

C: 感觉是黑暗料理…
E: Looks like it's not very palatable...

C: 巧了，我也是。
E: What a coincidence, me neither.

C: 我觉得家族未必会接受。
E: I doubt The Family will agree.

C: 完了，论文查重没通过，我要延期毕业了。
E: I'm doomed. My thesis didn't pass the plagiarism check. I'll have to postpone my graduation.

C: 你这是直接复制过来了吧，倒是稍微改改啊！
E: You're just directly copying it! At least tweak it a little!

C: 有点眼熟，你总觉得之前好像在哪里看到过这张画像。但既然记不清了，就一定不怎么重要。
E: Somewhat familiar... You can't help but feel like you've seen this portrait somewhere. But you can't recall clearly, so it must not be important.

C: …偏爱古典吹奏乐。
E: ...I prefer classical woodwind and brass.

C: 那个形状…是只鸟？我这个角度看不太清，拍好了给我也瞅瞅！
E: That shape... is it a bird? I can't tell from this angle, take a picture and send it to me, tweeet!

C: 走。正好我随身带着葫芦，这次非得把那些爱吓人的家伙一网打尽不可！
E: Let's go. I've got my gourd with me anyway, and I'll make sure to bust all these prankster jerks this time!

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 「超智能病毒」在《超级开拓小子》中的段位又有所提升，希望它没开挂。
E: The Supersmart Virus has leveled up in Super Trailblaze Kid, and you hope it hasn't been cheating.

C: 这里只有一个头颅。原因很简单——全身太大了，放不下。
E: There's only a head here. The reason is easy — its full body is too large to fit.

C: 从{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}庇护下的第一个生命，到大地兽第一次行走世间，阿斯忒利翁已经经历许多。
E: Asterion has been on quite the journey, starting from the time they were chosen as the first living being under the protection of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, all the way to when the young dromas began exploring the world.

C: 你这规矩好像还不少。
E: Seems like you have some strict rules here.

C: 好啦，方才的小插曲就让它过去吧——您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
E: Well, let's move past that incident. What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

C: 躺着吃饭是怎么回事？
E: What's the deal with eating while lying down?

C: 最后是甜点——整个奥赫玛最新鲜的苹果，配上我改良过的肉桂蜂蜜酱，刚好适合为这一餐做个完美的收尾。
E: Finally, we've got dessert — the freshest apples in Okhema paired with my upgraded cinnamon honey sauce, a delightful end to your meal.

C: 嗝～
E: ...Burp~

C: 真是美味极啦…虽然这种廉价的评价很容易脱口而出，但事实上它…平淡如水。
E: Delicious indeed... Though compliments can be cheap like that, the truth is... it tastes as plain as water.

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 这一杯秘酿混入了甜香的果肉，口感绵软，微微带着籽粒，令人回想起站在淋浴头下大嚼水果的感觉。就像是回到了没有蕉绿的过去，人类还不是人类的时候……
E: This ambrosia is mixed with sweet and fragrant fruits, with a soft texture and faintly crunchy seeds, bringing to mind the feeling of standing under the shower while munching on fruit. It's like you've traveled back to a time without bananxiety, back when humans weren't quite human yet...

C: 「咔嚓咔嚓咔嚓——」你三口并作两口，眨眼间便将拳头大小的苹果啃了个干净。
E: *crunch* *crunch* You keep taking bites out of the apple, and the fist-sized fruit is consumed almost instantly.

C: 实话说，上次我们的集会就被遐蝶小姐劝阻了，说奥赫玛再怎么样也是一座圣城，不可以这样无事生非、小题大作——她人虽然温柔，但那种生人勿近的感觉还是挺可怕的！
E: To be honest, Castorice dissuaded us at our previous gatherings, saying that Okhema is still a holy city no matter what, and we can't stir up drama like this. While she's gentle most of the time, she can be intimidating with how aloof she is at times!

C: 不懂。
E: Not really.

C: 我很想说，{RUBY_B#爱与美的泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}其实就是阿格莱雅姐姐的样子…但那是不对的。
E: I'd love to say that sister Aglaea looks just like {RUBY_B#Titan of Love and Beauty}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}... but that's not the case.

C: 再说浴池本身，除了中央浴池外，其他池子里并不都是普通的水，还混了一些对身体好的添加物，比如浴盐、牛奶、还有法吉娜的秘酿等等。
E: As for the baths themselves, apart from the central pool, the water in the other pools is no ordinary water, but mixed with substances that nourish the body, such as bath salts, milk, and Phagousa's ambrosia, among other things.

C: 你看起来有些疑惑，在你面前的是勒法刻，全翁罗法斯最最伟大的泰坦。要想拿留影石机就趁现在了。
E: You look confused — before you stands Lephake, the greatest Titan in all of Omlophas. If you want to get the photostone, there is no better time than now.

C: 你从哪里过来的？
E: Where are you from?

C: 医生？不，能带给我安宁的，只有塞纳托斯…但现在还不行，我还不能合眼，我只要一闭上眼，就会看到大家被黑潮吞噬的样子……
E: A doctor? No, only Thanatos can bring me peace... But I am not ready yet. I cannot close my eyes yet. Every time I do, I see them all being devoured by the black tide...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 不…你不明白…我不是法吉娜的虔诚信徒，在我心里只有艾格勒泰坦的全知全能才能俘获我的灵魂。
E: No... You don't understand... I am not a devout disciple of Phagousa. In my heart, only the omniscience and omnipotence of the Titan Aquila can capture my soul.

C: 嘘——请别告诉别人。就当是我和你之间的秘密好了，我不想惹上太多麻烦，免得遭人嫉妒。
E: Shh... Don't tell anyone. Just keep this a secret between us. I don't want to cause trouble or make others jealous.

C: 「法吉娜的祝福」究竟是什么？
E: Just what is this "blessing of Phagousa"?

C: 嗯，确实还挺显眼的…不过问题不大，我可以帮你补一下。
E: Hm, it is rather obvious, isn't it... But it's not a big problem. I can patch that up for you.

C: 那可真是不好意思，我是非卖品。拿来吧你——
E: My apologies, but I am not for sale. Hand it over.

C: 艺术家远观人间烟火？
E: Do artists watch the world turn from a distance?

C: 喏——知道街那边有个裁缝店不？那位店长记得每个老主顾的喜好，也会按他们自己的生活境况为订单提出中肯的建议。
E: Hmm... You know that tailor down the street, yes? The manager remembers every regular's measurements and makes pertinent suggestions for their order based on their life situation.

C: 那声音…据他们所说，非常尖锐，但你要知道它们平时的声音都是很低沉的，不会发出这么高音域的叫声。
E: That sound... according to the caravan, was really sharp. But you have to understand that normally their voices are very low, and they don't usually make high-pitched shrieks.

C: 哎呀，这就走啦？好吧好吧。对了，要是你能帮我弄到一些黄金裔的洗澡水，我会非常感激的！说不定下次见面，我就能给你看看会跳舞的泪葱了呢！
E: Oh, off so soon? Alright, alright. Oh, yes — if you could help me score some of that Chrysos Heir bath water, I'd be infinitely grateful! Maybe next time we meet, I'd be able to show you a dancing tear onion!

C: 消停了就好啊…谢谢您了，客人。
E: I'm glad that is settled... Thank you, dear customer.

C: 你到底…
E: Just who are...

C: 就聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave it there for now.

C: 我不是说了吗？前一批斗士的试炼还没结束，你得先耐心等待。
E: Didn't I already mention it? The trial for the previous batch of gladiators isn't over. You'll have to wait.

C: 疑虑是战士的大敌。说出来，我会帮你解答它。
E: Doubt is the nemesis of all warriors. I will help you break it.

C: 我是…我是什么呢？
E: I am... What am I?

C: 铁锤敲击，不止塑形。大地的祝福，把握力度，封存其中。
E: Hammer strikes, shape not alone. Earth's blessing, grasp strength, within seal it is.

C: 山之民，爱好和平。然而，隐居深山，战火也会烧到。
E: Love peace, Mountain Dwellers do. Yet, safe from war, hiding in mountains is not.

C: 告辞。
E: Goodbye.

C: 你并没有暴露身份，阿格莱雅女士也不会找你的麻烦。
E: You did not reveal yourself, and neither will Lady Aglaea cause trouble for you.

C: 话虽如此，我知道人们都习惯了这套计时方式，也无意接受任何改变，但……
E: Be that as it may, I know people are accustomed to this method of timekeeping and are not keen on any changes, but...

C: 很浪漫的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。人的认知并不可靠，经过转达与记录的信息更加真假莫辨。虚假的东西再怎么叠加，也得不到真实。
E: A very romantic notion, but it seems that you have not understood my question. The cognition of mankind is not reliable. It becomes even harder to ascertain the verity or falsity of any information that has been passed on or left in record. No matter how many falsehoods have piled up, it does not make them truths.

C: 对了，如果你在城里看到什么有趣的景象，也请告诉我。艺术家总是需要新的灵感。再见，我的朋友，愿墨涅塔与你同在！
E: By the way, if you come across anything interesting around the city, please let me know. Artists are always in search of new inspiration. Farewell, my friend, and may Mnestia be with you!

C: 我是克特西，是这些大家伙们的饲养员之一，但我更希望你叫我「大地兽的主厨」！
E: I am Ctesias, one of the caretakers here, but I'd prefer you call me "Chef of the Dromases"!

C: 嗯？什么什么？尽管问吧！
E: Hmm? What's that? Just ask away!

C: 喂土有特别的喂法吗？
E: Is there a special way to feed the soil?

C: 悬锋孤军…也就是那些住在奥赫玛的悬锋人，就会专门挑这些路线来跑步锻炼。
E: The Kremnoan Detachment, also known as those Kremnoans living in Okhema, specifically choose these routes for their running training.

C: 嘿嘿，不是我自夸，别看悬锋人会吃苦，真论锻炼效果，应该还是我自己发明的这个「飞瀑潜立」最有潜力！万敌哥哥都夸过咱呢！
E: Hehe, not to brag, but even though the Kremnoans endure a lot of hardship, I'd say the training method I invented, Flying Waterfall Stance, has the most potential! Even Brother Mydei has praised it!

C: 不过不是我说，你这肌肉也练得太差了吧。就你这小身板，就不怕下水后被人耻笑吗？
E: Still, not to be rude, but... your muscles are pretty unimpressive. With a physique like that, aren't you worried about being laughed at when you get in the water?

C: 你也好好练啊。
E: You should train too.

C: 你绕着浴场开始跑圈，1！2！1！到家！…怎么卫士们也跟着你跑过来了？
E: You start running laps around the baths — 1! 2! 1! Home! ...Wait, why are the guards following you now?

C: 你瞧，这两个人从小一起长大，多少年的感情了，结果遇到这种事还不是奇美拉咬奇美拉——一嘴毛，哈哈~
E: Look at that. These two have grown up together, years of friendship, and yet when something like this happens, it's just like a chimera biting another chimera — just as messy as a mouthful of fur, haha~

C: 明白了！您以凡人之躯行走在城邦中，这件事还不方便向世人明说。
E: I understand! You walk among the city's people in mortal form, and it's not yet time to reveal this truth to the world.

C: 好，慢走…我再泡一个时刻也该出去了…不，或许两个…？
E: Alright, take care... I should probably head out after soaking for a little longer... no, maybe two more rounds...?

C: …拒绝？要是不参加这个研讨会，我去哪找这么多免费的吃的？
E: ...Refuse? If I don't attend this seminar, where else can I get all this free food?

C: 哈哈，不必担心，此处的识本都受了瑟希斯的庇佑，哪怕书页被整个濡湿，也绝无损毁之忧…不过，污渍倒是防不住的，所以再重申一下，记得擦干手。
E: Haha, no need to worry. The texts here are all blessed by Cerces, so even if the pages get completely soaked, there's no risk of them being damaged... However, stains are another matter, so let me remind you once again — make sure to dry your hands!

C: 在翁法罗斯，人们通常将那些具有一定规模与影响的学术群体称作「学派」，而我便属于树庭七大学派中的「曳石学派」。
E: In Amphoreus, people usually refer to these structured and influential academic groups as Schools, and I belong to the Helkolithist school, one of seven in the Grove.

C: 对啊，能跟你聊两句吗？
E: Yes, can I speak with you?

C: 鲜血蜜酿？
E: Sanguine honey brew?

C: …唉，那会儿的尼卡多利是多么英明神武，仅靠矛尖一指就能屈人之兵。再看现在……
E: ...*sigh* Back then, Nikador was so valiant and mighty, able to subdue entire armies with just their spear tip. But now...

C: 那就去问，去找，而不是傻傻地站在这里：你是谁呀？…这样有意思吗？
E: Then go out. Ask around. Find them. Don't stand here and ask ignorant questions like "Who are you." Is that fun?

C: 「门」即是联结。你和我在此相遇，也是种联结。懂了吗？
E: "Gates" are connections. You and I meeting here is also a connection and a bond. Do you understand?

C: （拆开箱子）
E: (Tear open the crate)

C: 假期过得怎么样？
E: How's your holiday been?

C: 我乃银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer that roams the endless sea of stars!

C: 我是塔拉萨波利斯的贵族。
E: I am an aristocrat of Thalassopolis.

C: 最重要的是，烤制的时候记得向泰坦们祈祷，为接下来要品尝小甜饼的人送上你诚挚的祝福，这个步骤千万不能少，要不然吃起来就不是那么个味道了。
E: Most importantly, when baking, always offer a prayer to the Titans, blessing those who will enjoy your treats. Skipping this step means they just won't taste as delightful.

C: 都这样了，你还说自己不是偷？
E: Even after all that, you still insist you're not stealing?

C: 相比这个，不如您再跟我多讲讲圣女大人的事吧！她是位怎样的人？是否就像神谕说的那样，模样优雅，话语足以震慑人心？
E: Rather than that, tell me more about the Holy Maiden! What is she like? Is she truly as graceful and commanding as the prophecy foretold?

C: 有您对圣女大人的描述，已经足够滋养我的信念了！请放心，我会全力以赴，保卫雅努萨波利斯远离一切威胁！
E: Your words about the Holy Maiden are more than enough to inspire my faith! Rest assured, I will do everything to protect Janusopolis from all threats!

C: 你真的要独自返乡、抵御黑潮？
E: Are you really going to return home alone and face the black tide?

C: 身世神秘的遐蝶。
E: Castorice, the one with a mysterious backstory.
Open!!!

C: 她们分别是缇宝、缇宁，和在彼岸静静等候的缇安。
E: They are Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne who wait silently on the other shore.

C: 上次与你介绍风堇时，我提到她是「昏光庭院」的首席护理师。但事实上，她也是这个组织的继承人与管理者。
E: The last time I introduced Hyacine to you, I mentioned she is the chief healer of the Twilight Courtyard. But in truth, she's also the heir and manager of this organization.

C: 好呀，欢迎灰宝再来找我聊天！
E: Sure! I'd be happy to chat with you again, Grayie!

C: 随便聊聊可以吗？
E: Can we just chat about anything?

C: …公司…什么公司？我自己就是老板。
E: ...Corporation? What corporation? I'm my own boss.

C: 要不聊聊你的过去的经历？
E: Would you mind sharing your experiences?

C: 你搞戏剧真的能赚到钱吗？
E: Can you really make money in theater?

C: 你似乎很了解*墓志铭*？
E: You seem to know a lot about epitaphs.

C: 这世上有两种「死亡」——身体的消逝与心灵的沉沦。前者我是无能为力，但后者……
E: There are two kinds of "death" in this world — the death of the body and the floundering of the soul. As for the former, I can do nothing, but the latter...

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 只要我，还站着，绝不会，让民众倒下。我要，一直站着。
E: As long as I stand, civilians won't fall. I must keep standing.

C: 很悠闲嘛。
E: You seem quite relaxed.

C: 你相信再创世吗？
E: Do you believe in Era Nova?

C: 无论如何，也太莽撞了。
E: Regardless, they were too reckless.

C: 听说，伟大的刻法勒会确保新世界中每一个生灵都得到公平对待。这是不是代表…大地兽有可能不再是大地兽，而是变成奇美拉、海豹，或是别的什么？
E: I heard that the great Kephale will ensure every being in the new world is treated fairly. So... does that mean dromas might turn into chimeras, seals, or something else entirely?

C: 这些弥足珍贵的…世界毁灭的线索，黄金裔救世的壮举，文明点滴的幸福……
E: Such precious information... clues on the destruction of the world, the heroic deeds of the Chrysos Heirs as they try to save the world, the fleeting joys of a civilization...

C: 再创世后，一定还能再见的。
E: We'll definitely see her again after the Era Nova.

C: （…嗯，这样一来，就不会有人欺负姐姐了，对吧。）
E: (...Umm, now no one will bully that lady anymore, right?)

C: 别担心，这不是你的错。
E: Don't worry, this isn't your fault.

C: 嗯，也祝你好运，我的朋友。
E: Yeah. And good luck to you, my friend.

C: 嗯…有位织者总想成为法吉娜的圣兽。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的圣兽摊位</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the sacred beast of Phagousa. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide <color=#dbc291ff>within the Sacred Beast Stall in Marmoreal Palace</color>. Seek them there.

C: 天空的火种既被夺取，无法预料这里还会发生什么…贵客，请务必小心。
E: The Sky Coreflame have been stolen, who knows what may yet befall this place... Honored guest, do take care.

C: 贵客，请代我向地上的其他衣匠们问好。
E: Honored guest, please send my regards to the other Garmentmakers on the ground.

C: 差点忘了，我还晒了树莓干，你拿点，也给她带过去些吧。
E: Right, almost forgot. I've got some sun-dried raspberries too. Take some and give them to her as well.

C: 无论听多少遍都不会腻。
E: I could listen to it forever and never get bored.

C: 村长的职责是什么？
E: And what does a chief do?

C: 「都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！」
E: "Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, come and try it, memi!"

C: 好高好高~
E: Flying higher and higher~

C: 记忆永不落幕，贵客，我会在此守候。
E: The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest. I will remain here, waiting.

C: 拉比努斯先生，您、您觉得写得怎么样？
E: Mr. Labienus, wh—what do you think?

C: 而我，只愿做凯撒的马前卒，为她流尽荣耀的金血。
E: As for me, my only desire is to be the Imperator's vanguard, to shed golden blood in her glory and battles.

C: 我年少时便加入了树庭，沉浸于学业之中，眼中只有那遮蔽天穹的葱郁树冠。
E: In my youth, I joined the Grove, immersed in studies beneath its all-shrouding sky dome.

C: 哈哈，阁下，你在紧张什么呢？正如我所说，作为一名逐火的贤人，会有这种忧虑是很正常的事。
E: Hah, why the tension, dear guest? As a sage of the Flame-Chase, such worries are only natural.

C: 哈…早就听闻救世主思维独特、不拘小节，今日一见果然。怎么，是觉得我一个男人叫这名字很奇怪？
E: Ah... I've heard tales of the Deliverer's eccentricity, how they care little of trifling things — now I see it firsthand. What, does a man bearing this name unsettle you?

C: 答，错了——这又不是悬，悬锋城，没人有那么，狂，狂野的品味！
E: W—Wrong. They are not Kremnoans, they don't have such... barbaric tastes!

C: 「那时我没来得及和你分享，我心中的答案……」
E: "I never got the chance to tell you the answer inside my heart..."

C: 沙拉直接用叉子吃实在太过粗鲁。应该用菜叶卷起红酸果，一起送入口中迷。
E: Eating salad just with a fork is way too crude. Wrap the redsour fruit in leafy greens and savor them together, mem.

C: 啊啊，曾几何时的有名之人。已然忘却的无名之魂。
E: Ahh, once individuals of renown, now nameless souls lost to memory.

C: 瞧瞧，没事和奇美拉较什么劲，还是大地兽好养活，喂土就行。可惜就是，我昨天践行时钓的那条水桶一样大的鱼，它不肯吃哦。
E: Why are you obsessed with chimeras? Dromases are much easier to keep. You feed them some soil and that's it. Pity, the fish I caught yesterday during the Action Hour was as big as a bucket, but it just wouldn't eat it.

C: 哪儿能啊，就咱这运势，还用得着出千？我跟你说，这么多年来我就从来没输过！
E: How could I? With luck like mine, why would I need to cheat? Let me tell you, I've played for many years, and I've never once lost!

C: 你听说过「大法吉娜节」吗？
E: Have you heard about the Festival of Phagousa?

C: 这浴池可真舒服啊……
E: This bath is so comfortable...

C: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
E: Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...

C: 咕咕——太好了，孩子们全都乖乖回来了！可以开始考试了！
E: Hoot hoot... Excellent, all the children have obediently returned! We can start the exam!

C: 了不起的新同学，谢谢你对折纸树林教育的助力，请务必收下老鸟的心意。
E: Distinguished new student, thank you for assisting Paperfold Woods' educational process. You must accept my token of appreciation.

C: 说说看你都发现了什么有意思的事情。
E: Tell me what interesting discoveries you found.

C: 瑟希斯赐我灵智，驱散愚昧！瑟希斯请保佑我的毕业论文抵御灵水的浸泡！
E: May Cerces grant me wisdom and dispel my ignorance! Cerces, please protect my thesis from the deluge of spirit water!

C: 神识之蝶啊，你告诉我，我是这个世界上最漂亮的若虫吗？
E: O Butterfly of Divine Mind, tell me, am I the prettiest nymph on this world?

C: 是你从金色的彼岸缓步而来，将我渡回现世。
E: It was you who came from the golden beyond, ferrying me back to the waking world.

C: 你们仨怎么凑一起了？
E: How did the three of you end up together?

C: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
E: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

C: 要是猎手小姐对这些都没兴趣，我们还有小型的体育竞技赛，保证不教你无聊！
E: If that's not your style, Miss Archer, we've got some small-scale athletic competitions that might be more to your liking!

C: 没错！难得有人能理解我所践行的律法，我决定与苏克提瑞斯先生成为忘年交！
E: Exactly! Finally someone who actually understand the laws I uphold. For this, Mr. Soctires and I shall be friends for the ages — literally!

C: 太让人感动了！我去取真正的{RUBY_B#蜜酿}法吉娜的祝福{RUBY_E#}来！我们再多聊聊，我还以为你们不愿意和我说话呢！
E: I'm moved! I'm going to get the real {RUBY_B#honey brew}Phagousa's Blessing{RUBY_E#}! I thought you didn't want to talk to me, but let's chat more!

C: 好好好，没事了，大家散了吧。
E: Alright, alright, it's not a big deal, everyone. You may leave now.

C: 我很高兴您也对此感兴趣，工匠阁下。换个地方进一步细聊吧。
E: I'm glad you're interested in this too, Mr. Craftsman. Let's move somewhere else to discuss the details.

C: 咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
E: Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!

C: 好啊，灰子，等裁缝铺开张，记得要来光顾。别和她们说，我偷偷给你打折！
E: Great, Gray Mystery! When the tailor shop opens, make sure to drop by. Don't tell them, but I'll secretly give you a discount!

C: 首先…悬锋城确有字典。虽然不比树庭广博，但也绝非人们以为的那样。
E: First of all... Castrum Kremnos does have dictionaries. Though not as extensive as the Grove's, they're far from what people assume them to be.

C: 你为荒笛讲述了漂浮在星海中的仙舟「罗浮」，那里有一株建木古树，其中的居民饱经了「丰饶」的恩赐和苦楚……
E: You tell Terravox about the Xianzhou Luofu drifting in the sea of stars, where an ancient Ambrosial Arbor stands, and whose inhabitants have experienced both the blessings and suffering brought by the Abundance...

C: 在此过程中，某些微小的变量得以诞生，这也是若虫的雏形。自那以后，若虫便成了每一个史诗故事的注脚。
E: During this process, certain minute variables came into being, which became the embryonic form of the nymphs. Since then, nymphs have become footnotes to every epic story.

C: 我花了很长时间修复了列车，搭乘它启航前往群星……这是列车的心愿，也是我的梦想：见识未知的星辰海洋。
E: It took me ages to repair the Express and board it to travel to the stars... It was the wish of the Express and my dream to set sail through the unknown sea of stars.

C: 小三月醒来后，什么都不记得。这架列车上的其他人至少有一个可以称为家乡的地方，只有她是真的无依无靠，离开列车就无处可去。
E: March couldn't remember anything when she woke up. The people on the Express have at least a place to call home, but that's not the case for her. She doesn't have anywhere to return to outside of the Express.

C: 「建立」与新世界之间的联系，为其喜乐，共其忧虑。
E: Establish a connection with the new world — rejoice with it and share in its fears.

C: 哈哈，她是这辆列车的主人——虽说我们管帕姆叫列车长，但大家都知道，姬子才是星穹列车的所有者。
E: Haha, she's the owner of the Express. We joke around calling Pom-Pom the conductor, but everyone knows Himeko is the boss.

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 敌人吗？曾经的敌人已经被打败了。
E: Enemies? I've taken care of my past enemies.

C: 星神们强大几乎无敌，早在「毁灭」之前，就有「繁育」的寰宇虫灾席卷群星；「丰饶」与「巡猎」的争斗不知令多少世界生灵涂炭。
E: Aeons are so powerful that they're near invincible. Long before the Destruction existed, a swarm disaster from the Propagation spread through the stars, and the war between the Abundance and the Hunt has also ruined many worlds.

C: （也许在这里还能找找《冒险鼹鼠队》的书页…）
E: (Maybe you can find the pages of The Adventurous Moles here...)

C: 这页后记是娜塔莎大姐姐交给我的，你正好没有，我就交给你了呗。
E: The postscript was given to me by big sister Natasha. You happened to be missing it, so I gave it to you.

C: 不过啊，今天给这臭小子出的题只能说是开胃菜——真正难的还在后头呢。你要是对这矿车感兴趣，我现在就能给你布置场地。
E: That being said, the puzzle that I gave to the brat today was nothing more than an appetizer. The tricky stuff has yet to come. If you're interested in mine carts, I can set up the site for you.

C: 我看他无依无靠的，就想着把我这铺铁轨的手艺传给他。他也好靠自己讨个饭吃。
E: I saw he had no one to rely on, so I thought to pass on my track-laying skills to him. With those skills, he can make a living for himself.

C: 滴答…太阳不是紫色的，钟表小子也不能吃，我还得工作！
E: Tick-tock... The sun isn't purple, and Clockie is not edible. I have to get to work!

C: 宝贝，你很有趣，我那珍贵的表盘中可以为你留出一个刻度的位置。但你要乖，不要让我失望哦~
E: My pretty, you're interesting. I can leave a slot open for you on that precious dial of mine. But you mustn't be naughty, don't let me down!

C: …通关？您的意思是…所有关卡、所有难度，全都通关了？
E: ...Clocked it? You mean... You finished all the stages on all difficulties?

C: 你是本人？
E: It's "you"?

C: 嗯，嗯…没问题，价钱没错。这幅《晨曦》就交给你了。
E: Mmm... All good. This is the right price. You can take this Ray of Dawn.

C: 在他有力的锤下——自然迸出火花——！
E: Beneath his mighty hammer — natural sparks spurt forth —!

C: {NICKNAME}，我们刚刚在整理展品的时候发现了一张旧照片。
E: {NICKNAME}, we just stumbled across an old photo while going through the collection.

C: 有空的话，就去<color=#dbc291ff>博物馆修理间</color>看看吧。
E: If you're free, head over to the <color=#dbc291ff>museum workshop</color> and pay him a visit.

C: 找我有什么事吗？
E: Is there anything that I can do for you?

C: 那么，接下来是母亲大人生命中的最后一刻…但这部分克里珀堡已有定论，让我们跳过它吧。
E: So, next is the final moments of mother's life... but Qlipoth Fort already has a conclusion for this part, so let's skip it.

C: 为此，我和佩拉小姐又为你准备了些微薄礼，聊表谢意——辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: To thank you for your hard work, Miss Pela and I have prepared a small gift for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 来自天外的陨石碎片，七百年前随反物质军团一同降临在这片大地上。
E: Meteor shards from outer space. It landed on this land alongside the Antimatter Legion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.

C: 难道…在那片迷幻空间中与你交流的小女孩就是初代大守护者本人吗？
E: Does this mean... that the little girl talking to you in that strange space was the first Supreme Guardian herself?

C: {NICKNAME}，你在干什么啊？
E: {NICKNAME}, what are you doing?

C: 你谦虚的方式总是有些奇怪。
E: You always have a strange way of being humble.

C: 诶，冷静点啦，这次不是去打架！
E: Jeez, calm down. We're not going to fight anyone this time!

C: 回见…
E: See ya later...

C: 电视，没了，无聊，无聊。
E: TV, gone. Boring, boring.

C: 来来来，让咱看看！
E: Quick, quick, let's have a look!

C: 老板送我的，我面子薄没多要。
E: The stallholder gave me this for free, and I'd feel embarrassed asking for more.

C: 思考了再三，我还是想拒绝。
E: After much consideration, I'm still not up to it.

C: 只要您愿意帮忙就行。
E: A willingness to help is all we need.

C: 以后？多久以后？按你们仙舟人的时间观念，五百年以后？哈哈，这里的商铺们等得起吗？
E: Later? How much later? For the Xianzhou, does "later" mean <unbreak>500</unbreak> years? Haha, can the shop owners here wait that long?

C: （我们可以用什么证明？）
E: (Do we have any proof?)

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
E: Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?

C: 看来你们几位就是让斯科特代表当众道歉的人吧。
E: If I'm not mistaken, you're the ones who made Representative Skott apologize in public?

C: 胡闹，修不好事小，{F#她}{M#他}这样的新手万一砸了客人东西，我还得照赔，岂不是砸了同功坊的招牌？
E: Don't be ridiculous — a green hand like {F#her}{M#him} won't be able to fix a thing... Plus, if {F#she}{M#he} breaks our customer items in the process, it'll be us taking the blame.

C: 固执…对于仙舟人来说算是一种常态了。活过了几百年光阴，习惯了每天走在同一条道路上，干同样的活，与同样的人交谈…大部分人早已安于这样的生活方式。
E: We walk a single path, do the same things, and talk to the same people for centuries... A mind can become insensitive to change.

C: 不降反升，这不可能…难道你们在虚张声势？
E: The shop does better than it used to? Impossible... you must be bluffing.

C: 机巧鸟是这样的鸟吗？
E: I don't think that's on the cycrane agenda.

C: 商会不能脱离商铺存在，商会会把金人巷打造成「新•罗浮第一夜市」。
E: The guild serves the sole purpose of helping local businesses. We will help the Alley reclaim the title of "the best night market on the Luofu".

C: 晚了晚了，已经来不及了。
E: Not the brightest idea.

C: 没事，等你有空的时候。
E: It's fine, whenever you're free.

C: 哪有什么超大碗啊，我点的是大碗。
E: What mega bowl? I ordered a large one.

C: 你先找小天老板吧，我不着急，在这里等等。
E: Go ahead and see Little Tian first. I'm in no rush. I'll just wait here.

C: 我不会再为难小天了，不过请假还是得请假，我回去之后再想想怎么办好了。
E: I won't put Little Tian out anymore then, but I'll keep asking for leave. I'll go back and have another think about it.

C: 再重新问问看吧……
E: Ask again and see what happens...

C: 提升信赖？
E: Build trust?

C: 总之，只要有{NICKNAME}的合理规划，我想这「客制运单」也并非难事，拜托你了。
E: Anyway, with your amazing skills, {NICKNAME}, I don't think these custom orders will be much of a challenge. I'm counting on you.

C: 方位…方位是哪里…「方」的…建筑…是这个吗？
E: Bearings... Locating "bearings"... Is this like... a "building"...?

C: 还有…你身边的这位…这位是？
E: And also... Who's this with you? Who are they?

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 积分赛的具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules for the point-based tournament?

C: 你在做一种很新的东西。
E: You're doing some new stuff alright.

C: 沉闷的回音是唯一的回应，但似乎隐约听见了一些窸窸窣窣的杂音。你不确定这是否是错觉。
E: The only response you get is a deep, hollow echo. You do vaguely hear some rustling sounds. You're not sure if this is your imagination.

C: 这把孤独的钥匙，唯有匹配上对应的锁，才能发挥它的价值……
E: This solitary key will only show its true value when matched to the right lock...

C: 这孩子，你还没给{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说谢谢呢。
E: Oh, you. You haven't said thank you to the nice {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 不记得了，他好像说过，但我一直在听科学研究，没在意。
E: Don't remember. He must've said it, but I was trying to focus on his study, so I didn't pay attention.

C: 你真的没有孪生兄弟吗？
E: Do you really not have a twin brother?

C: 披萨，最便捷的美味，最直接的热量！每份<unbreak>12</unbreak>片，足够四个皮皮西人吃上一整天！
E: Pizza is the epitome of convenient delight and a direct source of calories! Each serving comes with <unbreak>12</unbreak> slices, enough to keep four Pepeshi folks satisfied for an entire day!

C: 我已经能预见它恐怖的销量了！
E: I can already foresee its terrifying sales!

C: 我们为所有参加完整七日活动的顾客准备了特殊礼品：免费的「彩梦」什锦糖体验装一份！
E: We have a special treat for all customers who completed the entire seven-day event: A complimentary "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets experience kit!

C: 哈哈，我就知道您肯定会感兴趣！还记得本店的标语吗？「爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！」
E: Haha, I knew you would be interested! Still remember the slogan of my store? "Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!"

C: 就这样，隔壁区划的压力逐渐到达顶峰，只差一粒火星就要爆发……
E: Just like that, the feeling of displeasure in the neighboring division reaches an all-time high. A spark is all it needs to erupt...

C: 我要回去补觉了啾~
E: Let me go back to bed, tweet!

C: 如何，这一套下来您有什么感想？
E: What do you think of the story?

C: 滴答！我是钟表小子！欢迎来到美梦小镇……
E: Tick-tock! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville...

C: 我就是单纯喜欢冒险闯荡。
E: I'm just someone who likes poking around on adventures.

C: {F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们该拼凑一下收集到的线索碎片了。当然，还是先离开这个地方吧…我感觉有点晕。
E: I think it's time to sort out the clues we've gathered so far, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Of course, we really should get out of this place... I'm feeling a bit woozy.

C: 我…我……
你冷静下来，深深地吸了几口气，抬头看，却发现一道可怖的身影出现在屏幕上。
E: You calm yourself down by taking a few deep breaths. By the time you look up again, you find a fearful figure emerging on the screen.

C: 我的眼光向来不会出错，你肯定能成为相当优秀的调饮师。
E: I've always had a good eye for talent, and I believe you'll be an awesome drinksmith.

C: 不用着急，我就在这等你。
E: No need to rush. I'll be here waiting for you.

C: 汪！舒翁…舒翁不要我们了呜呜呜呜呜！
E: Woof! Siobhan... she doesn't want us anymore... Boohoooo!

C: 这口气人家怎么都咽不下去！说话难听就算了，他们还打伤了铁皮人！
E: It's too much to handle! They said mean things and even hurt Tin Man!

C: 这段时间辛苦了。要不是有你接替调饮师的工作，我都没时间去处理家族的那些麻烦事。
E: Thank you for everything. If it weren't for you taking over as the drinksmith, I wouldn't have had time to deal with all the troubles within The Family.

C: 你是几百年前的人？
E: You're someone from hundreds of years ago?

C: 至此，你已经光荣地完成了一名无名客的使命！恭喜你，同时我也很感谢你。
E: And with that, you have gloriously completed the mission of a Nameless! I would like to take this opportunity to both congratulate and thank you!

C: 不愧是你，一点就通。
E: Absolutely. You picked up on that right away.

C: 啊——我的钢铁鳄鱼啊！
E: Ah! My Steely Gator!

C: 感觉自己已经变成苏乐达的形状了……
E: Feel like I'm already turning into the shape of SoulGlad...

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 唉，作为乐园，如今的魅力还不如我们的办公机构——
E: Alas, it's a shame that the theme park has even less pull than our office now...

C: 有什么解决方法吗？
E: Is there a solution to fix this?

C: 太感谢了！鸢尾花家系的审查工作就在<color=#dbc291ff>匹诺康尼大剧院</color>进行，就麻烦您走一趟了，期待您的好消息！
E: Thank you so much! The Iris Family conducts the review at the <color=#dbc291ff>Penacony Grand Theater</color>. It'd be great if you could make a trip there. I'll be waiting for your good news!

C: 她低语着那个你所熟悉的名号，但在这样的情绪之中，她似乎无法对你打开心房……
E: She whispers the familiar name. It seems unlikely that she will open up to you when getting caught up in emotions.

C: 尝试再次洞察她的内心。
E: Try reading her thoughts again.

C: 她的思绪依然在怒火中燃烧，没有作出回应。
E: Consumed by rage, she doesn't respond.

C: 喵，我的意思是做的好！特别是那个左轮队长，太他宝贝的帅了！
E: Hot fudge, what I mean is y'all did mighty fine! Especially that Captain Revolver, durn handsome as a wild stallion!

C: 对于广告片来说，这个程度也算够用了，不是吗？
E: This should be usable enough for a commercial, shouldn't it?

C: 「石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。」
E: "Boss Stone commanded the townsfolk to dig up stones every day, but he only offered them swamp weed and soiled water from the crocodile lagoon as food and drink. Everyone was miserable from it."

C: 「一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了用暴力镇压 / 从中挑拨离间 / 推行民主制度！」
E: "One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The crocodiles were at a loss for what to do, creating a chance for the townsfolk to launch a counterattack. Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to suppress with violence / stir up discord / push for democracy!"

C: 哪三个说法？
E: What were they?

C: 哼，再见。
E: Hmph, so long.

C: 我倒想看看他们…
E: But I really wanna see...

C: 观众那边的反响…
E: The reaction from the audience...

C: 晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。久疏问候，没想到我们竟能在这片小小梦境中再次相会——
E: Good evening, dear {NICKNAME}. I've been meaning to get in touch and never thought that we'd be able to meet up again in a tiny Dreamscape like this...

C: 这是鄙人最近在匹诺康尼赞助的新项目，一款有别于以太战线的游戏。我们利用匹诺康尼特有的梦境技术做了全沉浸式的体验——当然，没朋友也没关系，单人即可游玩！
E: This is the new project that I'm sponsoring in Penacony, and it's a different game from Aetherium Wars. We use the unique Dreamscape tech of Penacony to create a completely immersive experience — and of course, you don't even need friends to play it. It's a single-player game!

C: 我们利用匹诺康尼特有的梦境技术做了全沉浸式的体验——当然，没朋友也没关系，单人即可游玩！
E: We use the unique Dreamscape tech of Penacony to create a completely immersive experience — and of course, you don't even need friends to play it. It's a single-player game!

C: 嗯？还有什么问题吗？
E: Mmm? Any more questions?

C: 第一个问题：玩得开心吗？
E: Question one: Did you have fun?

C: 你看着这只眼睛，耳边居然传来了古怪的声音……
E: As you gaze into the eye, peculiar whispers reach your ears...

C: 「美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Dreamville is in danger! Don't you understand?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 小心，更多怪物进来了！准备开火！
E: Careful, looks like we've got more company! Get ready to fire!

C: 据说「钟表匠」早在童年时代便已构想出了它的原型！那时他还只是一位钟表店的学徒，某天夜里，他梦见那些坏掉的钟表全部长出了手脚……
E: It's said that the Watchmaker dreamed up the idea of Clockie when he was just a boy. Back then, he was merely an apprentice in a clock shop, and one night, he dreamt that all the broken clocks started sprouting arms and legs.

C: 你就是导演？
E: So, you're the director?

C: 领衔主演\n{NICKNAME} \n 关于流萤的记忆  饰 流萤
E: Lead Actors\n{NICKNAME}\nFirefly's Related Memories  as  Firefly

C: 只是这次的怀抱却并不温柔。
E: But this time, her embrace wasn't a gentle one.

C: 这样处理，既可以保障「方程」不会扰乱你的主体意识，也可最大限度地保持中立，实现完整的推演。
E: This approach ensures that your consciousness remains undisturbed by my "equations" while maximizing your objectivity for complete extrapolations.

C: 如果可以，希望你能为差分宇宙提供更多变量，仅是我作为朋友的邀请。
E: If possible, I hope you will introduce more variables to the Divergent Universe, as a request from your friend.

C: …那有什么关系嘛，一千个读者眼中就会有一千个大侠。
E: ...It doesn't matter. Everyone has their own preferences.

C: 对吧对吧，你就说谁的心里没有一个剑侠梦呢？
E: You agree, right? I mean, who wouldn't want to be a swordmaster?

C: 再加上你们这茶跟泥水一样，还敢向我收钱，你不是欺负老实人吗？！
E: Your tea tastes like slop, and you even have the nerve to charge me for it! Are you trying to scam honest folks!?

C: 将军在每次剑术考试之后都会带彦卿去工造司做剑器保养。三月小姐，走吧，今天我来效仿将军的做法，也是对三月小姐这一阶段的认可。
E: After every test, the general would take me to the Artisanship Commission for sword maintenance. Let's go, Miss March. Today, I'll follow the general's example as a way of acknowledging your progress.

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 身体已经跟不上脑子了！
E: The body can't keep up with the mind!

C: 十王司已经封印了那个好为人师的岁阳，它已经再也没有办法四处害人了。而之前受到它影响的演武仪典参赛选手也逐渐恢复了意识。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has sealed away that heliobus who's always eager to act as a tutor. It won't be harming anyone anymore. The Wardance participants who fell to its antics are also slowly recovering their senses.

C: 胜败乃兵家常事，请女侠重新来过。
E: Winning and losing are all part of the game, I encourage you to try again young hero.

C: 哈哈，就是你从中作梗，让我被调职的吧？咱们组可没别人有这样的手段了。
E: Haha, so it was you who meddled and got me transferred, right? No one else on our team has the skill to pull something like this off.

C: 这些年，有句话我一直憋在心里，不敢对你说。
E: All these years, there's something I've been keeping to myself, too afraid to tell you.

C: 当然喝完了。那药膳汤真是美味极了！没想到在人心冷漠的罗浮，还能喝到这样滚热肠胃的汤，真是出人意料啊。
E: Of course we did! That soup was surprisingly delicious. Who'd have thought, in a cold and indifferent place like the Luofu, we'd find something so heartwarming?

C: 尊敬的三月七小姐，我是战术人工智能普罗米括弧{RUBY_B#未付费破解版}学习版{RUBY_E#}括弧，我将协助您战胜敌人。
E: Greetings, Miss March 7th. I am the Tactical AI, Prome, *parenthesis* {RUBY_B#Unpaid Cracked Version}Learning Edition{RUBY_E#} *close parenthesis*. My purpose is to aid you in overcoming adversaries.

C: 糟糕，被你发现了。既然你知道了我的身份，那就只好用社会性死亡来灭口了。
E: Oops, you caught me. Since my cover's blown, it looks like I'll have to resort to social obliteration to keep you quiet.

C: 别说了，求求你，别说了——
E: Please... just stop it. Please...

C: 不错，「玄蛇」餐灵草而成「赤龙」。这便是千金难买的药材。
E: That's right. The Ebony Snake consumed spirit herbs and became a Crimson Dragon. Now that's a priceless herb.

C: 在场就没人质疑过卫生问题吗？
E: Is there no one here who's questioning the hygiene issue?

C: 我先回去查查降灵术的攻略，再找公输师傅准备好一台金人，你们俩也记得要来哦……
E: Let me check out the guide for Mechanical Seance Arts, then ask Master Gongshu to prepare an aurumaton. Do remember to come and join the ritual...

C: 你别打扰她，让她念完。
E: Don't interrupt. Let her finish.

C: 当然合法！事实上，仙舟人并不在意这些「灵魂的头皮屑」，以至于他们根本没有为此立法——我的研究自然不会有人禁止。
E: Of course it's legal! The Xianzhou people don't give a hoot about this kind of "spiritual dandruff," there's no way they'd make legislation to protect it... So, there is no way my research would be forbidden.

C: 试试就试试！
E: I'll give it a shot!

C: 那么{NICKNAME}，后续如果你有空了，记得来找我啊。
E: Alright, {NICKNAME}, if you have time again in the future, remember to come and find me.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 最近过得如何？希望你们这一路上没遇到什么太大的麻烦。
E: How have you been lately? I hope you haven't run into too much trouble on your path.

C: 哦，那件事啊！{NICKNAME}，你快告诉他——
E: Oh, that! {NICKNAME}, tell him about—

C: 「桑博」是「信任」的反义词。
E: "Sampo" and "trustworthy" have the opposite meaning.

C: 与朋友分享自己写的同人文。
E: Share her fanfics with her friends.

C: 没错，我也会继承一些你作战的风格。
E: That's right. I will also inherit part of your combat style.

C: {F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}，不必心急。即便再多等你一会儿，我也不会额外收费哟。怎么样，够意思吧！
E: Friend, there is no need to be anxious. I will not charge any extra fees, even if I am made to wait a little longer. See, don't you think I am a great friend?

C: 你参加了几场比赛？
E: How many matches have you participated in?

C: （呼～卢卡，你没问题的。你可是贝洛伯格拳王。）
E: (Phew, Luka, you're gonna be fine. You're the boxing champion of Belobog.)

C: 话题怎么突然拐到我身上了？
E: Wuh? When did I come into the picture?

C: 卡美丽小姐真是个温柔的人…那么快就能和虎克玩到一块。
E: Miss Carmella is such a kind person... She could get along with Hook so quickly.

C: 但我们青总可说，那次都是你的功劳！
E: But our President Qing said it was all down to your hard work!

C: 嘿嘿，为了和你对局，我可什么事都做得出来。
E: Heh-heh, I'll do anything it takes just to have a match with you.

C: 如果我们并非受邀贵宾，那么则需要自行负担滞留当地产生的一切费用。计算结果——我们负担不起。
E: If we are not invited guests, then we will be responsible for all costs incurred while staying here. Conclusion: We cannot afford it.

C: 行行行，老子不跟你抬杠。既然你这么想要我的子弹，那我也不好推辞，是吧？呵，来这里之前，我在鉴爻轩向帝弓司命求了六个吉签。
E: Alright, alright, I ain't gonna argue with ya. If you want my bullets that bad, who am I to refuse, right? Well, before I came here, I drew six lucky Weals at The Looking Bronze in front of the Reignbow Arbiter.

C: 各位，我已经退赛了。请不要再为我这样没用的东西浪费时间和金钱了。
E: Everyone, I've already withdrawn from the tournament. Please stop wasting your time and money on someone as useless as me.

C: 我看看…我看看……
E: Let's see... Let's see...

C: 可是我输了啊，尾巴大爷。我听从了那个「极为重要的声音」，然后输得一塌糊涂。
E: But I lost, Mr. Tail. I listened to that very important voice, and I lost terribly.

C: 那我们赶快去看看吧…希望这次能解释伊戈尔为什么会来仙舟。
E: Let's check them out now... Hopefully, we'll find out the reason why Igor came to the Xianzhou.

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 洞洞机就是她的「铁臂」！
E: Diggertron is her iron arm!

C: 那走吧！正好也出去转转！闷在这休息室里面，只会越来越紧张。
E: Let's go! You need some fresh air. Being cooped up here in the lounge will only make you more nervous.

C: 彦卿兄弟…你是在可怜我吗？我不需要这样的胜利，我已经能坦然接受我的失败了。
E: Yanqing... are you doing this out of sympathy? I don't need a victory like this, because I have no problem accepting defeat.

C: 我要回家了。我的故乡需要我…我本以为银河很大，一定能找到救它的法子，一定会有人愿意听听我的呼救。
E: I'm headed home because my home needs me... I thought I would surely find a way to rescue it, or at least someone in this vast cosmos would hear my plea for help.

C: 确认逃犯身份！立刻封锁现场，包围目标，在步离人造成骚动前结束战斗！
E: Escapee identified! Lock down the site immediately. Surround the target and finish the fight before the borisin causes a riot!

C: 法师，小心！
E: Master, watch out!

C: 来啊，老子输了。你可以杀死我，就像你们这些铁畜生当时杀死我兄弟那样……
E: Come at me. I lost. You can kill me, just like how you metallic maniacs killed my brothers back then...

C: 还记得我们的目的吗？必须要有一位僧侣把请愿送达仙舟——但不一定要是我。
E: Do you remember our objective? One of us must reach the Xianzhou with the petition — but it does not have to be me.

C: 这意味着…
E: This means...

C: 一旦她登上擂台，显露出自己的身份。等待她的将不只是云骑的围剿，还有所有观众对丹轮寺的恐惧。这真的是你们想要的结果吗？
E: Once she gets in the ring and reveals her identity, it won't just be a circle of armed Cloud Knights that awaits her. The audience will also become terrified to the name of Claretwheel Temple. Is that truly the outcome you wish?

C: 是呀！这可不是一个轻松的差事～
E: That's right! It's not some walk in the park!

C: 没错！是不是很精妙？
E: That's right! Isn't it ingenious?

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 我想想啊，那可太多了。
E: Lemme think... Be ready for this long list then...

C: 前面的比赛早就把我准备的战术用完了，接下来听天由命吧。
E: I've already exhausted all my tactics in the previous matches. Now I can only leave it up to fate.

C: 嗯嗯，我完全明白了。
E: Yep, I totally understand.

C: 兄弟姐妹们，快振作起来！小桂子还在看着呢！
E: Brothers and sisters, get it together! Lil Gui is watching!

C: 我从未见过像卢卡这样的无耻之人。
E: I have never seen someone as audacious as Luka.

C: 怎么和魔方秘社合作了？
E: How did you end up partnering with the Hex Club?

C: 神作啊，绝对的神作！
E: Legendary, this is absolutely legendary!

C: 检测到大量加密词汇，语言解析中…解析失败。
E: Massive amounts of encrypted vocabulary detected, language parsing in progress... Parsing failed.

C: 「贝斯•忍徒」，银河忍法虽千变万化，却万变不离其宗。有一条真言须时刻牢记，那便是——
E: Ninja Initiate Bass, Cosmic Ninjutsu may be mercurial, but never depart from its source. There is a mantra that you must always remember. That is...

C: 修行反复被打断，即便是在下这般优秀的忍者也实在难以忍受！还请离开此地！失礼！
E: My meditation is being interrupted. Even an outstanding ninja such as myself cannot withstand such disruption! I ask for leave from this place! Excuse me!

C: 这位乐队核心，获得学院认可的这位乱破同学…真的懂音乐吗？
E: This Rappa who's supposed to be the band leader, and was even acknowledged by the academy... Does she really know music?

C: 她连话都说不明白，而且缺乏基本的协作能力与团队意识。如果没有能力还继续担任核心，那演出的风险一定会很大…要是在台上出丑，会影响我们的前途。
E: Her words hardly even make much sense, and she lacks basic cooperative capability and understanding of teamwork. If she's unqualified but continues to bear the heaviest responsibility, this performance runs a huge risk... Our futures will be affected if we flop on stage.

C: …浣熊。
E: ...Raccoons.

C: 不过是场校园派对的演出而已，比这大得多的场面我都见过，完全不算…算什么的。
E: It's just a school party performance. I've seen plenty of crowds bigger than this. Th—This is nothing.

C: 音乐派对是彩梦校庆最盛大的活动，也是学生们最期待的时候！
E: The music party is the grandest event of the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration. It's also a time that all students look forward to!

C: （加入折纸小鸟的合奏）
E: (Join the Origami Birds' ensemble)

C: 你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，折纸小鸟在学鸟叫大赛中仅仅获得了第二名。
E: You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that the origami birds only came in second in the bird-calling contest.

C: （贝洛伯格的地下乐队…希望能从他们的演出中得到些灵感吧。）
E: (Belobog's underground band... I hope I can get some inspiration from their performances.)

C: 我来？
E: Me?

C: （乱破沉浸在音乐的世界里，怎么呼喊都没反应了。）
E: (Rappa is submerged deep in the world of music. You cannot seem to get a reaction from her.)

C: 你不是刚才的那个观众吗！
E: Hey, aren't you that spectator just now!?

C: 刚才来舞台的路上，我还看到他带着好多人气势汹汹地朝这走，很恼火的样子呢。
E: On our way to this stage, I also saw that he was leading an angry bunch of people over here. They looked really mad.

C: 好，记住你的选择。我要开始走咯。
E: Okay, remember your decision. I'm going to start walking.

C: 第二次则是因为…敬爱的学院代表以谈话为由，将我拘禁在了刻意制造的梦境中，责令我独处思过，希望借此来阻止「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的演出。
E: The second time was because... our respected representative of the academy detained me in a deliberately constructed Dreamscape under the pretense of a conversation. He ordered me to reflect alone, hoping this would stop Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's performance.

C: ——开始！
E: ...Begin!

C: （闭幕演出顺利完成，音乐派对也临近尾声了吧，莫名有点舍不得啊。）
E: (The closing act has been successfully completed, and the music party is nearing its end. There is an odd sense of reluctance to see it end.)

C: ——哼哼。
E: ...Heh-heh.

C: （咦，乱破身边站着的是…芮克先生？）
E: (Huh? That person standing beside Rappa... Isn't that Mr. Reca?)

C: 每个人都有被看见的渴望。听着乐队同伴们精彩的演奏，你的心中油然生出了闪亮登场的冲动。
E: Everyone yearns to be seen. Listening to the band's splendid performance, an impulse to light up the stage blooms in your heart.

C: 匹诺康尼在此次活动期间的游客数量剧增，学生们展现出的自主精神和热情也打消了外界对秩序余波的担忧，为梦境在银河中重新赢得了赞誉。
E: Penacony's tourism has been on the rise during the event. The proactivity and passion of the students have also quelled the worries of the concerns other worlds had towards the remnants of Order, renewing the Dreamscape's repute among the galaxy.

C: 不好意思——咕咕咕！鸟上了年纪，就容易想起往事，老鸟太唠叨了吧！
E: Oh, my apologies — Hoot hoot! As we get on in age, we reminisce far too easily. This old bird is far too chatty!

C: 有这么多心怀梦想的折纸小鸟，美梦小镇的未来…一定会更好的。
E: So many origami birds bearing dreams — the future of the Dreamville... will surely be better.

C: 正当你还在犹豫不决的时候，视角的余光中，你似乎瞥见队列最前端的那个苏乐达瓶…朝这边晃动了下瓶盖。
E: Just when you are on the fence, from the periphery of your vision, you seem to glimpse that SoulGlad bottle at the very front of the row... It just shook its bottle cap in your direction.

C: 再多说点，我已经好久没听到训练赛无敌的故事了。
E: Keep talking. I haven't heard the story of being undefeated in the training matches for a long time.

C: 造物本身就是不平等的，就算再怎么努力，废物就是废物，没办法呢。
E: Not all creations are equal, no matter how hard one may work. Trash is still trash. Nothing we can do about it.

C: 这很公平。
E: It is, very.

C: …咳。这片雪原虽然看起来没什么危险，但也还是要经常巡视，防患于未然。正好今天执勤的铁卫生病了，我就来临时顶个班。对，是这样。
E: ...Ahem. These snow plains may look quite safe, but they still need to be patrolled, in case of any mishaps. The on-duty guard was sick today, so I'm here to fill in temporarily. Yeah, that's the gist of it.

C: 所以…为了更好的生活，放弃原本的梦想，你会后悔吗？
E: So... do you regret it? Giving up on your original dream for a better life?

C: 糟糕了！！！{NICKNAME}，快逃！！！
E: Oh no!!! {NICKNAME}, run for it!!!

C: 没对上焦的。
E: The out-of-focus ones.

C: 不，我是来找东西的。必须在明天之前找到…姬子的「创意菜食谱」……
E: No, I was looking for something. Before tomorrow comes, I have to find... Himeko's Creative Cuisine Cookbook...

C: 哼哼，杨叔也有马虎的时候呢。咱们来推理一下，杨叔最后一次摘眼镜是什么时候，之后又发生了什么？
E: Heh-heh, so Mr. Yang also has his careless moments. Let's put our thinking caps on: When was the last time you removed your glasses, and what happened after that?

C: 关于一群剑侠的动画。
E: The one about a group of swordsages.

C: 哦？噩梦？我略懂一些精神分析学，如果你感兴趣，我可以尝试帮你找一找噩梦的源头。方便讲讲你做了什么梦吗？
E: Oh? A nightmare? I know a little about psychoanalysis. If you're interested, I could try to help you find the source of your nightmare. Care to tell me what you dreamed about?

C: 你可以保持沉默，但你说的每一句话都会成为呈堂证供。现在请回答列车长的问题，那些残渣到底是什么？
E: You have the right to remain silent, but everything you say will be used against you in the court of law. Now, please answer my question: What exactly is this residue?

C: 求助专业人士。
E: Request a professional.

C: 姬子是步离人。
E: Himeko is the borisin.

C: 就像「傀儡」。
E: Just like a puppet.

C: 哪有狗叫？
E: Who's barking?

C: 喵~
E: Meow~

C: 「全力擒拿」！
E: Mighty Grapple!

C: 今天的课题是「室内人像」…
E: Today's task is "indoor human portraits"...

C: 你怎么换衣服了？
E: Why have you changed your clothes?

C: 与时俱进不是坏事。
E: It's not a bad thing to stay informed on the times.

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢大家！咱们来拍合影吧~
E: Hee-hee, thank you everyone! Let's take a group photo!

C: 很抱歉打扰两位的讨论，但依照我随尼卡多利大人四处征战所见，您的作战理论较为古典，如今运用于应对黑潮未必奏效。
E: I apologize for interrupting your discourse, but from my many expeditions accompanying Lord Nikador in their conquests, your tactical theory is a tad antiquated and poses little effect against the black tide right now.

C: 即便在奇美拉当中，也有因能力差别而产生的定位划分。有的奇美拉适合实际工作，有的奇美拉则可以站在高位，着眼全局，发挥带头作用。
E: Even among chimeras, they are divided according to their capabilities. Some chimeras are more suited for practical work, while others can survey the bigger picture from an elevated position and utilize their leadership skills.

C: 有惊无险，差点就没完成…灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦啦，做得很不错哦。
E: That was really close. We almost didn't make it in time... You've worked hard, Grayie and chimeras. Decent job.

C: 与其思考这些毫无根据的事，两位不如多花点心思在团队建设上。
E: Rather than dwelling on unfounded matters, why not spare that time to build a better squad instead?

C: 仅统计昨日收到的入队申请，就已经有<unbreak>12</unbreak>次了。
E: Just counting the squad applications received yesterday, I already count <unbreak>12</unbreak>.

C: 所以你才会来花园吗？
E: So you came to the Garden?

C: 嗷呜？熟悉的回来了嗷呜！
E: Awoo? The familiar one is back, awoo!

C: 就是…你也见到了，我管理的小队出了点问题，没法跟生命花园交代。
E: It's... You saw it too — there was a hiccup with the squad I'm managing, and I couldn't explain it to the Garden of Life.

C: 我再去云石天宫想想办法吧。说不定泡在浴池里，就能冒出什么新主意来。
E: I'll head to Marmoreal Palace and think of other ideas. Who knows, I might be struck by inspiration in the bath.

C: 请相信，这一切真的值得。谢谢。
E: Please believe that everything is truly worth it. Thank you.

C: 来吧，「豹豹碰碰大作战」——启动！
E: There we have it. Seal Slammers — begins!

C: 一年一度的法吉娜诞辰，千载难逢的水上狂欢盛宴！{NICKNAME}选手，「豹豹碰碰大作战」正在火热进行中，下一场比赛，你做好准备了吗？
E: The annual Phagousa celebration, a once-in-a-lifetime water carnival! Contestant {NICKNAME}, the Seal Slammers is in full swing. Are you ready for the next match?

C: 来点简单的！
E: Give me something simple!

C: 你根本没有<unbreak>20</unbreak>只小海豹啊，少说大话，等你凑够了再来吧！
E: You don't have <unbreak>20</unbreak>! Don't lie to me. Come back when you have enough!

C: (x３っ「死了，快死透了…」)∋
E: (x３っ "I'm dead, I'm gonna die..." )∋

C: o((•ω‡= )o「你就让他上吧」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "Just let him have a go." )∋

C: 我们配合起来，肯定能拿下冠军，嗷呜嗷呜~
E: Together, we'll definitely take the championship. Awooo, awooo~

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「豹、豹会一直注视着你们，永远永远~~无处可逃~~」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "I... I will watch you forever and ever~~ You can't escape~~")∋

C: 我睡眠质量好，一般不做梦。
E: I sleep well, so I don't usually dream.

C: 我以奥赫玛「金织」的名义，托大工匠哈托努斯打造了一樽<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>，作为比赛胜者的奖赏——
E: By the name of the "Goldweaver" of Okhema, I've commissioned the Grand Craftsman Chartonus to create a <color=#dbc291ff>"Gold Seal Cup"</color> to be awarded to the winner of the competition —

C: 那人类能是小海豹进化来的吗？
E: Then are humans evolved from baby seals?

C: 我忘了法吉娜也不会忘了你们！
E: I'll forget Phagousa before I forget you!

C: …可是它什么也不会，真的能行吗？
E: ...But it doesn't know anything. Is this going to work?

C: 一束光正在你的视线中消逝远去。
E: A ray of light fades and departs from your sight.

C: 以前也不喜欢。
E: I never liked them.

C: 别这么自恋好吧。
E: Don't be so smug.

C: 说吧，找我什么事来着？
E: So, what do you want from me?

C: 徽章咱不要了，直接比赛吧。
E: Forget the badge, let's just get to the competition.

C: 你看着泡泡，神情复杂……
E: You look at Bubbles, your expression complicated...

C: 总之，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
E: Anyway, just enjoy the game. Leave the rest to me.

C: 我要先去完善游戏内容了。于星海再会吧，朋友。真希望有天，我们能亲眼见到彼此啊。
E: I'll go ahead and optimize the game content now. See you in the starry seas, friend. Maybe we'll meet in person one day.

C: 晚上好，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}。久仰星穹列车大名，没想到竟有幸在此相遇……
E: Good evening, {M#dashing sir}{F#lovely miss}. I've heard so much about the Astral Express but never imagined meeting you here...

C: 我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险、寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。
E: Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the galaxy, seeking the legendary strongest weapon — the Bat."

C: 目前我们正在对测试版的数据进行最后调整，那台机器很快就能重新投入使用。
E: We're currently putting the final touches on the beta data. That machine will be up and running again very soon.

C: 请允许我先行一步——当然，上线项目的持续运营很重要，我会在摊位附近留下一个全息投影，和我的手机直接相通，有什么疑惑尽管问便是。
E: Please, allow me to take my leave first — of course, the continued operation of the project is important. I'll leave a hologram projection near the booth, connected directly to my phone. If you have any questions, feel free to ask.

C: 果然，你和其他想挑战我的人都不一样……
E: You are indeed different from all the others who've tried to challenge me...

C: 我将解放银河间最为强大的力量……
E: I will release the most powerful force in the entire cosmos...

C: 尤其是那个「排水渠过弯」，哇，我都看呆了！
E: Especially that Gutter Run, wow, I was stunned!

C: 之前骇入空间站的那个？
E: The one who hacked the space station before?

C: 友友，你应该能懂的吧，打牌和赛车是有共通点的：「风险是生活的代价。」
E: C'mon, you get it. Jade tiles and racing share one thing in common: Risk is the price of living.

C: 我的一小步，无名客的一大步！
E: One small step for me, a giant leap for the Nameless!

C: 哇哦！这番话可太有气势了，颇有一种开创时代的感觉！这就是无名客所践行的开拓精神吧！
E: Woah! That line sounds so epic! It's like you're defining a whole era! Is this the trailblazing spirit that the Nameless lives by?

C: 咱们事不宜迟，现在就立刻体验一下这次的新内容吧！
E: Let's not waste another second — time to try out the new content!

C: …你们知道「匹诺康尼百大不可思议」吗？那其中就有「折纸小鸟」的都市传说。
E: Ever heard of the "Penacony Top <unbreak>100</unbreak> Mysteries"? There's an "Origami Bird" urban legend on that list.

C: 啾啾啾？
E: Tweet tweet?
...Tweet?

C: 啾啾。
E: Tweet tweet.

C: 总之没时间解释了！这边的街机是你的吧？快快快——先让我打两把，不然就来不及了！
E: No time to explain! That arcade machine is yours, right? Quick — let me squeeze in a couple rounds or we're toast!

C: 之前狠狠地打街机，我也赚了不少，请您收下，就当作是我的赔礼吧。
E: I racked up quite a bit earlier playing those arcade machines. Please accept this as a token of my apology.

C: 这玩意怎么还有网络延迟？！
E: This damn thing even lags!?

C: 就当是替匹诺康尼表示感谢吧，一杯「长眠不醒」，敬，往日的幽灵。
E: Consider it a token of gratitude on behalf of Penacony. A glass of "The Big Sleep" to the ghosts of the past.

C: 这个配方或许适合你…
E: This one might be just right for you...

C: 哦？整天被一群应声虫围着的确有些无趣，我也调校过「人格映射」模块，但效果一般。毕竟小小的人偶，怎么能模拟天才的思考？
E: Oh? Being surrounded day and night by a chorus of echo chamber gets dull fast. I've tweaked the "Replica Personality" module myself, but the results were lackluster. After all, how can a tiny puppet think like a genius?

C: 顺便多上几把锁。
E: And don't forget to put on a few more locks.

C: 我是一个兴趣使然的调饮师，不在乎这些身外之物。
E: I mix drinks purely for the thrill of it. Worldly possessions mean nothing to me.

C: 身正不怕影子斜。
E: A clear conscience fears no crooked shadow.

C: 不知过去了多久……
E: No one knows how much time has passed...

C: 因为列车上又多了一个「星期日」。
E: Because there's an extra "Sunday" aboard the Astral Express.

C: 求我啊。
E: Beg me then~

C: 三位「石心十人」正在热烈地讨论着。粘性价格模型、矢量自动回归模型、逆向选择、实物期权、内生变量、外生变量、流动性陷阱…你听到了很多关键词，但一个也听不懂。
E: Three of the Ten Stonehearts are engaged in a heated discussion. Sticky price models, vector autoregressive models, adverse selection, real options, endogenous variables, exogenous variables, liquidity trap... You hear many keywords, but you don't understand a single one.

C: 是你啊，准备好去古代遗迹寻宝了吗？
E: Ah, it's you again. Ready to go treasure hunting down in the ancient ruins?

C: 我想问关于古代遗迹的事。
E: I've got questions about the ancient ruins.

C: 好嘞，我们出发吧！
E: Okay, let's get going!

C: 但是吧，您的故事虽然…不能算无趣吧，却有逻辑复杂、情节平淡、看开头知结尾等等诸多问题在内……
E: Your story, however, has some issues: Even though the plot is not that boring, it's written in a way that is overstretched, underwhelming, and predictable. I can see where it's going from a mile away...

C: 连咱们说书的都得随客人的习惯来，开头一段暖场，啪地一下就直接切入最精彩的段落。
E: Even we storytellers have to take our cues from the audience. Get them warmed up with an icebreaker, then with a snap, we'll cut straight to the most exciting part.

C: 「{NICKNAME}又一次完成了试炼，却发觉自己陷入了一片漫无边际的白雾之中。当白雾散尽，{NICKNAME}看到一棵巨树，四周垂荡着无数气生根。」
E: "{NICKNAME} completed yet another trial, only to find {F#her}{M#him}self trapped in a vast white fog. Once it cleared, {NICKNAME} saw a huge tree with floating roots."

C: 「{NICKNAME}定睛观瞧——原来那里正好有一物，可用来分散恶兽的注意！」
E: "{NICKNAME} took a closer look — and there just so happened to be something useful for distracting the beast!"

C: 就这样吧！
E: So be it!

C: 我听说那西衍先生，还有阿来和阿往两位先生，都是罗浮上擅说书的好手，要是能录上他们的评书，我这客流量肯定不愁！麻烦你帮我去录一下吧！
E: I heard that Mr. Xiyan and Back'n & Forth are famous storytellers on this ship. Their recordings will definitely attract new customers to my stall! Please, help me get their recordings!

C: 久而久之，大家就把我这店当成是古董店了。商会的人也劝我尽早转型，我寻思这里头的利润确实大，做成一单就能歇息好久，可比卖文玩清闲。
E: Over time, people have started to see my store as an antique shop, and even the merchant guild has been recommending that I officially make the switch. To be honest, selling antiques is more lucrative than selling fandangles, and it would give me more time to relax.

C: 走吧走吧，就当是陪我啦！
E: Come on, let's go. Just think of it as... keeping me company for a while!

C: 为我们的友谊，干杯！
E: A toast to our new friendship!

C: 我…我不擅长这种事啦！还是你来吧？
E: I... I'm not good at this kind of thing! I think it's best if you do it...

C: …不行不行，不能把它交给公司！{NICKNAME}，我们就把它留下吧，好不好好不好？
E: ...No way! We can't hand them over to the IPC! Let's just keep them, okay?

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 哼，哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 好啦，我重说——次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神，{NICKNAME}，我们一起出发，在庆典里拿下冠军吧！
E: Fine, let me rephrase it. Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, {NICKNAME} let's go and win that tournament together!

C: 好问题！作为赞助人，我正在视察每个游戏设施——先前的决胜庆典竞技场就是我的第一站。
E: Great question! As the event's sponsor, I'm tasked with inspecting all facilities. And this place — the previous tournament's arena — is my first port of call.

C: 到目前为止的感觉如何，希露瓦小姐和佩拉小姐？这<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军候补」</color>的身份还习惯吗？
E: So, Miss Serval, Miss Pela, how are you feeling? Have you gotten accustomed to the title of "<color=#dbc291ff>championship contender</color>" yet?

C: 哈，小家伙看起来挺开心的——它很信任你们呢。
E: Look how happy they are! It's clear they trust you a lot.

C: 哈？又是你们，自顾自地说什么呢！明明是你们到处抢别人的以太灵！
E: Ugh, you two again!? We're minding our own business — you're the ones going around stealing people's Aether Spirits!

C: 哼哼？哼——
E: Oink? Oink...

C: 你好，桂乃芬。
E: Nice to meet you, Guinaifen.

C: 哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink, oink!

C: 你是…啊，你难道是星核猎手的那个骇客姑娘吗？为什么会出现在这里？！
E: Wait... Are you that Stellaron Hunter hacker girl? What are you doing here!?

C: 咦？那不是…呜呜伯吗？
E: Hey, isn't that a Wubbaboo?

C: 果然，我就觉得昨天少了些什么——原来是少了收拾你们的环节！
E: I knew we missed something yesterday – turns out I was right: We forgot to teach you guys a lesson!

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神可是我们的伙伴！才不会交给你们这种人！
E: Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is our friend, and we're not giving them to you!

C: 矿车？什么意思？
E: A mine cart? Why?

C: 难道…你们把我的同事们都解决掉了？
E: Are you telling me you wiped out all my co-workers?

C: 现在能说说问题的答案了吗？
E: So, can you give us some answers now?

C: 这下我们就凑齐两个纹样啦！不过，该说不说，这地方的构造可真够复杂的……
E: That's two down already! But seriously, I can't help but notice how... confusing this place is...

C: 这是…电梯解锁密钥吗？这样我们是不是就能操作电梯，前往收容舱段一楼了？
E: Isn't this an encryption key for the elevator? With this, we should be able to use the elevator to reach the first floor of the storage zone.

C: 这个小家伙和其他谛听有些不一样，它目露凶光，死死地盯着你腰间的以太硬币。
E: This little one is different than other Ditings you've seen... Its eyes are ferocious and its stare is locked on the Aether Coins around your waist.

C: 放马过来吧——用上你们的全力！
E: Game on — show me what you're made of!

C: 希望二位已经准备好了…这场对战我可是期待已久，你们可千万别掉链子哦？
E: I hope you're all set... I've been relishing this duel for quite some time — don't disappoint me, now.

C: …那就让我好好评估一下你们的价值——看看你们走到这里凭的是运气还是实力！
E: ...time to see if it was skill or just pure luck that got you to this point!
