C: 我们会把次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神留下来。
E: We'd like to keep Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord.

C: 对阵——磐岩镇的「铁臂」卢卡——！
E: They'll be facing off against the powerhouse from Boulder Town — Luka Strongaaaarm⁓!

C: 哎？藿藿，你不会真的打算……
E: Huh? Wait, Huohuo, you can't seriously be thinking about—

C: 跑咯！
E: Run!

C: 血肉之躯会畏惧死伤，想要保全自己，但姐姐不会。她正渐渐脱离自己为人时的常识，将自己视为「工具」，毫不体恤地消耗自己的身体。
E: Creatures of flesh and blood fear death and will always strive to preserve their life... but not my sister. Her human instinct for survival is slipping away — she sees herself more as a "tool," driving her body to the point of total exhaustion.

C: 它的力量本已衰弱之极，却因小姑娘的一念之善而被留存了下来。它渐渐恢复了心智，重又燃起了试图操控人类的念头。
E: That heliobus's power was weakened to the brink of death, but he was kept alive thanks to the kindness of the foxian girl. Gradually, he regained his strength and rekindled his desire to manipulate humans.

C: 因为我不在，之后这家伙又惹出了那么多乱七八糟的事…我没有扛起阻止她乱来的责任。
E: While I was passed out, she went and caused all kinds of trouble... I neglected my duty of keeping her from making a mess of things.

C: 她还用提醒？
E: Since when does she need reminding to skip work?

C: 该怎么才能让她醒过来？
E: How can we snap her out of it?

C: 不过，在走之前，我得帮这几位解决眼下太卜司面对的麻烦。要不然，别人还以为我是临危脱逃才被开除的呢。
E: But before I leave, I have to help these guests take care of some trouble here at the Commission. If I don't, people will think I was fired because of cowardice in the face of danger.

C: 幸好除了青雀，没人瞧见。
E: Don't worry, Qingque's the only witness in the Commission.

C: 有些看似美好的岔路，向前望去也许是万劫不复的深渊；有些小径则深深没入了无法推算的黑暗。而到头来……
E: Some paths look promising, but lead to an abyss of despair. Then there are small trails that plunge deep into unimaginable darkness. And in the end...

C: 那还用说。
E: Of course.

C: 需要的人手不多，两个就行。
E: I only need two people for my plan to work.

C: 打从这次十王司的行动以来，将军始终在背后支持着我们。该是咱们回报他的时候了。
E: The General has been supporting our ghost-hunting squad from the very beginning — it's time to return the favor.

C: 素裳，桂小姐，还有{NICKNAME}，请各位助我一臂之力。
E: Sushang, Miss Gui, {NICKNAME}, please help me rescue him.

C: 裳裳，我的裳裳，她怎么那么傻……
E: Sushang, my bestie... why is she so stubborn...?

C: 你只知道「悲伤其味」，却不知「悲伤何谓」。弟子执着于胜负迷了心窍，试图提升剑艺却选择了捷径，这是作为师父的失责，也是我悲伤的原因。
E: You know the flavor of sadness, but not its meaning. An apprentice obsessed with victory and defeat has lost his mind to a heliobus, and is now trying to shortcut his way to mastery of the sword. This is my failure to him as a master, and the source of the grief you see in me now.

C: 好啊，让咱们斟酌斟酌。
E: Sounds good. Let's have a think about it.

C: 各位急切的心思我明白，请交给十王司吧，我们自会有法子将这岁阳揪出来。
E: I know, I understand. But please, let the Ten-Lords Commission deal with this. We'll find a way to extract this heliobus from Huohuo.

C: 只可惜，经过上一次的教训，我已经彻底放弃将你纳入到我的计划之中了，就算是「燎原」最强大的碎片，获得多余的情感后，也只是个废物。
E: Still, after our last encounter, I've no intention of including you in my plans. To see Ignamar's most powerful fragment now burdened with emotions pains me. It's a pity, but you've become expendable.

C: 目的是挺单纯的，但坏事可一件没少干。得向朱明仙舟取取经了……
E: That it may be, but they cause no shortage of trouble. Perhaps I could glean some wisdom from the Xianzhou Zhuming...

C: 如果有漏网的岁阳，也还是交给我们吧！
E: Leave them to us!

C: 藿藿，我做梦都想有这么酷炫的尾巴，请你和我一起玩好吧？
E: Huohuo, I've always dreamt about having such a cool tail. Why don't you come play with me?

C: 这些日子你都跑哪去了，我还以为你…以为你已经……
E: Where have you been all this time? I thought you were already...

C: 她是不是我的妻子我能认不出来？我们在一起的年头比你岁数都大！
E: Do you think I could ever mistake my own wife? We've been together since before you were even born!

C: 都到这份上了，朋友！
E: I've told you what I think, my friend!

C: 输得一塌糊涂，朋友。
E: It's a total wipeout, my friend.

C: 该说「糟透了」。不要鼓动一个快乐的孩子无端做什么发财梦啦，岁阳！
E: It's terrible! Don't go encouraging a happy young girl to go chasing dreams of delusional fame and riches, heliobus!

C: 如果十王司不能出手，只凭你们几人恐怕是无济于事。
E: Without the assistance of the Ten-Lords Commission, I fear that you alone may not be of any use.

C: （触摸一下）
E: (Touch it)

C: …这里…好黑，我…不想被关在这里……
E: ...It's... so dark. I... I don't want to be trapped here...

C: 哎，是是是。看来线索就藏在这座宅邸里，只要找到岁阳，一切问题就能迎刃而解。
E: Ah, yes, yes! It looks like all of the clues are hidden in this residence. All we need to do is find the heliobus, and all these problems will be solved.

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: …对啊，我一早就告诉你们了，我是雷诺。
E: ...Yeah! I told you that before. I am Renault.

C: {NICKNAME}，能不能别学我说话？这样感觉好奇怪！
E: {NICKNAME}, can you stop talking like me? It sounds super weird!

C: 每到深夜，我的玉兆都会接到匿名的通话请求。我壮着胆子接通了，对方说要和我见面，有话想跟我说。
E: Late every night, my jade abacus receives anonymous call requests. I gather my courage to answer, and the person on the other end says they want to meet me, that they have something to tell me.

C: 诸位身手了得，能制服这种凶物，麻烦你们好人做到底，让我附身躲几天。
E: Taking out such a vicious creature means you're all outstandingly capable. Please, won't you be good to the very end and let me possess you for a few days?

C: 这家伙脑袋里有个怎么也放不下的念头，把咱们紧紧捆在了一起。
E: There's this thought stuck in this girl's head. She doesn't let it go no matter what, and it's binding us together tightly.

C: 废话少说，进来吧你！
E: Shut up and go in!

C: 我，不明白…但我品尝到了，三月这一刻的感觉。
E: I don't understand... but I can taste your feelings at this moment, March.

C: 恭喜！蹭蹭喜气！
E: Congratulations! How delightful!

C: 除了奖牌外，有没有实际点的？
E: Besides the medallions, is there any practical value?

C: 先别煽情，说好的惊喜呢。
E: Let's not sensationalize things. You promised a happy surprise.

C: 都说了这不是钱的事儿！再说你一个未成年人哪来的收入……
E: I told you, this isn't about the money! Also — as a minor, where DOES that income of yours even come from...?

C: 正在识别身份…认证中，认证已通过。
E: Verifying identity... Authenticating. Authentication successful.

C: 感谢您使用思维云端参与专项测试，再会！
E: Thank you for using Idea Cloud to complete this test. Goodbye!

C: 因为它头戴「垃圾桶」。
E: Because it wears a "trashcan" on its head.

C: 还有，请不要喷错位置！这可能会为其他机器人带来不必要的负担。
E: And please don't spray in the wrong place! This may cause unnecessary trouble for other robots.

C: 「惊喜」在哪儿？
E: Where's the "surprise"?

C: 造物们边吃边睡，口水与食物残渣流了一地，你与保姆机器人忙得团团转，才把这里收拾干净。
E: The creations are eating and sleeping, with drool and crumbs all over the floor. You and the Helper Robot dart about trying to clean up everything.

C: 无名客，你也是来听故事的吗？
E: Nameless one, are you here to listen to a story, too?

C: 我听它在给小朋友们讲故事。
E: I heard it telling some children a story.

C: 没发生过吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
E: It never happened, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

C: 您的意愿就是我的意志。
E: Your will is my command, Your Excellency.

C: 这就是嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀将军！英勇作战无人可挡，文治武功举世无双。有深谋远虑，有胆识，还能冲阵，有力量，甚至独战塔塔洛夫！然后就……
E: Behold, the renowned General Tick-Tock! In battle invincible, wisdom profound! Valiant and skilled, a warrior's might! Conquering his foe Tatalov, with his valorous light!...

C: 感谢您的仁慈。调制这杯饮品时，小女子选用<color=#dbc291ff>黑色的果液作为基底</color>，喻指激烈残酷的战场；<color=#dbc291ff>纯白的羊乳浮在表层</color>，代表着无路可退的绝望。
E: I sincerely appreciate your leniency. In the creation of this beverage, I selected <color=#dbc291ff>black juice as the base layer</color>, symbolizing a fierce and savage battlefield, and <color=#dbc291ff>a layer of white goat's milk to adorn the surface</color>, denoting despair.

C: …我知道错了，我不该欺负其他怪物，不该拿舒翁开玩笑…我说的话都是假的，都是随便闹着玩玩，不作数的！
E: ...I'm so sorry! I shouldn't have bullied other monsters or teased Siobhan... I was talking nonsense! It was all just a joke!

C: 「和朋友共同度过的时光总是很快乐，你愿意放弃这样的生活吗？」
E: "It's always a pleasure to spend time with friends. Are you willing to give up this life?"

C: 我不知道。谁能知道呢。
E: I don't know. Well, who really knows?

C: 那…我、我可以随时去上厕所吗？
E: Then... c—can I take bathroom breaks whenever I want?

C: 受负面情绪侵袭的「美梦剧团」会变为「惊梦剧团」，继而遭到家族的全面清理。除了被封锁的梦境酒店，它们没有可以去的地方。
E: When the Sweet Dreams Troupe gets corrupted by negative emotions, they turn into the Dreamjolt Troupe and end up being pursued by The Family. They've got nowhere to go except this sealed hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: 感谢您。人家这就跟上。
E: Thank you. I'll be right behind you.

C: （掏出舒翁给你的杯垫。）
E: (Take out the coaster that Siobhan gave you.)

C: 是真的挺忧郁的。
E: He's indeed melancholic.

C: 舒翁这么有魅力，性格也温柔，想和她约会的人可多了，人家当然有兴趣。但邀约过好几次，都被拒绝了，就只能转移目标了呀。
E: Siobhan is so attractive and kind, and everyone wants to date her. I was interested too and asked her out a few times, but got rejected. So, I had to find someone else.

C: 算了，没什么好说的，还是喝饮料吧。只有那温润的液体，能给予我痛苦的心灵以些许慰藉。
E: Let it go. Let's simply have a drink. Only the warmth of that liquid can offer solace to my tormented soul.

C: （…它在烦恼的，应该是和忧郁派相关的事吧？）
E: (...Is she worrying about something related to Melancholy?)

C: 尝试表演个甩杯子。
E: Attempt to do a flair with the glasses.

C: 贸然打扰…不会给您添麻烦吧？
E: My visit here... won't cause you any trouble, will it?

C: 我欺骗了那个发狂的蠢货，谎称舒翁呼唤它前来酒吧，相信很快就会到！
E: I lied to that frenzied fool and told him that Siobhan had called them to the lounge. I believe they will show up any minute now!

C: 您及时将我从错误的道路上拉了回来，我自然也应帮助您的事业！
E: Because you saved me from going down the wrong path. So naturally, I should help your business in return!

C: 这样的要求…对您来说不算过分吧？要是觉得麻烦，我立刻改…我现在就改……
E: Is this... too much to ask for? If it's too much trouble, I'll change it... right away...

C: …对了，还有件事要跟你说下。
E: ...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.

C: 我期待你的答案。
E: I'm looking forward to your answer.

C: 呵。这滋味还真是令人回味无穷。
E: Heh, what an intriguing flavor.

C: 饱了！差不多就到这吧，感谢招待！我还会再来的哦。
E: I'm full! It's time I stopped. Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back soon.

C: 嘻嘻，又见面了！这次…呃，我想要<color=#dbc291ff>甜的！味道强烈的饮料，还要让人神清气爽</color>才行！
E: Hee-hee, we meet again! This time... Er, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet! And tastes strong! And it has to be refreshing</color>!

C: 谢谢你的招待，我还会来找你玩的汪！
E: Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back next time to play with you later, woof!

C: （…这只狗狗真是惹人讨厌！）
E: (...This dog is really infuriating!)

C: 汪  汪      汪
E: Woof  Woof      Woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 趁四下无人，英雄，咱们也来瞅瞅，被上头加急抢救出来的文件，到底有多重要。
E: Since there's no one around, let's take a peek at this document and see why the higher-ups are so desperate for it, hero.

C: 玩！
E: Sure!

C: 您收获快乐，我们解决动画排期问题，让更多宾客收获快乐，这不是大好事嘛！
E: You'll have fun, we'll solve the animation workload, and other guests will have fun too. Isn't this a perfect solution for everyone?

C: 这么一说我也有点好奇。
E: Now that you mention it, I'm starting to get a little curious too.

C: 再说了，先前折腾了那么久，我也得歇口气放松一下心情嘛。
E: Besides, after everything we went through, I deserve a break to unwind too.

C: 好啊，我也没问题的。
E: Fine by me.

C: 行呗，那我们就走了，{NICKNAME}。晚点找你联机，记得把时间给我空出来。
E: Alright. In that case, we're out of here, {NICKNAME}. I'll contact you again later, so remember to leave some time for me.

C: 另外…你真的不打算考虑一下和公司的商务合作吗？
E: Also... Are you sure you won't reconsider partnering with the IPC for business?

C: 别走啊！我们好好聊聊嘛！
E: Don't run! Let's just talk!

C: 别贫嘴，快回去准备比赛吧！要好好教训一下那个造谣的家伙哦～
E: Enough with the jokes. Get back to training for the match! Show that rumor-spreader what you're made of!

C: 喂！可别把公司的人都当作耍弄阴谋诡计的坏蛋啊。
E: Hey! Don't assume everyone at the IPC is out to play dirty.

C: 啧，偏偏问了最麻烦的问题……
E: Tsk, you just had to ask the hardest question...

C: 我听到通风管道里有声音…
E: I heard noises coming from the ducts, so—

C: {NICKNAME}，即使如此，你也要成为无名客吗？
E: Now that you know all of this, {NICKNAME}, do you still wish to become a Nameless?

C: 怎么才七成啊？
E: Why am I only getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of the treasures?

C: 咱们各退一步，对半开，如何？
E: Let's both compromise and agree on an equal split?

C: 那是当然！早在黄金战争时期，奥赫玛就是当之无愧的「永恒之城」了。
E: Of course! Even as far back as the Chrysos War period, Okhema has always been the undisputed "Eternal City."

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 那，告诉我你的打算吧，灰宝？
E: So, what do you say, Grayie?

C: 当然，不然我如何与旅团的那么多伙计们相处？看来，这只幼兽是我兽友生涯的一大挑战……
E: Of course. How else could I get along with so many dromas pals in the troupe? Though... this little one might just be a tough challenge in my beast-friend career.

C: 呜…（或许，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也会和我分开……）
E: *sniff* (Maybe {F#Mama}{M#Papa} will leave me too...)

C: 包在我身上。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 待会再来找你们玩吧。
E: I'll come hang out with you later.

C: 让我算算，下次见是什么时候喵……
E: Let me see... when will we meet again, meow...

C: 进入「星尘之礼」
E: Enter "Gift of Stardust"

C: 当地总督不满于这种先祖崇拜，便命人翻新河口周围的堤坝，随后将石碑整个拆除。
E: The local governor, displeased with this ancestral worship, ordered the renovation of the levees around the river mouth and had the stone monument completely demolished.

C: 「它们等呀等，终于有一天，迷境入口传来了脚步声！妖精们纷纷竖起了耳朵……」
E: "They waited and waited... and then, one day, footsteps echoed from the secret entrance! The fairies all pricked up their ears in excitement..."

C: 没关系，我无所谓。
E: It's fine. I'm not bothered.

C: 求求了，英雄们！妖精们肚子瘪瘪的，就想毁灭世界！拜托了，请拯救迷路迷境！
E: Heroes, we're begging you! The fairies are starving... and when they're hungry, they just want to destroy the world! Please help us. Save the Membrance Maze!

C: 这个想法不错！大家聚在一起，克服万难提升评级，最后成为最受欢迎的餐馆，不觉得是个很有趣的故事吗？
E: Now that sounds fun! Everyone working together, overcoming challenges to raise our rating, and becoming the most beloved restaurant in the end! That's a fun story, don't you think?

C: 自定义名称2。
E: Custom Name 2.

C: 这位神秘的特邀嘉宾究竟会是谁呢，先前没听村长说过呀。
E: Who could this mysterious special guest be? The village chief never mentioned anything about this beforehand.

C: 无论如何，餐馆的评级提升，后续也能吸引来更多顾客，确实值得庆祝。
E: Either way, a higher restaurant rating means more customers will be coming your way. Definitely something to celebrate.

C: {NICKNAME}这么信任我，是很高兴啦。但人家还有许多事要处理，招聘、团队管理、营业报告、陪小妖精们聊天、宣布打烊……
E: Aww, {NICKNAME}, I'm flattered you trust me! But I've already got so much on my plate — recruiting, team management, business reports, chatting with the fairies, calling closing time...

C: 算错啦。{RUBY_B#缇宝、缇安和缇宁}*我们*{RUBY_E#}都举手了，该算作三票！压倒性的优势呢！
E: Uh-uh, you miscounted. {RUBY_B#Tribbie, Trianne and Trinnon}We{RUBY_E#} all raised our hands! That's three votes! A landslide victory!

C: 缇安觉得，这个问题很简单！含糖分多的食物，就是甜的！
E: It's super simple! Anything with tons of sugar counts as sweet!

C: 既然争论不出结果，就先解散！都想想办法，*我们*一起把甜蜜蜜节办好！
E: Since we can't settle on a conclusion, let's take a break! Everyone, go brainstorm — we'll make Sweetie Festival a success together!

C: 对了。听小动物说，你们餐馆办得像模像样的，有没有什么好吃的，让我也尝尝？
E: Anyway, the little critters say your restaurant is quite something. Got anything tasty for me to try too?

C: 等等！我还没投票呢！
E: Hold on! I haven't voted yet!

C: 无妨。总要还回来的。
E: No problem. You're bound to return it anyway.

C: 随着心灵逐渐满足，它的身躯也变得越发庞大，直到…变成现在的模样。

C: 「*我们*将为你指点迷津！」\n孩童们飞在前头，\n让迷路的人回到主干道。
E: "We will show you the path to take!"\nThe children fly ahead,\nguiding the lost back to the main road.

C: 「该多危险啊……」\n老人担忧地想让孩童停下。
E: "How dangerous..."\nAn old man worriedly wishes the children to stop.

C:
少女偏头望向窗外，
再度金黄的麦浪无边无际。
她撑住椅子，尝试起身，
双腿却绵软无力。
E:
The girl looks outside,
The golden wheat fields rolled endlessly, stretching to the horizon.
Holding to the chair, she tries to stand,
Only to find her legs trembling and feeble.

C: 少女按住话头，望向窗外，\n泰坦肩上光辉将她右颊照亮。
E: The girl pauses her words and looks out the window,\nAs the light above the Titan's shoulder casts her right cheek aglow.

C: 老妇慌忙引咎，\n坐实了不存在的罪。\n「多洛斯的律法，血脉株连！」
E: The old woman, in her panic, shouldered the blame,\nConfirming a sin that was but a fabrication.\n"By Dolos's laws, we must also execute all her family!"

C:
家的炉火是一场谎言，
最终被另一则谎言熄灭。
但若骗术再精明些，
火光可否燃烧不迭？
E:
The hearth of her home was a lie,
Doused by another conceit.
But if her sleight of hand had better skill,
Would it have made that fire burn forever?

C: 少女露齿一笑，\n走向那强颜欢笑的神明。
E: The young girl flashed a grin,\nAnd walked towards the god who was pretending to smile.

C: 在一处城邦，\n她听说贼灵的传闻。
E: In a certain city,\nShe heard of a Spirithief, rumors aplenty.

C: 无人见证的游记、\n无人知晓的诡计，\n如今还能说与谁听？
E: Travels unwitnessed,\nruses unknown,\nTo whom may these now be told?

C:
那青色的巨龙，
朝着翁法罗斯而来，
遥远的呢喃翻涌，
成为刻在大地中的低吼。
E:
That great cerulean dragon,
Approached Amphoreus,
The distant whispers roiling,
Becoming a roar engraved in the earth.

C: 在浩大行伍的末尾，\n一头巨龙停下脚步，\n目送我们远走。
E: At the end of the vast procession,\nA lone giant dragon comes to a halt,\nWatching us depart into the distance.

C: 它守着沉睡的精灵，\n望着黯淡的镜。
E: They watched over the slumbering sprite,\nGazing at the dull mirror.

C: 练剑之余，我偶尔会去金人巷的小吃摊，\n补充美食能量。
E: Between sword practice sessions, I occasionally hit up the food stalls in Aurum Alley\nTo recharge with some delicious eats.

C: 凯撒因何而死，\n身前身后会遭受何等非议。\n一起由未来的新世界评说。
E: As for why the Imperator died\nAnd what reproach she would face in life and death,\nThose should be left for the new world to judge.

C:
王的火种取代破灭的烈焰，
将士饮尽负创神的金血。
她已猎杀悲剧的源头，
又一次篡夺命运的冠冕。
E:
The monarch's Coreflame supplants the flames of annihilation,
Soldiers drink deep of the golden blood of The Blemished One.
She has slain the wellspring of tragedy,
Once again usurping destiny's crown.

C: 可通向星海的道路，\n并非一曲无忧的宴乐。
E: Yet the path to the sea of stars\nWould not be a carefree feast.

C: 「一切皆为学术，人智无边无际。」 「无论武技还是人情，皆能穷理尽性。」 他笃定万物都能被解明， 不能解明的并非不可知的神秘， 而是亟待解答的问题。
E: "All is science, and human wisdom knows no bounds." "Both martial prowess and emotions are knowledge that can be found." He firmly believes that all things can be deciphered, bared to those who peek. Those that cannot be solved are not mysteries infinite, But only questions waiting to be answered, not obstacles bleak.

C: 形骸暂留此间现世，\n魂灵出走冥河近滩。\n他生死疲惫。
E: His form remains in the mortal realm,\nWhile his spirit walks the River of Souls' shores.\nBetween life and death, he fatigues.

C:
丑仆挡下刺向她的匕首，
血又一次染红她织的衣裳。

那是她最后一次，
看清那丑仆的模样。
E:
The unsightly maidservant blocked the dagger aimed at the mistress' soul,
And blood once again dyed red something she wove.

That was the last time in her life,
The maid's face, she clearly beheld.

C: 一阵风拂过，阿格莱雅知晓是好奇的猫竖起了耳朵。她指向身旁的浴池。
E: A breeze swept by, and Aglaea knew the curious cat had perked up its ears. She pointed to the bath beside her.

C: 随后，赛法利娅一把将小女孩抱起，就像拎起一只小猫，走进了浴场的深处。
E: Then, Cifera scooped up the small girl like picking up a kitten and walked deeper into the baths.

C: 「请给我一束莫忒丝花！作为交换，请把这盏烛火带给彼岸的遐蝶大人吧！」
E: "Please give me a Mortis flower! In exchange, please take this candlelight to Lady Castorice on the other shore!"

C:
「遐蝶」多次对LykoS发起正面攻击，并试图通过碰撞检测将LykoS静默，无果。

光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年，「遐蝶」成为半神，移动权限卸载，并嵌入「坐标：冥界」。

该死循环末期，「遐蝶」凭借对「毁灭」的共鸣，于休眠中察觉到迷失的{NICKNAME}，并保护其记忆不受数据流干扰。
E:
"Castorice" launched multiple frontal attacks against LykoS. It attempted to use collision detection to make LykoS cease to respond, but to no avail.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>, "Castorice" ascended to demigod. Its mobility permissions were removed and became fused with "Coordinate: Nether Realm."

At the end of that recursive loop, "Castorice," through her resonance with Destruction, perceived the lost {NICKNAME} during her slumber, and shielded their memories from the erosion of the data stream.

C: 立于大地之上，你即是神的亿万化身；行于天宇之际，你即是亿万化身的神。\n\n再度启程吧，阿基维利。我将与你同行
E: When you stand upon the earth, you are the countless manifestations of god. When you traverse the heavens, you are the god of countless manifestations.\n\nSet off once again, Akivili. I will go with you.

C: 每场激动人心的旅行，你都会直奔当地最为出名的景点——一个最值得敬佩的行动派！和你结伴旅行一定少不了冒险和刺激。\n不过仔细想想，这样一来你的定位和三月七可能就有些重合了。或许你该重新考虑一下自己的人设定位，做个能带给人新鲜感的{F#女人}{M#男人}。
E: In each thrilling journey, you always speed toward the local sight with the greatest renown. What a commendable go-getter you are! Traveling with you must be an experience full of adventures and excitement.\nThough, come to think of it, your role might then clash with March 7th's. Maybe you should reconsider your personal purpose, and make yourself a {F#woman}{M#man} that offers novelty as their worth.

C: 你听闻一位逐梦客造访此处。他妄图赢得一切，却满盘皆输。\n无数逐梦客为了美梦赌上未来，却不知美梦本身才是最大的庄家——如果明知赌局必输无疑，你会像那位使节一样押上一切吗？
E: You heard a Dreamchaser had visited here. He tried to win it all but lost everything instead.\nCountless Dreamchasers gamble their future for the dream, not knowing that the dream itself is the biggest dealer here — If you knew the bet was a guaranteed loss, would you bet everything like how that emissary did?

C: 在灯红酒绿的迷宫中，幸运的你找到了一位当地向导。\n你还没法判断流萤作为向导的能力是否合格，但你觉得……
E: In the pleasure-drenched maze, you find yourself fortunate to encounter a local guide.\nYou are unable to judge if Firefly is an adequate guide or not, but you feel...

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你没事吧？失控的机器人们一直在伤害其他人…虽然它们也很可怜，但克拉拉不能让这种事情继续下去了——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，请让克拉拉和史瓦罗先生也帮忙战斗吧。」
E: "{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother} {NICKNAME}, are you okay? The malfunctioning robots keep hurting other people... They are in pain too, but I can't let this continue on... Please let Mr. Svarog and I help."

C: 加入不同原料，属性的倾向也会随之改变，对应「特调配方」中「少许」「超级」等不同程度。\n配方措辞模糊，需要调饮师根据提示仔细判断。
E: Adding different ingredients shifts these attributes' inclinations, matching the different extents described in the "Special Mix Recipe" such as "a little bit" or "super."\nRecipe phrasing is intentionally vague, so please judge the requirements carefully using contextual cues.

C: 小队生命值<color=#f29e38ff>不低于<unbreak>70</unbreak></color>，则<color=#f29e38ff>职级提升+3</color>。\n通关时，小队生命值<color=#f29e38ff>不低于<unbreak>40</unbreak></color>，则<color=#f29e38ff>职级提升+2</color>。\n通关时，小队生命值不足<unbreak>40</unbreak>，则<color=#f29e38ff>职级提升+1</color>。
E: If squad HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>70</unbreak> or above</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>rank increases by 3</color>.\nWhen clearing the stage, if squad HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>40</unbreak> or above</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>rank increases by 2</color>.\nWhen clearing the stage, if squad HP is below <unbreak>40</unbreak>, <color=#f29e38ff>rank increases by 1</color>.

C: 根据来客的需求，选择对应的美食，完成订单。
E: Select food items according to customers' requirements to complete the order

C: 将「仙馔秘酿」溶解在水中，从而提升供奉等级，并领取奖励。
E: Dissolve the Celestial Ambrosia in the water to raise the Offering Level and gain rewards.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>明亮</color>的星位决定其所在圈层罗盘转动1次的角度，1个<color=#f29e38ff>明亮</color>的星位代表1次可转动<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>60</unbreak>°</color>。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Bright</color> Astral Marks on the compass indicate the degree its Compass ring can rotate. For instance, one <color=#f29e38ff>Bright</color> Astral Mark would signify a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>60</unbreak>°</color> rotation per turn.

C: 通过开关和旋转挡板创造出连接两端弹珠机发射口的弹射轨迹，当<color=#f29e38ff>轨迹连通</color>时可以发射到达目标点。\n退出弹珠机时，当前挡板状态会被保存。
E: Create a trajectory that connects the pinball machines on both sides by activating, closing, or rotating the plates. When the <color=#f29e38ff>trajectory is completed</color>, you can launch the pinball to reach the destination.\nWhen you exit the machine, the current plate setup will be saved.

C: 灵活运用三维地图，规划前往宝箱的合理路线。如果在打开终点宝箱前<color=#f29e38ff>踏遍场景中所有「苏乐达地板」</color>，则会获得<color=#f29e38ff>额外奖励</color>！
E: Adeptly use the three-dimensional map and plot a reasonable route toward the treasure chest. If you walk across <color=#f29e38ff>all SoulGlad Floor Tiles in the map</color> before opening the chest at the end, then you'll get a <color=#f29e38ff>bonus reward</color>!

C: 有些镇球塑像的基座设有旋转架构，可以通过其基座连接处是否存在<color=#f29e38ff>发光的蓝色纹理</color>来辨别。对于这类塑像，可以从后方<color=#f29e38ff>调整它的朝向</color>，从而让球滚向不同方向。
E: The bases of some Ball-Holder Statues have a rotating mechanism, identifiable by the presence of a <color=#f29e38ff>glowing blue pattern</color> at their base connection. For these statues, you can <color=#f29e38ff>adjust their orientation</color> from the back to direct the ball to roll in different directions.

C: 拖动左下角摇杆控制移动，使用右侧按键上升，下降。按下<color=#f29e38ff>退出键</color>可以结束操控。「扎格列斯之手」将会<color=#f29e38ff>留在原地</color>。
E: Drag the joystick at the bottom left to control the movement and the right-side buttons to ascend and descend. Hit the <color=#f29e38ff>Quit button</color> to disengage. The Hand of Zagreus will <color=#f29e38ff>remain at the spot</color>.

On behalf of the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I want to once again express our deepest gratitude to you.

The Merchant Guild pledges to use the revenue to bid on Aurum Alley and for improving Aurum Alley's infrastructure.
You can see that Aurum Alley has become day and night since you first set foot here. These changes, without a doubt, were all possible because of you.

C: 有武林秘籍么？
E: Any martial arts secrets?

C: 看看本姑娘勤学苦练，拜师学艺的结果~
E: Finally! Some recognition for training my butt off!

C: 生死虚实，一念之间。
E: The truth of life and death, revealed in an instant.

C: 我们都在，可以按你喜欢的方式战斗。
E: We're all by your side, so go ahead and fight however you want.

C: 小伤。
E: Barely felt it.

C: 拜拜，{NICKNAME}，下一次试着让我意外吧。
E: Oh, bye-bye, {NICKNAME}. See if you can surprise me next time.

C: 普罗米修斯搭载了四个模块，「朋友」是最会说话的…「朋友是缘，永远珍惜。为我们的友谊，干杯！」
E: Prometheus is equipped with four modules — "friend" is the most talkative... "Friends are fated — a toast to our friendship!"

C: 用点力吧。
E: Barely felt it.

C: 好像在仓库里见过……
E: I think I've seen these in our inventory...

C: 经历了如此漫长岁月的人，往往逐渐丢失了灵魂而不自知，因而遗忘了自己最初踏上道路的理由。向圣杯祈愿，也许正是这位老人尝试找回过去的努力。
E: The passage of endless years often erodes the soul, leaving one blind to what was once their guiding purpose. Perhaps this elder's prayer to the Holy Grail is not for power or glory, but for the fragments of a past slipping beyond his grasp.

C: 「命运」有着众多可能，当人们做出不同选择时，世界就会走向截然不同的方向。话虽如此，你我的世界差异如此巨大，还真教人惊讶…不过作为人类的一员，能看到这个世界独特的存在方式，我仍然深感快乐。
E: "Fate" holds countless possibilities. When people make different choices, the world veers in entirely new directions. That said, the differences between your world and mine are truly astounding... Still, as a fellow human, I'm deeply grateful to witness this world's unique existence.

C: 干的好，御主。
E: Well done, Master.

C: 哦对了，分别之前，给你个忠告吧——珍惜你年轻时的朋友。就算时移势迁，友情依旧是如宝石般珍贵的存在。
E: Oh, before we part, let me give you a piece of advice — cherish the friends you make in your youth. Even when the world shifts around you, those bonds are worth their weight in gold.

C: 麻烦的家伙。
E: *sigh* Great.

C: 小意思。
E: Argh, only a scratch.

C: 得物尽其用才行。
E: We should put these to good use.

C: 史瓦罗：威胁清除。
E: Svarog: Eliminating threat.

C: 你在期待些什么？
E: What are you waiting for?

C: 哎呀，老巫…娜塔莎姐姐！虎克会乖乖听话哒！
E: Old witchy... M—Miss Natasha! I—I'll be good this time!

C: 冷静一点玲可，冷静…
E: Stay calm now, Lynx...

C: 这种感觉…沸腾起来了！
E: Niiiice, let's go!

C: 算总账咯。
E: Time for the payout.

C: 定能开个好价。
E: This'll get a good price.

C: 每次听符太卜讲话，我就在那犯嘀咕，同样是仙舟人，我俩说的真是一种语言么？
E: I think about this every time I listen to Diviner Fu talk. We are both from Xianzhou, but are we really speaking the same language?

C: 小桂子这一身的才华，去哪儿都会被埋没，还是「街头行为艺术家」最适合她！
E: I think Little Gui's talents would go unappreciated in a lot of settings... Being a street performer is her true calling!

C: 白露小姐——让我抱紧你的大腿——
E: Miss Bailu — don't leave me on my own!

C: 救命啊救命啊——
E: Help me!

C: 同你一样，我也曾禀受凝视。只不过，那是我自愿踏上的道路——进入虚陵仙舟十王司的深处，穿过众妙之门，踏上解脱大道。
E: I, too, once drew the gaze of an Aeon. The only difference was, it was a path I chose for myself — through the deep recesses of the Ten-Lords Commission on the Xuling, through the Gate of Wonders, and onto a path of redemption.

C: 飞光流泻！
E: Fleeting light, roaring flood!

C: 乘月返真。
E: The moon shines on the truth.

C: 破绽百出。
E: You are flawed.

C: 这样就好了。
E: Good.

C: 细思你的罪业。
E: Recount your sins.

C: 姐姐应该喜欢。
E: Sister would love this.

C: 藿藿：说不定我也能做到…
E: Huohuo: Maybe I can do this...

C: 这柄比我人还重的祖传大宝贝，已经到你手上了？素裳，了不得啊！
E: Such a great ancestral treasure is wielded by your hands? Impressive, Sushang.

C: 想要整顿好一个烂摊子，最重要的本领就是「心狠手辣」。别看她仙气飘飘的…她有这本事整顿好罗浮丹鼎司。
E: The most important skill for sorting out a mess is being tough and ruthless. Don't be deceived by her ethereal appearance... she has what it takes to put the Luofu's Alchemy Commission back in order.

C: 姑娘有些练武功底在，来仙舟学剑也可以理解，帅嘛！但还不够大胆…我这斧子不好吗？
E: That girl had some martial training already, so it makes sense she'd come to the Xianzhou to learn swordsmanship. She sure is dashing! But she lacks bravery... What's wrong with my axe? Not good enough for her?

C: 飞霄将军罹患之顽疾，并非妾身所能医治。但那位椒丘大夫也许能想出些奇招…他最擅长的莫过于此了。
E: I am not able to cure the illness that General Feixiao suffers from. That doctor Jiaoqiu, though, might have some tricks up his sleeve... He is the best at this.

C: 我是「药王秘传」养大的孩子。没有尽头的「治疗」、不讲道理的「家规」、喜怒无常的「家人」…我曾以为那就是普通人的生活。
E: I was raised by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Never-ending "treatments," unreasonable "family rules," and temperamental "family members"... I used to think all these things were a part of normal life.

C: 这次可不能……
E: Not this time...

C: 不管我未来会在哪儿，一定还会听到你的歌声。
E: No matter where I am in the future, I will definitely still hear your singing.

C: 每一场胜利，都来之不易。
E: Every victory is hard-won.

C: 给您添麻烦了…
E: Oh, sorry for bothering you...

C: 我曾见过一位令人惋惜的客人，他的故乡即将破碎，但即便献上一切，换来的资助也不足以拯救家园。最终，那颗星球在宇宙中存在过的唯一证明，只剩下这颗美丽的玉珠…
E: I once met an unfortunate customer whose homeland was about to be destroyed. Even though he offered up everything, the subsidies weren't enough to save his home. In the end, this beautiful jade bead is the only proof of his planet's existence in the whole wide universe...

C: 咔瓦岚星区出产的「巴特<unbreak>17</unbreak>年」，雪莉桶，真正的泥煤野兽。不喝酒的伙计，找杯草莓奶昔倒在春天刚翻过土的花园上，趴下啃一口那块奶昔草皮…经典的烟熏泥煤味，马上重现！
E: This here's "Bart <unbreak>17</unbreak> Years" straight from the Cuhvallun system, aged in sherry barrels, an absolute beast of peat. If Malt Juice ain't your poison, try pouring some strawberry milkshake over freshly tilled soil and voilà, classic peaty flavor! Bon appétit.

C: 怎么，没吃饭？
E: Mm? Haven't eaten yet?

C: 别来无恙，球棒•忍者！阁下之忍道有如万丈光芒，《银河忍法帖》有云：「地狱之端必有光明，照尽世间黑暗。」
E: Long time no see, Baseball Bat Ninja! Your way of the ninja shines like a thousand rays of light. As the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions read, "At the end of hell, there is light that illuminates all the darkness in the world."

C: 末法之世、邪忍强盛。所幸，无论御猿•邪忍多么强大，亦难逃是生灭法。生者必灭，而罪业不灭，大岚神的神威终将示现。
E: In the Mappou Age of the Dharma, the evil ninja thrives. Fortunately, no matter how powerful the Evil Ninja Osaru is, it is difficult to escape the law of birth and death. Those who are born must die, and karma will not be extinguished. The divine power of the Great Lan will eventually manifest.

C: 押忍！不来不去，无死无生。
E: Ossu! Neither coming nor going, neither dying nor living.

C: 诸行无常，此去一别或许便是永别。愿阁下之忍道勇气凛凛、盛者不衰。再会！
E: All things are impermanent, this departure may be our final farewell. May your way of the ninja be ever courageous and enduring. Until we meet again!

C: 智慧的考验，亦是忍者必经的试炼。
E: A test of wisdom is a trial that no ninja can avoid.

C: 翁法罗斯的「岁月」已铭记了太多创伤，多亏了这位活泼的无名客，她就像一道靓丽的色彩，将记忆中堆叠的阴霾一扫而空。
E: Amphoreus's "Time" has already received too many scars. Thankfully, that lively Nameless is now here. Like a dash of vibrant colors, she has swept away all the dusty gloom that the memories had built up.

C: 关键时刻，得要小风堇救救~
E: If we get into a tight spot, we'll need Cinny's help~

C: 为了城邦和子民，我们都做过极其困难的选择。但破旧革新，无论如何痛苦，必然是一位合格的王者会走上的道路。
E: We've both made very difficult choices for our city-states and people. However, no matter how painful it is to cast out the old and bring in the new, it's the road a worthy ruler must one day take.

C: 大地的力量为他增添了长枪的锋芒。如有机会，定与他切磋一下使用长矛的技巧。
E: The powers of the earth have sharpened his spear. If given the chance, I'd love to spar with him and learn more of the way of the lance.

C: 拿去吧，为族人添一副新甲。
E: Take it, and buy some new armor for your tribe.

C: 救世小子看着没什么心眼，但你要什么，想开什么价，他心里可是门儿清…他说话偏偏又很坦诚，难怪大家都很喜欢他，哎，不服不行。
E: The Deliverer boy looks naive, but he knows exactly what everyone wants and how much they're willing to pay... And yet everyone loves him because of the sincere way he talks. I concede my defeat.

C: 话我说在前头，该做的我都会做，你也少对我指手画脚哈。
E: I'm laying it out right now. I'll do everything I should, but you can stop telling me what to do, hmph!

C: 纷争带来的死亡往往充满痛苦与黑暗，但万敌阁下赐予对手的，是荣誉与光明的牺牲。
E: Death brought by Strife is often full of pain and darkness, but what Lord Mydei grants to his enemies is a glorious and brilliant demise.

C: 学到了。
E: I've learned something.

C: 也请你打开心房吧。
E: Please open up to me.

C: 在树庭的研习没有白费呀。
E: See? All that studying at the Grove didn't go to waste.

C: 献上一曲锋利的挽歌。
E: Allow me to offer a sharp-edged requiem.

C: 休止的沉默，稍稍有些久了。
E: This quarter rest seems rather prolonged.

C: 命运爵，预言揭示了何等的战局？
E: What end has the prophecy revealed for this war, Dux Fatorum?

C: 还需精进……
E: I need... to be better.

C: 集众生之愿，护佑此方。
E: Bearing their hopes, I guard this land.

C: 丹恒，我们速战速决。
E: Dan Heng, let's make this quick.

E: Move Character — Left

E: Confirm

E: Identify

E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all enemies.

E: All characters are inflicted with "Hemotort Corruption," "Hemotort Corruption" DMG triggers early, and this effect is removed!

E: Clear the stage with ally "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" receiving fatal damage fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge with ally "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" receiving fatal damage fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 恳请星核垂恩的颂歌，各段落似乎写就于不同时期。
E: The hymn of the Stellaron's grace, with passages seemingly written across different periods.

C: 果然，你多变的道德底线——
E: I knew it. Your ever-shifting morals...

C: 即使这一切，注定在清晨消散……
E: Even if all this is doomed to fade at dawn...

C: 小夸夸
E: Kind Praiser

C: 纷争神剑
E: Strife Chrysaor

C: 被击倒后，燕麦粥将为全队提供增益！
E: Upon being knocked down, Oatmeal will provide a buff to the entire team!

C: 棋逢对手，不失为件幸事。
E: It is a blessing to meet one's match.

C: 进入商店时：自身经验+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When entering the store: This unit gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Experience.

C: 使1只奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Increases <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for 1 chimera.

C: 对战开始前：<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Before the start of combat: <color=#dc6f33>Spend <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>Gold Coins</color> to <color=#dc6f33>increase <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 不会在商店中出现。队伍中最强的蜜果羹被击倒时：有<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的概率以满<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>复活，并使下一次攻击造成的伤害提升<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。每次成功复活后，复活的概率减半
E: Not available in Store. When the strongest Fig Stew in the team is knocked out: There is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> chance to revive with full <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>, and allows the DMG dealt with the next attack to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Each successful revival halves the chance of further revivals.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时：大地兽使紫色稀有度及以上的我方奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn: The dromas causes all ally chimeras with purple rarity and above <color=#dc6f33>have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

E: Levels up Vigethos by 2 levels, increasing its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. Vigethos can only be leveled up using Coreflames, up to Level <unbreak>13</unbreak>

C: 前1格同伴受到伤害时：与其交换位置，使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>。若受伤者为呜利呜，则提升双倍属性
E: When the companion 1 tile ahead takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. If the hurt unit is Wooreo, doubles the stat bonuses.

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每交换<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次位置，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> position swaps ally chimeras make in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> DMG.

C: 回合开始或被召唤时：咕噜鱼儿对<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值最高的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn or when summoned: Gurgling Fish deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP.

C: ・砂金与翡翠通话博弈，暗示公司布局已成，而巡海游侠波提欧忽然现身，直指关键人物。\n・翡翠与托帕作为公司代表，与匹诺康尼的老奥帝进行谈判。几经斡旋，匹诺康尼、公司、星穹列车三方达成了协议，列车也因此获得了匹诺康尼5%的股权。\n・你在离开匹诺康尼前与众人告别。
E: ・ Aventurine and Jade engaged in a game of words, hinting at the IPC's plans being in place, when Galaxy Ranger Boothill suddenly appeared and pointed to a key figure.\n・ Jade and Topaz, as IPC representatives, negotiated with Penacony's Old Oti. After much mediation, Penacony, the IPC, and the Astral Express reached an agreement, with the Express acquiring 5% of Penacony's shares.\n・ You bid farewell to everyone before leaving Penacony.

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams".

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 使自身进入<u>【潜伏】</u>状态。
E: Causes this unit to enter the <u>"Lurking"</u> state.

C: 造成伤害时使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【冰蚀】状态。
E: When dealing DMG, inflicts "Glacial Erosion" state on the attacked target.

C: 受到一定次数的普攻、战技、终结技或忆灵技攻击后行动提前，处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态时，触发行动提前的受击次数降低。
E: Advances action after taking a certain number of attacks from Basic ATK, Skill, Ultimate, or Memosprite Skill. When in the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, decreases the number of attacks required to advance action.

C: 受到致命攻击时，为相邻的敌方目标施加<u>【罪血腐蚀】</u>状态。
E: Upon taking a killing blow, grants adjacent friendly units the <u>"Hemotort Corruption"</u> state.

E: Firefly opened her eyes again and found herself in the hotel in the Dreamscape. With the surprise attack plan no longer viable, Silver Wolf tried to contact their temporary backup while Firefly searched for a suitable entrance to "sneak in."

C: 主家「使者」宣判歌斐木的无能之罪，并赐下另一桩罪行，令歌斐木得以动用予取予求的伟力——<color=#f29e38ff>「同谐之癌」，星核。</color>
E: The messenger of the main family pronounced Gopher Wood's crime of incompetence, and bestowed upon him another crime, granting him the power to wield at will: <color=#f29e38ff>the "Harmonic Cancer," the Stellaron.</color>

C: 悲伤的记忆也同样珍贵——你若能坦然地接受分别，就能拥有创造重逢的力量。
E: Sad memories are equally precious. If you can accept farewells with grace, then you'll gain the strength to create reunions.

C: 【事件】【遭遇】【奖励】类型事件会无视区域限制随机出现，且必定不会出现当前房间所对应的事件类型
E: Occurrence, Encounter, and Reward type Occurrences will appear randomly ignoring domain restrictions, and will never be of the same type as the current room's Occurrence.

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个3星祝福。在【遭遇】【转化】【首领】区域战斗胜利后，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个随机1-3星祝福
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> 3-star Blessing(s). After achieving victory in Encounter, Conversion and Boss Domains, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> random Blessing(s) of 1- to 3-star rarity.

C: 当前在场的我方角色数量为1/2/3/4时，<color=#f29e38ff>「毁灭」</color>命途角色的每1/2/3/4次施放攻击后额外造成附加伤害。
E: When there are 1/2/3/4 ally character(s) on the field, deals Additional DMG after every 1/2/3/4 attack(s) used by <color=#f29e38ff>Destruction</color> characters.

C:
不要靠近帕福斯西边的山脉，
除非你想在死前体验一把玩笑。
一位怪客占据了那里的小道，
声称要为每位路人带来公平。
他自诩塞纳托斯的使者，却全无对死亡的畏惧。
他手持塔兰顿的天平，宣判却阴晴不定。
倘若被他拦下，你必须把珍视之物放上天平，
随后便可活着离开，只要它比三根羽毛更轻。
但也有时，他会拿出一枚硬币，说让我们再玩一局。
反正只要遇上了他，你的生死就全听天命。
直到有勇士将其讨伐，人们摘掉他的面具，
发现那面具之下，是另一副凝固的面具。
E:
Stay away from the mountains west of Paphas,
unless you wish to experience a jest before death.
A strange visitor has claimed the paths there,
promising to bring fair judgment to all who pass.
He calls himself Thanatos' messenger, yet shows no fear of death.
With Talanton's scales in hand, he delivers verdicts as fickle as the weather.
If he stops you, you must place your treasured possession on the scales,
then you may leave alive, if it weighs less than three feathers.
Sometimes though, he'll pull out a coin, suggesting another round.
Once you meet him, your fate lies in destiny's hands.
Until brave souls defeated him and removed his mask,
only to find beneath it, another mask, forever frozen.

C: 梦境一定出现了什么问题，而哥哥似乎对此有所隐瞒，趁着还能勉强进行「调律」，尝试寻找梦境中「不协和音」的源头吧。
E: There must be something wrong with the dreamscape, and it seems Sunday's hiding something. While we can still manage to perform "tuning," let's try to find the source of the "dissonance" within the dreamscape.

C: 你无法再回到往昔，但无论过去是否因你而改变，都会留下为人铭记的痕迹。
E: You can't return to the past, yet the past, regardless of whether you changed it, will leave traces to be remembered.

E: Investigate The Dahlia's secret base

E: Talk to the girl beside the scroll

C: <color=#6f7cda><s>不对劲…你做了什么？</s></color>
E: <color=#6f7cda><s>Something's not right... What did you do?</s></color>

C: 看来没必要再白费力气了，对吧？
E: Guess there's no point in wasting any more effort, right?

C: 我先推演路线，计算下安保的响应时间……
E: Let me extrapolate the route and calculate the security response time...

C: 没必要非得搭理虫子，这是你的坏习惯。
E: No one said you have to pay attention to the bugs. That's your bad habit.

C: 以我现在的状态，不知能否感知到异常……
E: In my current state, I'm wondering if I can even sense any anomalies...

C: 啊？我……
E: Huh? I...

C: 多谢啦，洛卡先生。
E: Thanks a lot, Mr. Loka.

C: 美梦中不存在「死亡」——如果说，这不是一句谎言呢？所谓的死亡，只是让我们沉入更深的梦境。
E: What if "Death" doesn't exist in sweet dreams... or so they say. But what if that's not a lie? Perhaps death is just sinking into a deeper dreamscape.

C: 也不算什么坏事，就算我真的迎来死亡，也没机会再告诉他们真相。{F#她们}{M#他们}还在附近吗？
E: It's not necessarily a bad thing. If I really do meet my end, I won't have a chance to tell them the truth anyway. Are they still around?

C: 一时半会还不会有事，「死亡」吸引着他的注意，只要我们小心些，就不会暴露。
E: We should be fine for now. "Death" has his attention, as long as we are careful, we won't be exposed.

C: 你这是……
E: What are you...

C: 但具体到现在，他们倒是没说错。即使歌斐木亲自到来，也必须带上特定的光锥。他自己的记忆，已经不再可靠。
E: But they weren't wrong about the present situation. Even if Gopher Wood were to come in person, he'd need to bring a specific Light Cone. His own memories can no longer be trusted.

C: 是那位忆者在进行指引吧，要么是忘了分寸，要么…就是心怀叵测呢。
E: Must be that Memokeeper's guidance. Either she's lost her sense of restraint, or... got something nasty up her sleeve.

C: 然而，那时她还无法安心深入。没能说明真相，让她此前忧心的情形仍在持续。她心急如焚地想要折返，将你带离战场。
E: However, at that time she still couldn't venture deeper with peace of mind. Unable to reveal the truth, the situation that had worried her before continued to persist. She was burning with anxiety to return and get you away from the battlefield.

C: 在我第一次离开匹诺康尼时，「梦主」为我送上过一份临别礼物——一句<color=#dbc291ff>「律令」</color>。
E: When I first left Penacony, the Dreammaster gave me a parting gift... a <color=#dbc291ff>"divine law"</color>, so to speak.

C: 试试看就知道了，也只有三个字而已——
E: Let's give it a try. It's only two words...

C: 她已然生出的疑心，也将慢慢不复存在——无论她已经查到了什么，登上谐乐大典的那一刻，她将变回那个…生来行于「秩序」的好孩子。
E: The suspicions that have already taken root in her mind will also gradually fade away. No matter what she has discovered, the moment she attends the Charmony Festival, she'll revert back to that... good child who was born to walk on the Order.

C: 还有…看仔细些，不光是记忆——永火官邸本身也不复存在了。
E: And... look closer. It's not just the memories. The Ever-Flame Mansion itself has ceased to exist.

C: 哈，两位还真是…情深意重。
E: Ha, you two are... really something special.

C: …要去哪儿？
E: ...Where are we going?

C: 但他也并非无的放矢，我会存在于此，有其目的。
E: But his actions aren't baseless. There's a reason for my presence here.

C: 我应当也去做个「钟表匠」，我所认定的谐乐，仅有一个音节周而复始，永不失准——
E: I should become a Watchmaker too. The harmony I seek has but one note repeating endlessly, never falling out of tune...

C: 你的记忆，毕竟只属于你，命运只许我涉入到这种程度。但你一定要记得——
E: Your memories belong to you alone at the end of the day. Destiny only allows me to intervene this far. However, you must remember this...

C: 就像你此时此刻的作为一样，唯有拥抱过去，你才有力量走向未来。
E: It's just like your actions at this very moment... Only by embracing the past can you find the strength to walk towards the future.

C: 你和我…我们都还能最后清醒一小会儿。
E: Both you and I... can still stay awake for just a little bit longer.

C: 记住自己的名字，我会在尽头等你。
E: Remember your name. I'll be waiting for you at the end.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是啊，我改变不了结果，甚至也改变不了过程……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Indeed. I can't change the outcome or even the process...</color>

C: 星期日
E: Sunday

C: 艾利欧
E: Elio

C: <color=#dbc291ff>此后，「末王」化身为漆黑的群猫，其中蕴含着全部的神力。它们将从世界的尽头出发，逆时而行，直至宇宙诞生的刹那。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, Terminus turned into a pack of black cats, distributing every ounce of THEIR divine power between those creatures. The cats shall depart from the end of the world, going against the river of time, till the moment of the universe's birth.</color>

C: 命运是很奇妙的。
E: Destiny works in mysterious ways.

C: 也许不仅奇妙，还很温柔吧。
E: Maybe it's not just mysterious, but also gentle.

C: …所以你才自己待着？
E: ...So that's why you've been keeping to yourself?

C: 迷钟「老大」，看来我还能再为您效力一阵，我这就回去打卡上班。
E: Looks like this Ticker hasn't run outta time yet, Boss. I'm heading back and clocking in for work.

C: 为什么你不用工作？
E: Why don't you have to work?

C: 你旁边的同事怎么不说话？
E: Why isn't your coworker next to you saying anything?

C: 但比赛还没有开始，先在花园里随便逛逛吧。
E: The competition hasn't started yet, so why not take a stroll around the garden first?

E: AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>

E: Oneiric Memoir
